name: Coravin   Timeless Six + Piano Black
desc_en_short:
Pour your favorite wines without pulling the cork with the Coravin Timeless Six Preservation System. The Six System brings a new level of elegance to our Timeless Wine Preservation Systems, allowing you to preserve still wines for weeks, months, or even years. Choose from a variety of elegant color options in a high-gloss finish, metallic accents, and premium accessories.
 
 
Celebrate the holidays with the limited edition Gemstone Collection in Anthracite, Deep Emerald and Dark Amethyst, all with striking gold accents.
 
The Keith Haring x Coravin Artist Edition features the artist’s signature design style on our popular wine by the glass system.

name: Romeo Y Julieta  Mini (20 Sticks per Box)
desc_en_short: This Cigar will help get you through many an awkward situation. A real pleasure to relax with one of these. Romeo y Julieta Mini for a very reasonable price, guaranteeing hours of pleasure.

name: Riedel  Decanter Ultra Magnum
desc_en_short:
The design of the Ultra Magnum is a nod to tradition with its swooping curves and wide base. The size of this decanter makes it perfect for young wines, as it offers a large surface area for the wine to be exposed to oxygen after decanting.

This decanter is designed for a magnum bottle of wine.

This pack contains a single piece.
This product is handmade. Please handwash only.
RIEDEL recommends: Use bottle cleaners to remove stains from the decanter.

name: Glencairn  Official Whisky Glass (Set of 6)
desc_en_short: The Glencairn Whisky Glass is a revolutionary whisky glass that really lets one savor the taste and complexity of fine whisky. These are great to use for any of your Single Malt Whisky's, Irish Whiskey's, and also your single barrel bourbons. With the tapered mouth, you are able to really smell all of the nuances the whisky has to offer. Any malt advocate will love this glass!

name: Riedel  Sommeliers Black Series ( R ) : Bordeaux Grand Cru
desc_en_short: Recommended for: Bordeaux (red), Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Fronsac, Graves rouge, Listrac, Margaux, Médoc, Merlot, Moulis, Pauillac, Pessac Leognan (Rouge), Pomerol, St. Emilion, St. Estèphe, St. Julien

name: Riedel  Veloce Cabernet/Merlot (Pack 2 piece)
desc_en_short:
The Cabernet glass is perfect for full-bodied, complex red wines that are high in tannin.

This glass shape has been redeveloped as part of this collection. Its diamond shape works beautifully for big and bold New World wines as the extreme angles offer more space to develop aromas. The generous size of this glass emphasises fruit, smooths out the rough edges and bitter qualities of the tannin, and allows wines to achieve balance.

name: Grande Absinthe  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A vividly green Absinthe, Grand Absente Original is made to a pre-ban recipe at Distilleries et Domaines in Provence. This uses artisanal distillation techniques and local botanicals.

name: St-Rémy  V.S.O.P (700 ml)
food_matching: Chocolate, Dried Fruits, Cheese, After Dinner
desc_en_short: ST-Remy V.S.O.P. is the flagship product. The international leader of French brandy category with the highest sales in the world. It is a symbol of the highest possible quality among the French brandies Gold Medal, SFWSC 2005

name: Remy Martin  V.S.O.P (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The world's favorite V.S.O.P. The Market Leader and the reference for its pedigree and smooth taste. The ultimate versatility of the Fine Champagne which will lift your drink to new heights. The perfect harmony of mature and powerful aromas.

Awards :

  • Gold Medal : The Cognac Masters (The Spirits Business) - 2010

name: Martell  V.S (700 ml)
food_matching: Chocolate, Dried Fruits, Cheese, After Dinner
desc_en_short: A fresh, harmonious cognac of vigorous character. Martell VS is seen as a bright young cognac. Its fresh, fruity side makes it an ideal base when preparing cocktails.

name: Calvados Pere Magloire  Fine V.S. (700 ml)
food_matching: Chocolate, Dried Fruits, Cheese, After Dinner
desc_en_short: This concentrates the apple flavour which is further accentuated by blending the fruitiest vintages and ageing them in century-old oak barrels.

name: Massenez  Poire Prisonniere ( Prisoner Pear ) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Flagship of the MASSENEZ Brand, Prisonere Pear captivates with its olfactory and gustative qualities and the pear-shaped bottle with a whole pear inside. The bottle is simply attached to the pear tree in flower...so the fruit develops inside the bottle.When it ripens,the fruit and the bottle are carefully detached

name: Camus  Cognac VSOP Borderies (700 ml)
desc_en_short: CAMUS Borderies VSOP presents a lively, mineral and floral character. The wine used for this Cognac came mostly from the Domaines CAMUS estates, and was exclusively distilled on the lees. The long ageing process in seasoned casks has sublimated the mineral character of this CAMUS Borderies VSOP into a harmonious, smooth and coherent array of aromas.

name: Hennessy  V.S (With Box) (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Hennessy Very Special (V.S) is one of the most popular cognacs in the world. Matured in new oak barrels, Hennessy V.S is bold and fragrant. Its beguiling character is uniquely Hennessy, a timeless choice with an intensity all its own. Hennessy V.S offers toasted and fruit notes, with a rich, clearly defined palate and a welcoming exuberance.

Hennessy V.S expresses its vibrant and dynamic personality through unique artist partnerships and annual limited editions. Easy to enjoy, it’s a perfect cognac for high-energy occasions and sharing the moment.

The round and robust flavours of Hennessy V.S make it very versatile and ideal for any cocktail possibility, from classic recipes and sophisticated cocktail creations to easy mixed drinks.

name: Vecchia Romagna  Riserva Tre Botti Brandy (700 ml)
desc_en_short: From Vecchia Romagna comes Riserva Tre Botti, a blend of brandies aged in three different cask types. There's French oak barriques, Slavonian oak casks and barrels which previously held Italian red wine. It's all bottled up at 40.8% ABV, and like their other brandies is packaged in a triangular-shaped bottle. The blend is crafted from a variety of ages, including brandies aged up to 15 years. “Double Gold” medal winner at San Francisco Spirits World Competition 2021.

name: Hennessy X.O  Chinese New Year 2025 Limited Edition (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Celebrate the Year of the Snake in 2025 with the exquisite Hennessy XO Chinese New Year Limited Edition, a refined 700ml cognac that embodies luxury and tradition. This special release pays homage to the rich heritage of Chinese culture while showcasing the unparalleled craftsmanship that Hennessy is renowned for.

name: Moose  Original Cider  330ml x 24
desc_en_short: Moose is Thailand’s first domestically brewed high-quality and authentic alcoholic cider. Taste created by specially selecting the best apples and slowly letting them develop into the perfect balance of fruity sweetness and crisp refreshment.Taste that’s not too heavy and not too light, that gives a great depth of flavour and a clean, smooth finish.

name: Canario  Cachaca Superior (1 L)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Certainly the most well-known and most popular drink made with Canario Cachaça is Caipirinha, an exciting mix of Cachaça, crushed ice and lime, plus white cane sugar. You can also use Canarío Cachaça to mix a typical Brazilian Batidas. Depending on the flavour, this is made by mixing fresh tropical juices or fruits, or these fruits are puréed and mixed with plenty of ice - and of course Canarío Cachaça.

name: McCormick  Gin Extra Dry (750 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Recently noted in impact magazine as the 10th best selling gin in american. available at 42, 80, 90 proof. mccormick is one of america's most respected spirit companies and owner of one of its oldest distilleries, operating since 1865 in weston missouri. it's dedication to the art of distilling comes across in the best tasting spirits at friendly pricing.

name: Hendrick's Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A superb, and utterly unique, pink-tinged gin from William Grant's distillery in Scotland. Handcrafted gin with traditional botanicals, juniper, coriander, and citrus peel but the special infusion of cucumber and rose petals creates a unique and unexpected flavour.

name: Gordon's  Dry Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Gordon’s London Dry Gin is carefully distilled using a secret recipe. The distinctively refreshing taste comes from the finest handpicked juniper berries and a selection of other botanicals. It’s the taste that’s made Gordon’s the world’s best-selling London Dry gin.

name: Tanqueray  Gin (750 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: The vibrant juniper and licorice flavor and a pretty, slightly floral, rosewater finish is braced up with a peppery spine. Give this gin some time to open up for optimal aromatics—the reward is a citrusy zing. Good value.

name: Gilbey's  Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: The recipe dates to the 1870s, when the Gilbey brothers, two veterans of the Crimean war, whose successful wine/spirits merchant business had thrived throughout the second half of the 19th century, expanded their business to include the eponymous gin (called Gilbey’s since 1895). Distilled from grain neutral spirits, it purportedly contains 12 botanicals. It was so popular that the rights to distill it were sold to the US in the 1930s and it has been distilled domestically since then.

name: Monkey 47  Dry Gin (500 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Monkey 47 won the World Spirits Award Gold in the Gin category and Gold for best in class for the Gin Worldwide at the International Wine and Spirits Competition London.

name: The Botanist  Islay Dry Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The botanist is a gin of layered complexity. A progressive exploration of the botanical heritage of our isle of islay. Nine classic gin botanicals are augmented by 22 local herbs and flowers, foraged responsibly and by hand from the hills, shores and bogs of this fertile hebridean island by our own team of botanical scientists. The result is a gin as much for the mind as the palate; a thinking person’s gin. a roller coaster botanical odyssey in a glass.

Awards :

Silver - Gin - 2019 : San Francisco World Spirits Competition

name: Iron Balls Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: A great refreshing Gin served on ice with a touch of tonic and a garnish of ginger and lime.

name: Bulldog  London Dry Gin (750 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
A delicious English gin made with poppy, dragon eye, lotus leaves, citrus, almond, lavender and various other botanicals (12 in total). This is four times distilled in copper pot stills, and Bulldog had the highest rating ever received by a gin from Wine Enthusiast Magazine. It was also voted a Top 50 spirit!

Awards :

Silver - Gin - London Dry - 2014 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Citadelle  Original Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
Citadelle Gin has a delicate and fragrant nose of fresh flowers, jasmine, honeysuckle and cinnamon. After a few moments, stronger, more herbaceous aromas of anise, grains of paradise and cinnamon develop in a most remarkable way. The appetizing bouquet is reminiscent of gardens in springtime. On the palate, juniper gives way to a voluptuous complexity redolent of fresh flowers, leading into an elegant, round and highly refined finish.

The 19 botanicals are infused for 72 hours, three days in which the Citadelle body is shaped and takes all its aromatic notes. For 12 hours, Citadelle is distilled in a copper pot still with a naked flame.

Awards :

Silver - Classic Gin - 2020 : World Gin Awards

Best Brand Design - 2019 : World Gin Awards

name: Bombay Sapphire Gin (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Bombay Sapphire Gin is one of the more popular premium gins on the market for a very good reason. This London Dry gin is one of those that is distinctly gin but not overwhelming on any of the botanicals, which makes it ideal for mixing into any gin cocktail. Beyond the mixable, aromatic flavor, Bombay Sapphire is also reasonably priced and readily available so it can (and should) become a reliable staple in any bar. This is also an ideal gin to introduce people to gin because it is not overpowering but very appealing to any taste

name: Bols  Genever (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Bols Genever is an award-winning classic cocktail spirit that combines the mixability of a white spirit and the complexity of a brown spirit, resulting in a flavour that is like nothing else out there. Rediscovered, it is renowned for its mixing qualities and for sipping; the original Dutch ritual of drinking Genever neat in the traditional tulip glass.

name: Beefeater  London Dry Gin (750 ml)
desc_en_short: From James Burrough's original recipe, Desmond Payne - the world's most experienced master distiller - oversees a bold and distinct gin that sets the standard for London Dry Gins. Since 1863 it has stood the test of time and now claims the title of the world’s most awarded gin.A product of our bold, creative city, Beefeater is proud to still be made in the heart of London. With big juniper character and strong citrus notes, this is a real London Dry for those that enjoy the real taste of gin

name: Gin Mare  Mediterranean Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The finest botanicals are selected from across the Mediterranean, coming together to create a carefully hand-crafted gin that stands out as being savory and unique. Herbaceous on the nose, with thyme and juniper dominating, but also a presence of olives, and a wonderful explosion of rosemary, basil & coriander when tasted.

Awards :

Gold - Super Premium - 2016 : The Gin Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Whitley Neill  Rhubarb & Ginger Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A handcrafted gin of exceptional quality inspired by the glory of the English Country Garden. The essence of Rhubarb adds a tart crisp edge, to the smooth English gin base, whilst the real ginger extract warms the palette for a full bodied complex finish. Handcrafted dry gin, Inspired by England.

name: Suntory  Roku Japanese Craft Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
Japanese craftsmanship brings out the rich flavors of ROKU

ROKU is produced in the "Liquor Atelier", the specialized craft distillery for Suntory spirits and liquor.

For instance, the delicate scent of cherry blossom is isotonicals to extract the most flavor and maintain their individual flavor and maintain their individual flavor and maintain their individual flavor and is their process unique to ROKU, the botanicals are distorted separately according to drawn out through vacuum distillation in stainless pot stills, whereas the deep flavor of yuzu is achieved by distillation in copper pot stills.

ROKU's complex, yet harmonious flavor is the result of the unique Japanese sensitivity captured in the blending of the carefully crafted extracts of the 14 botanicals.

Awards :

Silver Medal : San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2019

name: Harahorn  Norwegian Small Batch Gin (750 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
While the Harahorn Norwegian Gin is named after a mountain in Norway, it's also inspired by the story of a hare with horns. A more terrifying prospect has never crossed our minds. Despite striking fear into our hearts, this gin is rather pleasing indeed, making use of Røros juniper berries, Nordmarka blueberries, Grimstad rhubarb and bladderwrack, Oppdal angelica and Sunndal wild marjoram.

Awards :

Gold - Gin - 2019 : San Francisco World Spirits Competition

name: Malfy  Gin Rosa (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: The Malfy Gin Rosa is a bright and refreshing flavoured gin. It has a zesty and citrusy taste of pink grapefruit, with a rich, long juniper finish.

name: Malfy  Con Arancia (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Malfy Con Arancia’s key botanical additions are Blood Orange peels sourced from Sicily.Blood Oranges are a prized variety in Sicily – and harvested in November – their rich red color develops from the cool Mediterranean nights.

name: Sakurao  Japanese Dry Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A craft gin that utilizes 9 kinds of botanicals, including fresh citrus from Hiroshima, and is distilled using a combination of steeping and vapor methods.

Besides 9 kinds of botanicals from Hiroshima, 5 kinds of imported botanicals such as juniper berry and coriander seed are also used for SAKURAO GIN ORIGINAL.

The fusion of a citrus-like aroma with the traditional taste of gin is the most distinctive feature of our original gin.

name: Tanqueray  No. TEN Distilled Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
"Tanqueray No. TEN is the only gin to be inducted to the San Francisco World Spirits Competition Hall Of Fame"

Passion and attention to detail in perfect measure, is a recipe for exquiste results.

Tanqueray No. TEN, named after the stills of its origin, is small batch gin crafted using fresh citrus fruits. An exquisite citrus burst in every sip, best enjoyed with premium tonic water and a slice of pink grapefruit.

Awards :

Double Gold - Gin - 2020 : San Francisco World Spirits Competition

name: Tanqueray  Flor de Sevilla (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla is a unique distilled gin made with Sevilla orange essences and other fine botanicals. Inspired by Charles Tanqueray’s original recipes and the ripening oranges growing on the trees in sun-drenched SEVILLE, the result is a perfect balance of the uniquely bittersweet taste of Seville oranges balanced with the complexity of Tanqueray London Dry Gin. Best served with Premium tonic and a squeeze wedge of orange.

name: Drumshanbo Gunpowder  Irish Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Here at the edge of a lake in a shed in a small Irish town, the ordinary is made extraordinary. Within is the laboratory of PJ Rigney, boundary-pushing begetter of hand-made spirits who slow distills gin with natures finest oriental botanicals and gunpowder tea.

WIN – In celebration of a very different Pride this year, we are giving you the chance to win one of our Limited Edition Collectors’ Bottles and 6 minis to celebrate Pride 2020. To enter simply follow us, like this post & retweet. Good luck. T&C's. #drinkresponsibly #PRIDE2020

name: Suntory  Sui Japanese Craft Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: A wonderful new premium gin expression from drinks giant Suntory that was created using three of Japan’s most famous flavours: Yuzu, Green Tea and Ginger, along with 8 traditional gin botanicals: juniper berry, coriander seed, angelica root, angelica seed, cardamom seed, cinnamon, bitter orange peel, and lemon peel

name: Hendrick's  Flora Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Hendrick’s Flora Adora is a NEW limited release gin from Hendrick’s Cabinet of Curiosities that's inspired by the enticing flowers that attract all manner of flying things to pollinate our precious ecosystem. Our master distiller, Ms. Lesley Gracie, finds watching the butterflies and bees at work endlessly fascinating and has used the flowers that they adore the most in Hendrick’s Flora Adora. This luscious libation is infused with an enticingly fresh floral bouquet and is the go-to gin for garden get-togethers big and small.

name: Siam Lanna  Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Siam Lanna Gin delivers a light, crisp, and lively floral notes, and is dry, mellow, and round in the mouth. The Umbria juniper are immediately evident from the very first sip, followed closely by the flavors of the botanicals. It concludes with a persistent, delicate, and well-rounded harmonious finish, with a lasting hint of pine and lemongrass. It is a complex and aromatic spirit, with layers of flavors that unfold on the palate, providing a captivating and memorable tasting experience.

name: Inchon  Esprit Des Champs Tranquilles Gin (750 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
Gin with floral and citrus notes, showcasing a light pale yellow appearance. Woody aromas on the nose lead to pine and dark leaf flavours with hints of walnut honey. Light to medium body with a short length of flavour.

Awards 

Silver Medal : London Spirits Competition 2024

name: Hendrick's  Grand Cabaret Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
This exquisitely extravagant expression boasts a rich ensemble of bright flavours that seduce the senses. It seems that stone fruit flavours, rose scents and gin were a magical combination in the most opulent of establishments in Paris at the turn of the 20th Century, and eaux de vies, peach schnapps, cherry liqueurs and the like were the ‘in thing’ for those who had the means to celebrate in spectacular style.

Our Master Distiller, alchemist and liquid poet Lesley Gracie has deftly combined these flavours into a ravishingly fruity spirit, where pirouettes of decadent stone fruit share the stage with sweet herbs and make for an elegant sensory feast that is deliciously indulgent and yet as light as silk. 

This is a bright, bold gin that has a rich depth and layers of flavour and yet is still refreshing and light – it’s ideal in a Hendrick’s Grand Cabaret and Tonic. If you want to be a little more fancy, the Hendrick’s Grand Cabaret Royale is an indulgent way to toast tantalising celebrations and combines Hendrick’s Grand Cabaret, cranberry, lime and a touch of sugar syrup which is topped with Champagne or sparkling wine for added decadence.

name: Nonino  Grappa Il Merlot (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Pure, soft and round with scents of rose petals and cherry stones. On the nose it recalls the smell of grape must being pressed.

name: Nonino  Grappa Il Moscato (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Elegant, aromatic, soft and sensual with the perfume of roses, thyme and vanilla.

name: Bottega  Limoncino (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The lemons from Sicily are characterized by the aromatic intensity. Once collected, are peeled by hand. The skins of the lemons are then let steep in alcohol and grappa. The result is a sweet liqueur, fragrant and aromatic.

name: Amaro Montenegro (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Amaro Montenegro was born in 1885 with the name Elisir Lungavita and immediately received notable recognition. 11 years later, marking the marriage of the charming Princess Elena of Montenegro to Prince Vittorio Emanuele III, Stanislao decided to dedicate his storied elixir to her royal highness, changing it’s name to Amaro Montenegro. 40 Botanicals create a unique taste as bitter and herbaceous, citrusy and sweet with 7 discovery notes.

It can be enjoyed straight, with soda water and lemon rind, or hot, as well as in various combinations in modern cocktails.

name: Aperol  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Aperol is the perfect aperitif. Bright orange in color, it has a unique taste, thanks to the secret recipe, which has never been changed, with infusions of selected ingredients including bitter and sweet oranges and many other herbs and roots in perfect proportions.

name: Cointreau  Orange Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A truly premium international brand created in 1849, made from 100% pure orange liqueur. Cointreau is a perfect marriage between sweet and bitter orange peels resulting in a crystal clear spirit with exquisite fullness, enveloping fragrance and fine clarity 3 Gold Medals, SFWSC 2007, 2008, 2009 | Hall of Fame Inductee Class of 2011, SJ June 2011

name: Midori  Melon Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: MIDORI is the original melon liqueur enhanced by premium Japanese musk melons that can be enjoyed with juices, spirits and other liqueurs. A fruity sensation of fresh melons.

name: Campari  Liqueur (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Campari is a bitter Italian aperitif. It is a proprietary blend of herbs and spices, is a brilliant red color, and has an extremely unique flavor. It's prominant flavor is that of a strong bitter orange similar to if you were to drop orange bitters directly on your tongue. Served on the rocks or in simple cocktails such as the Campari and Soda and Negroni. It is used in a number of classic cocktails and though it is frequently paired with gin, works well with other base liquors such as whiskey and vodka.

name: De Kuyper  Blue Curacao (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The essence of this liqueur is the Curaçao or Lahara fruit, famous for being inedibly bitter. Luckily, it is also incredibly useful in creating a distinctive liqueur. Having covered the 'Curaçao', what about the 'blue'? Honestly, blue made this liqueur famous, but doesn't do anything for the taste. For all we care, this might as well have been Clear Curaçao – no one would taste the difference.

name: Luxardo  Amaretto di Saschira (1 L)
desc_en_short: A classic refined liqueur, with a velvety taste and fragrant almond aroma.

name: Luxardo  Limoncello (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Obtained from the infusion of lemon peels in alcohol, Limoncello is one of the most world-renowned Italian liqueurs. It stems from an ancient tradition which enhances the natural aroma and fresh taste of lemons from southern Italy.

name: Luxardo  Maraschino (1 L)
desc_en_short: Maraschino Luxardo is a classic. The typical straw coated bottle is by now a true icon on the mass consumption scenario. It is one of the very few liqueurs in the world produced by distillation. It is obtained from the marasca, a sour cherry variety exclusively cultivated by Luxardo. The distillate is allowed to mature for two years in Finnish ash vats (this wood does not lend its colour even after many years of maturing), and is then diluted and sugared.

name: Heering  Cherry Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Heering Cherry Liqueur is the original "Cherry Brandy". contains only natural ingredients including Danish grown cherries. No additives or artificial colouring. Swirl with ice, lean back and chill.

name: Baileys  Original (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Baileys Irish Cream is a classic combination of Irish whisky, fresh Irish dairy cream and the finest spirits, infused together to create a silky velvety liqueur. Best enjoyed poured over ice, added to cocktails or even to coffee for an indulgent twist.

name: Cinzano  Vermouth Rosso
desc_en_short: Cinzano Rosso is dark red in colour and wrapped in intense, delicious citrus flavours. Sweet and Fragrant, it finishes with a unique and pleasantly bitter aftertaste. It is exciting, rich and daring. Always serve chilled. Enjoy pure, over ice, or mixed with apple juice and a dash of cinnamon. Try one of our Rosso cocktails.

name: Bols  Cherry Brandy (700ml)
desc_en_short: BOLS Cherry Brandy is a deep red cherry liqueur using fresh cherries from Eastern Europe, where cherry brandy has long been a tradition. The cherry’s stone, its kernel, is crushed, giving Bols Cherry Brandy a faint amaretto flavour. Extracts of various selected herbs and spices produce a well balanced liqueur.

name: De Kuyper  Dry Orange (700 ml)
desc_en_short: To be honest, this liqueur qualifies as a Curaçao. But since we already sport a blue, white and red one, we decided it best to not fuel the confusion. So Dry Orange it is. A delicate liqueur marmalade made from distilled lemon and orange extracts, eau-de-vie and - there you have it – Curaçao fruit for the characteristic bitterness. The sensation is familiar, the spicy finish takes you by surprise.

name: De Kuyper  Triple Sec (700 ml)
desc_en_short: In bartending Triple Sec is a household name. The recipe dates back to the early 19th century and has been copied and altered ever since. We also took a shot at the infamous cocktail seasoning, pronouncing the citrus and prolonging the taste. By distilling the dried peels of sweet and bitter oranges, and mixing the two flavours meticulously together, we came up with this one of a kind liqueur.

name: De Kuyper  Butterscotch (700 ml)
flavor_tags: Butterscotch, Brown Sugar, Caramel, Treacle, Orange, Butter
desc_en_short: Butter, brown sugar and a quarter of treacle. That’s all you need to make some good old-fashioned butterscotch. But if you now think it should be evenly easy to create a butterscotch liqueur, think again. For just adding spirits simply won’t do. You want to keep that buttery caramel sensation, but leave out the sticky sauce part. Distil the taste, not the waste. Some challenge, but so we did.

name: De Kuyper  Peachtree (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Crystal clear, light spirit, bursting with the taste of tree-ripe peaches. A perfect liqueur to mix anytime. Also straight on ice over desserts. Peachtree is the exclusive white peach spirit, which offers the bartender many unique and exciting mixing opportunities. Crystal clear, light spirit, busting with the taste of tree-ripe peaches.

name: De Kuyper  Raspberry Pucker (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Raspberry Pucker is a sweet and sour mixing sensation. It starts off with the flavour of ripe and juicy raspberries and ends with a fruity tang. Drink on-the-rocks, in a martini cocktail or as a longdrink with plenty of ice and a splash of lemonade.

name: De Kuyper  Kwai Feh Lychee (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The pure essence of fresh lychee fruit captured in a light, sweet, natural tasting liqueur. Perfect for all occasions, both as a cocktail and an afterdinner drink. Also to be used as a dressing for ice cream and lychee fruit.

name: Frangelico  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Clear Pale Gold., Intense hazelnut aromas., Rich texture. Pronounced but delicate hazelnut flavour with hints of vanilla and dark chocolate.  Smooth, long finish with fragrant back-note.

name: Fernet Branca (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Fernet-Branca is particularly refreshing if mixed with cola or Chinotto: a drink with a clean-cut and unexpected flavour. Fernandito, a cocktail that has conquered Argentina thanks its unique character. It is easy to do and very flexible, so it is an ideal aperitif that is becoming increasingly popular all over the world among those who love to share a drink with their friends.

name: Mr.Boston  Triple Sec (1 L)
desc_en_short: Triple sec is a colorless, orange-flavored liqueur used in thousands of mixed drinks and recipes as a sweetening and flavoring agent. The orange flavor comes from the dried peels of prematurely-picked oranges that grow natively on the island of Curacao, and tend to be more bitter than other oranges. The peels then macerate in alcohol to disperse the flavour.

name: Bitter Truth  Chocolate Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Dark, rich and complex. A bitter chocolate nose leads the palate to dark chocolate, cinnamon and spice flavors that are supported by classic European bitter herbs.

name: Galliano  Vanilla (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Galliano Vanilla is different from all other liqueurs with its unique taste, offering a harmonious and unique balance of various flavours within which anise and vanilla stand out.

name: Grand Marnier  Cordon Rouge (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The original liqueur created in 1880 by Louis-Alexandre Marnier Lapostolle. A delicate blend of fine cognacs and distilled essence of tropical oranges with Marnier-Lapostolle's secret touch. Slow ageing in French oak casks gives it incomparable roundness and subtlety.

name: Giffard  Fleur De Sureau Sauvage (Elder flower) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Liqueur made from a small batch maceration of wild elderflowers for a rich floral aroma. The small pale yellow elderflowers are hand-picked in spring, naturally dried and macerated into alcohol.

name: Kahlua  Original (700 ml)
desc_en_short: KAHLÚA is an alluring combination of sugarcane spirit and 100 percent Arabica coffee—two of the highest quality ingredients from the mountains of Veracruz. The complex taste profile of KAHLÚA is comprised of intense coffee flavor with rich notes of caramel and vanilla.

name: Hiram Walker  Blue Curacao (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Made from the peel of Curacao oranges, Hiram Walker® Blue Curacao is a delicately flavored orange cordial that takes its name from the Caribbean Island of Curacao.

name: Hiram Walker  Triple Sec (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Made from all natural flavors, Hiram Walker® Triple Sec is "triple dried" with three distillations. Imported orange peel is then softened in water and added to the spirit for a clean, crisp orange taste.

name: Hiram Walker  Orange Curacao (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Made from the peel of Curacao oranges, Hiram Walker® Orange Curacao is a delicately flavored orange cordial that takes its name from the Caribbean Island of Curacao.

name: Martini  Extra Dry Vermouth (1 L)
desc_en_short: Enjoy the balanced and delicate Martini® Extra Dry. Its unique character comes, amongst several other gems, from the raspberry and lemon distillates over a background of orris

name: Martini  Rosso Vermouth (1 L)
desc_en_short: Martini® Rosso is superbly balanced with a rich, warm sweetness and citrus overtones. It owes its unmistakable dark colour to the caramel added during the blending of the ingredients. Best served with fresh cranberry juice, ice and an orange slice.

name: Martini  Bianco Vermouth (1 L)
desc_en_short: Queen of vermouth. Known in the past as Bianchissimo - meaning ‘whitest’, lips have come to recognise the soft vanilla notes. With multiple awards since 1910, Pessione’s fair lady has become a name held in the highest regard.

name: ST. Germain  Elderflower Liqueur (750 ml)
desc_en_short: In the world of St-Germain, the liqueur created in the artisanal French manner from freshly hand-picked elderflower blossoms. The first thing one must do with The St-Germain Cocktail is to make it one’s own. That is to say, this artisanal apéritif is willing to adapt to any wedding’s color palette. A twist of yellow lemon, a fresh green mint sprig, any number of worthy pink berries.

name: Benedictine D.O.M Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Nose : Those who have failed to note this liqueur ways in at 40% abv are soon reminded when they plunge their nose into the glass. After the initial alcohol hit subsides, a delightfully understated aroma of lavender honey and complex herbal spice dotted by a range of botanicals that intermingle to create a complex and enjoyable aroma.

Neat : This is not liqueur that does anything by halves; Its high (for a liqueur) abv, intense sweetness and robust herbal palate are all big on the palate. A few ice cubes helps to loosen things up a little, revealing the true beauty of this liqueur; And what a beauty it is. As the initial honeyed sweetness fades, a mix of Christmas spice, summer fruits and gin-like aromatics offer up a deliciously complex and herbal profile. There is not a hint of the ‘medicinal’ taste that often is present in herbal spirits, and as such this is a liqueur with wide appeal. The finish ends with a lovely marzipan note that will keep you coming back for more.

name: Ricard  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Ricard was born in sunny Marseille back in 1932. To reveal the delicacy of the anise, the fresh taste of the liquorice and the subtle Provence herbs, we suggest you add five parts of water to one part of Ricard, plus a few ice cubes.

name: Angostura  Aromatic Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: The perfect addition to a tall cocktail or non-alcoholic drinks, bitters gives any beverage an aromatic lift. The most common use for bitters is in the classic Lemon, Lime and Bitters: rim a glass with 5 or 6 dashes of bitters, add ice and swirl to coat the glass. Fill with lemonade and 15mL of lime cordial or lime juice. Garnish with a slice of lemon or lime and you have one of the world's favourite mixed drinks.

name: Lillet  Blanc (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Versatile aperitif option, try it on the rocks mixed with tonic strawberries and mint or in a cocktail.

Tasting Notes

Colour: Golden

Aromas: Floral Notes, with Orange

Taste: Honey, Candied Orange & Lemon

name: Aperol  (1 L)
desc_en_short: Aperol is the perfect aperitif. Bright orange in color, it has a unique taste, thanks to the secret recipe, which has never been changed, with infusions of selected ingredients including bitter and sweet oranges and many other herbs and roots in perfect proportions.

name: Campari  Liqueur (1 L)
desc_en_short: Campari is a bitter Italian aperitif. It is a proprietary blend of herbs and spices, is a brilliant red color, and has an extremely unique flavor. It's prominant flavor is that of a strong bitter orange similar to if you were to drop orange bitters directly on your tongue. Served on the rocks or in simple cocktails such as the Campari and Soda and Negroni. It is used in a number of classic cocktails and though it is frequently paired with gin, works well with other base liquors such as whiskey and vodka.

name: Ancho Reyes Originale Chili Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Ancho Reyes Original is handcrafted using only the highest-quality sun-dried chiles. Once ready, the chiles are collected and sent to our facility to be macerated for 6 months. Each bottle of Ancho Reyes Original liqueur is then hand labeled and bottled, one by one.

name: Massenez  Liqueur Creme de Cassis de Dijon (Blackcurrant) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Alsace, France- French black currant liqueur made by an artisinal distillery based in Alsace. This is a premium Creme de Cassis and you'll certainly notice the difference. Use for delicious Kir Royales and any recipes that call for Cassis. It's also a wonderful dessert topping.

name: The Japanese   Yuzu Bitter (200 ml)
desc_en_short: The Japanese Bitters Yuzu is a concentrate of bitter citrus fruits. It is produced from the extract of the 'Yuzo' a citrus fruit and plant originating in part of Japan and is believed to be a hybrid of sour mandarin and ichang papeda. With its floral fragrance and sour flavour, it lands somewhere between grapefruit and lime.

name: Disaronno  Originale Amaretto (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Disaronno Originale is the amaretto you need to have in your personal reserve. It is indeed one of the most appreciated Italian liqueurs in the world. Almond-based (fruit and stone), it has a mild and sweet flavor, beyond measure.

The Disaronno bottle is easily recognizable thanks to its rectangular shape and its domed cap. This square bottle is a work of art in itself, made by a master glassmaker from Murano (Venice).

name: Passoa Passion fruit liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Passoã is a full-bodied passion fruit liqueur with a lovely sweet palate and a nice zesty touch. It is made with Brasilian passion fruit and presented in a distinctive black bottle. Passoã is widely known as one of the key ingredients in a Pornstar Martini.

name: Fernet Branca (1 L)
desc_en_short: Fernet-Branca is particularly refreshing if mixed with cola or Chinotto: a drink with a clean-cut and unexpected flavour. Fernandito, a cocktail that has conquered Argentina thanks its unique character. It is easy to do and very flexible, so it is an ideal aperitif that is becoming increasingly popular all over the world among those who love to share a drink with their friends.

name: Inchon  Plum Umeshu (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

It has beautiful amber color and full-bodied good balance of sweetness with a very long pleasant aftertaste. Served chilled straight, on the rock or divided by soda is good idea to enjoy it.

name: Appleton Estate  12 Years Old Rare Casks (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Appleton Estate Rare Blend 12 Year Old is a true expression of our Master Blender’s craft and passion. The rare, golden rums that make up Rare Blend are hand-selected, and have all been aged for a minimum of 12 years. The long years of tropical ageing give it its rich mahogany hue, confident woody character, and smooth robust taste – all of which make a bold statement of extraordinary quality.

name: Captain Morgan  Jamaica Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Captain Morgan Dark Rum offers a unique depth of flavour. The name harkens back to the 'Navy Rum' rations which were the choice of swashbuckling adventurers and connoisseurs alike.

name: Chalong Bay  Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Natural fine spirit 100% distilled from pure first press Thai sugarcane (pure sugarcane white rum). Our aim was to create a spirit of rare purity allowing enough flexibility at use. Lighter than traditional rhum agricoles or cachacas, and more flavorful and fruity than molasses based white rums. Chalong Bay is particularly adapted to cocktails and mixology. The balance between lightness and its delicate sugarcane and floral aromas allows a wide utilization in cocktail creation.

name: Diplomatico  Reserva Exclusiva (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A complex blend of Copper pot still rums aged for 12 long years, has a characterful nose, showing fruit cake, rum'n'raisin ice cream, cocoa, dried ginger, cinnamon and clove. Develops baked bananas with fudge sauce and chewy toffee notes alongside vanilla oak and a deeper note of syrupy gingerbread, with hints of orange zest. The palate evokes chocolate sauce and the sweet toffee, fudge and tropical fruit flavours from the nose. Flakes of Terry's Dark Chocolate Orange sprinkled over melted vanilla ice cream. Deep, vivid and extremely seductive flavours.

name: Ron Zacapa  Centenario Sistema Solera 23 Years (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Wonderfully complex, generous and full-bodied, with a sweet honeyed viscosity atypical of an aged spirit; a great depth of raisined fruit and apricot preserves, building to an intense heart of savoury oak, nutmeg, leather and tobacco with notes of coffee and delicately sweet vanilla, balanced with a spicy touch of cinnamon and ginger on the pleasantly astringent finish; truly a rum for the discerning palate.

name: Plantation  Original Dark Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The essence of Plantation Rum Original Dark is the wealth of its palate and its technique of double aging. Plantation Original Dark comprises the elegant rums of Trinidad which are distilled then aged in their tropical climate in the Caribbean in American oak barrels under high heat before traveling to France. Once in Europe, the House cellar master decides on less “high esters” for the Trinidadian rum and blends in old rums from Jamaica (15 - 20 yrs.) This end result finishes like sweet nectar but also adapts beautifully to classic cocktails made with dark rum such as the Mai Tai or Daiquiri.

name: Plantation  Stiggins Fancy Pineapple Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: This rum was created by Alexandre Gabriel, cellar master Plantation and David Wondrich, author of the book Imbibe! It is a tribute to the esteemed Reverend Stiggins whose favorite drink was the “pineapple rum” in the Pickwick Papers by Charles Dickens. Not intended for sale, the rum was created to share among colleagues and friends at Tales of the Cocktail 2014. “Victim” of its own success, it is now available in the United States. The manufacturing process of Stiggins' Fancy Plantation Pineapple is complex.

name: Malibu  Original Coconut Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The world’s best-selling Caribbean rum with natural coconut flavor. The taste of MALIBU is sunshine in a bottle - smooth, fresh coconut flavor with a sweet finish - perfect for bringing the sun-kissed island to anytime.

name: Bacardi  Carta Blanca (White Rum) (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: The most famous white Rum in the world, Bacardi is sold in over 100 countries and used in countless cocktails. A light and clean spirit, Bacardi is filtered through charcoal for purity and aged in white oak for character.

name: Bacardi  Carta Blanca (White Rum) (1 L)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: The most famous white Rum in the world, Bacardi is sold in over 100 countries and used in countless cocktails. A light and clean spirit, Bacardi is filtered through charcoal for purity and aged in white oak for character.

name: Plantation  O.F.T.D Overproof Dark Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Plantation O.F.T.D. (Old Fashioned Traditional Dark) Overproof is a group effort. Alexandre Gabriel, Master Blender for Plantation Rum, brought together six rum luminaries--Jeff "Beachbum" Berry from Latitude 29, Martin Cate from Smuggler's Cove, Paul McFadyen from Trailer Happiness, Paul McGee from Lost Lake, Scotty Schuder from Dirty Dick, and Dave Wondrich, cocktail historian extraordinaire. Over many tasting and blending sessions, they formulated a rum ideally suited for use in top-shelf Tiki and tropical cocktails. The O.F.T.D. is a blend of rums from Barbados, Guyana, and Jamaica in the overproof dark style, and replaces Plantation’s Trinidad-sourced Original Dark Overproof Rum.

name: Dead Man's Finger  Spiced Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Dead Man's Fingers is a spiced rum created by the owners of Cornwall restaurant The Rum & Crab Shack. A blend of rums from Trinidad and Barbados that is aged for three years, this has notes of orange, nutmeg, raisin and vanilla.

name: Dead Man's Finger  Coffee Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A delicious variation of our spiced rum infused with heart-warming roasted coffee. It’s full flavoured yet rounded and nicely balanced bringing forth characteristics of vanilla, raisins and a suspicion of chocolate orange. In addition, you’ll find traces of clove and a good wallop of cumin.

name: Phraya  Elements Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A blend of aged rums, Phraya Elements follows the tradition of maturing the distillate in fine American oak ex-bourbon barrels to give a unique flavour and distinctive character.

Phraya Elements Rum boasts creamy vanilla with caramel sweetness and gentle spices, leaving a warm lingering finish.

name: Havana Club  3 Years Rum (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
Havana Club 3 Anos is the most prestigious of all white rums. It brings a touch of unparalleled class to all cocktails and blends. Havana Club 3 Anos is the result of blending aged and aromatic sugarcane aguardientes with extra light sugarcane distillates to produce a selection of young rums. This batch of rums is then allowed to rest in white oak barrels after which the Maestro Ronero chooses the best barrels and blends the final three-year-old rum, which is again set to rest, then filtered and bottled.

The perfect premium white rum for creating authentic Cuban cocktails like the Mojito and the Daiquiri. Distilled from Cuban sugarcane, the rum is naturally aged for at least 3 years in white oak barrels specially selected by the Maestros Roneros. This ageing process in a tropical climate gives Havana Club 3 Year Old its special balance of lightness and character for an unmistakable Cuban flavour.

name: The Colonist  Black Spiced Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Rum tasting in the Finnish wilderness with my good old friend continued with The Colonist Spiced Black Rum. Unique bottle and label design. Dark brown color. Plenty of oak, vanilla and a massive amount of unaged alcohol to the nose and palate when neat. Quite a kick at the end. Harsh even as a mixer rum.

name: Havana Club  7 Years Rum (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Crafted for sipping, to be enjoyed on the rocks and ideal for rich cocktails: Havana Club 7 Años is highly versatile. This dark rum, matured in ex-Bourbon barrels, showcases the rich natural flavours of Cuba. The liquid unveils the tastes of the Cuban terroir: aromatic tobacco, sweet tropical fruits, molasses, spices, and vanilla from the continuous ageing process, enhanced by the slow release of aromas.

name: Saint James  Royal Amber "Rhum Agricole" (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
St James Royal Ambre Rum is a rhum agricole from St James Plantation on Martinique. Matured in oak for 18 to 24 months, this has notes of spice and figs. This is fantastic in a Planter's Punch with mango and pineapple.

Rhum agricole is the French term for sugarcane juice rum, a style of rum originally distilled in the French Caribbean islands from freshly squeezed sugarcane juice rather than molasses. Rhum is the term that typically distinguishes it in French-speaking locales from the rum made with molasses in other parts of the West Indies.

name: Sod Chaeng  Coconut Rum (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Coconut rum is Based from pure sugarcane white rum. Natural fine spirit 100% distilled from Ubon Ratchathani sugarcane. White rum with natural coconut flavor .Very smooth and fresh flavorful coconut flavor with sweet finish. Smooth and refreshing aroma from coconut.

Tasting Notes

Nose : Aromatic fresh Coconut

The Palate : Smooth, fresh and clean coconut flavor

The Finish : Sweet and crisp finishes

name: Dictador  20 Year  Colombian Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
Dictador 20-Year-Old Rum is made from the fermentation of virgin sugar cane honey, distilled partly in copper alembic and partly in steel continuous column, to achieve a medium body rum. It's then aged in pre-used oak barrels and finally bottled under the highest quality control to ensure all the secrets are contained in the liquid flavour. 

Big on the nose with soft caramel, vanilla, smoky honey, toffee, dry seeds, roasted coffee and a rich rounded oak sensation. In the mouth, it is very soft and round, yet big and full flavoured with caramel, vanilla, cocoa and roasted honey, a strong and rare texture.

name: Phraya  Elements Rum 8 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
This rum is aged in the finest, charred American oak barrels for minimum of 8 years in tropical kingdom of Thailand.

Smooth and long lasting flavour of coconut, vanilla, toffee, honey and a hint of chocolate.

name: Plantation  Barbados 5 Year Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
Plantation Barbados 5-Year rum is distilled from molasses and aged 5 years in bourbon casks before being transported to France for further 'finishing' in Cognac casks.

Plantation rum is owned by the French company Cognac Ferrand, which was founded in 1989 and produces wine, gin, and other spirits to sell in over 40 countries. The Plantation range includes 7 vintages from different Caribbean countries and 3 blends of multiple regions.

name: Ron Zacapa  Centenario XO Rum Solera Gran Reserva Especial (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Zacapa XO is a unique balance of complex aromas and flavors resulting from the exclusive blend of reserve rums. We hand select rums aged between 10 and 25 years in the “Sistema Solera.” Older and younger rums are then blended as they age in a sequence of barrels that previously stored robust American whiskeys, delicate Sherries, fine Pedro Ximénez wines and finished in French oak casks which previously aged Cognac. Zacapa XO is best enjoyed neat or on the rocks and pairs beautifully with dark chocolate and desserts.

name: The Pirates Silver Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
The Pirates Silver Rum pays tribute to the fearless sailors and privateers who once roamed the Caribbean and Southeast Asian seas — men and women who traded, fought, and celebrated under the same moonlit waves that inspire this rum today. It is a spirit crafted in the image of freedom, salt air, and tropical adventure.

Distilled from finest molasses and sugarcane juice, The Pirates Silver Rum undergoes double distillation in copper pot stills to achieve purity and depth. It is then rested in American oak casks just long enough to develop smoothness and subtle golden tones, without losing its lively, youthful energy.

The result is a rum that captures both the brightness of the tropics and the soul of the sea — clean, smooth, and vibrant, like the horizon after a storm.

Whether enjoyed neat, on the rocks, or as the base of a classic cocktail, this rum embodies the adventurous heart of its name — bold, spirited, and timeless.

name: BORN  Gold Junmai-Daiginjo (720 ml)
desc_en_short: "Born Gold" won the highest quality, gold award, in the Daiginjo section B of the 2013 U.S. National Sake Appraisal. Finishes soft and easy with a medium sweetness and very light, clean acidity. After lagering over a year at -10 degrees, the smoothness of this sake pairs very well with everything. Best enjoy when well chilled.

name: Dassai  Junmai Daiginjo 45 (720 ml)
food_matching: Sushi, Sashimi, Tempura, Japanese Cuisine, Light Seafood
desc_en_short: This best-selling premium sake has dreamy honeydew melon aromas and a light tropical fruity taste. Using top-grade sake rice milled down to 45% to remove impurities, Dassai 45 delivers a supremely balanced sake with mild acidity - great as a gift for newbies.

name: Tequila Rose  Strawberry Cream (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Tequila Rose is the original strawberry cream liqueur. Combining tequila with strawberry cream was a bold innovation, the first drink of its kind to pair cream with anything other than Irish whiskey. Exotic. Unexpected. Delicious. Over twenty years later, Tequila Rose remains the world’s best-selling strawberry cream liqueur and was the inspiration that paved the way for the unique cream liqueurs that have followed.

name: El Jimador  Blanco (750 ml)
desc_en_short: As natural as tequila can get, el Jimador Blanco, which means "white" in Spanish, is a remarkably crystal clear tequila that is bottled immediately after distillation.

name: Jose Cuervo  Especial Reposado (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The world's leading brand of premium tequila. Jose Cuervo Especial gets its distinctive golden colour and smooth mellow taste from resting in oak casks. Drink neat, on the rocks or the base for a wonderful Margarita.

name: Jose Cuervo  Especial Silver (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: A true silver tequila, Cuervo Silver is the epitome of smooth. The master distillers at La Rojeña crafted this unique and balanced blend to bring out tones of agave, caramel, and fresh herbs in its flavor profile.

name: Don Julio  Reposado (750 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: "Barrel aged for eight months in American white-oak barrels, Tequila Don Julio Reposado is golden amber in color, and offers a rich, smooth finish—the very essence of the perfect barrel-aged tequila. With a mellow, elegant flavor and inviting aroma, Tequila Don Julio Reposado is best savored as part of a refreshing drink or chilled on the rocks"

name: Sierra  Reposado (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
Sierra Tequila Reposado is traditionally distilled twice in copper pot stills. It matures for nine months in toasted oak barrels, which gives it its shimmering golden color. Reposado is the favorite variety of tequila among Mexicans. The fresh, irresistible fruitiness of Sierra Tequila Reposado carries delicate notes of vanilla, caramel, and herbs. A recipient of numerous international awards, Sierra Tequila Reposado’s diversity of aromas makes it especially complex.

Awards :

  • Gold Mixto Tequila - Reposado - 2020 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)
  • Silver Mixto Tequila - Reposado - 2019 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Sierra  Blanco (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
Sierra Blanco is a mature, clear tequila. Its full, fruity, fresh aroma dominated by a subtle chili note reflects the Tequilana Weber Azul Agave and also contains slight hints of green apple and young pineapple. Nuances of pepper give Sierra Tequila Silver that certain something, making it a feisty tequila.

Awards :

Silver Mixto Tequila - Blanco - 2020 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

Silver Mixto Tequila - Blanco - 2019 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: 1800 Tequila  Reposado (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
This tequila is crafted using 8-12 year old 100% Weber Blue Agave and is matured in American and French Oak barrels for no less than six months. This rich liquid has notes of buttery caramel, mild spices and a touch of smokiness, which is imparted by the finishing process. Perfect mixed in a cocktail or on the rocks.

Awards :

Gold Premium Reposado - 2015 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: 1800 Tequila  Coconut (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Our signature double-distilled 1800® Silver Tequila infused with natural, ripe coconut flavor. With its slightly-sweet and medium-bodied tropical taste, this versatile spirit is delicious on the rocks and also tastes great mixed with pineapple juice.

name: Jose Cuervo  Tradicional Reposado (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
Tradicional Reposado is 100% blue agave rested tequila. It has been aged in oak barrels for a minimum of two months, giving it the smooth and subtle complexity that aficionados seek. Tradicional is the original Cuervo tequila, and it is still the number one premium tequila in Mexico.

Awards :

  • Gold Premium Reposado - 2015 :The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)
  • Silver Reposado Tequila - 2019 : San Francisco World Spirits Competition

name: Kah  Tequila Reposado (750 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
This tequila has surprisingly subtle flavours of butter, vanilla and cinnamon. Exceptionally smooth and balanced like the blanco so easy to sip neat or as a base for classic cocktails.

Awards :

Gold Super Premium Reposado - 2018 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Creyente Mezcal  Joven (750 ml)
desc_en_short: The smooth and smoky flavor of CREYENTE® creates unique cocktails, from the “Creyente® & Tonic” to a twist on the classic Margarita.

name: 400 Conejos Mezcal  Joven (750 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: The gods of the drinks were called collectively centzon-totochtin (400 rabbits) in Nahuatl. The number 400 was synonymous with “innumerable” and” uncountable”. It is believed that the spirit of the 400 rabbits carries on to this day in each bottle of this fine mezcal.

name: Clase Azul  Tequila Reposado (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Clase Azul Tequila Reposado is a symbol of Mexican tradition and culture. Made with slow-cooked 100% Blue Weber Agave, our ultra-premium reposado tequila is unique and incomparable.

This Reposado is masterfully aged for eight months in American whiskey casks creating its unique hazelnut and vanilla flavors as well as exceptionally smoothness.

Its decanter is our most recognized icon with its distinctive "feathered" design, painted by hand in cobalt blue.

name: Montelobos  Espadin Joven Mezcal (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
Montelobos Joven is an artisanal Mezcal made in Santiago Matatlán produced with 100% organically certified agave Espadín. This Mezcal is crafted by biologist and distiller Iván Saldaña and mezcalero Don Abel Lopez. It is made according to Saldaña’s vision and passion for agave and artisanal mezcal with respect for traditional production methods, sustainability, and the quality of life in the communities and families who have produced mezcal for generations.

Awards :

  • Gold Medal: Mezcal - Joven - 2019 The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Montelobos  Pechuga Mezcal (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Montelobos Pechuga is a Mezcal Espadin distilled for a third time with turkey breast, seasonal fruit and spices. An homage to Oaxacan traditions, with an experimental twist. Celebrating festive ingredients.

name: Pancho Villa  Silver Tequila (750 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: Pancho Villa Silver Tequila (also known as "Pancho Villa White Tequila") has made from 100% Weber Blue Agave. The name and label pay homage to Mexican revolutionary general Pancho Villa. It is smooth and flavorful Tequila carriers with it nearly 40 years of distilling tradition. It offers a roasted agave nose that leads to a warm body. It has a herbal entry with a nutty mid-palate and a light finish. It has bottled at 40% alcohol by volume.

name: 818 Tequila  Eight Reserve (750 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
TASTE

Cooked agave, vanilla, cinnamon, dried berries, and praline

BODY & COLOR

Light amber with copper hues, full bodied

AROMA

Vanilla, clove & cinnamon, toasted nuts, honey, orange peel, and black cherry

FINISH

Prolonged and silky smooth, elegant aftertaste with fruit and spiced accents

WHAT MAKES IT SPECIAL

A masterful blend of Añejo aged up to 8 years, aged in French and American barrels

name: Dos Companeros  Silver Tequila (700 ml)
flavor_tags: White Pepper, Herbaceous, Citrus, Floral, Pepper, Agave, Lime, Wood
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: Dos Companeros Silver is a bright, unaged blanco tequila made from 100% Blue Weber agave — clean, crisp, and expressive with fresh agave, citrus zest, white pepper, and a hint of herbaceous green, ideal for cocktails or sipping chilled.

name: McCormick Vodka (750ml)
desc_en_short: McCormick Vodka is quadruple distilled vodka containing only American grains. According to the company, McCormick Vodka is the number 2 selling American vodka in the world. The Vodka is available in a variety of flavors including: Apple, Watermelon, Raspberry, Grape, Sweet Tea, Blueberry, Cherry, Citrus, Orange and Peach.

name: Smirnoff  Vodka (1 L)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Smirnoff Vodka is triple distilled and exceptionally smooth. Ten Times filtered in a unique process for ultimate clarity. Enjoyed all over the world in cocktails and in mixed drinks.

name: Smirnoff  Vodka (700 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Smirnoff Vodka is triple distilled and exceptionally smooth. Ten Times filtered in a unique process for ultimate clarity. Enjoyed all over the world in cocktails and in mixed drinks.

name: Grey Goose  Vodka (750 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Clear, fresh with an elegant floral aroma accented by a subtle citrus note. Smoth and rounded texture with a hint of almond on the palate. Fresh and bright throughout with a long, satisfying finish.

name: Absolut  Vodka (700 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Absolut Vodka is a Swedish vodka made exclusively from natural ingredients, and unlike some other vodkas, it doesn’t contain any added sugar. In fact Absolut is as clean as vodka can be. Still, it has a certain taste: Rich, full-bodied and complex, yet smooth and mellow with a distinct character of grain, followed by a hint of dried fruit.

name: Absolut  Vodka (1 L)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Absolut Vodka is a Swedish vodka made exclusively from natural ingredients, and unlike some other vodkas, it doesn’t contain any added sugar. In fact Absolut is as clean as vodka can be. Still, it has a certain taste: Rich, full-bodied and complex, yet smooth and mellow with a distinct character of grain, followed by a hint of dried fruit.

name: Russian Standard  Platinum Vodka (700 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: The modern and refined taste profile of Russian Standard Platinum and its citrus aroma makes it perfect to taste on its own or as an excellent base for any cocktail. Russian Standard Platinum employs a proprietary silver filtration system known for its unique natural refining values. This exclusive process produces an extraordinary silky smooth vodka with an ultra-clean finish.

name: Lanna  Thai Spirits Vodka (700 ml)
desc_en_short: LANNA 100% Thai Rice Spirit is about paying homage to Chiang Mai, the Kingdom of a Million Rice Fields. LANNA is handcrafted in small batches from a harmonious blend of locally grown Thai Jasmine and sticky rice before distillation and charcoal filtration.

name: Suntory  Haku Vodka (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Made with 100% Japanese white rice, the name Haku® means “white” in Japanese. The word can also be read as “brilliant” – a tribute to the craft of mastering a clear, clean, and luminous vodka. Filtered through bamboo charcoal, Haku® has an unparalleled soft, round, and subtly sweet taste.

name: Gilbey's  Vodka (1 L)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Gilbey’s Vodka is a clear distilled alcoholic beverage that is composed primarily of water and ethanol, but sometimes with traces of impurities and flavorings.

name: Glenfiddich  12 Years Old (700 ml) (With Box)
desc_en_short:
Our original, signature single malt Scotch whisky has matured for at least 12 years in American and Spanish oak casks. A fragrant malt which balances the fruitiness of pear with the richness of subtle oak.

Awards :

Gold - Speyside Single Malts up to 12yo - 2019 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Wild Turkey  Bourbon Whiskey (750 ml)
desc_en_short: A lower strength bourbon from Wild Turkey, bottled at 81 proof (40.5% abv) and created by the associate distiller Eddie Russell, the son of master distiller Jimmy Russell. This has a high rye content in the mash bill and is aged in casks with a heavy char - the result of which is huge flavour and complexity without the same heat as the 101 proof.

name: Laphroaig  10 Years (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Those enjoying the 10 Year Old will first notice the bold, smoky taste, followed by a hint of seaweed and a surprising sweetness. This full-bodied variant is the foundation of all Laphroaig expressions and comes with a long finish.

name: Maker's Mark  Bourbon Whisky (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: More than 50 years ago, Kentucky distiller Bill Samuels, Sr., founder of Maker's Mark, set out to make a better tasting bourbon whisky. What he discovered was that if you used winter wheat in the mash instead of the traditional distiller's rye, your bourbon whisky was smoother and less bitter and that's made all the difference.

name: Chivas Regal  25 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Chivas 25 is a rare and exclusive blend of the finest Scotch whiskies, which have all been aged for a minimum of 25 years. Chivas Regal 25 Year Old is available only as a strictly limited release in individually numbered bottles.

name: Jack Daniel's  Old No.7 (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Jack Daniel’s® Tennessee Whiskey is made with the careful selection of the finest corn, rye and barley malt. These choice grains are mixed with the iron-free water that flows from the Cave Spring found on Distillery grounds. Our process includes the unique step of charcoal - mellowing, which give Jack Daniel’s its trademark smoothness and character and makes it a Tennessee Whiskey.

name: Jack Daniel's  Old No.7 (1 L)
desc_en_short: Jack Daniel's has a smooth smoky sweetness. One reviewer has descibed it as having a corn syrup note to it and I agree. Jack Daniels has a reputation for a light licorice note to all of their whiskies and its readily apparent in Black Label. The licorice note isn't overwhelming and lends a nice background note to flavors of vanilla, toasted oak, fresh brewed coffee, nuts and English toffee. What is most interesting about Jack Daniel's Black Label to me is the number of flavors that come into play over the course of drinking it. I challenge you to sit down and think about the flavors appearing on your palate. You'll be surprised at just how much complexity and depth there is hidden under the blanket of vanilla at the front of the palate.

name: Ballantine's  30 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Ballantine's 30 years olds ranks as one of the world's most exquisite blends. With a deep gold colour, subtle sweet flavour on the nose and a complex palate of honey and vanilla, Ballantine’s 30 Year Old is an exceptional, rare and exclusive whisky.

Awards :

Gold Outstanding Scotch Whisky - Deluxe Blend - 2018 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

Master Blends aged 19-30 years old - 2015 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Johnnie Walker  Black Label (1 L)
desc_en_short: A true icon, recognised as the benchmark for all other deluxe blends. Created using only whiskies aged for a minimum of 12 years from the four corners of Scotland, Johnnie Walker Black Label has an unmistakably smooth, deep, complex character. An impressive whisky to share on any occasion.

name: Johnnie Walker  Black Label (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A true icon, recognised as the benchmark for all other deluxe blends. Created using only whiskies aged for a minimum of 12 years from the four corners of Scotland, Johnnie Walker Black Label has an unmistakably smooth, deep, complex character. An impressive whisky to share on any occasion.

name: Johnnie Walker  Red Label (1 L)
desc_en_short: The character of the whisky is defined by intense, spicy, zingy, edgy flavours. RED LABEL bursts onto the palate with the freshness of spray from a crashing wave, followed by the zing of aromatic spices and finally a long, lingering, smoky finish. The sensation in the mouth is complex – ‘sweet chilli’ is a good description of this taste and the tingling sensation on the tongue.

name: Bowmore  12 Years Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Puffs of peat smoke and pools of honey, sharpened by lemon zest. Breathe in subtle lemon and honey, balanced beautifully by Bowmore's trademark peaty smokiness. Sip sweet and delicious heather honey and gentle peat smoke. Savour the long, mellow finish.

Awards :

Gold Scotch Single Malt - Islay - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

Silver Independents’ Single Malts 21 years old and over - 2019 : International Spirits Challenge

Gold Single Malt Scotch - to 12 Yrs - 2013 : San Francisco World Spirits Competition

name: Canadian Club (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Our best-selling, flagship whisky is where most folks begin their whisky journey. This is the one that started the legend. A giant of Canadian whisky since 1858, it’s aged longer than the 3 years required by law in oak barrels before bottling for the smoothest possible flavor.

name: Johnnie Walker  Gold Label Reserve (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve is an indulgent, luxurious and multi-layered blend with a smooth balance of sweet fruits and creaminess that evolves into deeper honeyed tones before finishing in lingering waves of wood, fruit and light, sweet West-coast smoke.

Awards :

Winner - World's Best Blended Whisky - 2018 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Compass Box  The Peat Monster (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
PROCESS

Layer curated whiskies from distilleries across the peat spectrum to achieve balance and complexity of flavour. Blended carefully so aromatic, sweet smoke takes centre stage, accented by heavier, medicinal peatiness.

FLAVOUR PROFILE

Peaty and smoky, with a creamy and fruity character on the palate.

SERVING RECOMMENDATIONS

A fantastic late-night whisky that also works beautifully in a classic Scotch whisky Highball.

TECHNICAL DETAILS

Bottled at 46%.

Natural colour.

Not chill filtered.

Blended Malt Scotch Whisky.

name: Johnnie Walker  Gold Label XR 21 (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Johnnie Walker XR 21 is a tribute to the legacy of Sir Alexander Walker II, grandson of the brand’s founder, who was honored with the Royal Warrant in the 1920s. Inspired by his private blending notes, XR 21 is crafted with a selection of rare malt and grain whiskies, each aged for at least 21 years.

Some of the whiskies used in this blend come from now-silent distilleries, such as Brora, adding complexity and rarity to its profile. The result is a whisky that reflects the finest blending traditions of John Walker & Sons.

name: Lagavulin  16 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A much sought-after single malt with the massive peat-smoke that's typical of southern Islay - but also offering richness and a dryness that turns it into a truly interesting dram. The 16 year old has become a benchmark Islay dram from the Lagavulin distillery.

Awards : 

Gold - Islay Single Malt 13 to 20 Years - 2016 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Ardbeg  10 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Ardbeg Ten Years Old is revered around the world as the peatiest, smokiest, most complex single malt of them all. Yet it does not flaunt the peat; rather it gives way to the natural sweetness of the malt to produce a whisky of perfect balance.

Awards :

Gold Islay Single Malt 12 Years and Under - 2016 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Glenmorangie  The Lasanta (Sherry Wood)-12 Years  (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Lasanta is Gaelic for warmth and passion, a reminder not just of the Spanish provenance of these Oloroso sherry butts, but also a reflection of this expressions lusciously soft texture and deep, enticingly sweet aroma.Non chill-filtered for additional aroma and mouthfeel.

Awards :

Gold Outstanding - Scotch Single Malt - Highland - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Heaven hill  Rittenhouse Rye Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Intensely woody aromas and succulent marshmallow, bakery and lanolin scents spring forth. The fat palate entry oozes buttercream, dark caramel, and brown sugar tastes; the mid palate focuses more on the grain aspect as the flavor becomes toasty, fruity and honeyed. Ends honey sweet, decadent and maple-like. An unbelievable bargain.

name: Monkey Shoulder  Blended Malt Scotch Whisky (700ml)
desc_en_short:
Monkey Shoulder's easy-drinking blend of three single malts - Balvenie, Glenfiddich and Kininvie. Named after the injury distillery workers were prone to suffering as a result of turning the malt. An elegant, stylish nose of marmalade, Crema Catalana, cocoa and malt. Plenty of vanilla and a sprinkling of winter spice alongside a mouth-watering hint of aniseed. The palate is very malty, creamy delivery with a suggestion of berry fruit. Juicy toasted barley, cloves and butterscotch. Manuka honey.

Awards :

Gold - Scotch Whisky - Blended Malt - 2017 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Buffalo Trace  Bourbon Whisky (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Burnished gold in color, this bourbon brings a mélange of aromas to the nose: honey, vanilla, oak, toffee and a suggestion of coriander are all there. The body is big, and on the palate, this becomes a very spicy, masculine whiskey with a complex spicy mustiness and notes of leather, tobacco, overripe oranges and a surprising smokiness not often found in a bourbon.

name: Fireball  Cinnamon Whisky (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Fireball is made with Canadian whisky and natural cinnamon flavours. It's certainly very cinnamony, and it's not too sweet, which is a plus. A very popular shot drink on the other side of the pond, Fireball was awarded 87 points from the Beverage Testing Institute, and a Silver Medal from the International Review of Spirits.

name: Arran  10 Year Single Malt Whisky  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Ripe Golden Barley. Bouquet is the initial rush of rich vanilla sweetness gives way to the fruits of slow distillation A touch of cinnamon adds a spicy edge to the soft and sweet texture which captivates the palate.

name: Glen Moray  12 Years Old Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A beautifully balancing vanilla and berried notes, this quintessential Speysider reflects all our 120 years of expertise. It is distilled on the banks of the River Lossie, in the time-honoured Glen Moray way. Then this single malt is entirely aged in select American oak casks, to bring its traditional Speyside character to its best. Adored by single malt fans, our smooth and fruity expression has delighted one of the industry's biggest names. Awarding it 90/100 in his renowned Whisky Bible, global expert Jim Murray proclaimed our 12 Year Old "the measuring stick by which all other malty and clean Speysiders should be tried and tasted".

Awards :

Gold Scotch Whisky – Single Malt: Travel Retail Exclusive - 2018 : The Travel Retail Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: The Macallan  12 Year Old Sherry Oak (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Deliciously smooth, with rich dried fruits and sherry, balanced with woodsmoke and spice. Described by F Paul Pacult, the renowned international whisky writer, in his book Kindred Spirits as "simply the best 12 Year Old single malt around".

name: Evan Williams Bourbon Black (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Evan Williams is a smooth, easy to drink Bourbon named after Evan Williams who, in 1783, opened Kentucky’s first commercial distillery along the banks of the Ohio River. Many years and barrels later, we’re still producing Bourbon with the same time-honored methods that Evan Williams did years ago.

name: Elijah Craig  Small Batch (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
The signature Bourbon bearing the name of Rev. Elijah Craig, a Bourbon pioneer who is credited with being the first distiller to age his whiskey in charred oak barrels.

Long before the term Small Batch even existed, our Master Distillers were hand-selecting just the right number of barrels to make Elijah Craig. This expertise and attention to detail give Elijah Craig Small Batch the right balance of rich flavor and full body. Each small batch carries a signature warm spice and subtle smoke flavor. A combination that belongs in any Bourbon fan’s regular rotation.

name: Wild Turkey  Rare Breed (750 ml)
desc_en_short: The true, bold spirit of Wild Turkey has been captured in this authentic barrel proof whiskey, creating one of the finest bourbons in the world. Uncut with water, Rare Breed is an uncompromised Kentucky bourbon with tones of sweet tobacco and hints of orange and mint, making it a remarkably smooth whiskey legend.

name: Jack Daniel's  Single Barrel Tennessee Whiskey (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Jack Daniel’s® Single Barrel is finely crafted and bottled from a single barrel which has been individually hand selected by our master tasters for its unique taste and smooth and aromatic character. The barrels chosen for Single Barrel come from the uppermost floors of the barrelhouses; roughly only 1 of every 100 barrels make the cut. The extremes in temperature these floor experience during the year, result in barrels which yield whiskey of the most robust flavors, smoothness and aroma.

name: Jack Daniel's  Honey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Jack Daniel’s® Tennessee Honey is Jack Daniel’s Tennessee Whiskey flavored with a unique blend of all natural flavors and real Tennessee Honey.
