name: Auchentoshan  Single Malt Scotch Whisky 12 Year (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Triple distilled then matured for over twelve years. Our Lowland Single Malt Whisky has the tempting aroma of toasted almonds, caramelised toffee and the signature smooth, delicate, Auchentoshan taste.

name: TOGOUCHI  Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Corn whisky and Scotch malt whisky aged 8years are blended. Corn whiskey has a soft sweetness of the corn. Scotch malt whisky aged 8years has slight peat notes and soft sweetness of vanilla and chocolate. You are sure to feel the strength in the young light taste.

name: Suntory Whisky  Chita (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Located south of Nagoya city in Aichi prefecture, Chita is a grain distillery owned by Suntory. Most of the grain whisky produced in Chita is used to compose the famous Hibiki blends. However a small part is bottled as a single grain under the name “Suntory Chita Single Grain.”

name: Wild Turkey  Russell's Reserve Single Barrel (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Russell’s Reserve Single Barrel Bourbon is matured in only the deepest No. 4 “alligator” char, American White Oak barrels handpicked by our master distillers. Individually bottled at 110 proof and non-chill filtered to guarantee maximum flavor, each barrel has its own unique personality yet still captures our signature rich, creamy toffee and vanilla taste.

name: Jack Daniel's  Old No.7 (3 L)
desc_en_short: Jack Daniel’s® Tennessee Whiskey is made with the careful selection of the finest corn, rye and barley malt. These choice grains are mixed with the iron-free water that flows from the Cave Spring found on Distillery grounds. Our process includes the unique step of charcoal - mellowing, which give Jack Daniel’s its trademark smoothness and character and makes it a Tennessee Whiskey.

name: Jameson  Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Jameson Original is a blend of pot still and fine grain whiskeys that is as versatile as it is smooth. Triple-distilled and aged for a minimum of 4 years, this is the timeless whiskey that turned our green bottle into an icon.

name: Jim Beam  Double Oak (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Jim Beam® Double Oak is first aged in charred American white oak barrels, then we pour it into another freshly charred barrel to mature for a second time. The added interaction with the oak wood results in a liquid intense in flavour, smooth in taste.

name: Suntory  Whisky Kakubin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The Suntory Kakubin is a budget blend from Suntory. Kakubin means square bottle and althou "Kakubin" is stated nowhere on the bottle it is it's official name. It was originally introduced in 1937 and now bottled at 40% vol. Very drinkable blend for a very low price, no mixer needed. Very clean and simple, really nothing wrong with it.

name: Jim Beam  White Label Straight Bourbon Whiskey (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Jim Beam is the best-selling brand of Kentucky straight bourbon in the world. Seven generations of craftsmanship go into every bottle, along with corn, rye, barley malt, water, time and pride.

name: Jameson  Irish Whiskey (1 L)
desc_en_short: Jameson Original is a blend of pot still and fine grain whiskeys that is as versatile as it is smooth. Triple-distilled and aged for a minimum of 4 years, this is the timeless whiskey that turned our green bottle into an icon.

name: Suntory  Hibiki Japanese Harmony (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Hibiki Japanese Harmony is made with malt whiskies from the Yamazaki and Hakushu distilleries, as well as grain whisky from the Chita distillery. The whiskies are drawn from 5 different types of cask, including American white oak casks, Sherry casks and Mizunara oak casks. The blend itself was crafted by the Suntory Whisky blending team, led by Master Blender Shingo Torii. An elegant expression, with wafts of honey, orange, a herbaceous touch or two and light oak.

name: Chivas Regal  12 Years (1 L)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Chivas is a blend of many different malt and grain Scotch whiskies, matured for at least 12 years. This rich, smooth blend balances style with substance and tradition with a modern twist.

name: The Glenlivet  12 years (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
"This is one of Speyside’s definitive malts. Deceptively complex, The Glenlivet 12 is one of the classiest, most sophisticated malts." Paul Pacult, Kindred Spirits

Representing The Glenlivet’s signature style, this classic malt is matured primarily ex-American Oak casks. These impart notes of vanilla and give the whisky its distinctive smoothness. The mineral-rich water that comes from Josie’s Well helps form the flavours during mashing and fermentation, whilst the specific height and width of the copper stills add a delicate yet complex character.

name: Aberlour  12 Year Old Double Cask Matured (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The 12 year-old expression is a fine example of how the distinctively crisp, citrus character of Aberlour’s raw spirit is deftly softened by double cask maturation. Traditional oak and seasoned Sherry butts are both used to great effect, as the mellowed spirits within are combined to deliver a subtly balanced flavour.

Awards :

Gold Speyside Single Malts up to 12yo - 2018 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Bulleit  Rye (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Bulleit Rye is an award-winning, straight rye whiskey with a character of unparalleled spice and complexity. Released in 2011, it continues to enjoy recognition as one of the highest quality ryes available.

name: Michter's  US*1 Kentucky Straight Bourbon (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Michter’s US*1 Kentucky Straight Bourbon is made from a carefully selected mashbill that features the highest quality American corn. It is then matured to the peak of perfection.

name: Michter's  US*1 Kentucky Straight Rye (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Our Michter’s US*1 Kentucky Straight Rye is made from select American rye grain that is sheared to maximize the extraction of flavor from the grain. Ideal neat or in cocktails, every bottle comes from a single barrel – a unique attribute reflecting our extraordinary commitment to offering Kentucky Straight Rye whiskey of the absolute highest quality at every level of the Michter’s range.

name: Singleton  Of Dufftown 12 Year Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A gentle and smooth single malt that replaces the old Singleton which came from Auchroisk. Confusingly there is another Singleton from Macduff distillery which is made for the Far Eastern market. This version is very popular with customers despite the lack of high praise from whisky 'experts'. What you get here is a polished, approachable and very easy to drink whisky. 

Awards :

Gold Speyside Single Malts up to 12yo - 2014 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

Silver Outstanding Scotch Single Malt - Speyside - 2014 :International Wine & Spirit Competition

Silver Distillers' Single Malts 12 years and under - 2014 : International Spirits Challenge

name: Bushmills  Black Bush (Matured in Sherry cask) (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Bushmills Black Bush Irish Whiskey combines a high amount of malt whiskey matured in former Oloroso Sherry casks, with a sweet, batch-distilled grain whiskey. This unique recipe means Black Bush has rich, fruity notes and a deep intense character, balanced by an incredibly unique smoothness. It’s best enjoyed neat, or over ice.

Awards :

Winner Irish Blend of the Year - 2018 : Jim Murray's Whisky Bible

Gold Outstanding Irish Whiskey - Blended - 2013 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

Master Irish Blended - Premium - 2013 : The Irish Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: The Dalmore  12 Years Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Dalmore 12 is aged for the first nine years in American white oak ex-bourbon casks, before half is transferred to ex-oloroso sherry casks for the final three years. The result is a whisky with a combination of sweetness and rich, sherried flavours.

Awards :

Silver Scotch Single Malt - Highland - 2017 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Lagavulin  8 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Released to commemorate the 200th anniversary of the founding of Lagavulin distillery by John Johnston in 1816, this eight-year-old is big and smoky, with sweet spice that becomes apparent with a drop of water. Inspired by the visit of Alfred Barnard to the distillery in the 1880s when he tried an 'exceptionally fine' eight-year-old from the distillery, this is a fitting tribute for the milestone.

name: Douglas Laing's  The Gauldrons (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Part of Douglas Laing's Remarkable Regional Malts series, which also includes the likes of Big Peat and Rock Oyster, The Gauldrons is a small-batch blended malt from Campeltown, named after the area in the region whose name literally means 'bay of storms'. Both maritime and with a sweet, honeycomb character typical of the region, this is made from a marriage of the independent bottler's best casks of Campeltown single malt. The bottle's spiderweb design is a nod to the local legend that King Robert the Bruce, having been defeated by his enemies, was inspired by the sight of a spider building his web in the bay to carry on fighting.

Awards :

Gold - Blended Malt - No Age Statement - 2020 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Tenjaku  Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Rich, full-bodied malt flavors are expertly harmonized, with a grain taste that is toned down but freely allowed to express its individual characteristics. An exquisite balance that forms a clean,
timeless blend.

name: Tamdhu  15 Year Old Speyside Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
From your first sip of our new 15-year-old expression, you’ll fully appreciate that time maturing exclusively in the finest sherry oak casks. You’ll taste the intense burst of vibrant summer fruits on the palate and enjoy the rewardingly long finish it delivers. Bottled at 46% volume, natural colour and un-chillfiltered.

Awards :

Double Gold Winner : San Francisco World Spirits competition 2020

Gold Distillers' Single Malts between 13 and 20 years old - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

Master Speyside Single Malts 13-18yo - 2019 :The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Woodford Reserve  Double Oak (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
An innovative approach to twice-barreled bourbon creates the rich and colorful flavor of Woodford Reserve Double Oaked. Uniquely matured in separate, charred oak barrels – the second barrel deeply toasted before a light charring – extracts additional soft, sweet oak character.

Awards :

Master Bourbon - Super Premium - 2018 : The American Whiskey Masters (The Spirits Buiness)

Master Bourbon - Super Premium - 2017 : The American Whiskey Masters (The Spirits Buiness)

name: Jack Daniel's  Apple (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple has the unique character of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey coupled with crisp green apple for a fresh and rewarding taste. It's bold, refreshing, and exceptionally smooth.

name: The Macallan  18 Year Old Double Cask (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Two oaks, creating the perfect harmony within one exceptional single malt whisky. Our Double Cask whiskies are aged in two types of oak, in specially selected hand-crafted casks seasoned with dry Oloroso sherry. American oak imparts delicate flavours of vanilla, citrus and butterscotch. European oak delivers the unmistakable subtle spice of The Macallan. Once matured, two exceptional whiskies unite to create a distinctive single malt with a sweeter, warmer taste and character. Enjoy it neat, over ice or in a serve.

name: Aber Falls  Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The Aber Falls Single Malt Welsh Whisky has been years in the making, from the first whisky distillery in North Wales in over 100 years. This rich and full-bodied whisky, crafted meticulously with passion to achieve distinct flavour profiles, is a fine liquid that we’re proud to permanently add to our portfolio of award-winning spirits.

Awards.

  • The Global Spirits Masters 2022 - gold
  • San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2022 - silver
  • World Whisky Awards 2022 - silver
  • World Spirits Awards 2022 - silver
  • London Spirits Competition 2022 - silver

name: Nikka  Taketsuru Pure Malt Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: This is an expression launched in 2020, with a refined formula and a new label design to represent the brand. While remaining a smooth and well-balanced blended malt, the formula further showcases an exquisite balance between elegant softness and deep complexity along with rich mouthfeel and smokiness.

name: Wild Turkey  Aged 8 Years Bourbon Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: For over 60 years, Wild Turkey has been making 101 the same way, the right way. Aged in American White Oak barrels coated in the deepest alligator char, Wild Turkey 101 has an impossible-to-miss character. It’s high rye content and the 101 proof makes it a most flavorful Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey that carries a bit of a pleasant bite to it – making it highly enjoyable neat, on the rocks, or in a cocktail.

name: Jack Daniel's  Old No.7 (375 ml)
desc_en_short: Jack Daniel’s® Tennessee Whiskey is made with the careful selection of the finest corn, rye and barley malt. These choice grains are mixed with the iron-free water that flows from the Cave Spring found on Distillery grounds. Our process includes the unique step of charcoal - mellowing, which give Jack Daniel’s its trademark smoothness and character and makes it a Tennessee Whiskey.

name: Nikka  Days Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Nikka Days has been developed for whisky lovers who appreciate fine drinks on any casual day, based on the concept "whisky for every day". Its round bottle and bright colored label visualize the taste profile of the whisky inside and enhance a vibrant mood. This whisky can be enjoyed neat, on the rocks, in a simple highball or refreshing cocktail. Nikka Days will complement and elevate your day.

name: The Irishman  The Harvest Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Welcome to the beautiful re-release of The Irishman – The Harvest. The Irishman is made up of 70% Single Malt and 30% Single Pot Still and contains no inferior grain whiskeys. An unusual and unique blend which is matured in bourbon casks.

Awards :

94 points : Beverage Tasting Institute USA

Gold Medel : International Spirits Challenge London

Gold Medel : International Spirits Competition San Francisco

Gold Medel : International Spirits Competition San Francisco

name: The Glenturret  10 Years old Peat Smoked Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Peat smoke has long drifted through our history. In years gone by, peat featured heavily in distilling traditions and our records show The Glenturret using peat dug from Octhertye Estate in the early 1800s. We are in the rare position of producing peated and non-peated spirit at different times of the year from the same small stills. This has allowed us to craft this mellow, sweet, smoky 10 years old single malt that shows its character off to the full at a strength of 50%.

name: Elijah Craig  Toasted Barrel (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Twice barreled for added complexity, Toasted Barrel takes our award-winning Small Batch Bourbon to new heights. After it's fully matured, we finish this Bourbon in a second, custom toasted new oak barrel, where it’s left to develop even more sweet oak flavor.

name: Prakaan  Single Malt Whisky Tribura Series Select Cask (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
SELECT CASK

Aged in Ex-Bourbon Oak Cask

Kamphaeng Phet is one of the most ancient cities of Thailand, a prestigious connecting point in the prosperous era, famous for its impressive fortified walls. For centuries these walls have stood strong in defense of the Kingdom of Thailand. Honoring the social and cultural significance of this proud history, PRAKAAN single malt whisky pays respectful tribute to this iconic city with its venerable walls and keeps the legacy alive.

PRAKAAN single malt whisky was born in Kamphaeng Phet amidst unspoiled natural abundance where pure spring water is slowly filtered into underground reservoirs; an ideal environment for making fine quality whisky.

Our whisky is crafted by our proud craftsmen and women who combine their passion about nature and centuries old whisky making methods. PRAKAAN single malt whisky is expertly distilled and matured with great pride in the Kingdom of Thailand.

name: Prakaan  Single Malt Whisky Tribura Series Double Cask (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
DOUBLE CASK

Aged in Ex-Bourbon & Ex-Sherry Oak Cask

Kamphaeng Phet is one of the most ancient cities of Thailand, a prestigious connecting point in the prosperous era, famous for its impressive fortified walls. For centuries these walls have stood strong in defense of the Kingdom of Thailand. Honoring the social and cultural significance of this proud history, PRAKAAN single malt whisky pays respectful tribute to this iconic city with its venerable walls and keeps the legacy alive.

PRAKAAN single malt whisky was born in Kamphaeng Phet amidst unspoiled natural abundance where pure spring water is slowly filtered into underground reservoirs; an ideal environment for making fine quality whisky.

Our whisky is crafted by our proud craftsmen and women who combine their passion about nature and centuries old whisky making methods. PRAKAAN single malt whisky is expertly distilled and matured with great pride in the Kingdom of Thailand.

name: Lingyun  Singlemalt Whisky Sherry Cask (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
TASTING NOTES :

COLOUR - Clear amber.

AROMA - Very active with a plum aroma, accompanied by light oak and sweet vanilla notes.

FLAVOUR - Slightly sweet and smooth on the palate, with subtle notes of chocolate, candy sweetness, raisins, and almond nuts.

FINISH : Medium short, with a delicate Pedro Ximenez oak cask plum sweetness in the aftertaste.

name: Lingyun  Singlemalt Whisy Cognac Cask (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
TASTING NOTES :


COLOUR - Gold.

AROMA - Vibrant oak cask sweetness with hints of French pastry and fruit pie.

FLAVOUR - Extremely smooth and delightful on the palate, with sweet and rich flavors featuring raisins, red apple, nuts, and a hint of spice.

FINISH : Rich and intense fruitiness imparted by the French cognac cask

name: Johnnie Walker  Black Ruby (1 L)
desc_en_short: A vibrant new blend delivering an indulgently sweet flavour experience, Johnnie Walker Black Ruby is the latest interpretation of our iconic blended Scotch Whisky, Johnnie Walker Black Label. Elevate cocktails with its deliciously sweet and smooth fruity flavours.

name: Kilchoman Batch Strength (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Matured in a combination of re-charred red wine casks, oloroso sherry butts and bourbon barrels, a few drops of water were added post maturation to produce a Batch Strength of 57% abv. The result is a colossal dram combining the natural peat smoke and citrus character of Kilchoman with dark fruits, rich spices and salted caramel sweetness.

name: Johnnie Walker Blue Label Festive VAP 2025 – Decanter Edition (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Johnnie Walker Blue Label Festive VAP 2025 – Decanter Edition represents a special celebration of craftsmanship, rarity, and timeless elegance. This limited-release expression for 2025 brings together exceptional Scotch whisky with the refined beauty of a bespoke decanter—created to elevate both the drinking ritual and the visual experience.

name: Johnnie Walker Blue Label Chinese New Year Of Horse (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Johnnie Walker Blue Label Chinese New Year – Year of the Horse celebrates strength, elegance, and forward momentum through a beautifully crafted limited-edition design. Featuring exceptionally rare whiskies from only 1% of Johnnie Walker’s reserves, it offers a silky, smoky, and deeply refined flavor—perfect for meaningful New Year celebrations and collectors.

name: The Macallan A Night on Earth The First Light (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
A limited edition single malt whisky matured in
a harmonious combination of sherry seasoned
European and American oak casks, with sparing
inclusion of casks that previously held Bourbon.
A Night on Earth - The First Light is a radiant
tribute to the feeling of joy, renewal and shared
beginnings at the very first light of the new year.

name: Fever-Tree  Premium Indian Tonic Water (200 ml) (Pack 24 Bottles)
desc_en_short: By blending fabulous botanical oils with spring water and the highest quality quinine from the 'fever trees' of the Eastern Congo, we have created a delicious, natural, award winning tonic with a uniquely clean and refreshing taste and aroma. Designed to enhance the very best gins or vodkas.

name: Fever-Tree  Premium Mediterranean Tonic Water (200 ml) (Pack 24 Bottles)
desc_en_short: By blending the essential oils from the flowers, fruits and herbs that we have gathered from around the Mediterranean shores with the highest quality quinine from the 'fever trees' of the eastern Congo, we have created a unique, delicate, floral tonic. Created to accompany the finest vodkas or to enjoy as a sophisticated soft drink.

name: Batasiolo  Moscato Spumante Dolce
wine_color: Light straw yellow, clear and bright. Fine and thin with good persistence.
desc_en_short: Light straw yellow, clear and bright. Fine and thin with good persistence. Pleasant aromas of muscat grapes, apples, fruit and white flowers. In the mouth it is sweet but not cloying, pleasant, and rightly so cool, good intensity.

name: Cantine Pellegrino  Zebo Moscato IGT
desc_en_short: Extremely refreshing with nectarine notes, a light floral undertone and a strong moscato nose. This theme continues on the palate along with both yellow and white peach notes giving to the wine a long lasting finish.

name: Donnafugata  Ben Rye' Passito Di Pantelleria (375 ml)
wine_color: The color is bright golden with amber glints.
desc_en_short: A particularly positive vintage producing grapes of an exceptional quality entirely appreciable in this Ben Ryé 2009. The color is bright golden with amber glints; to the nose it shows notes of apricot, fig, date, candied citrus and Mediterranean maquis. In the mouth its sweetness is perfectly balanced by freshness and minerality. Very long aromatic persistence. A wine of great complexity, harmony and elegance, iconic of the heroic viticulture of Pantelleria. It matches with caramelized duck, foie gras and blue cheeses. It goes well with pastries and gourmet chocolate like gianduja. Extraordinary alone, as a meditation wine.

name: Dow's  Fine Ruby Port
desc_en_short: The grapes used in the production of Dow’s Fine Ruby were a blend of traditional Portuguese varieties from the Douro Valley. Dow’s Fine Ruby was aged in seasoned oak casks at our lodges in Vila Nova de Gaia for an average of 3 years, and bottled when ready to drink. Exuberant youthful fruit flavours make it perfect for informal drinking. It is ready to drink and enjoy when bottled and does not require further ageing.

name: Dow's  Fine Tawny Port
desc_en_short: Dow’s Fine Tawny is a three-year-old blend aged in small oak casks at our lodges in Vila Nova de Gaia. The barrel ageing produces a smoother and lighter style of wine than the Dow’s Ruby which is aged primarily in large oak vats and tonels. Dow’s Tawny combines subtle fruit with delicious velvety nutty flavours derived from the cask ageing. It is ready to drink and enjoy when bottled and does not require further ageing.

name: Blandy's  Rainwater "3 Years Old"
grape_variety: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz
desc_en_short: Rainwater is a medium dry pale Madeira that is delicious taken chilled before meals but also goes well with dessert. It’s elegant and refined bouquet has made it a universal favourite.

name: Bottega  Moscato Vino dell'Amore Spumante
wine_color: Brilliant, with fine and lasting perlage. Straw yellow
desc_en_short: This wine is a Moscato Spumante made with juicy grapes grown in the Euganean Hills area in the district of Padua. This is a thriving rose-growing area, so when the roses are flowering bees carry their subtle perfume to the nearby vineyards. One of the characteristics of this wine is then the unmistakable hint of roses, which evokes the image of the petals depicted on the label.

name: Granmonte  Bussaba Natural Sweet Wine
desc_en_short: Bussaba is light, refreshing , snappy and aromatic. With nose of purple passion fruit, mango, apple and orchard fruits with distinctive Semillon characteristics of fresh cut grass and gooseberry. It has citrusy acid that balances the sweetness and a round, long lingering finish. Only 8.5 percent in alcohol, Bussaba is perfect for aperitif or a compliment with Thai desserts.

name: Graham's  10 Year Tawny Port
wine_color: Very deep purple in colour with an intense garnet edge.
desc_en_short: Graham’s 10 Year Old is a tribute to craftsmanship, the passion for excellence, and unmatched precision, which is at the heart of every handmade Tawny Port. After a decade of care, this wine is a wonderful expression of Tawny Port. For those who appreciate quality in every detail.

name: Massolino  Moscato D'Asti DOCG
desc_en_short: Bright straw yellow Bouquet is tempting, immensely fresh and intense, it reveals decisive fruit notes, with a clear predominance of sage., Flavour is expansive and enveloping, but not too sweet; the typical aroma of Moscato grapes is naturally prevalent and it has a very long and delicious finish.

name: Bottega  Moscato Vino dell'Amore Spumante (200 ml)
flavor_tags: Orange Blossom, Apricot, Blossom, Orange, Floral, Peach, Honey, Rose
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short: Bottega's Vino dell'Amore — 'Wine of Love' — is a delicate, sweet sparkling Moscato from Veneto in its iconic pink bottle, bursting with fresh peach, apricot, rose petal, and honey aromas with a light, frothy fizz and gentle sweetness.

name: Marchesi Di Barolo  Moscato d'Asti DOCG Zagara
wine_color: Straw-yellow sparkling wine that boasts golden highlights.
desc_en_short:
There are abundant fine beads in this straw-yellow sparkling wine that boasts golden highlights. The fragrance is intense and full of aromatic scents, especially those of orange, peach and apricot flowers, which is perfectly balanced with the low alcohol content and the moderate acidity, making this wine pleasantly fresh.

This sweet and aromatic wine is well-matched with desserts at the end of a meal and with the classic hazelnut nougat. It is an ideal companion in moments of celebration and a pleasantly refreshing drink at any time of the day, including after playing sports.

name: Taylor’s  Fine Tawny Port
wine_color: Pale brick colour with broad amber rim
style: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz, Tinto Cao, Tinta Barroca
grape_variety: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz
desc_en_short:
Taylor’s Fine Tawny is drawn from wines selected for their smoothness and mellow character. These are aged for up to three years in oak casks in Taylor’s cellars in Vila Nova de Gaia. The individual wines are then blended together a few months before bottling for balance and completeness.

Taylor’s Fine Tawny Port is particularly popular in Continental Europe where it is drunk predominantly as an aperitif. For those preferring a lighter style, this versatile port can also be enjoyed after meals.

name: Taylor’s  Special Ruby Port
wine_color: Pale brick colour with broad amber rim
grape_variety: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz
desc_en_short:
Taylor’s Fine Ruby a blend of full bodied Port wines aged for around two years in large oak vats in Taylor’s cellars, or ‘lodges’, in Vila Nova de Gaia.  

As they age, they gain smoothness and elegance while retaining their fruitiness, intensity and youthful ruby colour.  They are then blended together for balance and consistency. With its firm tannins and concentrated fruitiness, Fine Ruby is perfect for the classic port-and-cheese combination.

It is particularly good with blue-veined and richly flavoured soft cheeses.  It also pairs well with berry fruit and dark chocolate flavours and, like all red Ports, makes an excellent after dinner drink.

name: Maison Castel  Medium Sweet Muscat Pays d'Oc
wine_color: Light yellow robe with golden hints
desc_en_short: With this Medium Sweet Muscat, Maison Castel combines a modern approach with French savoir-faire. This deliciously expressive sweet wine has excellent aromatic character.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Baronne Paulinne AOC Sauternes
desc_en_short: The powerful and stylish attack opens on the freshness of the fruit along with a touch of hazelnut, while the mid-palate displays the white fruit notes. Spicy, toasted notes return on the finish, complementing a minerality typical of Sauternes wines.

name: Fontanafredda  Moscato D'Asti Le Fronde DOCG
desc_en_short: The fragrance of its aroma, wich comes direct from the grapes, imbues this wine with an intense nose of musk, black locust and orange flowers, sage and honey, and the lingering of its carefree flavour brings out the brightest of spirits. The warmth arid light that the sun has shed on the vineyards are reproduced in the glass, where this clear, straw-yellow wine has a pleasantly sweet taste that is very well-balanced and features honey and just-picked grapes.

name: Shumi  Kisi Dry Amber
desc_en_short: This wine has a nose of apricot and juniper berry. It is full in the mouth, with chewy tannins and flavors of grapefruit, guava and vanilla that persist into a grippy finish.

name: Chateau d'Esclans  Whispering Angel Rose
style: Grenache, Rolle, Cinsault, Syrah, And Mourvedre
desc_en_short: 90 points in Wine spectator. A Beautiful colour, the palest of pale roses, a silver-pink, lovely fragrance on the nose, clean and fresh light summer fruits, a certain fleshiness and structure on the palate that shows the red grapes base, quite firm texture and fine dry finish, very clear and clean and will gain flavours during the year, while retaining fragrance and freshness.

name: Chamdeville  Pinot Noir Rose
desc_en_short: Only wines of one vintage from the grape variety Pinot Noir are carefully selected and fermentated to a fresh and elegant sparkling wine with it´s typical varietal taste.

name: Don Luciano  pink moscato
desc_en_short: This fine sparkling presents an intense aroma of fresh berries and tropical fruits with hints of white flower petals. Delicate bubbles caress the palate offering a silky and pleasant sweetness well balanced by a crisp, refreshing finish.

name: Domaine L'Ostal Cazes  Rose
desc_en_short: The colour is very pale. The very complex, tremendously delicate noseis a subtle blend of rose petal and pomegranate. In the mouth, the attack is supple, light and fresh. Pairing with BBQ, cold meats, Chinese, salads, Shellfish.

name: Zeni  Bardolino Chiaretto Classico DOC
desc_en_short: Color is  pink fruity and elegant, with clean scents of roses and violets, Taste fresh, delicate, fruity and lively, Food pairing of wine Recommended with light starters, fish, white meat, seafood risotto, fresh pasta

name: Monsoon Valley  White Shiraz (Shiraz Rose)
desc_en_short: What an honor! Monsoon Valley White Shiraz vintage 2017 has been selected the best rosé wine in Best Rosé in Thailand 2018 by James Suckling with 92 points. It bested rosé wines from around the world. Not only that, Monsoon Valley White Shiraz has also received Best of Show, Best Value and No.1 Top 10 awards.

name: Viu Manent  Reserva Rose Malbec
desc_en_short: A bright, striking intense purplish-pink in color, with an intense nose featuring fresh fruit, particularly raspberries, strawberries, and floral notes that recall colored roses. The palate is fresh, juicy, intense, silky, and very easy to drink.

name: Domaines Ott  By Ott Rose
wine_color: Pale and pretty in crystal-clear pink with orange undertones.
desc_en_short: Pale and pretty in crystal-clear pink with orange undertones. The nose is delicate and fruity with notes of white peach and apricot mixed with passion fruit and mango. The taste is full, fresh and crisp with echoes of the fruity aroma amplified by citrus zest and sweet spices (cinnamon and cardamom).

name: Chateau Paradis  AOP Coteaux D'Aix En Provence
desc_en_short: Intense rose. Rich and intense, offers a blend of white pulp fruit and flowers with subtle spicy notes. Well balanced and generous, perfect mix of roundness and freshness with a long fruity finish. Pairing with Green olive Tapenade with parmesan cheese biscuit

name: De Bortoli  DB Family Selection Rose
desc_en_short: Lifted berries and cream with a nuance of spice, this Rosé is soft and generous yet restrained with a fine acid and lovely textural finish.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Syrah Rose (VDF D'OC)
wine_color: Brilliant appearance with a lovely rose colour.
desc_en_short: Brilliant appearance with a lovely rose colour. Intense and fine white fruit aromas of peach livened up with notes of citrus fruits. Enticing in the mouth, tender, generous with an incredible freshness and a round finish.

name: Granmonte  Sakuna Rose
desc_en_short: This wine is lively and refreshing. It shows confectionary nose of raspberry lollies, strawberries, fresh pineapple and nuance of cream. It is youthful with a touch of natural sweetness balanced by refreshing acidity. The wine has an attractive silky palate with long lingering finish. Sakuna rosé is perfect for apéritif and a great complement to flavourful Thai cuisine such as papaya salad, spicy soups, jungle curry and other coconut-based curries

name: Donnafugata  Rosa Dolce & Gabbana
desc_en_short:
The pleasure of the family that meets at the dining table and the conviviality that survives even in this delicate moment: Dolce&Gabbana and Donnafugata renew their collaboration by giving life to Rosa, a new rosé wine with a fruity and floral personality. A message of common positivity and rebirth, starting from its roots: Sicily.

Love for their native land, attention to detail and craftsmanship: united by the desire to make the colours, scents and history of Sicilian culture known to every corner of the world, these two excellences of Made in Italy strengthen their partnership in the name of the tradition and expertise of the Bel Paese.

name: Chateau d'Esclans  The Pale Rose By Sacha Lichine
desc_en_short: Once again Sacha Lichine owner of Chateau d'Esclans and founder of Whispering Angel produces the goods with this extraordinary good value rosé. An expressive, aromatic, elegant blend of Grenache, Cinsault and Syrah grapes that grow parallel to the Mediterranean coast where their salty, sun-drenched soils give the wine a dry yet fruity character.

name: Banrock Station  Pink Moscato
desc_en_short:
This Pink Moscato displays fresh, floral aromatic notes with a touch of sherbet. The
palate exhibits a delicate fairy floss character and red grapefruit spice. The natural fruit
sweetness is balanced with the fresh acid finish.

name: Vigneti del Salento  I Muri` Negroamaro
desc_en_short: Ruby red with purple hues. This wine is intense with notes of black berries (blackcurrants and berries). It is medium bodied, velvety, with good balance. It has savoury notes on the long, fresh finish.

name: Carta Vieja  Limited Release Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Intense red cherry color. Aromas of red fruits with vanilla and coffee notes. In the palate, it has a firm structure, with flavors of blackberries, blueberries and cassis mixed with delicate toasted notes of its barrel aging. Long and fruity aftertaste.

name: Noble Vines "337" Lodi  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Aromas of black cherry, ripe currant and lightly roasted coffee. Supple tannins and balanced acidity support core flavors of black cherry and blackberry intertwined with sweet herbs and accents of black pepper spice. Can be enjoyed on its own or with pork loin stuffed with spinach and herbs, grilled baby back ribs, or roasted chicken with spicy Italian sausage.

name: Rawson's Retreat  Shiraz & Cabernet
desc_en_short: Deep red, bright with good depth of color, Cinnamon spice, mocha and dark fruits, Ripe fresh raspberries, blueberries and blackcurrant, balanced with soft tannins, Fresh coffee bean flavors.

name: Rawson's Retreat  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองสัมผัสความเข้มข้นของ Rawson's Retreat Cabernet Sauvignon

name: Santa Helena  Varietal Merlot
desc_en_short: "The magic of chilean wines" Intense red with violet tones. Fresh black fruit, such as blackberries in aromas. Balanced and medium-bodied, pleasant finish. Very gentle tannins, a very friendly, drinkable wine.

name: Carta Vieja  Cabernet Sauvignon (375 ml)
wine_color: Attractive red color with soft purplish tones.
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Attractive red color with soft purplish tones. Fruity and typical nose of this variety. Black cherries and berries aromas are mixed with sweet notes of chocolate and mocha. On the palate, it is balanced and with a velvety texture. Blueberries, cassis and mature blackberries appear, supported by soft and elegant tannins that leave a long and pleasant sensation.

name: Duckhorn  Decoy Merlot
desc_en_short: Duckhorn's Decoy Merlot delivers a lush, fruit-forward expression built on black cherry, blueberry, and plum, framed by dark chocolate, cedar, and a mineral backbone — a polished, accessible take on the varietal from one of California's most celebrated Merlot houses.

name: Duckhorn  Decoy Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 13% Merlot, 4% Zinfandel, 2% Petite Sirah, 2% Syrah, 1% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Duckhorn's Decoy Cabernet Sauvignon is a lush, crowd-pleasing California red built on layers of blackberry, black cherry, and dark chocolate, with refined tannins and a hint of spearmint that keep every sip fresh and satisfying.

name: Lungarotti  San Giorgio
desc_en_short: A wine with ample, solid structure and very intense ruby red with garnet reflections. The aroma releases notes of cassis and bilberry and persistent plum jam, elegant, light oak with a background of cinnamon, cocoa and balsamic notes. The initial flavour is definitely concentrated, dense and fleshy with mature tannins that envelop the mouth with a long-lasting finish.

name: San Polo  Rubio
desc_en_short: Brilliant ruby red with purplish highlights, this wine is intense and persistent, with fresh aromas of cherries, violets and red currants, followed by subtle, spicy nuances. Artfully- structured with balanced tannins and a lingering aromatic finish. The hints of forest fruits and cherries that characterise the varietal make it an easily approachable wine while still rendering it intense and elegant.

name: Baron de Brane  Margaux
desc_en_short: Superb nose very expressive and bursting with fruits.Intense wild strawberries and licorice nose,with a touch of menthol and caramel.Beautiful finesse and aromatic richness.Straightforward in mouth,with firm yet elegant tannins.Long and dense backbone with a very nice volume and a lot of freshness.concentrated aromatic aftertaste with floral and chocolaty notes.Long and powerful finish,remarkable tannic structure.A sexy and powerful wine!

name: Castello Banfi  Brunello di Montalcino DOCG
wine_color: Intense ruby red with garnet reflections.
desc_en_short:
WINEMAKER’S NOTES

A "classic" of our production, this Brunello di Montalcino is obtained with clones of Sangiovese selected after 20 years of research on this unique grape and is aged in French oak barrels of 350 lt as well as in 60-120 hl Slavonian barrels. The most aristocratic combination of Montalcino tradition with winemaking modernity.

PRODUCTION TECHNIQUE

The meticulous grape selection (yield not exceeding 6 metric tons/ha) is followed by vinification in temperature-controlled Horizon hybrid stainless steel & wood tanks, with skin contact for 10-12 days. The wine ages for 2 years in various sizes oak barrels, 350-liter barriques, and 60- and 120 hl barrels; the wine is subsequently aged in bottle for an additional 8-12 months before release.

name: Castello Banfi  Col Di Sasso
desc_en_short: One of the best known and appreciated Banfi labels in the world, Col di Sasso, which translates to "Stony Hill", is a blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Sangiovese cultivated on the most rocky and impervious slopes of the Banfi estate in Montalcino. The perfect marriage between these two grapes gives birth to a youthful yet concentrated and extremely fruity red wine.

name: Fleur de France  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Ruby Red Colour On The Eye
desc_en_short: This wine has a ruby red colour on the eye, with an attractive nose full of red fruit and spicy aromas. In the mouth it opens strongly with velvety tannins. Food Matching with red meat, game and cheese, original Asian dishes.

name: Inspired Company  Shiraz Cabernet
desc_en_short: Deep purple with crimson hues. This wine shows aromas of dark berry fruits and cracked black pepper. full bodied on the palate displays black current and spicy peppery flavours supported within a soft tannin structure.

name: Michel Lynch  Medoc Reserve Red
desc_en_short: Fresh with an intense colour, Michel Lynch Reserve Red displays savoury black cherry and mocha aromas that dominate the palate, leading to a fine full-bodied finish full of gentle tannins.

name: Michel Lynch  Bordeaux Rouge
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลิ้มลอง Bordeaux Rouge ที่ให้รสผลไม้สุกและเครื่องเทศในความสมดุล

name: Sunnycliff  Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: The palate shows abundant varietal flavours from both Shiraz and Cabernet Sauvignon. A delicious blend of dark berry fruit aromas including blueberry and blackcurrant. There is a subtle hint of oak and spice. This full bodied wine is an ideal accompaniment for red meat or spicy Italian dishes.

name: Sunnycliff  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Rich and juicy with blueberry characters and well-balanced oak. The palate shows good structure with medium tannins and a lingering finish.

name: Zonin  Chianti DOCG
wine_color: Bright ruby-red color of an attractive intensity.
desc_en_short: Bright ruby-red color of an attractive intensity. In its youth, it is richly marked by violet reflections that tend to become garnet with age. Characteristically intense,fine and elegant and distinguished by an elegant scent of violets and tenuous perfumes of wild berries. Dry, full, properly balanced and extremely enticing with lingering acidity and flavors of cherry and spice.

name: Banrock Station  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Banrock Station Shiraz from South Australia's Riverland delivers ripe plum and raspberry fruit layered with black pepper, aniseed spice, and a touch of vanilla oak — an approachable, medium-bodied red with genuine everyday charm and an environmental conscience behind every bottle.

wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: Hardys Varietal Range Cabernet Sauvignon delivers classic Australian richness in a bold, approachable style — dark berry fruit, a hint of oak, and firm but friendly tannins that make it an everyday crowd-pleaser equally at home on a weeknight table or around a weekend barbecue.

wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: สัมผัสไวน์เบลนด์ผสมชิราซและแคบอร์เนต์จาก Hardys Stamp

name: Hardys  Stamp Cabernet/Merlot
wine_color: Medium  Purple / Red With Light Purple Hues
desc_en_short: Our Stamp Cabernet Merlot is a medium-bodied wine, exhibiting great flavours of blackcurrant and dark cherry, complemented by the sweetness and complexity of subtle oak. Perfect with spicy beef or soft cheeses.

name: Robert Mondavi   Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 8% Merlot, 7% Petit Verdot, 3% Cabernet Franc, 1% Malbec
desc_en_short: Fruit for our Napa Valley Cabernet comes from sub-appellations throughout the Valley, each of which have been specially chosen for their contributions to a combined blend that is a true reflection of place, a gorgeous expression of Napa Valley.  Nearly half of this year’s blend is sourced from the deep, well-drained soils of Oakville, which give us gorgeously dark, supple wines framed by fine tannin. Complementary portions of the blend come from Stags Leap District, Oak Knoll, Yountville and Rutherford.

name: Robert Mondavi   Private Selection Vint Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Cabernet Sauvignon delivers classic California character with ripe blackberry and plum fruit, a touch of warming spice, and oak-aged depth — an approachable, full-bodied red that punches well above its everyday price point.

name: Robert Mondavi   Private Selection Vint Merlot
desc_en_short: A plush, fruit-forward California Merlot from Robert Mondavi's Private Selection range, drawing on Central Coast grapes to deliver ripe dark cherry, plum jam, and mocha notes over silky, well-rounded tannins — an everyday red that punches well above its price.

name: Robert Mondavi   Private Selection Vint Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Classic varietal aromas and flavors in our Pinot Noir grapes, this vivacious red wine’s hallmark is fresh, vibrant fruit. On the nose, lovely rose petal, strawberry, and sour cherry aromas mingle with complementary scents of smoky oak. Soft and round with good length and richness on the palate, enjoy this delectable Pinot Noir with grilled salmon, herb-roasted chicken, baked ham, or lighter pork dishes.

name: Robert Mondavi   Woodbridge Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 13% Syrah, 5% Petite Sirah, 2% Petit Verdot,1% Merlot And 3% Other Complementary Varieties.
desc_en_short: Robert Mondavi Woodbridge Cabernet Sauvignon delivers generous aromas of plum and cedar with deep blackberry and tobacco flavors, rounded out by smooth oak-aged tannins — an approachable, food-friendly California red built for everyday enjoyment.

name: Montes  Alpha Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองลิ้มรสแคบอร์เนต์เข้มข้นจาก Montes Alpha ที่มาจากชิลี

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Escudo Rojo Gran Reserva - Blend
wine_color: An intense, glittering crimson with a purple tint.
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Carmenère, Syrah
desc_en_short: Escudo Rojo Gran Reserva is a blended wine made from four different grape varieties. Cabernet Sauvignon (40%) and Cabernet Franc (2%), traditonal Bordeaux varieties, give refinement and tannic power, while Carmenere (38%) and Syrah (20%) bring body, density and a touch of spice.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mapu Reserva Merlot
desc_en_short: The Mapu range is made by Baron Philippe de Rothschild in Chile. Intense red violet. Very spicy nose of roasted green pepper, macerated cherries and raspberries, snuff and black chocolate. Its medium acidity, tannin something sour and spicy. Enjoy drinks with red meat, Chilean cuisine.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Reserve Graves Rouge
desc_en_short: A deep, dark ruby with attractive highlights, has a refined, nicely open nose that reveals aromas of morello cherry, vine peach and violet mingled with the flinty, mineral notes typical of the appellation. Substantial on the palate, it has good body and a very gentle tannic structure, its elegant and stylish tannins perfectly enfolded in a wash of flavour characterised by juicy fresh fruit, nectarine and a touch of liquorice. The expansive, rich and well-balanced finish displays fine length and considerable character.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Reserve Medoc
desc_en_short: An intense garnet red. The complex nose opens on fresh fruit and refined spice aromas, going on to develop toasted notes and a hint of blackcurrant. Fruit From a fruit-driven, smooth and powerful attack, the mid-palate reveals powerful, perfectly controlled tannins. The very long finish, typical of a Médoc, concludes a complex and harmonious wine with very good ageing potential.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Bordeaux Rouge
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)

สัมผัสรสแคบอร์เนต์ที่เข้มและสมดุลจาก Frontera

name: Argento  Estate Bottle Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A wine of Argentina By Argento Brand.Made from Cabernet Sauvignon grape.A vibrant and fresh Cabernet with notes of dark cherry, plum, cassis and truffles.

name: Argento  Malbec
desc_en_short: Argento Malbec from Mendoza delivers a deep violet pour bursting with blackberry, plum, and black currant, layered with chocolate, sweet spice, and a whisper of vanilla from oak ageing — all wrapped up in a long, velvety finish.

name: Carpineto  Dogajolo Sangiovese & Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Deep garnet color with violet reflections. Very fruity and intense, with hints of cherry, coffee, vanilla and spice. Full, soft on the palate, complex, well developed. Food matching with Grilled meats, cold cuts and Tuscan regional food.

name: Catena Zapata  Alamos Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: From Catena Zapata's accessible Alamos label, this Mendoza Cabernet Sauvignon delivers ripe red currant and cassis, layered with cedar, sweet spice, and a whisper of tobacco — finishing soft and structured with finely grained tannins. Rated 87 points by Wine Advocate.

name: Catena Zapata  Alamos Malbec
desc_en_short: Made by the Catena family, this fantastic Malbec offers bright black cherry aromas with floral notes and a touch of spice. Showing ripe dark berry fruit along with nice spicy notes. The mouthfeel is full yet soft and supple, with black raspberry and currant flavours mingled with notes of sweet spice and a touch of leather. The finish is long and persistent with soft, sweet tannins.

name: Wente Vineyards  Wente Beyer Ranch Zinfandel
desc_en_short: “Our Beyer Ranch Zinfandel comes from three different estate vineyards in the Livermore Valley. Each vineyard is picked ripe to accentuate the deep jammy fruit flavors, yet the alcohol remains balanced. The wine features all of Zinfandel’s classic aromatics and full body.” - Karl D. Wente, Fifth Generation Winemaker

name: Wente Vineyards  Wente Southern Hill Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: “With fruit sourced from our estate vineyards, our Southern Hills Cabernet Sauvignon is expressive of the Livermore Valley. The fruit comes from the valley floor and southern hills of Livermore Valley with its gravelly alluvial fans. Our soil and climate help to give us a Cabernet that is rich in flavor with an appealing structure.” - Karl D. Wente, Fifth Generation Winemaker

name: Catena Zapata  Catena Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: The Catena wines are a special assemblage of High Mountain Estate Vineyards made by fourth generation vintner, Laura Catena and chief winemaker, Alejandro Vigil. Although we have found that most of the Catena wines are consumed shortly after release, we are pleased to see that they age beautifully for ten to twenty years. Through decades of study and exploration within Mendoza's high altitude mountain terroirs, the Catena family has identified special locations for its Estate vineyards. From the marriage of these historic vineyards emerges a wine of unique character that has natural balance, concentration and a distinct varietal identity.

name: Antinori  Villa Antinori Toscana Rosso IGT
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Villa Antinori Toscana Rosso is the entry-level red from the Antinori house — a smooth, fruit-forward Sangiovese blend that embodies the character of Tuscany in an accessible, everyday style with bright cherry, plum, and spice.

name: Antinori  Chianti Classico "Peppoli" DOC
flavor_tags: Dried Herbs, Tobacco, Cherry, Earthy, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Peppoli is one of the most celebrated Chianti Classico estates, now managed by the Antinori family. This Sangiovese-dominant blend delivers the hallmark character of the appellation — sour cherry, dried herbs, and earthy depth — with an open, generous texture.

name: Antinori  Tignanello IGT
flavor_tags: Blackcurrant, Dark Fruit, Graphite, Mineral, Leather, Tobacco, Cherry, Violet, Cedar, Plum
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Tignanello is one of Italy's most iconic Super Tuscans, crafted by the legendary Antinori family from their Santa Cristina estate in Chianti Classico. A bold Sangiovese-led blend with Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc, it pioneered the use of non-traditional varieties and French barriques in Tuscany.

name: "Tormaresca" By Antinori  Torcicoda Salento IGT
flavor_tags: Blackberry, Chocolate, Cinnamon, Leather, Cocoa, Plum, Game, Fig, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Torcicoda is Tormaresca's flagship Primitivo — a rich, full-bodied southern Italian red bursting with dark plum, blackberry, chocolate, and warm spice, crafted from old-vine Primitivo grown in the sun-baked soils of the Salento peninsula.

name: Vigneti del Salento  `I Muri` Primitivo Puglia
wine_color: Deep ruby red colour with violet reflections.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red colour with violet reflections. This wine has red berry fruit perfumes with a hint of spice. Full-bodied with firm tannins, this wine is well balanced with lots of ripe fruit flavours.

name: Vigneti del Salento  "ZOLLA" Primitivo Merlot Puglia IGP
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลิ้มลองเบลนด์อิตาเลียนผสม Primitivo และเมอร์โลจาก Vigneti del Salento

name: Mastrojanni  Rosso di Montalcino DOCG
wine_color: Bright ruby red with purple streaks, nicely intense and vivacious.
desc_en_short: Bright ruby red with purple streaks, nicely intense and vivacious. Characterised by an intriguing youthful classicism, featuring fragrant and juicy sour cherry. An intense entry with a pleasantly tannic and savoury ending on the palate. Pair with: all courses of a meal, the perfect enhancement for grilled red meats.

name: Santa Helena  Siglo de Oro Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Wine flavor marked by sweet notes of vanilla combined with fruit. It has an intense and persistent aftertaste, in which one perceives the taste of blackberries and cherries, contrasted with delicate minty background. Beautiful red, deep and intense color. pairing duck, lamb and beef stroganoff. Serve between 15 and 17 º C

name: Santa Helena  Varietal Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Dark ruby red color. Very intense Cabernet, with berries, cherry and blackcurrant notes, perfectly blended with soft notes of vainilla and chocolate. Fresh in palate, with good acidity, improving the fruit taste. Soft tannins and a very pleasant and round finish.

name: Chateaux Cantemerle  Haut Medoc
desc_en_short: The 2021 is 65% Cabernet Sauvignon, 21% Merlot, 9% Cabernet Franc, 5% Petit Verdot with maturation in 40% new oak. Mid ruby colour. This is crunchy, cool and fresh with blackcurrant leaf, red berries and cedar. The palate is leafy and cool, full of savoury tones and bell pepper. There is a hint of toast, cedar and dried tobacco together with green tea. The fresh red fruit lingers with chalky tannins on the finish in this compact, cool wine that will appeal to classic claret lovers.

name: Velenosi  Montepulciano D' Abruzzo The Year of the Rabbit
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองสัมผัส Montepulciano ที่มีความลึกจาก Velenosi

name: Vigneti Di Zabu  Nero D' Avola Sicilia IGT
wine_color: Ruby red, intense with purplish highlights.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red in colour. Fresh and unoaked, the plummy flavours of this wine are preseved by the wine-making. A soft, supple wine made in a modern style.

name: Allegrini  Palazzo della Torre IGT
desc_en_short: This is one of the wines that has made Allegrini famous throughout the world. The vineyard surrounds Villa della Torre, a splendid masterpiece of Renaissance architecture now owned by the family, and produces a full-bodied red wine that has an ageing potential of at least ten years. The blend is the historic combination of Corvina and Rondinella with the addition of a small quantity of Sangiovese. A small percentage of the harvested grapes are left to dry out until December and then added to the previously vinified fresh grapes. The result is a velvety, well-balanced red wine that proffers mature, pulpy fruit.

name: Antinori  Villa Antinori Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG
flavor_tags: Scrubland, Truffle, Leather, Tobacco, Cherry, Cedar, Plum, Rose, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Villa Antinori Chianti Classico Riserva is one of the historic wines from Tuscany's most famous dynasty — a concentrated, structured Sangiovese from the heartland of Chianti Classico, aged to develop complexity while maintaining the grape's vivid cherry-fruit character.

name: Bodegas Salentein  Portillo Malbec
wine_color: Ruby-Red Wine With Very Intense Purplish Tints
desc_en_short: Portillo Malbec from Bodegas Salentein delivers classic Mendoza fruit — ripe red and black berries laced with warming spice — wrapped in soft, silky tannins and a generous, crowd-pleasing finish that punches well above its entry-level price point.

name: Errazuriz  Estate Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A classic Chilean Cabernet Sauvignon from Errazuriz, sourcing grapes across the prestigious Maipo and Aconcagua valleys to deliver ripe cherry fruit, tobacco spice, and a well-structured palate with satisfying juiciness and smooth, medium tannins.

name: Errazuriz  Estate Reserva Carmenere
wine_color: A deep red-coloured wine with violet tones
desc_en_short: "Inky purple. Pungent black and blue fruits on the powerfully scented, smoke-tinged nose. Broad, sweet and fleshy, offering intense black and blue fruit flavors and a musky licorice nuance. A peppery note adds lift and bite to the youthfully tannic finish, which lingers with very good smoky persistence. I'll bet that I'd have called this a Syrah in a blind tasting."

name: Marques De Riscal  Reserva, DOC Rioja
desc_en_short: One of Rioja's most storied names, Marqués de Riscal Reserva blends Tempranillo with Graciano and Mazuelo for a classically structured red brimming with dark berry fruit, balsamic spice, and the signature elegance of long oak aging.

name: Torres  Mas La Plana
desc_en_short: It is more than three decades since this mysterious Spanish wine was born. The label: Black. The bottle: Burgundy style. The variety: Cabernet Sauvignon. Few had much faith in this project. Certainly, nobody back in 1979, could have dreamed that it would triumph in a Parisian blind tasting against some of the world's most famous wines. Yet it marked the start of a new era in wine making: a time in which to stop dreaming and embark on a new journey, year after year, harvest after harvest.

name: Torres  Celeste Ribera Del Duero
desc_en_short: Intense blackberry colour. Spicy and intense nose, with liquorice and black pepper hints on a base of well ripened fruits (blackberry and cherry). On the palate, very fruity at first with ripened tannins, also persistent and full bodied.

name: Zonin  Lambrusco
desc_en_short: Light, fresh, fruity and simply enjoyable. Lambrusco shows all those classic flavours of super ripe cherry, raspberry and strawberry with lovely palate desity.

name: Masseria Altemura  Sasseo Primitivo
desc_en_short:
Sasseo Primitivo is rich, velvety, and fruit-forward, with flavors of black cherry, plum, blackberry, and hints of dark chocolate, vanilla, and exotic spice from oak aging.

This is a wine for those who enjoy power with finesse—perfectly suited for grilled meats, robust pastas, or sipping on its own in cool evening air.

name: Springfield Estate  The Work of Time
style: Merlot, 31% Cabrnet Franc, 25% Cabernet Sauvignon,  14% Petit Verdot
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: It was our desire to produce a Bordeaux Blend and so we planted the classic varieties of Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot and Petit Verdot. These vines were planted on carefully selected sites and took 9 years to reach a level of maturity which we felt comfortable to use for the maiden vintage (2001). The grapes were fermented whole with native yeasts (true to our ancient custom) and left for 5 weeks on their skins. A slow 2 years of barrel maturation followed and a further 4 years of bottle maturation. Finally, we released this wine rich, classic and complex from age – of vines and wine. This long wait, justified only by our passion, does bear fruit. It’s called-“The Work of Time”.

name: Wolf Blass  Eaglehawk Shiraz
wine_color: Deep purple (ม่วงเข้ม)

name: Wolf Blass  Bilyara Shiraz
desc_en_short: Soft and approachable, this fruit-driven Shiraz has a lifted nose of berries, cherries, spiced fruit and subtle oak. The palate is medium-bodied, rich with berry flavours and has a soft, lengthy finish. Equally enjoyable by itself or matched with food.

name: Beringer  Founders Estate Merlot
desc_en_short: Hints of plum and brown spice on the nose compliment the boysenberry, blackberry and blueberry finish on the palate. It's well-balanced, soft tannins make this wine a perfect accompaniment to a variety of foods, such as grilled meats or hearty vegetable dishes.

name: Two Oceans  Shiraz
wine_color: A deep ruby red colou shows this delighful shiraz.
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

A deep ruby red colou shows this delighful shiraz. On the nose there is an abundance of prunes and cherries with a smokey background. On the palate you get an intense ripe berry flavour and spicy peppery nunances with a lingering aftertaste and soft tannins.

name: Continuum 2019
wine_color: A dense purple robe and vibrant violet rim.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 37% Cabernet Franc, 7% Petit Verdot, 6% Merlot
desc_en_short: A landmark Napa Valley Bordeaux blend from the Mondavi family's Sage Mountain Vineyard, the 2019 Continuum showcases a record proportion of Cabernet Franc alongside Cabernet Sauvignon, delivering volcanic mountain-fruit intensity wrapped in silky tannins, dark mulberry, wild herbs, and ferrous minerality.

name: Donnafugata  Mille e Una Notte Contessa Entellina DOC
desc_en_short: Mille e una Notte 2018 is soft and intense, characterized by an ample bouquet with fruity notes combined with balsamic and spicy scents. Donnafugata's flagship red confirms itself as an icon of style and elegance.

name: Donnafugata  Tancredi D&G (Cabernet Sauvignon, Nero  d'Avola, Tannat)
desc_en_short: Inspired by the homonymous character of Il Gattopardo, Tancredi stands out with a packaging that combines tradition and modernity. Gold, blue and baroque-inspired lines refer to the prestige of the aristocracy, while red, green and geometries evoke the revolutionary values that established themselves in Sicily after the unification of Italy.

name: Donnafugata  Sedàra Sicilia
style: Nero D’avola (The Primary Grape) Along With Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Syrah And Other Grapes
grape_variety: Nero d'Avola, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Syrah
desc_en_short: Donnafugata's Sedàra is a sun-drenched Sicilian red led by Nero d'Avola, offering a vibrant bouquet of cherry and plum with a whisper of black pepper — a soft, well-structured everyday wine that pairs beautifully across the table.

name: Piccini  Chianti Arancio DOCG
desc_en_short: A deep, ruby red with an intense and persistent fragrance of mature red fruit. It’s a well-structured, smooth wine, with soft tannins and distinct notes of red fruit. Food paring with a wide variety of foods, from antipasti and hearty soups to roasts or pizza.

name: Penfolds  Bin 23 Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Penfolds Bin 23 Pinot Noir is a multi-regional cool-climate expression drawing fruit from Tasmania's Tamar Valley, Adelaide Hills, and Henty — delivering generous strawberry, framboise, and subtle herbal complexity matured in the storied Cellar 23 at Magill Estate.

name: Louis Latour  Marsannay Cote de Nuits
desc_en_short: A beautiful ruby color. The nose is floral with notes of peony, iris and clove. The mouth is round and gourmet. This wine reveals blackcurrant and spicy aromas with elegant tannins on the finish.

name: Tommasi  Amarone Della Valpolicella Classico DOC
desc_en_short: Tommasi's Amarone della Valpolicella Classico is a benchmark expression of the appassimento tradition — opulent and deeply structured, with concentrated cherry, dried plum, and dark spice from a renowned multi-generational Valpolicella family estate.

name: Yalumba  Y Series Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Full depth crimson red colour with bright.
desc_en_short: The Yalumba "Y Series" Cabernet Sauvignon has a varietal nose that shows blackberry jam, rhubarb and plum with hints of vanilla. A generous wine that has all the hallmarks of Cabernet Sauvignon. It is medium bodied and has a core of ripe sweet fruit, a juicy mouthfeel and dusty tannins.

name: Mascota Vineyards  La Mascota Malbec
wine_color: An intense purple red colour with ruby hues.
desc_en_short: La Mascota Malbec shows an intense purple red colour with ruby hues. Aromas of black fruits, jam and vanilla, with a subtle licorice touch. Sweet attack and full bodied tannins. Long and pleasant finish. Ideal to match with grilled meats or strong cheeses.

name: Mascota Vineyards  La Mascota Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: A deep red colour with hints of violet.
desc_en_short: La Mascota Cabernet Sauvignon displays a deep red colour with hints of violet. Aromas of licorice, cassis and warm raspberry jam. Elegant touch of roasted pepper and chocolate. Full-bodied, complex and very long aftertaste. Ideal to combine with pasta, red meats or mature soft cheeses.

name: Catena Zapata  Catena Malbec
desc_en_short: Crafted by fourth-generation vintner Laura Catena and winemaker Alejandro Vigil, this Mendoza Malbec draws from high-altitude estate vineyards to deliver a wine of remarkable concentration, natural balance, and distinctly Andean character — equally compelling young or after a decade in the cellar.

name: Catena Zapata  Nicasia Malbec
desc_en_short:
Nicasia Malbec is powerful yet polished, with bold dark fruit flavors like blackberry and blueberry, layered with violets, licorice, and cocoa, framed by elegant French oak. It offers an ideal expression of high-altitude terroir, showcasing balance between natural strength and graceful structure.

This is a benchmark Malbec—worthy of comparison to top wines from Bordeaux or Napa, yet rooted in the soul of the Andes.

name: Lindeman's  Premier Selection Shiraz / Cabernet
wine_color: Medium red in colour with ruby tinges
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

This Lindeman’s Premier Selection Shiraz Cabernet features aromas of blackcurrants and over ripe dates with spiced oak, while the palate is soft and has lashings of dark red berry fruit and savoury oak.

name: Masi  Amarone "Costasera" Classico DOC
desc_en_short:
Proud, majestic, complex and exuberant: this is Masi's gentle giant. A benchmark for the Amarone category, which, together with Barolo and Brunello, makes up the aristocracy of the Italian wine world.

The product of Masi's unrivalled expertise in the appassimento technique, whereby traditional grapes for the Valpolicella Classica area - Corvina, Rondinella and Molinara - are laid out on bamboo racks to concentrate their aromas during the winter months.

name: Masi  Amarone Riserva "Costasera" Classico DOC
desc_en_short:
Proud, majestic, complex and exuberant: this is a special cru version of Masi's gentle giant, Costasera.

A benchmark for the Amarone category, which, together with Barolo and Brunello, makes up the aristocracy of the Italian wine world. 

Here Masi's unrivalled expertise in the Appassimento technique is used to give the grapes a long period of further ripening on bamboo racks and an ageing period for the wine of at least three years in casks made from the finest wood types. 

The expert use of indigenous grapes for the Valpolicella Classica area - Corvina, Rondinella and Molinara - is enriched by the addition of the unique Oseleta, a grape variety rediscovered by Masi.

name: Chateau Bel-Air  Pomerol
desc_en_short: From clay-rich gravels located downslope from Trotanoy, the 2019 Bel-Air opens in the glass with aromas of dark berry and cassis fruit mingled with spices and creamy new oak. Medium to full-bodied, layered and powdery, it's a fleshy, succulent wine that concludes with a kirsch-inflected finish.

name: Joseph Drouhin  Laforet Bourgogne Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: "A seductive wine. Yum! it smells of red fruits: rapberries, redcurrants, blackcurrants... After that, in the mouth, lovely spicy notes. And the silky touch, pure joy!".

name: Joseph Drouhin  Volnay
desc_en_short: Joseph Drouhin's Volnay is a benchmark expression of Côte de Beaune elegance — silky Pinot Noir from marl-limestone soils delivering violet, blackcurrant, and gentle spice in a wine prized for its velvety texture and refined, long-lingering finish.

name: Joseph Drouhin  Corton Grand Cru
desc_en_short: "Its colour is rather deep, its nose powerful and verging on candied fruit and spices when maturing. It has good structure in the mouth, without harshness. A good Corton must have "gras" (a velvety texture) to counterbalance tannin and acidity. On the palate, it recalls the candied fruit present in the nose. Very long and persistent, it ends on a very complex note".

name: Joseph Drouhin  Cote De Nuits Villages
desc_en_short: "A delicious red Burgundy, with harmonious flavours. Bright ruby colour. On the nose, intense aromas of wild cherry, liquorice and mild spices, evolving towards notes of undergrowth and mushroom. On the palate, excellent balance between tannin, acidity and "gras" (velvety texture). The aftertaste is reminiscent of little red berries".

name: Louis Latour  Cote de Nuits-Villages (375 ml)
desc_en_short: As an intense colour of glinting garnet. It reveals a very fresh aroma and offers a fragrance of fruits such as raspberries and blackberries with nuances of chocolate. In the mouth, it is an ample and lively wine with a blackcurrant finish. It has a real length in the mouth.

name: Marques De Riscal  Reserva Rioja DOC (375 ml)
desc_en_short: A historic Rioja Reserva from Marqués de Riscal, blending 90% Tempranillo with Graciano and Mazuelo for a full-bodied red layered with dark berries, balsamic spice, and elegantly rounded tannins — classic Spanish craftsmanship in a convenient half-bottle format.

name: Matua  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Dark plum red in color, the nose of this wine is packed with dark cherries and wild thyme aromas. The palate is soft and luscious, overflowing with sweet fruit. Ripe tannins offer suppleness to the palate, well-balanced by a lingering savory finish. Perfect with spicy Asian dishes or pizza.

name: Sutter Home  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This medium-bodied wine has no agenda other than inviting you to partake in its rich cherry flavors and toasty vanilla touches of goodness. Enjoy this wine immediately, accompanying chicken dishes, red meats, game, and mildly seasoned pastas.

name: Michel Lynch  Nature Merlot Bordeaux "Organic" AOC
wine_color: Deep red colour with purple hues.
desc_en_short: Deep red colour with purple hues. Fruit-forward aromas of blackcurrant, black cherry and hints of violet. Supple and round on the attack, this wine displays an attractive concentration with silky smooth tannins and a nice and flavourful finish. Enjoy with hearty pasta dishes, grilled salmon, veal, pork and beef.

name: Clarendelle  Rouge Inspired by Haut-Brion AOC
desc_en_short: The wine has a deep, brilliant, intense red colour. The bouquet is complex and fruity, with blackberry and blackcurrant overtones. The tannin is firm, but elegant. There is also great acidity, which contributes freshness and elegance. Furthermore, the wine has a long, powerful aftertaste and a beautiful finish.

name: Rocca Di Frassinello  Ornello DOC
desc_en_short: The “Maremma cowboy”, a symbol of elegance and strength typical of the earth of Maremma. Still today Ornello is the name of the lance wood used to move the cattle. The only one blended with Syrah. Balsamic notes and roasted coffee at the nose and a full and rich wine with a nice elegance and freshness, typical of Rocca di Frassinello style.

name: Cordero Di Montezemolo  Langhe Nebbiolo DOC
desc_en_short: From one of Barolo's most respected estates, this Langhe Nebbiolo from Cordero di Montezemolo delivers the signature charm of Piedmont's noble grape — vibrant raspberry and violet aromas, fresh acidity, and supple tannins in an approachable, food-friendly style.

name: Cristo Di Campobello  Lusira DOC
desc_en_short: Ruby Red impenetrable. On the nose intense aromas of ripe berries, cocoa and coffee, rhubarb, leather and Mediterranean scrub. Slightly spicy. On the palate soft and mellow, rich, with elegant tannins.

name: Castellare Di Castellina  Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG
wine_color: Typical ruby red colour, which has a tendency to become garnet red as the wine ages.
desc_en_short:
Chianti Classico Riserva

Only native vines, without Cabernet or Merlot, to maintain the most typical formula of the most famous Italian wine, without following the trend that see the use of wines from the South to modify the beautiful ruby red typical of the Sangioveto with red-black hues. A wine which with its typical characteristics strives to achieve maximum elegance.

name: Terrazas  Reserva Malbec
wine_color: Deep purple colour with dark red hues with ripe fruits
desc_en_short:
92 points in James Suckling "A young malbec that shows blackberry, flowers and minerals. Full body, fresh acidity and a bright, focused finish that's subtle and savory. Drink or hold."

89 points in Wine Enthusiast "Strapping currant and berry aromas come with a full dosage of toasty oak. This Malbec feels sinewy, with good depth. Oaky notes of toast and blackened spice lend a chocolaty essence to berry and plum flavors, while this finishes with an herbal, spicy aftertaste."

name: Terrazas  Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Elegant deep red with black highlights in the glass
desc_en_short: 91 points in James Suckling "Aromas of blackberry, spice and terracotta. Full body, with hints of sweet tobacco, currant and dust. Juicy and flavorful. A complete cabernet sauvignon for the money. Drink now or hold."

name: Echeverria  Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
Bright red with purple hues. A round and vibrant Cabernet Sauvignon with plum and strawberry flavours combined with hints of red pepper and spices. The palate is smooth and well balanced, with a fruity and long lasting finish.

Sustainable Winery

ISO 9001-HACCP

name: Echeverria  Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Bright ruby red with purple hues.
desc_en_short: Echeverría Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon is a sustainably produced Chilean red delivering vivid aromas of dark berries, coffee, and tobacco on a round, full-bodied palate with high tannins and a long, satisfying finish.

name: Echeverria  Founder's Selection
wine_color: Ruby red with deep amber gleams.
desc_en_short:
Ruby red with deep amber gleams. Cherries, plums, strawberries and blackberries combine nicely with eucalyptus and menthol aromas. A fulfilling and soft palate with black pepper and bitter chocolate flavours create a well balanced wine, owner of a distinctive personality.

Sustainable Winery

ISO 9001-HACCP

name: Chateau Labarthe Bordeaux
desc_en_short: Deep ruby colour, this wine offers a nose with complex aromas of red fruits, mingled with toasted and roasted notes. The elegant mouth is based on silky but also thick tannins.The final turns to be fresh and aromatic.

name: Feudo Maccari  Saia
desc_en_short:
Saia is bold yet balanced, showcasing black cherry, plum, cocoa, and tobacco leaf, framed by silky tannins and a mineral-driven freshness. The oak aging is well-integrated, giving a polished structure while preserving the earthy and sun-kissed nature of the grape.

Ideal for pairing with grilled meats, roasted vegetables, or aged cheeses, this wine offers a Mediterranean expression that’s both robust and refined.

name: Massolino  Barolo DOCG
desc_en_short: 95 points in Wine Spectator - "A stream of pure, juicy cherry fruit is at the heart of this red, along with mineral, tobacco and wild herb notes. Firm and tightly wound, with a matrix of dense, refined tannins for support. All the elements are in the right proportions, this just needs time."

name: Tedeschi  Amarone Della Valpolicella Classico Riserva Capitel Monte Olmi
wine_color: Strong ruby red. Clear and transparent.
desc_en_short:
CAPITEL MONTE OLMI – Amarone della Valpolicella DOC Classico Riserva

Monte Olmi is the name of this vineyard, located at Pedemonte di Valpolicella in the heart of Valpolicella Classica. The vineyard has a south-western exposure and is 2.5 hectares in size. It is laid out on terraces in order to ensure efficient draining in case of abundant rainfall. At the same time, the depth and the clay structure of the terrain serve to retain water during dry period.

name: Zenato  Amarone Riserva Sergio DOCG
wine_color: Deep garnet with violet reflections—dense and intense like blood-red velvet.
desc_en_short:
This wine is a poem written in tannins and time. Zenato Amarone “Sergio” 2018 is a masterful showcase of controlled power, with a tightly woven structure and layers of intensity. It offers deep notes of dried fruit, black cherry, and warm spice, wrapped in a rich, velvety texture.

This is not just a wine to drink—it's a wine to reflect with, to celebrate with, and to remember. It carries the strength of the man who built the estate and the finesse of Veneto’s most noble expression.

name: Zenato  Amarone della Valpolicella Classico DOC
wine_color: Red, becoming garnet red with ageing.
desc_en_short: A regal, important wine with great structure, elegant and velvety. Prized for the method and the sensations it bestows on whoever drinks it. It is produced from grapes cultivated in the classic zone of Valpolicella, in the municipality of S. Ambrogio, a land abounding with significance, tradition and the culture of food and wine.

name: Zenato  Ripassa Valpolicella Superiore DOC
desc_en_short:
A refined and concentrated wine, extremely smooth and velvety, with vibrant red fruit aromas.
On the palate, it delivers fruity notes and elegant tannin with hints of chocolate and spice.
 Ripassa has played a highly important role in the Zenato winery’s evolution over the years.

name: Chateau Fontenil  Fronsac
desc_en_short: The 2016 Fontenil is medium to deep garnet-purple colored and gives up exuberant red cherries, black raspberries, wild blueberries and cinnamon stick scents with hints of wild sage and forest floor. Medium-bodied, refreshing and wonderfully elegant, it has beautiful vibrancy and a perfumed finish.
