name: Dourthe  Grands Terroirs Graves Rouge
desc_en_short: The Graves Grands Terroirs is characterised by elegance and finesse. The wine boasts deep, dark appearance and a delicate red-fruit bouquet. On the palate, it is full bodied and well balanced, with a nice long aromatic finish.

name: Crane Lake  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: A soft, approachable California Pinot Noir from the Franzia family's Crane Lake label, offering aromas of raspberry and violet with flavours of cherry and plum that glide to a velvety, easy-drinking finish.

name: Caymus  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Caymus has a signature style that is dark in color, with rich fruit and ripe, velvety tannins – as approachable in youth as in maturity. We farm Cabernet grapes in eight of Napa’s 16 sub-appellations, with diversification enabling us to make the best possible wine in a given year. Our Cabernet offers layered, lush aromas and flavors, including cocoa, cassis, and ripe dark berries.

name: Caymus  Conundrum Red
desc_en_short: Conundrum' s original began at the dinner table. Charlie Wagner Sr., who co-founded Caymus Vineyards in 1972 with his wife, Lorna, and son, Chuck, would mix wines to find the perfect glass to pair with his meal. No one blended wines back then, so his experiment was pretty radical. They source Conundrum in places that are both famed and off the beaten track – in Napa, Monterey, Santa Barbara, San Benito, Solano and Tulare Counties.

name: Chateau Montelena  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Chateau Montelena's Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is a cool-boned, perfumed red delivering cassis, menthol, and fennel alongside briary earthy minerality — a structured, personality-driven Cab that rewards patience and a proper decant.

name: Duckhorn  Napa Valley Merlot
style: Merlot, 22% Cabernet Sauvignon, .5% Malbec, .5 % Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Duckhorn's Napa Valley Merlot is a benchmark American Merlot — lush and generously textured, weaving Bing cherry, ripe plum, and blueberry with cedar, vanilla, and a long coffee-tinged finish underpinned by polished, full-bodied tannins.

name: Duckhorn  'Goldeneye' Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Goldeneye's flagship Anderson Valley Pinot Noir from Duckhorn delivers layers of fresh raspberry, Bing cherry, and bramble berry, underpinned by silky tannins and whispers of leather, breakfast tea, and baking spice across a long, lingering finish.

name: Francis Coppola  Director's Cut Cinema Red Blend
style: Zinfandel, 39% Cabernet Sauvignon, 5% Petit Sirah, 4% Merlot
desc_en_short: Francis Coppola's Director's Cut Cinema is a bold Sonoma red blend built around Zinfandel and Cabernet Sauvignon, delivering lavish layers of dark berries, spiced plum, toasted oak, and a velvety finish framed by firm, age-worthy tannins.

name: Honig  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This Cabernet is Dark purple. medium-bodied, with aromas and flavors of red cherry, and plum, alongside anise, black tea, vanilla, white pepper and dried herbs. The finish has the perfect balance of bright fruit, elegantly proportioned tannins, and a hint of cocoa powder. Pronounced pungent spice and roasted coffee. Spice cake aromas. med/- tannin. Nice fruit, full, but not over the top.

name: Silver Oak  Cabernet Sauvignon Alexander Valley
desc_en_short: Silver Oak's Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is a California icon — lush with red cherry, blackberry, vanilla, and warm baking spices, offering an elegant, fruit-forward style with remarkable aging potential through 2047.

name: Glaetzer  Bishop
desc_en_short:
Bishop is the family name of Colin's wife' Judith. Fittingly the sign of Venus, a symbol which has come to represent women and feminine energy, is the centrepiece of the Bishop label.

In mythology, the symbol meant the Roman goddess Venus or her Greek equivalent Aphrodite. But the sign has also been linked back to ancient Egypt – a nod to Bishop’s link to Amon-Ra and Anaperenna.

name: Glaetzer  Amon-Ra
desc_en_short: Amon-Ra Shiraz is an iconic wine that epitomises Ben Glaetzer's passion to create wines that are full flavoured, multi layered and intense but still elegant, stylish and finely balanced. This wine is a balanced between the fruit and the tannin extraction. The fruit has such expression that we aim to preserve the caracteristics of the vineyard rather than dominate them. Deep, dark purple in colour. The palate is full bodied and multidimensional. Black fruits with hints of charcoal and graphite sit in equilibrium with balanced savoury tannin.

name: Torbreck  Shiraz Woodcutter's
desc_en_short: This wine reflects the up & coming Shiraz vineyards of the Barossa, rather than the battle hardened old vines which make up the core of our other cuvee’s. Full of dense, savoury fruit, rich and complex wine. A dark cherry, central core of fruit gives way to an intense textural mid palate full of blueberry, cocoa, spice and dark chocolate.

name: Torbreck  The Steading
wine_color: Deep ruby with flickers of violet
desc_en_short: Deep ruby with flickers of violet, its delicate aromas of truffle, five spice and spring flowers are supported by a rich core of licorice, saddle leather and Provencal herbs. Very ‘Burgundian’ in style, the palate is elegant and pure with subtle notes of crushed cherries, earth and cedar all neatly wound by a taut spine of acidity and ripe supple tannins.

name: Torbreck  The Factor
desc_en_short: 98 points in James Suckling. " Dark fruit with iodine, muscle shell and hints of coal on the palate. Full-bodied, very tight and structured with steely tannins that give incredible length and poise. The greatest Factor I have ever tasted. Driven and brilliant. Better after 2021 "

name: Torbreck  Run Rig
desc_en_short:
Aubergine core with a deep purple rim. Aromatics leap from the glass with great finesse and power yet with precision and focus. The lifted plum, black currant and dark cherry along with Turkish delight, star anise, earl grey tea and black olive combine with gorgeous plumes of subtle vanilla pod and cardamom aromas. The palate is dense, firm and powerful yet holdsincredibly balanced fruit intermingled with voluminous structure. One of the better RunRig’s from lower than normal yields. A wine for the cellar best after 2025-2050.
Serve at 16C with delicious rich flavored cuisines.

name: Montgras  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Bright red to purple. On the nose you can feel aromas of blackberries and ripe plums framed by subtle notes of chocolate and vanilla. Medium bodied. Mouth filling, juicy and rich, with ripe red plum and cherry notes and a touch of toast. Goes great with meat pies or a nice weekend barbecue.

name: Montgras  Antu Ninquen Syrah
wine_color: Deep ruby red wiith purple tones.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red wiith purple tones, generous aromas of ripe blackberry, plum, green olives, with touches of vanilla and sweet smoke from the barrel ageing.With a round and juicy feeling in mouth,this wines shows tannins that give it a charming grip in the mouth. Dense black fruit flavours combined with subtle cedar persist until the long and smooth finish.

name: Montgras  Antu Ninquen Cabernet Sauvignon - Carmenere
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red with aromas of black cherry, ripe blackberries and spices, enveloped by elegant notes of vanilla and cedar from the oak ageing. Flavours of black cherry,spicy plum, and blackberry, everything well centred, offering depth and a finish with firm tannins given by the barrel ageing. Balanced and powerful, it has a long finish.

name: Chateau Certan De May  Pomerol 2018
desc_en_short: 96 points in James Suckling - "Very classic style of Pomerol with black olives, blackberries and spices on the nose that follow through to a full body with layers of ultra fine tannins and a long, long finish. What a beautifully crafted red. Try after 2025."

name: Chateau De Pez  Saint-Estèphe 2021
wine_color: A deep color and harmonious composition.
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

The Château de Pez winery remains resolutely faithful to wood. The blend is composed in December, then the wine is stored in barrels (40% new wood, 40% in "Premier vin" casks and 20% in "Deuxième vin" casks) and racked every three months. It is to be noted that the wine undergoes absolutely no filtration. Château de Pez exhibits deep color and harmonious composition. This complete, rich, dense wine merits prolonged ageing. Thanks to the quality of its production, Château de Pez is counted among the most highly reputed crus of the Médoc. Despite all of the surprises, fears and doubts, 2015 turned out to be a remarkable vintage. The growing cycle took place in perfect conditions up until some extremely dry weather in July, leading to worries over low yields. The rain and associated fungal diseases that we usually fear turned out to work for us from mid-July to mid-September, enabling the vine to reach optimum ripeness levels. The wines are distinctive and exceptionally precise yet also dense and restrained. They remind us of the extremely dense yet ethereal Bordeaux’s of the 1980s, with an excellent ageing potential yet able to be enjoyed in their youth.

name: Chateau Carignan  Prima (Premieres Cotes de bordeaux)
wine_color: Intense dark red color and brilliance.
desc_en_short: The nose with notes of toasted, coffee, vanilla and leather evolves on aromas of very ripe black fruits. It is complex and expresses a beautiful diversity of aromas of black fruit. The mouth is rich and structured, perfectly balanced with well-developed tannins and good length

name: Dal Forno Romano  Valpolicella Superiore DOC
desc_en_short: Valpolicella offers hints of blueberry, blackberry, cherry and chocolate which emerge gradually as the wine breathes. The potent tannins, which give structure to this product, are in perfect symbiosis with the velvety aromas of sweet spices and jam which envelop the palate and excite the senses.

name: Pegasus Bay  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Pegasus Bay Pinot Noir from Canterbury, New Zealand, is a beautifully crafted, Burgundian-inspired red vinified with whole berries, natural fermentation, and 18 months in French oak barriques — delivering silky tannins, vibrant red fruit, and genuine depth of character.

name: Felton Road  Pinot Noir Cornish Point
desc_en_short: The aromas are bursting with exuberant ripe plum and black cherry backed up with wafts of fine chocolates and a whole cupboard of complex spices. The mouthfeel is velvety soft and voluptuous, with fleshy fruit over dark chocolate and freshly roasted coffee. A plush, harmonious and expressive wine. Charming and textbook Cornish Point.

name: Ata Rangi  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: A complex wine from the outset with gently reductive notes and modern oak spice threading into fresh cherry, spiced bread, rose, forest wood and blood orange, as well as darker cherry notes. The palate tells the full story. This displays real power and definition with clear-cut and powerful tannins. The intensity of the red-cherry fruit is impressive and the way it occupies the finish with length and uplift is the thing that defines great Pinot Noir per se. Strong vintage.

name: Kanonkop  Kadette
desc_en_short: The wine has a deep ruby, red colour. It shows ripe raspberries, black currant and mocha flavours on the nose and has dark chocolate and blackberry fruit on the palate. This wine has good length with a dry finish and can mature for a further 7-8 years.

name: Kanonkop  Paul Sauer
desc_en_short: Full bodied, deep ruby red colour. A combination of the varietals gives you more than the sum of the parts. Very complex bouquet with black currant, red berry, mocha and spicy flavours. Big structured wine with a refined line of elegance.

name: Kanonkop  Pinotage
desc_en_short: A complex wine with red fruit flavours. Big, elegant and ripe tannin structures. Will over time show more secondary and forest floor characteristics.

name: Kanonkop  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: 90 point by Wine Advocate "The 2014 Cabernet Sauvignon offers a rich nose with a dark-fruited core of blackberries, dark plum, cassis and soft oak spices of cinnamon and nutmeg, with a focused and dusty minerality. Full-bodied on the palate, the wine is packed with juicy and rustic dark fruit and subtle, integrated oak tones that linger through the mid-palate. It's a quality-minded wine with precise, focused balance and a long finish."

name: Castello di Fonterutoli  Castello Fonterutoli Chianti Classico Gran Selezione DOCG
desc_en_short:
The first "Super" Chianti Classico

40 years of research, over 300 meters of altitude gradient, 120 single vineyards, 36 biotypes of Sangiovese of which 18 exclusive to Fonterutoli, 120 individual vinifications and ageing processes, a blend of 50 wines from the best single vineyards: since its conception Castello Fonterutoli represents the real star of Chianti Classico.

name: Luccarelli  Negroamaro Puglia IGP
desc_en_short: Ruby red color with purple hues, intense, vinous, fruity, with notes of black berries (black currants and berries). Medium bodied, velvety, very good, balance between freshness and warm feelings, with a long persistence and savoury.

name: Brotte  La Fiole Cote Du Rhone
desc_en_short: Fruity and spiced bouquet evoking notes of cassis and prune Full body and round. Initially fresh and full, supple and fruity with dominant notes of Small black fruit and liquorice.

name: Mcguigan  Black Label Red
wine_color: Ruby red (รูบี้แดง)
desc_en_short: ลองลิ้มรสเบลนด์แดงที่เข้าถึงได้จากออสเตรเลีย ที่ผสมผสานผลไม้สดและเครื่องเทศอย่างลงตัว

name: Mcguigan  Black Label Merlot
wine_color: Ruby red (รูบี้แดง)
desc_en_short: ลองลิ้มรส Merlot ที่นุ่มนวลจาก McGuigan

name: Mcguigan  Private Bin Shiraz
desc_en_short: McGuigan Private Bin Shiraz delivers classic Australian warmth — dark cherry and plum fruit layered with smoky vanillin and toasty oak, finishing with a satisfying grip of firm tannins that makes it an ideal companion to bold, hearty dishes.

name: Monsoon Valley  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Classic varietal characters of dark plum, cherries, toasted coffee and spices. Medium body is perfected with lovely fruity mid-palate and very ripen tannin. After being aged in oak barrel,the fruits and sweet spicy flavors become more round and leave the good body at the end.

name: Vigneti del Salento  "ZOLLA" Primitivo Di Manduria DOC
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองสัมผัสรส Primitivo จาก ZOLLA" ที่มาจากอิตาลี"""

name: Domaine Laroche  Pinot Noir de la Chevaliere IGT
desc_en_short: Pale ruby colour. The nose displays fresh red fruit with cherry overtone. An elegant and harmonious structure with fine velvety tannins. Enjoy it with salt crust baked chicken, stuffed mushrooms or soft cheese.

name: Signus  Fruit Red Blend (Merlot) (Fruit wine blend)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Full bodied, elegant wine with a fruit from Maule Valley – Single Vineyard. Attractive red colour with violets hints. The nose is very complex, with abundant red and black fruit and some herbal and spicy tones, accompanied by vanilla and coffee notes. Round and well structure mouth. Soft and velvety tannins. Tasty and juicy, good structure and balance.

name: Luccarelli  Campo Marina Primitivo di Manduria DOP
desc_en_short: Luccarelli Campo Marina delivers the sun-drenched soul of Primitivo di Manduria in a bold, fleshy Italian red bursting with black plum, ripe purple fruit, and a generous, warming finish — tailor-made for grilled meats and open-fire feasts.

name: Vesevo  Aglianico del Beneventano IGT
desc_en_short: Vesevo's Aglianico del Beneventano IGT is a southern Italian red from Campania's volcanic heartland, delivering vivid red fruit, warming spice, and a silky-smooth finish that belies Aglianico's typically austere character.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite)  Los Vascos Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: 90 points in Decanter.com (wine-review) - "A fresher and purer style seems to have emerged from this new release, part of the Domaines Barons de Rothschild holdings. It’s vibrant and bold, focused on primary cassis and red cherry fruit and a herbal hint. Silky textured and supple, it’s elegant with lovely depth too."

name: San Marzano  Santoro Primitivo Puglia IGP
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Medium body, elegant and balanced with round tannins and final elegant and silky mouth. Its aftertaste is nice and thin, especially by ripe red fruit notes.

name: Casanova di Neri  Brunello di Montalcino Tenuta Nuova DOCG 2017
wine_color: Deep garnet-ruby, reflecting concentration and maturity.
desc_en_short:
Tenuta Nuova 2017 is a Brunello of both power and grace—crafted from 100% Sangiovese carefully selected from the estate's finest plots.

This wine displays a well-defined character: robust yet refined, intensely flavored yet harmonious. Its structure is firm without harshness, offering remarkable aging potential—easily 20+ years. Ideal for connoisseurs who seek world-class Brunello with both strength and precision.

name: Viu Manent  Estate Collection Reserva Merlot
wine_color: Ruby red (รูบี้แดง)
desc_en_short: ลองลิ้มรส Merlot ที่นุ่มนวลจาก Viu Manent Reserva

name: Viu Manent  Estate Collection Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Ruby red with violet highlights. Very fruity on the nose, with aromas of fresh red fruits such as berries, cassis, and sour cherries that combine with subtle notes of toast and vanilla. Medium-bodied and very nicely balanced on the palate, with firm but mild tannins that lead to a pleasingly balanced finish.

name: Angove  Organic Shiraz Cabernet
desc_en_short: Deep red with inky hues. Aromas of raspberry and red cherries flourish before leading to spicy pepper and soft oak flavours on the palate, with a long yet soft, earthy finish.

name: Chateau La Rose Gadis  Bordeaux Rouge
desc_en_short: This is a serious, structured claret. On the nose, you get vibrant cassis and black cherry notes with juicy black fruits on the palate. There’s a hint of bitter cherry overlaying the generous ripe fruit with supple tannins and a smooth, long finish. Robust enough to enjoy with roasted red meats and rich sauces.

name: Luccarelli  Primitivo Puglia IGP
wine_color: bright ruby red color with violet reflections
desc_en_short: Youthful ruby with purple highlights; black cherry, plum and spice aromas; dry, medium bodied; ripe black fruit flavors with balanced acidity and fresh finish.

name: Wolf Blass  Eaglehawk Merlot
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

A soft and easy-drinking wine with aromas of satsuma plums and ripe black cherries. A rich, generous palate shows off fruit sweetness and spice, with a light to medium body and a smooth, lasting finish.

name: De Bortoli  Sacred Hill Cabernet Merlot
wine_color: Vibrant purple with deep crimson hues.
desc_en_short: A medium bodied wine with aromas of dark fruits and understated oak. A generous palate showing vibrant, rich fruit flavours and soft mouth-coating tannins.

name: Masseria Li Veli  Orion Primitivo IGT
wine_color: Dense ruby red with a purplish rim
desc_en_short: Intense bouquet, ripe and fleshy red fruit aromas, notably chierries followed by spicy notes of cinnamon and nutmeg. Palate is full and soft, long with a unique acidity that makes it fresh and pleasant.

name: Jim Barry  The Lodge Hill Shiraz
wine_color: This wine is a deep red with a bright magenta hue.
desc_en_short: Jim Barry's Lodge Hill Shiraz from Clare Valley is a medium-bodied, fruit-driven red delivering juicy plum, blackberry, and sweet spice with fine powdery tannins — an approachable, expressive Shiraz that punches well above its price point.

name: Wairau River  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Lifted aromas of ripe cherries and spice lead this wine. The palate is soft and generous with delicate primary fruit characters of wild berries shadowed by subtle toasty oak.

name: Kendall Jackson  Vintner's Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Aged 8 months in French (65%) and American (35%) oak barrels for a wine that is rich and round. Artisan winemaking techniques, such as cold soaking and extended maceration were used to enhance and simultaneously soften the tannins, deepen the color and intensify the flavors.

name: Montes Winemaker's Choice  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองสัมผัสรสแคบอร์เนต์จาก Montes Winemaker's Choice ที่มีความลึกซึ้ง

name: Tenuta delle Terre Nere  Etna Rosso Feudo Di Mezzo Il Quadro delle Rose DOC
desc_en_short: Feudo di Mezzo is the largest cru in the appellation, a homogenous character, but with clear qualitative variations – much like one could say of Clos de Vougeot in Burgundy. From the best parcels – such as our “Quadro delle Rose” - it betrays a dusky character, autumnal tones in its cedary-spicy bouquet. Always the fist to be harvested, Feudo di Mezzo is also always the one readiest to open up and generously deliver itself. Of all crus it is supremely silky, its tannins suave, its bouquet darkly debonair. I love it as it ages effortlessly, its crepuscular nature picking up light as it ripens. Poultry, pork, game, lasagne, braised meats.

name: Pio Cesare  Barolo DOCG
desc_en_short: A classic style Barolo. Excellent structure, harmony, elegance. Soft tannins and balanced fruit. Approachable, but with a very long ageing potential. Barolo is such a great wine which should not be described as a “basic” or “regular” Barolo, simply because it does not have any additional indication on the label.

name: Tenuta Lunelli  Carapace Sagrantino
desc_en_short: Ripe black plum, leather, game, truffle, blackberry and tobacco aromas unfold in the glass. These follow through to the rich palate along with black cherry, clove and baking spice. It's structured but elegant, with velvety tannins and a smooth texture.

name: Montes  Alpha Syrah
wine_color: Deep ruby-red with a purplish tone.
desc_en_short: 92 points in Wine Enthusiast - "Deep purple in color, this cool-vintage Syrah excels via smooth cherry, cassis, cedar and charcoal aromas. A full-bodied palate is balanced by firm acidity, while plum, berry, cassis and chocolate flavors finish in harmony. Drink through 2020."

name: Robert Mondavi  The Estate Oakville  Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 6% Cabernet Franc, 6% Petit Verdot, 2% Malbec, 1% Merlot
desc_en_short: The Estates Oakville Cabernet Sauvignon has aromas of blackberry, blueberry, plum, chocolate, nutmeg, and subtle oak with flavors of black plum, blackberry, blueberry, and fine, well-integrated tannins. Juicy with good acidity and a beautiful flow from entry to finish.

name: Au Bon Climat  Santa Barbara County
desc_en_short: This wine is particularly focused and earthy, with a beautifully balanced and integrated acidity. Elegant and complex, this wine has a lovely spice component which becomes ever present while sipping.

name: Little Beauty  Marlborough 'Limited Edition' Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: A seductively aromatic Marlborough Pinot Noir from Little Beauty, layering raspberry, dark cherry, and violet perfume over a silky, medium-ruby palate with gentle smoky oak and soft, ripe tannins — an elegant expression of New Zealand's cool-climate finesse.

name: Bodegas Muga  Reserva Rioja DOC
wine_color: Ruby-red with glints of brick-red and a medium-high depth of colour.
desc_en_short: This wine is ruby-red with glints of brick-red and a medium-high depth of colour. Dense legs which provide you with a sequence of patterns around the sides of the glass. Initially you can find notes of red fruit aromas such as blackberries and reminders of spices. This is all well balanced by smoked aromas from its time in wood which had received a light-to-medium toasting. A subtle vanilla pod aroma coming through with roast coffee nuances. A smooth, mellow attack, with tannins wrapping the sides of the mouth with hints of menthol. In the finish the interesting lingering persistence is worthy of note. You can pair this wine with veal, Iberian ham and charcuterie and some kinds of stews and hotpots.

name: Louis Jadot  Gevrey Chambertin
desc_en_short: Louis Jadot Gevrey-Chambertin reflects the quality characteristics of the commune. A deep color with a multifaceted berry and red fruit bouquet, a full tannic structure and a mellow texture that carries into a lasting finish.

name: Castello di Bossi  Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: For owner Marco Bacci, success is in the details, from vineyard to bottle. The entire Castello di Bossi portfolio of wines carefully balances the tradition and rich history of the region with innovative winemaking techniqes; this Chianti Classico is no exception. Made from 100% Sangiovese, grown in soils with high chalk content, this wine shows just how good this varietal can taste.

name: Castello di Bossi  Chianti Classico Riserva Berardo DOCG
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

This riserva has a luminous ruby red color. Appealing aromas of dark cherries, plums, sweet spice, violets, vanilla and hints of dark chocolate and menthol emerge on the nose. On the palate, the wine is full-bodied but smooth with an almost creamy mouthfeel. Tannins are well integrated with the alcohol, and lead to a subtly sweet, silky finish. Pair this wine with Korean short ribs, ragù sauces, gnocchi with roasted rabbit, and beef negimaki.

name: Castello di Bossi  Girolamo IGT
wine_color: Deep ruby red in color with purple highlights.
desc_en_short: Named for the oldest vineyard of Merlot, planted in Bossi 42 years ago, the muscular Girolamo is made entirely from Merlot grapes. After the harvest, the grapes are crushed and fermented in stainless steel for extra smoothness and complexity. Girolamo is then aged in Allier barriques for approximately two years, to achieve an elegant combination of fruitiness, softened tannins, and body.

name: Wither Hills  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Rich brooding aromatics full of dark wild berry fruits, alluring toasty spice and subtle earthy undertones blend together in a concentrated hedonistic bouquet.

name: Monsoon Valley Signature Red
desc_en_short: Monsoon Valley Signature Red, a blend of red cultivars such as Dornfelder and Syrah. Grapes are hand-picked for premium quality selection. This wine is medium bodied, soft tannins with spiciness and lots of fruit characters

name: Jacob's Creek  Classic Shiraz Cabernet (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองลิ้มรสไวน์ที่ผสมผสานชิราซและแคบอร์เนต์แบบเป็นกันเอง ที่ให้ความรู้สึกเหมือนนั่งคุยกับเพื่อน

name: Jacob's Creek  Classic Cabernet Sauvignon (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short:
ให้รสชาติของผลแคสซิส เสริมด้วยกลิ่นไม้ซีดาร์และเครื่องเทศ เป็นรุ่นที่นำเสนอความสดชื่น รสชาติดี ดื่มได้ทันที เป็นตัวเลือกยอดนิยมที่ต้องการหาไวน์ที่ยอดเยี่ยม ในราคาที่สมเหตุผล

 

Wine Score : 88 POINTS, Jane Faulkner - winecompanion.com (Aug-18)

Award : DOUBLE GOLD, Tasters Guild International 2018

name: Jacob's Creek  Reserve Shiraz (750 ml)
desc_en_short: This premium, full bodied wine is an outstanding example os South Australian Shiraz, displaying an intensity of ripe plum with pepper spice, balanced by soft grape and oak tannins, leading to a lingering smooth finish. An ideal accompaniment to most red meats, game and cheeses. A wine that will develop further with cellaring.

name: Jacob's Creek  Double Barrel Shiraz (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep purple with a hint of ruby
desc_en_short:
Double Barrel is finished in aged whisky barrels for a richer, deeper, and smoother taste. Double Barrel Shiraz has a full and generous palate with a beguiling mix of sweet red fruits and dark chocolate indicative of its origins as Barossa Shiraz. Subtle toasty vanilla drives from aging in traditional French and American oak wine barrels. 

Wine Score : 93 POINTS, Huon Hooke - The Real Review (Feb-18)

Award : SILVER, Sakura Awards Japan, 2018

name: George Wyndham  Bin 555 Shiraz (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep purple (ม่วงเข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองสัมผัส Shiraz ที่มีความกลมกล่อมจาก Bin 555 ในขนาด 750 ml

name: George Wyndham  Bin 888 Cabernet Merlot (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองลิ้มรสไวน์เบลนด์ที่ผสมผสานผลไม้เข้มและเครื่องเทศอ่อน ๆ แบบเป็นกันเอง

name: George Wyndham  Bin 999 Merlot (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Rooted in Australia's winemaking heritage since 1830, George Wyndham Bin 999 Merlot is a generous, fruit-forward red blended from premium viticultural regions — soft in tannin, rich in plum and dark berry character, and effortlessly easy to enjoy.

name: Campo Viejo  Tempranillo (750 ml)
wine_color: Ruby red (รูบี้แดง)
desc_en_short: ลิ้มลอง Tempranillo ที่สมดุลและสดชื่นจาก Campo Viejo

name: Campo Viejo  Reserva (750 ml)
wine_color: Ruby with a hint of garnet
desc_en_short:
An approachable yet complex wine, capturing the very best that Rioja has to give, thanks to the winemaking artistry of the Campo Viejo winemaking team.

Wine Score : 90 Points, Julien Miquel - socialvignerons.com (Jul-17)

Award : GOLD, San Diego International Wine Competition 2017

name: Brancott Estate  Pinot Noir (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
This range of fruit-forward and approachable wines focusses on varieties we introduced to Marlborough.

Award : BRONZE, New York International Wine Competition 2018

name: G7  Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: It has a cherry red color with aromas of cassis, black cherry, coffee and spicy notes. In the mouth, it is concentrated and structured, with ripe red fruit, toffee and chocolate. The tannins are firm and well integrated. Its finish is long and persistent.

name: La Linda  Malbec
desc_en_short: La Linda Malbec from Mendoza, Argentina, delivers classic varietal character with bright cherry and blackberry fruit, delicate violet florals, and a silky full-bodied palate shaped by three months of oak ageing — approachable, elegant, and built for the table.

name: Luigi Bosca  Malbec
wine_color: A deep red color with violet hints.
desc_en_short: Luigi Bosca Malbec from Mendoza delivers a lush, full-bodied expression of Argentina's signature grape — deep ruby with violet hints, bursting with ripe plum, warming spice, and coffee notes from careful oak ageing, finishing with elegance and impressive length.

name: Luigi Bosca  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Expressive aromas that are reminiscent of black fruits, spices, pepper and leather. Strong in the mouth, this is a highly smooth wine with fine and firm tannins. Genuine, markedly structured and full-bodied, with a long and persistent finish which allows for perceiving the subtle smoked notes resulting from its ageing in oak barrels.

name: Bodegas Protos  Roble Ribera del Duero D.O.
wine_color: Bright cherry colour with purple rim, bright and clean.
desc_en_short: Bright cherry colour with purple rim, bright and clean. Very expressive, powerful and complex aroma with fresh fruits, sweet spices, creamy oak and red berry notes. Flavourful taste, fruity and toasty with round tannins and good finish.

name: Rawson's Retreat  Merlot
desc_en_short: Bright red cherry, Hint of spicy aromatics from the subtle use of oak with lifted herbal and floral notes. Fresh and vibrant flavors with dark fruit and spice, plum and creamy vanillin oak.

name: Rawson's Retreat  Shiraz
wine_color: Deep red, bright with good depth of color,
desc_en_short: Deep red, bright with good depth of color, Cinnamon spice, mocha and dark fruits, Ripe fresh raspberries, blueberries and blackcurrant, balanced with soft tannins, Fresh coffee bean flavors.

name: Gallo Family Vineyards  Merlot
desc_en_short: This Merlot begins with a nose of enticing plum and blackberry jam aromas layered with hints of vanilla and crème brûlée. This wine is a great complement to grilled meats, spicy pasta dishes and a variety of cheeses.

name: Bread & Butter  Pinot Noir
wine_color: Light ruby (รูบี้อ่อน)
desc_en_short: Bread & Butter Pinot Noir from California is an approachable, silky red delivering gentle cherry fruit, subtle earthy notes, and soft tannins — an everyday crowd-pleaser that rewards both casual sipping and relaxed dinner tables alike.

name: Angove  Long Row Cabernet Sauvignon (187 ml)
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 24 Bottles.

ลองลิ้มรสแคบอร์เนต์ขนาด 187 ml จาก Angove ที่พกพาสะดวก

name: Henschke  Henry's Seven, Barossa Valley
desc_en_short: Deep crimson with ruby hues. Attractive aromas of spiced plum, red currant and blue and black berry fruits are met with floral nuances of violets and black pepper spice. The round, supple palate is filled with juicy blue and red fruits, spiced plum, liquorice and notes of crushed tarragon, with beautifully textured svelte tannins and a long, peppery finish.

name: Little Things  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A full bodied wine showing flavors of ripe blackcurrants, Black Forest cake, and maraschino cherries. Full flavored in the mouth, the wine lingers with plump ripe cherries and finishes withelegant silky tannins.

name: Yellow Tail  Merlot
desc_en_short: Soft, juicy Merlot with dark plums again with chocolaty tannins and a long, fleshy finish. Serve with charred meats. Yup, this is the ultimate BBQ wine. It’s great with sausages, steak and marinated chicken.

name: Yellow Tail  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Deep and dark in the palate, this Shiraz offers classic red berry fruit, Christmas cake spices, dried figs and a long, juicy finish. Serve with herb crusted leg of lamb, medium rare, and a handful of oven baked potato wedges.

name: Penfolds  Bin 8 Shiraz Cabernet
wine_color: Crimson core and vibrant purple highlights at the rim.
desc_en_short: Bin 8 has been crafted in the traditional Penfolds style. Ripe, balanced fruit flavours are supported by softly integrated oak resulting in a silky, smooth red wine.

name: Penfolds  Bin 2
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: Penfolds Bin 2 Shiraz Mataro เป็นไวน์ที่แสดงออกถึงประวัติศาสตร์ของไวน์ออสเตรเลียและคุณภาพที่ยอดเยี่ยม สำหรับผู้ที่มองหาไวน์แดงที่มีความสมดุล ซับซ้อน และเหมาะสำหรับดื่มเดี่ยวหรือจับคู่กับอาหาร ไวน์นี้คือทางเลือกที่สมบูรณ์แบบ

name: Penfolds  Bin 28 Shiraz
desc_en_short: Bin 28 offers a showcase of warm climate Australian Shiraz – ripe, robust and generously flavoured. First made in 1959, Bin 28 was originally named after the famous Barossa Valley Kalimna vineyard purchased by Penfolds in 1945 and from which the wine was originally sourced. Today, Bin 28 is a multi-region, multi-vineyard blend, with the Barossa Valley always well represented.

name: Penfolds  Bin 407
desc_en_short: Vibrant crimson red color. The aromas soar brazenly, immediately cabernet – tomato relish/chutney, cassis. Other fruits edge forward for shelf space, like yellow-fleshed plum (El Dorado?) and ripe persimmon. Intriguingly, other less assertive aromatics offer more complexity: sage soaked in butter/oil (pre-saltimbocca preparation); olive leaf/turmeric spices, and caper brine. Reticent oak (cedar) noted – manifested as a seasoned/maturation character. On the palate, the wine is medium-bodied and elegantly framed. No mid-palate deficiencies! Blackcurrant and plum fruits sit alongside mocha/chocolate/walnut flavors. Oak? A genteel (washed, older oak) character – affording a maturation, not a flavor imprint. Mouth-watering with fine, rounded/polished tannins. In sharp palate contrast – a finessed, varietally-driven alternative to the muscular and Grange-like Bin 707 Cabernet.

name: Penfolds  Bin 389 Cabernet Sauvignon/Shiraz
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: สัมผัสเบลนด์พิเศษผสมผสานแคบอร์เนต์และชิราซจาก Penfolds Bin 389 พร้อมกล่องของขวัญจาก Nigo

name: Penfolds  Bin 707 Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: A purple rim and dense black core.
subregion: Coonawarra / McLaren Vale / Barossa Valley / Adelaide Hills
desc_en_short: Penfolds Bin 707 Cabernet Sauvignon is Australia's benchmark Cabernet — a multi-region masterpiece drawing fruit from Coonawarra, McLaren Vale, and the Barossa Valley, aged in new American oak to deliver extraordinary depth, velvety richness, and two decades of cellaring potential.

name: Penfolds  Koonunga Hill Shiraz/Cabernet
wine_color: Dark plum with a ruby rim
desc_en_short: The palate reflects the nose, with deeper plum and red-fruits, although there is further depth, akin to rhubarb compote. Texturally there is a rolling persistence and a Claret-like grip that is eminently Penfolds. The chocolate like finish is Koonunga Hill through and through, with fine grained tannins.

name: Penfolds  Koonunga Hill Shiraz
wine_color: Deep purple (ม่วงเข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองสัมผัส Shiraz จาก Koonunga Hill โดย Penfolds ที่มีรสชาติเข้มข้น

name: Penfolds  Koonunga Hill Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองสัมผัสรสแคบอร์เนต์จาก Koonunga Hill โดย Penfolds

name: Penfolds  Max's Shiraz / Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Penfolds Max’s Shiraz Cabernet is a tribute to former Chief Winemaker Max Schubert 1948-1975, a legend in Penfolds history. Max’s constant pursuit of excellence paved the way for those who followed in his footsteps and also allowed the status and heritage of Penfolds Winery to grow. A more approachable Penfolds style at release – ideally shelf to glass; save the cellar.

name: Penfolds  Max's Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Penfolds Max’s Cabernet Sauvignon is a tribute to former Chief Winemaker Max Schubert 1948-1975, a legend in Penfolds history. Max’s constant pursuit of excellence paved the way for those who followed in his footsteps and also allowed the status and heritage of Penfolds to grow. Max’s Cabernet Sauvignon displays the Penfolds ‘stamp’ inspired by Max Schubert.

name: Beringer  Main & Vine Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: สัมผัสแคบอร์เนต์ที่เข้มและมีโครงสร้างจาก Beringer

name: 19 Crimes  Shiraz
desc_en_short: This full and round bright-red wine with crimson hues give way to a subtle sweetness on the palate. The criminally intense vanilla aromatics are balanced with ripe raspberry and plum fruits. The vanilla aromatics carry through on the palate and complement subtle flavors of raspberries, dark plums and chocolate. Red berry fruit and plush tannins provide a lingering finish perfect for any evening.

name: 19 Crimes  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: สัมผัสแคบอร์เนต์ดุดันจาก 19 Crimes

name: 19 Crimes  Red Blend
desc_en_short: Bright red to crimson hues. Intense lifted vanilla aromatics balancedwith ripe red to dark berry fruits. Full and round on the palate with a distinct sweetness giving a rich and round mouth feel. The vanilla aromatics carry through on the palate and compliment subtle flavors of chocolate and a cedary spice. The palate finishes soft and fruity with a pleasant lingering freshness.

name: Chateau Mouton Rothschild  2012 (Premiers Crus)
wine_color: A dense and opaque, almost black colour with a very attractive glint.
desc_en_short: This is a beautifully opulent wine, great Mouton in its richness and succulent fruits. It’s combines structure and obvious new-wood aging with hugely ripe black plum and currant flavors. While it is a pleasure to taste now, there is a great tannic structure in the background to give the sense of power and aging potential.

name: Angove  Long Row Shiraz
wine_color: This wine is deep red in colour, with some purple hues.
desc_en_short: This wine is deep red in colour, with some purple hues. Ripe berry and plum fruit aromas with notes of spice and pepper dominate the nose. On the palate rich ripe black berries and plums precede fine soft smooth tannins and a good length of fruit. Some vanillin and toast characters provide a well-balanced finish.

name: Mount Riley  Pinot Noir
wine_color: Mid-red with garnet and ruby hues.
desc_en_short: Mount Riley's Estate Range (pictured right) is great quality and value. Each wine in this range is fresh with pure, vibrant fruit flavours and aromas.

name: Hopes End  Red Blend
wine_color: Bright, deep purple red in color
desc_en_short: Bright, deep purple red in color with aromas of boysenberry and cherry jam. Forest fruit jam, vanilla with subtle oak, a hint of chocolate and a velvety, smooth finish.

name: Chateau Les Reuilles  Bordeaux rouge AOC
desc_en_short: Deep red ruby in colour with a vibrant tight cherry nose. A lovely fresh juicy red fruit palate with textured fruit tannins and elegant oaking. Really fresh and fruit driven, it is drinking well now but will age well for at least another 5 years

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Casillero del Diablo Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon from Concha y Toro delivers ripe blackberry and dark fruit on a medium-bodied frame with silky, polished tannins — a reliably satisfying Chilean Cab with legendary heritage and everyday versatility.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Reserva Carmenere
wine_color: Intense and deep purple red color.
desc_en_short: From the start, it’s a remarkable expression of Carmenere thanks to the typical fruit like plums, blackberries and some spicy touches. The tannins are polished and long with a medium body at the end. It expresses marvelously well with gam meat, garnished with sweet-and-sour sauces and berries.

name: Famille Perrin  La Vieille Ferme Rouge
desc_en_short: Rhone, France- The Perrin family selects Grenache, Syrah, Carignan and Cinsault, vinifying in a manner reflecting their Châteauneuf tradition. This is a richly fruity and supple wine, ruby-purple colored, with aromas of cassis and herbs, flavors of plum and blackberry on the palate.

name: Antigal  UNO Malbec
desc_en_short: Antigal UNO Malbec offers delicious plums, strawberries and blackberry flavors with enticing hints of violets, vanilla and milk chocolate. Brightened by carefully protected natural acidity, this violet-red intense wine is surprisingly versatile at the dining table and pairs well with lamb, duck, beef as well as pasta and risotto.

name: Jacob's Creek  Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Jacob's Creek Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon from South Australia delivers ripe plum, cracked pepper, and warming cinnamon spice, with approachable tannins shaped by careful oak maturation — a crowd-pleasing full-bodied red that punches well above its price point.

name: La Spinetta   Langhe Nebbiolo DOC
desc_en_short: In the glass, this wine shows the light red color typical of Nebbiolo. On the nose, it offers aromas of dried rose petals and dark fruits such as plums and blueberry. The palate is full-bodied, chewy and rich with dusty tannins and a juicy, yet elegant, finish.

name: La Spinetta   Barolo "Garretti" DOCG
desc_en_short: Barolo Vigneto Garretti is a dark and brooding wine that has a long way to travel on its evolutionary track. Only at the beginning of its ageing trajectory, this Barolo reveals stern and uncompromising notes of dark fruit, tar, licorice and smoke. The mouthfeel is firmly constructed, tight and crisp. The bouquet is layered and powerful. Give this wine five more years, at a bare minimum, of cellar aging."

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Escudo Rojo Gran Reserva Syrah
desc_en_short: This succulent wine has a very good, fresh and generous attack, with good substance and balanced acidity on powerful but refined and elegant tannins which underpin harmonious fruit, violet and liquorice flavours on the mid-palate. The long and elegant finish perfectly expresses the sheer style of Maipo Valley Syrah.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Escudo Rojo Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: A deep ruby red with a purple tint.
desc_en_short: A deep ruby red with a purple tint. Refined and complex, with intense, forward fruit, the nose reveals wild strawberry, cherry and blackcurrant aromas mingled with subtle, delicate notes of vanilla and almond. Excellent attack, good substance, concentration and balanced acidity, on silky and refined tannins.

name: Chateau Clerc Milon  2015
wine_color: An intense garnet red, the wine has a bright and glittering aspect.
desc_en_short:
Climatic conditions

In terms of the weather, although 2015 was slightly warmer than average, it was above all very dry (706 mm of rain, compared with an annual average of 862 mm), especially between February and July, from budbreak to veraison. As a result the berries remained small, which explains why the yield was rather low even though we had hopes of a normal crop after flowering.

Rainfall in August and September was higher than average, which helped to prevent the ripening process from coming to a halt in a vineyard already stressed by the lack of water. As a result, the grapes matured at rather different rates from one plot to another, according to the variety, the age of the vines and the terroir.

In order to ensure that each grape variety and each plot was picked at optimum maturity, the harvest period was the longest in living memory. It lasted 23 days between our three estates, from the first Merlot clusters on 14 September to the last Cabernet Sauvignon grapes on 6 October.

The grapes were magnificent and fermentation took place quickly. The wines immediately showed plenty of colour and a complete array of very intense aromas ranging from red and black fruit to spice and incense.

The tannins are generally very well-rounded, dense and seamlessly smooth. After blending, the wines still have the same aromatic intensity and complex, full-bodied structures which barrel-maturing should further enhance.

name: Robert Mondavi   Woodbridge Red Blend
desc_en_short: Our Red Blend combines some of the finest attributes of Petite Sirah, Zinfandel, and Syrah with a touch of other complementary reds, resulting in a deliciously rich, full-bodied blend. The wine offers warm, toasty aromas and flavors, including jammy blackberry, vanilla, and baking spices. It’s full and rich with a long, flavorful finish.

name: Tenuta Guado al Tasso By Antinori  COn't Ugo Bolgheri DOC
flavor_tags: Dried Herbs, Blackberry, Dark Fruit, Tobacco, Cedar, Plum, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Con't Ugo is the second wine of Antinori's prestigious Guado al Tasso estate in Bolgheri, offering Bordeaux-style depth and elegance at a more accessible level. Expect lush dark fruit, cedar, and Mediterranean spice with smooth, well-integrated tannins.

name: Alois Lageder  Merlot MMXIII  DOC
wine_color: Deep, intense cherry-red colour with ruby tints.
desc_en_short: Deep, intense cherry-red colour with ruby tints. Pronounced, complex aroma with concentrated fruity notes (red and black berries), delicate spice impressions (juniper, liquorice) combined with elegant oak. Quite powerful and rich on the palate. Long lasting with a fresh aftertaste and well balanced tannins. When stored properly, this wine will drink well for at least 4 to 8 years.

name: Damilano  Barolo "Liste" DOCG
wine_color: garnet ruby red with fleeting orange reflections
desc_en_short: At the eye, Liste appears in its intense ruby red color. At the nose, it expresses notes of wild berries, liquorish, tobacco, and cocoa. At the palate, it is dry, full-bodied, has a persistent flavor, and is austere and velvety.

name: Damilano  Barolo "Cannubi" DOCG
wine_color: Garnet ruby red with orange reflections
desc_en_short: Damilano is one of the oldest wineries in Barolo. The family business dates back to 1890 when Giuseppe Borgogno started cultivating and producing wine from the grapes from his own vineyards. Giuseppe  improved the general quality of the vinification system and of the wines, turning the winery into a “jewel” of the Langhe area. In 1997 Giuseppe passed the winery on to his grandchildren Paolo, Mario and Guido. Together, they are working to keep and improve the level of the quality of the Damilano wines.

name: Bodegas Garzon  Reserva Tannat
desc_en_short: This elegant yet powerful Tannat has aromas of red fruits such as cherries and strawberries, black plums, tobacco, and black chocolate, with a spicy background. It is juicy and fresh in the palate, and has a full-body with a lingering finish, perfectly balanced with a touch of oak.

name: Cuvaison  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short:
WINEMAKER NOTES

Rose petals, hawthorn, wild strawberry and plum mingle with hints of cola, black tea and licorice. On the palate, dark fruits of blackberry and black cherry take the lead, with lovely jam notes, a notion of sassafras and a long, supple, velvety finish.

name: Argento  Reserva Malbec
desc_en_short: Argento Reserva Malbec is dark violet and offers concentrated aromas of black plums, cherries, and blackberries. These vibrant black fruit flavors provide a pleasing structure on the palate, and the predominant French oak characters coming from its aging in barrels for six to nine months blend perfectly, providing a delicate mouth texture.

name: Yalumba  Samuel's Collection Barossa Bush Vine Grenache
desc_en_short:
93 points in James Suckling

Such clarity, purity and depth here. This is surely a benchmark for the band of pedigree Barossa grenache, delivered right on the apex of quality and value. Vibrant raspberries, cherries and red plums flood the nose and palate and the chassis of fruit-tannin is sleekly cut. Fresh, juicy resolve. Drink now. Screw cap.

90 points in Wine Spectator

Perfumed, with heady floral and baking spice aromas singing through to raspberry coulis and strawberry flavors, set on a smooth and seamless body. A hint of vanilla bean lingers on the finish. Drink now through 2034.

name: Yalumba  Samuel's Collection Barossa Shiraz
desc_en_short:
91 points in James Suckling

A quite distinctive, dark-cherry and raspberry nose with a gently tarry edge, leading to a smooth and fleshy, red and dark-berry palate. There’s great value in this soulful shiraz. Drink now. Screw cap.

90 points in Wine Enthusiast

This is a well-balanced and drinkable yet food friendly example of Barossa's most famous wine style. It oozes ripe plums, licorice, dried green herbs, dried florals, warm earth and graphite nuances with a lick of spicy oak. The tannins are fine and chalky textured, and a line of acidity lifts the plump fruit, herbs and spice into brightness.

name: Shafer  TD-9
desc_en_short: TD-9 is an adventurous red blend that celebrates a bold move. In 1973 John Shafer went from taking morning commuter trains in Chicago to teaching himself to drive an old TD-9 tractor in our Napa Valley vineyard. He’d never grown grapes or made wine in his life. That spirit of risk-taking and adventure continues to inspire everything we do at Shafer Vineyards today. TD-9 is a blend of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Malbec – we hope you enjoy drinking it as much as we love making it.

name: Castello di Albola Chianti Classico DOCG
wine_color: Ruby red with shades of garnet.
desc_en_short: This Chianti Classico encloses all the main features of Castello di Albola vineyards. Sangiovese grapes are carefully picked and vinified according to the traditional methods used in the high hills in the area of Radda. A long ageing period in large Slavonia oak batters brings out an assertive personality, defined by minerality, a fresh taste and great elegance.

name: Chateau Lagrezette  Seigneur de Grezette Malbec
wine_color: The wine is dark red in color.
desc_en_short: From one of Cahors' most storied estates, Seigneur de Grezette is a characterful Malbec shaped by centuries of history and the guiding hand of legendary consultant Michel Rolland — delivering ripe dark fruit, supple structure, and unmistakable southwest French terroir in every glass.

name: Famille Perrin  Réserve Côtes-du-Rhône Rouge
desc_en_short: A beautiful deep red. The nose shows caramel and spices that mingle with red berry fruit. The palate is full and deep, with fine tannins and good length.

name: Dalrymple  Pinot Noir
wine_color: A brilliant purple-red colour that shines in the glass.
desc_en_short: Aromas of spiced rhubarb, sweet red cherries, Asian five spice and vanilla mingle with earthy notes and the distinct fruity spice notes of sassafras forest. The palate is seductive with fleshy red and black cherries. It develops with spices from the whole bunch inclusion and French oak barrels.

name: Vasse Felix  Filius Range Cabernet Suavignon
desc_en_short: The West Australian Wine Guide 2018 - Ray Jordan 93 points - "Such an elegant and stylish cabernet that captures the regional stamp or Margaret River. Blackcurrant and black olive tapenade on the nose. The palate has good oak integration and firm sinewy tannins. Controlled and integrated. Its a wine that clearly over-delivers at this price."

name: Campo Viejo  Winemaker's Art (750 ml)
wine_color: Ruby with a hint of garnet
desc_en_short: Campo Viejo's Winemaker's Art is a rich, expressive Tempranillo from Rioja Alta, delivering layers of red and dark fruit, polished tannins, and a clean, lingering finish — a bold statement of Spanish winemaking craft at its finest.

name: Robert Mondavi   Private Selection  Vint Bourbon Barrel-Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep, rich ruby red in color
desc_en_short: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Bourbon Barrel-Aged Cabernet Sauvignon is a bold California red finished in Kentucky bourbon casks, delivering a richly layered experience of blackberry, praline, vanilla custard, and mocha, framed by soft, chewy tannins and a smoky oak finish.

name: Robert Mondavi  Private Selection Vint Rum Barrel-Aged Merlot
desc_en_short: Our latest addition to the portfolio, Rum Barrel-Aged Merlot blends the traditional craftsmanship of California winemaking with the exotic tradition of dark rum barrel aging. This results in an incredibly bold and unique sensory expression. Following in the footsteps of our Bourbon Barrel-Aged wines, a portion of this Monterey County Merlot is aged in used Rum barrels. These used barrels impart complex nuances of molasses and toasted coconut.

name: Shafer  Hillside Select Cabernet Sauvignon 2018
desc_en_short: Shafer Hillside Select 2018 is a benchmark Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon from one of the appellation's most celebrated single-vineyard sites, delivering a sumptuous layering of blackberry, berry compote, baking spice, and mocha underpinned by firm, cellar-worthy tannins.

name: Alta Mora Etna Rosso
desc_en_short:
93 Points James Suckling

"From the moment you hang your nose in the glass, it’s clear that there are plenty of ripe plums, but not the slightest hint of prune character. However, there is a ton of subtle, herbal nuances in here, too. Powerful and concentrated with plenty of healthy tannins that carry the long, dry finish. Drink or hold."

name: Castello Di Ama  Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short:
Ama is a small village in the Gaiole municipality. Castello di Ama is in the historic heart of Chianti Classico, in central Tuscany, between the Florence and Siena provinces.

"Chianti" has referred to the municipalities of Radda, Gaiole and Castellina since the mid-eighteenth century. Over the centuries, the word "Chianti" was overused and abused to the point that a narrower and more distinctive denomination was needed, hence "Chianti Classico".

name: Agricola San Felice  Il Grigio di San Felice Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red. Rich, long-lingering aromas are redolent of violets and wild red berry fruit. Il Grigio is a full-bodied wine, lean and firm, with succulent tannins and a tangy acidity. Ideal when accompanying meat-sauced first courses, roast pigeon, grilled steak.

name: Monte Antico  Rosso IGT
wine_color: Deep ruby color with garnet reflections
desc_en_short: 90 points in James Suckling - "I like the pretty tangerine and citrus character here, which works well with the main attraction of red berries and spices. Light to medium body, fine tannins and a fruity finish. A blend of sangiovese, merlot, sangiovese and cabernet sauvignon. Drink now. Screw cap."

name: Pala  Cannonau Riserva Sardegna DOC
desc_en_short: Dark ruby red, almost impenetrable, intense notes of little red fruits, blackberry and red cherry jam, together with fine spicy notes. Smooth, elegant tannins, full body, enveloping. Long finish. Paring with grilled or braised red meats; savoury, spicy main courses, seasoned cheeses.

name: San Marzano  Talo Primitivo di Manduria DOP
wine_color: Ruby red colur enriched with violet hues
desc_en_short: From the sun-drenched heel of Italy's boot, San Marzano's Talò Primitivo di Manduria is a richly structured Puglian red delivering opulent aromas of ripe cherry, plum, cocoa, and vanilla — a warm, generously flavoured wine with a seductively sweet, lingering finish.

name: Tommasi  Graticco Appassionato IGT
desc_en_short: A medium-bodied vibrant Corvina, Rondinella and Merlot red wine blend made in a similar method as Amarone wines. When wine grapes are harvested, they are air-dried, thereby concentrating the flavours prior to fermentation. Lush and spicy with dried fruit, dark cherry, savoury herb and nutty flavours rich on the palate.

name: Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci  Villa Da Vinci S.to Ippolito
desc_en_short: A bold Tuscan blend of Sangiovese, Syrah, and Merlot from the historic vineyards surrounding the Villa da Vinci estate, crafted using the proprietary Metodo Leonardo® to deliver rich blackberry, warm spice, and balsamic depth with seamless oak integration.

name: Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci   1502 Da Vinci in Romagna Sangiovese Appassimento
wine_color: It shows an intense red color with hues that verge on ruby.
desc_en_short: During his journey across the region of Romagna in 1502, Leonardo observed and then painted the grapes of Cesena, which dried thanks to an ingenious hanging system. This same technique helps the grapes to achieve the concentration of flavour which is at the heart of the exceptional richness of this wine. Sangiovese grapes for drying are picked by hand in crates in mid-September, after a careful selection and a quality check. The grapes are allowed to rest in special fruit warehouses at controlled temperature and humidity where they are left to dry for at least sixty days. Wine-making starts with soft pressing followed by temperature-controlled fermentation on the skins at 25°C. Pumping-over and punching-down are performed to extract color and allow aromatic components to develop. Later on, racking is carried out to separate the skins from the must. Ageing includes malolactic fermentation to make wine smoother and rounder on the palate, after which one part of the wine is aged in barriques for a minimum period of nine months.

name: Brancaia  Rosso "Tre" IGT
desc_en_short: Brancaia TRE is a blend of 80% Sangiovese and 20% Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon. The basis for this wine, are the grapes from our three estates: Brancaia (Castellina), Poppi (Radda) and Brancaia in Maremma (Grosseto).

name: Brancaia  Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: Brancaia Chianti Classico shows our passion for this territory and the real character of the Sangiovese grape. This wine matures for 12 months in stainless steel tanks. It has seducing notes of ripe fruit, a lovely acidity and it offers you a lot of drinking pleasure.

name: Bodegas LAN  Rioja Reserva
desc_en_short: Bright, ripe cherry red. Intense and complex in aromas. Aromas of ripe red fruit, enveloped in white flowers, almond blossom and broom. Touches of cinnamon and resinous notes. Velvety on the attack, smooth and delicate. It is elegant, balanced and harmonious on the palate. A long finish, leaving a pleasant aftertaste that encourages you to take another sip.

name: Bodegas LAN  Rioja Gran Reserva
wine_color: Deep garnet red with a ruby rim.
desc_en_short: Intense deep red-garnet with a ruby trim. In the nose is intense with black ripe fruit, fig and a touch of raisins all mixed with intense spicy and smoky notes. In the palate is harmonious, balanced with gentle tannins that allowed for a long aftertaste that strengthens the ripe fruit and spices aromas.

name: Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci  Da Vinci I Capolavori Chianti Riserva DOCG
desc_en_short: The landscape in this Leonardian masterpiece is typically Tuscan and nuanced, just like the fruit of this famous Reserve wine. Ripe grapes are left on the skins for about 10-12 days. Fermentation takes place at controlled temperatures of 27-28°C. Pumping-over is performed frequently for a short while, and the saignée or "bleeding off" technique is used to increase the richness of noble polyphenols. Once removed from the skins, wine is kept in steel containers to complete malolactic fermentation. Then wine is aged in French and American oak barrels for 10 months.

name: Velenosi  Montepulciano D' Abruzzo DOC Circum
desc_en_short: Glamour and Winning : Silver Medal for our Montepulciano d'Abruzzo DOC 2017@ Korea Wine Challenge 2018!

name: Tenuta di Biserno  Insoglio del Cinghiale DOCG
grape_variety: Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon, Pecorino
flavor_tags: Dried Herbs, Blackberry, Cassis, Earthy, Cedar
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Insoglio del Cinghiale is the second wine of Biserno, the prestigious Tuscan estate co-founded by Lodovico Antinori — a bold, elegant Bolgheri-area red blending Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Syrah and Cabernet Sauvignon with impressive depth, warmth, and Mediterranean character.

name: Castello di Fonterutoli  Badiola
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: สัมผัสไวน์เบลนด์ทัสกานีที่เข้มข้นและซับซ้อนจาก Castello di Fonterutoli Badiola

name: Tenuta Belguardo  Maremma Toscana DOC
desc_en_short: Made with Cabernet Sauvignon and a small percentage of Cabernet Franc grapes, this powerful and elegant wine is the most important "Cru" of the Estate, a pure expression of the Maremma "terroir".

name: Domaine Du Pegau  Cotes du Rhone Cuvee Setier Villages Rouge
desc_en_short: Classified as Côtes du Rhône Village, the Cuvée Sétier named after an old measure of wine averaging four liters or 8 pints comes as the image of Côtes du Rhône Village. Generous with pronounced tannins born from a blend of Grenache, Mouvèdre & Syrah planted on hillsides on rolled pebbles. Character and aging wine.

name: Casisano  Brunello di Montalcino DOCG
desc_en_short:
Intense ruby in color, it opens to
the nose with an elegant complexity
with characteristic aromas
of fresh red fruit and spicy notes.
Harmonic to the taste, it in fact has
a great tannic structure and an excellent
acidity; it presents an excellent and long
aromatic persistence both
on the nose and in the mouth,
with marked characteristics of elegance
and minerality, all elements
of extraordinary longevity.

name: Messenez Family  Chateau M Gran Reserva Cabernet Merlot
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: สัมผัสไวน์เบลนด์ผสมแคบอร์เนต์และเมอร์โลที่โดดเด่นจาก Messenez Family

name: Chris Ringland  Barossa Shiraz
desc_en_short:
With the CR Barossa Shiraz, I am looking for that classic North-Western Barossa Shiraz blackberry profile, together with sweet, dark, plum jammy notes. As always, the palate is all about sweet red berries, milk chocolate and subtle vanillin.

Gold Medal – San Francisco International Wine Competition

name: CUNE  Reserva
wine_color: Brilliant ruby red in color with deep garnet hints.
desc_en_short: “The first wine produced by the company took its name from the initials CVNE. A fortuitous misspelling between the U and the V created the brand. Historically it was known as fourth year or fifth year. In accordance with the wine law passed in 1970, it was renamed "Reserva ”

name: Oddero  Barolo DOCG
desc_en_short: Brilliant garnet-red color, with warmer tinges developing over time. Unmistakeable bouquet, very pleasant, intense yet ethereal, very persistent, at times spiced, with aromas of truffles, liquorice and dried flowers. Dry taste, with important, full tannins.

name: Pinical Estate  Cabernet Merlot
desc_en_short: Pinical Estate is a family owned business who takes extreme pride in their company. The owner aims to produce wines that are delightful, friendly and drunk for all occasions amongst family and friends. The wines are produced from highly acclaimed vineyards in the South Eastern Australia.

name: Castelli del Grevepesa  Castello Di Bibbione Gran Selezione Chianti classico DOCG
wine_color: Very intense, bright, ruby red colour.
desc_en_short:
Selection of Sangiovese and Merlot from a single Castello di Bibbione vineyard.
Vineyard exposure west /south west – 200 m above sea level. Very intense, bright, ruby red colour. Deep, intense fragrance with broad bouquet and notes of ripe forest fruits and vanilla. Sapid, balanced flavour with tannins in harmony with the essences of wood, persistent.

name: Villa di Corlo  Lambrusco Grasparossa di Castelvetro Corleto DOC
wine_color: Ruby red intense, tending towards violet.
desc_en_short: Intense ruby-red color, tending towards garnet. Distinctly vinous and particularly fragrant bouquet. Dry and sapid, this Lambrusco is full-bodied and slightly tannic.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Pinot Noir (VDF D'OC)
desc_en_short: The Pinot Noir has a deep ruby colour. Full-bodied and hearty, it reveals fresh fruit aromas, such as Morello cherries. Its silky tannins and length make it a very well-balanced wine.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Merlot (VDF D'OC)
wine_color: A cherry red colour with plum-coloured tints
desc_en_short: A cherry red colour with plum-coloured tints, this wine has a harmonious nose that reveals kirsch and red berry aromas. Full-bodied and aromatic, with fine, fruity tannins. A pleasing wine that won’t disappoint, even after it has just been opened. Young, well-balanced and made with very typical grapes. It will gain in length and smoothness as it ages.

name: El Coto Rioja  Crianza
wine_color: Dense cherry red with orange highlights
desc_en_short: The nose is fresh and pronounced with concentrated red fruits and notes of vanilla and toasted oak. On the palate, it is silky with a core of strawberry fruit combined.

name: 19 Crimes  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Medium bodied with soft, round tannins, cherry and strawberry fruit sweetness which complements the vanilla and spice oak undertones. All these elements combined create a well-balanced, enjoyable wine with a long finish.

name: 19 Crimes  Malbec
desc_en_short: 19 Crimes Malbec delivers a richly textured, full-bodied pour of dark cherry, red currant, and chocolate, rounded out with a whisper of vanilla sweetness and soft, lingering tannins — a bold red built for the table and the story behind it.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Heritage Bordeaux Rouge
wine_color: Garnet red with an intense crimson hue.
desc_en_short: Heritage is a rich blend of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc from old vines in the Cotes de Bordeaux. Full of blackberry and dark cherry fruits and baking spices, black fruits and coffee the wine is oak aged 16 months prior to release.

name: Montes  Twins Red Blend
wine_color: Deep and intense ruby red colour.
desc_en_short:
It is a perfumed wine, with elegant aromas of ripe black fruit recalling fig and blackcurrant, typical of the Cabernet Sauvignon from this area. The Syrah makes its presence felt with delicate aromas of sweet spices and leather that heighten the character.

Fresh and juicy on the palate, due in no small part to the percentage of Tempranillo in the blend. The Carmenère lends smooth, round tannins for a light sweet sensation that lingers on its pleasing finish.

name: Louis Latour  Corton Grand Cru "Domaine Latour" 2017
brand: Louis Latour  Corton Grand Cru "Domaine Latour"
desc_en_short: Louis Latour team which carries out strict pruning in order to produce later harvests thus insuring a good degree of maturity in the grapes. This wine is made up of grapes selected from several different parcels of vines in order to guarantee consistent quality each year. It has a good ageing potential.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Dark Red
desc_en_short: A wine that dazzles with its intense, deep red colour and seduces with its attractive touch of black fruits that melt with delicate notes of mocha and creamy vanilla. This wine delivers a pleasing blend of flavours and sensations that envelop and captivate from the beginning. It is versatile and especially recommended with red meats and spicy dishes.

name: Piccini  Frapasso Primitivo di Manduria
desc_en_short: This bright cherry wine has a bouquet wrapped in chocolate and clove, with vanilla and cocoa notes and vibrant fruitiness. It has a lingering finish of sweet licorice and figs. A perfect pair for roast meats, game stews and meat sauces.

name: Chateau De Pez  2nd Pez Saint-Estèphe
desc_en_short: 2nd Pez is the second wine of the superb Château de Pez in the Saint Estèphe appellation. The nose is deep and intense, very focused on black fruits and dried flowers. The mouth is structured with roundness and a beautiful texture reminiscent of velvet. We also detect a very fine woodiness, a very pleasant second wine to taste.

name: Dominio de Punctum  Finca Fabian Tempranillo
desc_en_short: Deep intense bright cherry colour with coloured tears. Intensely expressive nose laced with spicy and mineral notes. Juicy and fresh flavour. Smooth drinkable and balanced with a lovely fruity finish.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Reserve Haut Medoc
desc_en_short: Subtle blackcurrant notes before revealing blackberry and mild star anise & vanilla spice aromas. On the palate, the initial powerful attack display nicely extracted fruit on rich tannins while the concentrated mid-palate flavors mirror the aromas found on the nose. The finish boasts delicate touches of blackcurrant combined perfectly with elegant & refined tannins belying a firm expression of the Medoc terroir.

name: Pinical Estate  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Shiraz displays typical Clare Valley style and texture. Spicy highlights with red and black cheery aromatics lead into an energetic palate with flavours of spice red fruits and blackberries supported by a savoury, baked meat like element. Firm but fine tannins and oak - playing a purely supporting role - provide framework for a textural and lengthy finish.

name: Domaine de La Pousse d’Or  Volnay 1er Cru "Clos des 60 Ouvrees" - Monopole
desc_en_short: The Pousse d'Or domaine at Volnay was established in 1954. Its vineyards are anything but ordinary, consisting as they do mainly of premier and grand crus in the villages of Morey-Saint-Denis, Chambolle-Musigny, Corton, Pommard, Volnay Puligny-Montrachet and Santenay. The domaine's 18 hectares yield 90,000 bottles annually and are managed in a spirit of respect for terroir. Le Domaine de la Pousse d'Or can be traced back to the Dukes of Burgundy and the year 1100. Since 1997, its new owner Patrick Landanger has invested considerable resources both in the vineyards themselves and in the arrangements for vinification and elevage. In pursuit of ever-higher quality, he is animated by profound respect for his terroirs and this guides his ambition to share his passion for the great wines of Burgundy with the world at large.

name: Torrebruna  Sangiovese Di Toscana IGP
wine_color: Intense with a red berry rim
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Intense with a red berry rim. aromas of cherry, dark fruits and vanilla Silky tannins. Robust and balanced. A pleasant feel of toasted coffee and vanilla.

name: Feudi di San Gregorio  Primitivo di Manduria DOC
desc_en_short: A richly structured Primitivo di Manduria DOC from Feudi di San Gregorio, delivering wild cherry, prune, and warming spice alongside a velvety finish of cocoa and coffee — a deeply satisfying expression of Puglia's sun-drenched southern terroir.

name: Masseria Borgo Dei Trulli  Lucale Primitivo Puglia IGP Appassimento (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Cherries, raspberries and redcurrants aroma. Full-bodied,supple, well-balanced, with layers of dark fruit, fine tannins and a long
and lingering finish. Pairing with roasted red meats, gam.

name: Anakena  Nuna Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Excellent balance of ripe tannin, acidity and berry fruit, complimented by subtle vanilla flavours. Great length and a fine elegant finish.

name: Concha Y Toro  Reservado Merlot
desc_en_short: A delicious Chilean red wine in Central Valley, which brings all the softness of the Merlot variety, combined with the aroma of ripe red fruits with hints of pepper and toast. On the palate, soft tannins and good persistence.

name: CUNE  Gran Reserva
wine_color: Ruby red in colour, the wine shows a youthful hint at the rim.
desc_en_short: "The first wine produced by the company took its name from the initials CVNE. A fortuitous misspelling between the U and the V created the iconic Cune brand"

name: Pure Bred  Old Vine Zinfandel
desc_en_short: Our Pure Bred Lodi Old Vine Zinfandel offers a deep ruby red color. The nose is intense with blackberry jam and floral notes. The palate is big and plush with decent grip.

name: Noble Hill  Estate Reserve
desc_en_short: Boasts rich, ripe and bold fruit expressions in the glass. Full-bodied, the wine offers succulent acidity with flavors of dark cherry, black plum and cassis with a spicy undertone across the mid-palate. Concluding with an elongated finish and mineral tension.

name: Domaine De Rochebin  Vieilles Vignes Bourgogne Pinot Noir
wine_color: Deep ruby red with violet highlights.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red with violet highlights. With a nose opening on the fruit, this Pinot will seduce you by its freshness. Smooth and light with soft tannins and elegant flavors of berries.

name: Domaine De Rochebin  Bourgogne Pinot Noir
wine_color: Deep ruby red with violet highlights.
desc_en_short: The wine has a characteristic. aroma of strawberries, morels and cassis with herb tons. The taste is medium-bodied with balanced spices from barrels and fruity fruits with soft tannins at the end.

name: La Cour Des Dames  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: With its nice dark red colour, this wine is elegant, complex and velvety. It offers blackcurrant and strawberry aromas with hints of spices, cinnamon, mint and honey, and a fresh vegetal note typical of this grape variety. The finish is subtle with hints of cedar and oak.

name: Echeverria  Reserva Merlot
desc_en_short:
Intense aromas of autumn berry fruits combine nicely with notes of black pepper and dried fruits. An easy-drinking and juicy wine that persists on the fruity finish.

Sustainable Winery

ISO 9001-HACCP

name: 9 Lives Reserve Apasionado Red Blend
desc_en_short: Live every moment with passion while trying this 9 Lives red blend. With notes of red and black fruits, cocoa, and vanilla, this wine offers structured tannins with a velvety finish.

name: Chateau Clou Du Pin Superieur Premium
desc_en_short: Aged for longer in oak barrels and are produced from older vines. From start to finish. There's a nice sensation of fresh, spice cherries, earthy and polished textures with dark chocolate.

name: Opus One  Vintage 2018
desc_en_short:
WINEMAKING

The Opus One 2018 offers profuse aromas of blackberry, cassis and black cherry. Elegant notes of violets, white pepper and rose petals follow and together they deliver a very seductive bouquet. The seamlessly layered flavors build to a crescendo of fresh and juicy black-fruit, accented with hints of orange zest, licorice and dark chocolate. Beautifully balanced, the smooth round tannins and fresh acidity combine to create a soft, creamy mouthfeel and extend the flavors into a long persistent finish.

name: Velenosi  Ninfa Marche Rosso IGT
wine_color: Intense ruby red, with violet reflections.
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red, with violet reflections. The aromas are deep and persistent: aromas of fleshy fruit, blackberries, cherries together with notes of liquorice and graphite, black pepper and tobacco. Balsamic hints complete the aromatic picture of great complexity, persistence and elegance. Warm and elegant, with a strong impact and great taste progression, with a firm and decisive character marked by very fine, soft and round tannins. The finish is long with very pleasant fruity returns.

name: Penfolds  Bin 389 Magnum-Lunar New Year 2023 (limited Edition)  (1.5L)
desc_en_short: Health, wealth and good fortune. Lunar New Year is an occasion to be celebrated with a generous gift of exceptional wine. Make a statement with this limited-edition Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz 2023 Magnum in a special Lunar New Year Gift Box.

name: Kaiken  Aventura Los Chacayes Norte
wine_color: Intense red with light violet hints
desc_en_short: Our restless, exploring spirit means we are constantly reinventing ourselves through the new experiences brought by every encounter and journey. This is exactly what drove us to craft a Malbec whose fermentation and aging take place in concrete tanks. A fresh and very floral wine, with mineral notes, sharp tannins, and a structured profile.

name: Kaiken  Aventura Valle De Canota
wine_color: Intense red with light violet hints.
desc_en_short: Our restless, exploring spirit means we are constantly reinventing ourselves through the new experiences brought by every encounter and journey. This is exactly what drove us to craft a Malbec whose fermentation and aging take place in concrete tanks. A fresh and very floral wine, with mineral notes, sharp tannins, and a structured profile.

name: Kaiken Obertura Cabernet Franc
wine_color: Intente, ruby-red colour, with glimpses of subtle, elegant violet.
desc_en_short: Intente, ruby-red colour, with glimpses of subtle, elegant violet. The very complex nose shows notes of ripe redcurrant, fresh plum, and red pepper, together with spicy notes of black pepper and clove. The concentration and structure are very balanced. On the palate freshness and bright acidity prevail, accompanied by a sensation of minerality that characterizes the grapes grown at high-altitudes and on rocky soils. The finish is long and elegant.

name: Granmonte  Asoke Cabernet Sauvignon Syrah
desc_en_short: It is a full-bodied yet fruit-driven wine with a well-balanced oak. This wine is shows layers of red berries, bell peppers, plums, vanilla and spices. Complex and dry with exceptional marriage between the two grape varieties. The mouth feel is of red fruit, tobacco and elegant tannins. Held together by tight acidity that helps this wine to age well.

name: Colina  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: Colina Cabernet Sauvignon from Chile's Central Valley delivers a structured, fruit-forward red with dark berry intensity, subtle spice, and firm tannins — a satisfying everyday bottle with real character for the price.

name: Langmeil  Barossa Valley Floor Shiraz
wine_color: Medium to deep crimson with purple hues.
desc_en_short: The Barossa is famous for its viticulture, history and winemaking dating back to the 1840s. At its heart is the Valley Floor, a highly-prized strip of viticultural land which is the very foundation and forms the essence of this wine. A true taste of the Barossa.

name: Torbreck  Old Vines Grenache Mourvedre Shiraz
desc_en_short: A finely-judged blend of 55% grenache, 24% shiraz and 21% mourvèdre off old barossa valley vines, matured in french oak for 12 months. elegantly styled, with attractive cassis, cherry, spice and floral notes.

name: Concha Y Toro  Marques de Casa Concha Merlot
desc_en_short: Deep, dark, bright red. Rich and skillfully balanced. Fresh and complex. Delicate notes of blackcurrant, spices, wild fruits, and red plum. It has a nice and elegant touch of toasted oak which adds an attractive dimension. Elegant tannins accompany a great fruit expression on the palate. Its finish is long, fresh, and captivating.

name: Zonin  "Classico" Primitivo di Puglia
