flavor_tags: Blackberry, Vanilla, Cherry, Violet, Cocoa, Plum, Oak
desc_en_short: Zonin's Classico Primitivo is a dependable, generous southern Italian red — ripe, smooth, and deeply fruited with dark cherries, plum, and a whisper of oak spice. An easygoing crowd-pleaser built for everyday enjoyment.

name: Chateau Clerc Milon  2019
wine_color: The wine has a rich colour with a garnet hue.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 22% Merlot, 4% Cabernet Franc, 2% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Château Clerc Milon's 2019 Pauillac is a fifth growth of uncommon elegance, delivering layered aromas of blackcurrant, violet, and licorice alongside creamy, close-knit tannins and a saline, minty finish that lingers with impressive persistence.

name: Bodegas Protos  27 Ribera del Duero
wine_color: Intense cherry red color, with violet hues resulting in a very vivid and bright wine.
desc_en_short: Protos ’27 in a homage to those 11 visionaries that founded Protos in 1927. It is a wine where the years of better vineyard techniques and winery research blend together to form a beautiful orchestra of wood and fruit that embodies not only our history but our wishful look towards the future.

name: Aromo  Winemaker's Selection Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: This wine of a beautiful ruby red pale, fresh ripe strawberry aromas, light spices and hints of caramel and coffee. Sweet and delicate body.

name: Robert Mondavi   Woodbridge Merlot
desc_en_short: This Merlot shows lush fruit and velvety tannins. The aromas and flavors suggest juicy black cherries and red berries accented by hints of cocoa and spice. The supple tannins give the wine structure, while oak aging adds warm vanilla tones to the finish.

name: Reserve St Martin  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Violet color. Aromas and flavors of blackberry jam, licorice, hints of peach, and black tea with a slightly chewy, vibrant, dryish medium body and a smooth, medium-length finish with moderate oak flavor. A juicy, chewy red to please the crowd.

name: Reserve St Martin  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: South of France- Rich and supple, this delicious red shows notes of fresh cherries and raspberries supported by soft, easy-drinking tannins that give structure without being overpowering. Another great value from Reserve St Martin.

name: The Blind Pig  Merlot
desc_en_short: Rich aroma of black cherry and cassis with hint of vanillin. Flavours of dark chocolate and plums are tasted in abundance on the palate. The finish is smooth and long lasting.

name: The Saddler  Shiraz
desc_en_short:
Intense aromas of dark cherries, blackberry and baking spice.
The palate is Full-bodied, showing plum and cedar oak. The finish is
balanced, rich and lingers long. Pair with cottage pie or steak.

name: Tedeschi  Marne 180 Amarone della Valpolicella
wine_color: Strong ruby red. Clear and transparent.
desc_en_short: About the name “Marne 180”: marne means marl, the variety of soil on which we’ve planted our vineyards; 180 are the degrees of exposure of our vineyards, from south-west to south-east. This wine is made from grapes harvested in various vineyards located on hills in the Valpolicella area. Different sources and different grape varieties are important to obtain a well-balanced wine with the fine structure that only a few single areas in the Valpolicella zone can provide.

name: Santa Helena  Gran Vino (Red Blend)
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

ลิ้มลองไวน์เบลนด์แดงที่เข้มข้นและสมดุลจาก Santa Helena

name: Bertinga  Sassi Chiusi Rosso Tuscany IGT
desc_en_short: Bertinga's Sassi Chiusi is a vibrant Tuscan IGT blending 85% Sangiovese with 15% Merlot, vinified in stainless steel and concrete for freshness, delivering expressive red fruit, iris, violet, and a lively, spice-laced finish of impressive length.

name: Vintae  La Garnacha Salvaje del Moncayo
wine_color: Medium-deep garnet colour with bright red edge.
desc_en_short: Medium-deep garnet colour with bright red edge. Intense and elegant red berry fruit character, with tobacco and herbs notes. Rich and fruity with well balanced freshness. Elegant, with unique varietal characteristics and long aftertaste.

name: Monfort  Pinot Nero Trentino DOC
desc_en_short:
Father of Pinot Blanc and Pinot Gris, Pinot Noir is probably the most prestigious variety in the
world. From its grapes are born many great wines in Burgundy and Champagne. Versatile, it
manages to merge elegance with capacity for aging. In Trentino, it is adaptive only in a few
areas. Monfort’s Pinot Nero grapes are grown in a hilly area in Cirè di Pergine in Valsugana.

name: Angove  Naturalis Organic Shiraz
desc_en_short: Brooding purple-red with magenta hues. Aromas of wild foraged berries, spice and plum precede a soft, full palate that finishes with richness and subtle oak undertones.

name: Angove  Naturalis Organic Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Brooding, rich red with purple hues.
desc_en_short: Brooding, rich red with purple hues. Aromas of black currant, chocolate and cedar precede a soft, full palate that adds plum and subtle oak characters to the mix.

name: Bell' Agio  Chianti DOCG Fiasco
desc_en_short: While Chianti may be the single best-known Italian wine in the world, its taste and quality can vary dramatically among producers. For wine lovers, Bell’agio Chianti D.O.C.G. represents a treasure they can trust.

name: Escorihuela Gascón Familia Gascón Malbec
desc_en_short: Bright red color. A fruit forward Malbec with aromas of fresh plums, blueberries and cherries. Its subtle contact with oak delivers notes of vanilla and cocoa. On the palate the wine is soft and accessible with simple, mostly fruity flavours. Mid-bodied, flows fresh and delicate with round and velvety tannins.

name: Escorihuela Gascón Gran Reserva Malbec
wine_color: Deep red color with purple hues.
desc_en_short: Deep red color with purple hues. An expressive and fruity nose that delivers notes of fresh red fruits such as plums and berries. It is complemented by hints of red fruit marmalade, violets, and smoky aromas provided by oak aging. A juicy and fresh red wine with sharp fruity flavors. Broad, with a velvety texture, good balance, and sweet rounded tannins. Lingering finish and fruity aftertaste. It is undoubtedly the wine to please palates that appreciate intense and expressive wines.

name: Oddero  Langhe Nebbiolo DOC
desc_en_short: A typical Nebbiolo, with a ruby-red color, a beautiful bouquet of violets and red fruits, with pleasant tannins which recall the earth of the Langhe.

name: Chateau Graves de Pez  Saint-Estephe
desc_en_short: The nose offers notes of crushed strawberry, wild raspberry and more slightly vanilla essence combined with fine hints of liquorice and a very discreet hint of sweet blond tobacco. The palate offers freshness, juiciness, minerality and good definition. On the palate, this wine expresses notes of pulpy/juicy raspberry, pulpy/juicy red berries and more slightly of lily, combined with touches of racy minerality, nutmeg and a fine hint of vanilla essence.

name: Clay Creek Old Vine Zinfandel
desc_en_short: The Clay Creek Vineyards Lodi Old Vine Zinfandel is a bold wine opening with rich aromas of blackberry bramble, black raspberry, toasted oak and hints of rose. This fruit forward wine boasts intense avors of blackberry, dark plum and lingering oak nuances. Balanced acidity and supple tannins add complexity and depth to the finish.

name: Blason d'Issan  Margaux
desc_en_short: A juicy and very delicious red with plum, light pepper, chocolate and hazelnut aromas and flavors. It’s medium-bodied with a pretty center palate and a bright fruity finish with just the right amount of tannins that frame the wine nicely.

name: Le Colombier De Brown Pessac-Leognan AOC
desc_en_short: Le Colombier de Brown is the approachable second wine of Château Brown in Pessac-Léognan, blending Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon into an elegant, fruit-forward expression of Graves terroir — ready to enjoy now yet structured enough to reward short-term cellaring.

name: Chateau Cantenac Brown 2018
desc_en_short:
Cantenac Brown 2018 presents a wine of power and finesse, offering intense dark fruit, silky tannins, and beautifully integrated oak and spice. The bouquet is richly aromatic, reflecting the best of Margaux terroir.

It is a wine of both immediate pleasure and long-term potential, offering elegance and structure in perfect balance—ideal for special occasions or cellaring over the next two decades.

name: Chateau Pavie Macquin  Saint-Emilion
desc_en_short: Pavie Macquin is a total stunner. Rich, lush and inviting, This Wine is a drop-dead gorgeous beauty. Sweet red cherry, plum, rose petal, lavender and mint are all given an extra kick of allure by silky tannins that caress the palate from start to finish. There is a level of precision and nuance here that is simply breathtaking. The purity of the fruit is just mind-boggling.

name: Chateau Peymouton  Saint-Emilion
desc_en_short:
Château Peymouton is managed by the same team and enjoys the same care and attention as Château Laroque. Harvest takes place based on the individual maturity of each parcel, and the wine is vinified gently with particular care given to the expression of fresh fruit. Fermentation in thermo-regulated stainless steel tanks, aging partly in French oak barrels.

The wines of Château Peymouton express the elegance of this historic terroir in a vibrant, fruit-driven style that can be enjoyed after just a few years of cellaring.

name: Domaine du Vieux Bourg  Morgon Cinq Terres
desc_en_short: This Morgon blended with fruit from five different vineyards is deliciously dark and brooding. Deep purple to ruby in color, it has a nose of black plum, apricot, raspberry, strawberry and black cherry. Concentration on the midpalate carries additional notes of dried violet blossom and hay.

name: Renieri  Brunello di Montalcino DOCG 2018
desc_en_short: This has complex aromas of mulberries, strawberries, red tea, dried flowers, cocoa powder, wild thyme and hazelnuts. So bright and lively with a medium to full body and firm, fine-grained tannins. Poised and fresh, even refreshing, with wild berry fruit lingering on a lengthy finish.

name: Robert Mondavi   Napa Valley Red Blend
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 13% Cabernet Franc, 9% Merlot, 4% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: On the nose, Ripe plum, black cherry, cedar, and graham cracker. On the palate, sweet tobacco, dried herbs, blackberries, rich dark chocolate, and toast. Juicy and plush, with fine tannins but a layer of rich creaminess here also carries through to the finish - enjoyable now and for years to come.

name: Alpaca  Organic Red
desc_en_short: Alpaca wines were created to convey the authenticity of Chilean wines, through fruity, tasty wines and for daily consumption.Inspired by the friendly personality of this charming creature from the Andean highlands, who invites us to delight in its texture and feel the softness of its voluminous body, just like our wines.

name: Duckhorn  Canvasback "Red Mountain" Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 7% Merlot, 7% Malbec, 2% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: This lush and alluring Cabernet Sauvignon begins with aromas of ripe strawberry, grenadine and Bing cherry that leap from the glass, followed by notes of sarsaparilla, root spices, black licorice cinnamon and star anise. On the palate it is both luxurious and energetic, with plush tannins and ripe red berry flavors balanced by enlivening energy and sophisticated hints of cigar wrapper, granitic minerality and sweet baking spices.

name: Duckhorn  Decoy Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: This lush and alluring Pinot Noir draws you in with aromas of black cherry, wild strawberry, red currant, black tea and sage, as well as rustic hints of earthy forest floor. On the palate, the generous ripe berry flavors are framed by bright, balanced acidity and refined tannins that carry the wine to a long, silky finish.

name: Sena  2020
wine_color: A dark ruby-red color with violet highlights.
desc_en_short: A deep and beautiful garnet-red color with violet hues, the 2020 Seña presents complexity on the nose with multiple layers of fresh red-fruit aromas such as cherries and raspberries accompanied by violets and pleasing touches of dill and rosemary, all framed by light notes of sweet spices. The palate shows young fruits, more sweet spices, and smooth balsamic tones. It is fresh and juicy with elegant fine-grained tannins that create to a silky and pleasing sensation. The 2020 vintage of Seña shows elegance and balance with an ample and profound finish.

name: Joseph Phelps  "Freestone Vineyard" Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Pinot Noir opens with intensely floral aromatics of red fruit, dried savory herbs and violets. A viscous, layered wine with balanced acid and tannin structure, jammy boysenberry, baking spice, and sour cherry notes linger to a complex finish.

name: Belena  Shiraz
desc_en_short: A crowd-pleasing Australian Shiraz from the Calabria Family, delivering spicy dark forest fruit and plum on both nose and palate — approachable, alluring, and made with genuine heart.

name: Louis Jadot  Coteaux Bourguignons Rouge
flavor_tags: Raspberry, Mushroom, Cherry, Violet, Earthy, Oak
desc_en_short: Louis Jadot's Coteaux Bourguignons is an approachable, elegant entry into the world of Burgundy Pinot Noir — light-bodied and silky with fresh red cherry, raspberry, violet, and subtle earthy depth, showing the gentle finesse that makes Burgundy so distinctive.

name: Chateau Pericou  AOP Bordeaux Rouge
desc_en_short: Intense garnet red in color, it shows hints of plum, blackberry and cassis on the nose, with pleasant hints of rose. In the mouth it is soft and mature, complex and evolved. Excellent to combine with all meat recipes, both white and red.

name: Chateau de la Vieille Tour  Bordeaux Supérieur AOP
wine_color: Ruby red (รูบี้แดง)
desc_en_short:
สัมผัสรส Bordeaux Supérieur ที่เนียนและสมดุลจาก Chateau de la Vieille Tour นำเสนอไวน์บอร์โดซ์ที่กลมกล่อมและเป็นธรรมชาติ ด้วยรสผลไม้ที่สุกและกลิ่นเครื่องเทศที่ละมุน

CERTIFICATION:

Since 2021: Certified BIODYNAMIC

Agriculture France

Certified Organic by QUALISUD FR-BIO-16

name: Vinum Terra  Bordeaux AOP (No Sulfites)
desc_en_short: ค้นพบไวน์ Bordeaux ปราศจากซัลไฟต์ที่สดใสและบริสุทธิ์

name: Reserve Tradition du Chateau de la Vieille Tour Bordeaux Supérieur AOP
wine_color: Ruby red (รูบี้แดง)
desc_en_short:
ลองสัมผัส Reserve Tradition จาก Chateau de la Vieille Tour ที่ผสมผสานรสชาติอย่างลงตัว ไวน์ Bordeaux Supérieur ที่มีความกลมกล่อมและความเป็นธรรมชาติของไวน์ Bordeaux

Agriculture France

Certified Organic by QUALISUD FR-BIO-16

name: Chateau D'Armailhac  2021
wine_color: The wine is dark and deep with purple tints.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 22% Merlot, 13% Cabernet Franc, 2% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: The 2021 Château D'Armailhac is terrific and, like all the releases under the Mouton-Rothschild umbrella, it has terrific depth of fruit and impressive richness. Ripe cassis, smoky tobacco, graphite, and ample minerality all emerge from this medium-bodied, beautifully balanced 2021. It plays in the fresher style of the vintage yet has a great mid-palate, good concentration, and a great finish. It will shine with just 2-3 years of bottle age and cruise for 15+ years in cold cellars.

name: Daou  Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: The 2021 DAOU Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon is emblematic of Paso Robles as a world-class region for Bordeaux-style wines. Intense purple-red hues foreshadow deep aromas of black fruit, pomegranate, tobacco, mocha, and bay leaf. Trailing notes of clove, nutmeg, and vanilla emerge as the wine opens up in the glass. Opulent textures expand across the palate with flavors of red fruit, blueberry, and chocolate-covered raspberry. The overall experience is fresh and rich, concluding with velvety tannins and impressive length.

name: Pingorote  Tempranillo (Vegan)
desc_en_short: A cherry red color. Clean and bright, aromas of fruits of the forest and figs with hints of red fruit and liquorice well structured and easy to drink food matching: cheese, pâté, tapas, barbecue meat, carpaccio and poultry.

name: Pingorote  Tempranillo Reserva
wine_color: Cherry in color with burgundy edge
desc_en_short: Pingorote Tempranillo Reserva is a Vegan red wine. Aged in French and American oak barrels for 12 months, this aged red wine with its La Mancha Protected Designation of Origin is perfect for those seeking intensity without sacrificing the smoothness of a good reserve.

name: Pastourelle De Clerc Milon  "Le 2nd Vin De Chateau Clerc Milon" 2016
wine_color: A beautiful, radiant colour with glittering highlights.
desc_en_short: Discreet and elegant nose which opens up with airing to reveal succulent aromas of brandied morello cherries mingled with peppery, minty notes. From a substantial and powerful attack, the mid-palate reveals a close-knit, creamy texture set off by well-integrated, structured tannins. The succulence hinted at on the nose is expressed in black fruit and mocha notes, leading into an opulent finish which underlines the wine’s complexity.

name: Opus One  Vintage 2012
desc_en_short:
WINEMAKING

After a warm and dry winter, generous rains returned in March just in time for bud-break and provided the water needed for the rest of the year. Mother Nature continued to favor the vintage with a superb growing season characterized by moderate temperatures and bountiful sunshine resulting in one of the valley’s most exceptional vintages. At harvest, the fruit exhibited the classic style of our Oakville estate vineyards with incredible depth of flavor, layers of complexity and excellent structure. Picking started on September 21st at the fresh fruit stage of ripeness to keep flavors bright and lively. Through careful and precise management of the incoming fruit, harvest continued evenly until it was completed on October 20th. The 2012 Opus One effuses fresh dark fruit aromas accentuated by subtler notes of forest-floor and graphite. The wine’s round mouthfeel and satiny tannins wrap around classic flavors of cassis, blackberry and black cherry. This refined and age-worthy wine simultaneously offers a long lingering finish, with lively acidity and a sturdy structure at the close.

name: Chateau Pichon  Longueville Baron 2019
desc_en_short: The 2019 Pichon-Longueville Baron is a Bordeaux blend, predominantly comprising 87% Cabernet Sauvignon and 13% Merlot. Originating from the Pauillac region in Bordeaux, France, this red wine, with an alcohol content of 14.5%, has garnered exceptional reviews from various professional critics, highlighting its distinguished quality and aging potential.

name: Chateau Lynch Bages  AOC Pauillac 2019
wine_color: Medium to deep garnet-purple in color.
desc_en_short: The Chateau Lynch Bages 2019 is in line with the previous wines of the property with a blend dominated by Cabernet Sauvignon. This great Bordeaux wine offers a characteristic fruity nose with fresh and spicy notes, as well as fine woody notes. The smooth and balanced palate is supported by a beautifully dense and powerful tannic structure, providing plenty of precision and fruit.

name: Costera  Red Blend (Cabernet Sauvignon) (Fruit Wine Blend) (Screw Cap)
desc_en_short: Smooth and easy drinking with ripe berry and red & dark fruit flavors

name: Cantina Tollo Primitivo Puglia
flavor_tags: Dried Herbs, Blackberry, Chocolate, Cinnamon, Cherry, Cocoa, Plum, Oak
desc_en_short: From one of southern Italy's most reliable cooperatives, this Primitivo is a warm, fruit-forward red showing ripe blackberry, plum, chocolate, and a touch of sweet spice — full-bodied, smooth, and built for the table.

name: Orapiena  Montepulciano D'Abruzzo
wine_color: Intense ruby red in colour with purple hues.
desc_en_short: Orapiena's Montepulciano d'Abruzzo pours a deep ruby with purple hues, delivering ripe red fruit, vanilla, cocoa, and warming spice on a full-bodied, velvety palate — a generous, food-friendly red from one of southern Italy's most reliable appellations.

name: CUNE  Crianza
desc_en_short: “The first wine produced by the company took its name from the initials CVNE. A fortuitous misspelling between the U and the V created the iconic Cune brand. Initially, this wine was made in the style of the Bordeaux Medoc clarets. It then evolved to become a Crianza, originally known as "Third Year”

name: Chateau Cos D'Estournel  Saint-Estephe 2018
wine_color: Deep opaque ruby-black, signaling great concentration and long aging potential.
desc_en_short:
Cos d’Estournel 2018 is the embodiment of power wrapped in elegance. Predominantly made from Cabernet Sauvignon, its structure is bold and muscular, while Merlot contributes a plush texture and softness that balances the wine beautifully. It’s a wine of depth, opulence, and poise—with dark fruit, spice, and mineral nuances that evoke both intrigue and sophistication.

Despite its concentration, the wine maintains remarkable balance, showcasing vibrant acidity and refined tannins. It is a Bordeaux that feels like "strength draped in velvet"—confident yet composed.

name: Ferraton Pere & Fils  Hermitage “les Miaux” Rouge
desc_en_short: Powerful and fleshy wine with smooth tannins. Aromas of very ripe black fruit. Long lasting and persisting wine.

name: Adulation  Zinfandel
desc_en_short: A dark ruby-red color and violet reflections. Its aromatic profile is intense and complex with a strong concentration of black fruit, plums, blackberries, and cherries, followed by spices, dark chocolate, tobacco, and leather. On the palate, It is a well-balanced wine refreshing acidity and velvety tannins. The finish is long and smooth and recalls fruity notes.

name: Domaine Marchand -Grillot  Gevrey-Chambertin 'Enjouise'
desc_en_short:
This wine offers a textbook expression of Gevrey-Chambertin, with notes of wild cherry, dried flowers, and subtle earthiness, supported by mineral-driven tension and gentle oak integration.

Elegant and focused, this Pinot Noir will evolve gracefully over 5–10 years, revealing new dimensions with cellaring while already charming in its youthful precision.

name: Louis Latour  Chambolle-Musigny
desc_en_short: The 180 hectares of vines in the tiny village of Chambolle-Musigny are a soft interlude amongst the great vineyards of the Côte de Nuits, a moment of finesse before the masculin wines from Vougeot, Morey-Saint-Denis, and Gevrey-Chambertin. Chambolle-Musigny is one of the smallest Côte d'Or appellations and produces mostly red wines. The limestone soil is renowned for producing wines that are delicately scented and very elegant.

name: Blowfish  Cabernet Merlot
desc_en_short: This wine is Generous ripe blackcurrant and soft notes of cloves on the palate Light to Medium bodied. Hints of juicy blackberries, robust taste of plum and a touch of spice. Full flavoured, smooth and a well rounded wine, soft tannins

name: Xige Estate  Jade Dove Red (Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot)
desc_en_short: From the Helan Mountain wine region of Ningxia, Xige Estate's Jade Dove Red blends Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot into an elegant, fruit-forward red with silky tannins, ripe berry aromas, and a polished structure that punches well above its category.

name: Velenosi  SOLESTÀ Limited Edition Rosso Piceno DOC Superiore
desc_en_short:
Intense and complex. Clear scents of red fruit preserve and 
nuances of tobacco, cinnamon and licorice.Fruity scents of 
red currant, cherry and moresco cherry as well as nuances 
of tobac-co,licorice, cinnamon and nutmeg. Good structure, 
complex and harmonious.

name: Bodega Aleanna El Enemigo  Malbec
desc_en_short: El Enemigo Malbec displays rich and concentrated aromas of black fruit such as cherries and berries. It's full-bodied with spice, blackberry, black cherry, pepper, and floral notes leading into an elegant and lengthy finish. Certified Sustainable by Bodegas de Argentina.

name: Bodega Aleanna  Gran Enemigo Gualtallary
desc_en_short: 100 points James Suckling - "A complex, restrained and deliciously austere cabernet franc with damp earth, oyster shells, blueberries, thyme, rosemary and mushrooms. Super serious and chalky on the palate with lots of dissolved, minerally-textured tannins. Very long and uncompromising! An incredible cabernet franc from Gualtallary by Alejandro Vigil. Extremely pure, mineral and seductive. A fabulous cabernet franc that grows on the palate with remarkable tension and texture. I’d want to drink a bottle now even it can hold extremely well."

name: Tikal  Natural Organic Red Blend
desc_en_short: This is Malbec and Syrah in their most natural expression of untouched grapes shining through and capturing the true essence of the biodynamic vineyard where they were picked. It has a beautiful pomegranate color and aroma of fresh red cherries with light French oak undertones. The palate is fresh and lively with black raspberry and spiced mocha notes.

name: Ernesto Catena Vineyards Alma Negra (Malbec ,Bonarda ,P. Verdot)
desc_en_short: A wine with dense, dark, and intriguing aromas of dark berries and coffee with a wonderful earthy aroma. It flows smoothly with rounded tannins which last for a long time with echoes of cooked ripe blackcurrants.

name: Two Hands  Gnarly Dudes Shiraz Barossa
desc_en_short:
Gnarly Dudes, An unctuous yet classic Barossa Valley Shiraz. After the popularity of bottling this wine in magnums the past two vintages, it’s back again! Adding a bit of theatrics to the dinner table or a friends birthday party, this Barossa Valley Shiraz staple will be able to go anywhere with you.

“I’m the Dude, so that’s what you call me. That or, uh, His Dudeness, or uh, Duder, or El Duderino, if you’re not into the whole brevity thing.” – The Dude, The Big Lebowski

name: Poggio Al Lupo  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
Poggio al Lupo is a wine that expresses the Maremma territory and its great oenological potential, which has immediately won considerable recognition. Endowed with persuasive personality, this Cabernet Sauvignon blends territorial and varietal character with extreme elegance.

It was produced for the first time in 2003 and takes its name from the homonymous winery located in the heart of the Tuscan Maremma. An area of Etruscan settlements in the past, it is now one of the most vocated for wine production. A vineyard that dominates a breathtaking panorama: Giglio Island in front and Talamone to the side. It is located at 120 meters above sea level, in a particular hillside characterized by red soils rich in skeleton and clay, where our Cabernet find its perfect habitat. In fact, these variety gives us an extremely identifiable wine: high amount of polyphenolic substances, good alcoholic presence and an important acidity give it structure, complexity and longevity.

name: Noble Vines  "181" Lodi Merlot
desc_en_short: Vine types perform at their best when they are put to work in the type of soil and climate from which they were born. The clay soil and temperate Mediterranean climate of our Clay Station Vineyard on a breezy knoll in Lodi make this a perfect California home for the vaunted Merlot 181 vine stock from Pomerol, France. 181 Merlot vine stock is used to thick, silty soils that hold their moisture from winter rains into the growing season. Like Bordeaux, Lodi offers stone “cobbles” over a layer of clay red soil. These soils allow for deep root penetration and a stable vine during times of low moisture and heat. This allows the roots to “reach out” and establish a balanced vine.

name: Shumi  Saperavi Iberiuli Premium
desc_en_short: This wine features aromas of black plum and Christmas spices. On the palate it offers good play between acidity and mellow tannins, with flavors of black cherry, strawberry, dark chocolate and violet with an orange zest finish.

name: Shumi  Kindzmarauli
desc_en_short: This late-picked Saperavi from Kindzmarauli micro-zone offers an exceptional bouquet of naturally semi-sweet notes with the typical Saperavi taste of ripe fruits. It has a silky smooth structure.

name: Fontanafredda  Langhe Nebbiolo Ebbio DOC
desc_en_short: When young, it features a fragrance which is wonderfully spontaneous and full of surprise. In its bouquet, colour, and generous, velvety body this langhe Nebbiolo brings out all the typical qualities of the magnificent vine it is made from. Later in life its colour becomes garnet-red with delicate orange shades, and its nose deepens, with traces of withered flowers, such as roses and, above-all, geraniums. Its warm, soft, well-bodied flavour is velvety and well-balanced, lingering in the mouth.

name: Penfolds  Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz (750 ml) Limited Relese Lunar New Year Snake Edition
desc_en_short:
Celebrate the Year of the Snake with an iconic Bin 389 Magnum presented in a Lunar New Year-inspired gift box.

Bin 389 was often referred to as ‘Baby Grange’, in part because components of the wine are matured in the same barrels that held the previous vintage of Grange. First made in 1960 by the legendary Max Schubert, this was the wine that helped forge Penfolds reputation with red wine drinkers by combining the structure of Cabernet Sauvignon with the richness of Shiraz. Exemplifying the judicious balance of fruit and oak, Bin 389 highlights the generous mid-palate Penfolds is known for.

name: Château Morin  Saint Estephe
flavor_tags: Blackcurrant, Dried Herbs, Dark Fruit, Graphite, Mineral, Earthy, Cedar, Plum, Oak
desc_en_short: Château Morin is a classic Saint-Estèphe from the Left Bank of Bordeaux — structured and serious with dark fruit, pencil shavings, earthy depth, and the firm, mineral tannins that define this appellation's rugged character.

name: Chateau Leoville Poyferre Saint-Julien Grand Cru Classé 2017
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 27% Merlot, 3% Cabernet Franc And 2% Petit Verdot,
desc_en_short:
The blessing of a great terroir

As the devastating effects of frosts have a serious impact on the viticultural landscape of Bordeaux, Saint-Julien can give praise thanks to Saint Vincent, patron Saint of the vineyard workers, blessed by his protection from the worst of the exceptional frosts and safeguarded for the duration of the vintage.

2017, not too dissimilar to its companions of misfortune in sevens, started off on the wrong foot. A very dry winter and late severe spring frosts were then turned around with a warm pleasant summer.

This beautiful weather coupled with our unique terroir really raised the bar for our 2017 vintage. The result is a wine that is dense, marked with an exquisite aromatic expression, all wrapped in a vintage with surprising cellaring potential. An outsider, quite contrary to its reputation!

name: Vigneti del Salento  Zolla Primitivo Di Manduria Riserva
wine_color: Ruby red colour with violet reflections.
desc_en_short: Ruby red colour with violet reflections. Offers a complex bouquet with notes of cherry, blackberries, black currant combined with scent of spice and vanilla, coffee and toffee. A red with great body, velvet tannins and long persistence.

name: Fantini Casale Vecchio Montepulciano D'Abruzzo
wine_color: Strong ruby red with garnet highlights.
desc_en_short: Strong ruby red with garnet highlights. Intense, persistent, fruity with a strong aroma of ripe red fruits, “amaretto”, marzipan, spices. Dry, warm, elegant tannins.

name: Fantini Edizione 21 Cinque Autoctioni Vino Rosso
desc_en_short: Very deep garnet red. Very intense and persistent, with notes of cherry and blackcurrant, herbs, cinnamon, cloves, cocoa, licorice and hints of mineral. Great structure, good balance between alcohol and freshness, velvety tannins, very persistent with a long finish ; ready to drink or can well be aged for long.

name: Maison Jaffelin  Bourgogne Hautes-Cotes de Beaune Rouge
desc_en_short: Crimson colour. Aromas of cheery, liquorice and sometimes violet. A firm, straightforward taste, tannins plesant once matured, and just the right amount of body.

name: Tavernello Vino Rosso d’Italia
desc_en_short: Tavernello Vino Rosso d’Italia is a strong and intense red wine in colour. It has delicate floral aromas and a rounded palate of dark fruits. Try it with grilled pork chops or simply on its own.

name: Opus One  Vintage 2021
desc_en_short: The Opus One 2021 effuses seductive, dark-fruit aromas of crushed cassis, blackberry, and black cherry with subtle hints of violet, vanilla, and baking spices. Bright and fresh on the attack, concentrated flavors mirror the aromas and are coupled with an exceptionally plush, creamy texture in the mid-palate from the fine-grained tannins. Poignant notes of black tea, licorice, and dark chocolate lead to a long lingering finish. With attentive cellaring, the wine will delight for decades to come.

name: Chateau La Gasquerie AOP Bordeaux Rouge
desc_en_short: Chateau La Gasquerie embodies the essence of classic Bordeaux winemaking with modern accessibility. Sourced from vineyards in the Entre-Deux-Mers area—one of the region’s most food-friendly terroirs—it delivers a Merlot-dominant blend that reflects balance, heritage, and everyday elegance. Crafted by a family-run estate committed to quality and tradition.

name: Hopes End  Barrel Selection Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Plum compote, forest floor, berries and chocolate with spicy aged tones and a soft ripe tantalising finish from the brandy tempered oak.

name: Riporta  Zinfandel
desc_en_short: Its intense ruby color with beautiful violet reflections catches the eye and promises unforgettable taste experiences. This wine stands out with a rich bouquet, dominated by the aromas of juicy red fruits, creating a harmonious composition for the palate.

name: District Series Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Deep ruby-black in the glass, this Cabernet displays textbook aromas of dried currant, tobacco, black pepper and pencil shavings on the nose. The palate is rich, but not overbearing, showing chocolate covered cherry, spiced fig and bright raspberry flavors before a long finish that shows tannin and acid in near perfect balance

name: VIK  Milla Cala
desc_en_short: With an irresistible character, expressing fruit and structure, Milla Cala is a harmonious blend with a persistent elegance that maintains a flawless equilibrium between aroma and taste. This assemblage is a tribute to its origin: the meeting between the new and old world. "Milla" means gold in Mapudungun, while "Cala" is the Spanish translation of Vik. It has an irresistible character, expressive fruit notes, and a persistent elegance that perfectly balances aroma and taste.

name: Sena  2021
wine_color: A beautiful deep ruby colour with violet hues.
grape_variety: Carmenère, Malbec, Cabernet Sauvignon, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: "Seña 2021 is a beautiful deep ruby colour with violet hues. The nose reveals delicate notes of strawberries, cassis and rose petals, framed by hints of cloves, spice and cocoa. Red fruit and blackcurrants, pastries and dark chocolate make for a delicious palate where the tension is perfectly balanced by the juicy acidity and ne-grained tannins, tracing a smooth and vertical backbone through the palate. is wine can be enjoyed for many years to come."

name: Tenuta Moraia  Il Pacchia Maremma Toscana
wine_color: Medium ruby red with garnet edges.
desc_en_short: Medium ruby red with garnet edges. Inviting nose of mocha, milk chocolate, then a slightly deep note. Soft and flattering on the palate notion, then quickly loses drive, slightly bitter in the aftertaste.

name: Domaine Pierre Girardin Volnay Premier Cru Les Taillepieds
desc_en_short: Pierre Girardin is the 13th generation of his family to make wine in Burgundy. This brilliant yet youthful winegrower grew up learning in the vines and cellar of his father, Vincent Girardin. Pierre’s viticulture is organic, moving toward full certification. He follows the lunar calendar for every action and uses next-level pure compost from the family farm.

name: Reguta Carant Tre Venezie I.G.P.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon , Merlot , Refosco Dal Peduncolo Rosso
desc_en_short: A richly perfumed Tre Venezie blend from Friuli-Venezia Giulia, Reguta Carant weaves Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Refosco dal Peduncolo Rosso into a velvety, full-bodied red with enticing notes of cherry, spice, and nutmeg — structured yet approachable.

name: Bulichella Maria Shizuko
desc_en_short:
Fleshy fruit of plum and sweet
cherry, plus tobacco, coffee and a
hint of orange zest. Spreads wide
and round on the palate, with
hearty fruit, on grippy tannins,
until the long finish.

name: Poliziano In Violas Cortona Merlot D.O.C.
desc_en_short:
Ruby red to the eye, it gives off
a bouquet of notes of cherry,
vanilla and oak, embellished with
light touches of tobacco. Elegant
and intense on the palate, it
closes on a finish of remarkable
persistence

name: Lohsa Mandrone Di Lohsa Maremma Toscana D.O.C.
desc_en_short:
Ruby red in color. The nose traces
an olfactory progression that
passes through notes of blackberry
and blueberry, and then turns on
perceptions of vanilla. The sip
is medium-bodied, with round
tannins, soft, powerful, elegant
and structured.

name: Feudi Bizantini “8” Vino Rosso
wine_color: Very intense and elegant ruby red color
desc_en_short:
Very intense and elegant ruby red
color; ample and complex fruity
fragrance with hints of plum,
cherry jam, and tobacco, slightly
spicy; a full-bodied wine, soft
and rich in tannins, with a finish
that offers notes of cocoa, coffee,
and vanilla. Richly flavored first
courses, red meat, and game. A
meditation wine.

name: Chateau Les Clavelines Saint Emilion Grand Cru
wine_color: Deep garnet red with violet reflections
desc_en_short: A refined Saint-Émilion Grand Cru 2022 highlighting Merlot’s lush fruit and Cabernet Franc’s floral spice. Smooth, full-bodied, and elegant — a modern Right Bank Bordeaux with classic charm.

name: Enjoy It Non Alcoholic Cabernet Sauvinon
desc_en_short: This Cabernet Sauvignon has the aroma of dark cherry, black berries and cedar wood. rich in the taste of plum, dark berries, and dark chocolate, very round flavors in the palate. It's good as paring beef, barbecue, any other red meat and pasta.

name: Larkmead Solari Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A legendary, single-vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon from Larkmead, known for its immense power, concentration, and long aging potential.

name: Finca Fella El Maso Garnacha Tintorera
desc_en_short: A bold, single‑variety expression from Almansa using old bush‑vines of Garnacha Tintorera at high altitude, offering remarkable intensity, purity and depth for its region.

name: Torbreck The Pict 2007
wine_color: Totally opaque, black-dark red with a deep brick-red hue.
desc_en_short: A bold and muscular Barossa Mataro, Torbreck The Pict 2007 offers savory intensity and layered complexity, crafted from ancient vines and aged to reveal the full depth of this noble Rhône variety.

name: Torbreck Factor 2007
wine_color: Deep, opaque crimson-purple with a dark, brooding core.
desc_en_short: Torbreck Factor 2007 is a bold, muscular Barossa Shiraz with deep, dark fruit character, spicy complexity and ripe tannin structure — a wine of power and refinement that showcases top‑tier vintage material.

name: Chateau Mitrotes Saint Emilion Grand Cru
desc_en_short: 91 points Wine Enthusiast - "The wine's dark chocolate and spice aroma and full-bodied black fruits and generous texture, promise some good aging. This is a full-bodied wine, rich and worth aging. Drink from 2027." — Michael Laudenslager

name: Chateau Pichon Longueville Baron 2009
desc_en_short: Château Pichon Longueville Baron 2009 is a benchmark Pauillac from one of Bordeaux's most celebrated Second Growth estates — a powerful, age-worthy blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot shaped by the legendary 2009 growing season and the estate's storied gravelly terroir.

name: Penfolds Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz 2023 with Gift Boxes
desc_en_short:
Celebrate the holiday season with Bin 389, a benchmark Penfolds wine. The structure of Cabernet Sauvignon meets the richness of South Australian Shiraz. This 2023 vintage leaves a lasting impression of power and elegance, layered with dark fruit complexity, fine tannins, and a long, savoury finish. 

The limited-release shipping container gift box is thoughtfully crafted as a collectable keepsake to treasure or gift.

Signed, sealed, delivered. From Penfolds... to the World.

name: Penfolds FWT 585 Cabernet Merot Petit Verdot 2022 with Gift Box
wine_color: Deep crimson with a vibrant garnet core.
desc_en_short:
Celebrate the holiday season with Penfolds FWT 585, a French Winemaking Trial shaped by Bordeaux vineyards and honed by Penfolds signature House Style.

Encased in this limited-release gift box, is the 2022 vintage. Classic Bordeaux varietals of Cabernet, Merlot and Petit Verdot meet Penfolds signature fruit-forward, mid palate generosity. Explore black cherry, chocolate mint and delicate violet notes.

Signed, sealed, delivered. From Penfolds... to the World.

name: Domaine Du Pegau  Chateauneuf du Pape da Capo 2020
wine_color: A deep purple, dark and dense.
desc_en_short:
A deep purple, dark and dense. On the nose, ripe black fruits like plum and blackberry, licorice and black pepper. On the palate, it is focused, linear, deep and powerful. This wine shows great length with well-integrated tannins.

Try with a rib eye and other grilled steaks, game dishes, or a number of chocolate based dishes.

name: Penfolds Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz Lunar New Year Horse Edition (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Penfolds Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz arrives in a limited Lunar New Year Horse Edition, blending 51% Cabernet Sauvignon with 49% Shiraz for a South Australian classic that delivers dark fruit richness, exotic spice, and mouth-coating tannins in an elegant, collectible package.

name: 7 Cascine  Prosecco Extra Dry Spumante
desc_en_short: This superior sparkling treat is bursting with fresh green apple and settling citrus. Made from the moment you inhale the aromas your mouth begins to involuntarily salivate, only sedated once the long dry finish has you contemplating another cheeky sip!

name: Freixenet  Cordon Negro Brut
desc_en_short: This is the world’s favourite Spanish sparkling wine and is known for its beautiful and sexy black bottle. Its fresh, crisp and fruity aroma goes with just about everything and magically makes every moment just that bit more special. A light, modern Cava with a very refreshing style and lots of bubbles that really last. When you taste it, you’ll pick up hints of citrus fruit and an aroma that reminds you of both apple and pear as well as peach, melon and pineapple.

name: Freixenet  Vintage Reserva Brut
wine_color: yellow colour and very fine bubbles
desc_en_short: Brut Vintage is crafted for those special moments that call for celebration. Vintage moments, like an intimate candlelight dinner with close friends or private celebrations, when the occasion demands an elegant sparkling wine in a beautiful bottle. With its classic taste characteristics and striking presentation, Brut Vintage is the perfect companion for those vintage occasions.

name: Opera Prima  Gold Moscato
desc_en_short: This distinctive sparkling wine boasts beautiful rose petal and lychee fruit aromas and luscious, silky-sweet flavors balanced by a crisp, refreshing finish. Lovely to sip on its own, it’s also delicious with a wide range of desserts. Serve well- chilled.

name: Opera Prima  Pink Moscato
desc_en_short: An intense aroma of fresh berries and tropical fruits with hints of white flower petals. Delicate bubbles caress the palate offering a silky and pleasant sweetness well balanced by a crisp, refreshing finish. Ideal on its own, as an aperitif or with all types of sweets and desserts. Serve it very cold, between 7 and 9°.

name: Zonin  Prosecco Brut
desc_en_short: The flavour is very well-balanced and appealing, with the extremely delicate almond note that is typical of Prosecco. An excellent aperitif, It can also be served throughout the meal - including desert - as along as the dishes are not too strongly.

name: Champagne Ernest Rapeneau  Brut
wine_color: A clear colour with a delightful foam.
desc_en_short: 84 points in Wine Enthusuast - "This tastes soft and almost off-dry, despite its brut label. The flavors are of off-ripe apple, creamed pear and a light taste of acidity. It's all fine and in balance, it just misses vivacity and freshness."

name: Bollinger  Special Cuvee
wine_color: A golden colour, distinctive of black grape varieties; very fine bubbles.
desc_en_short: The name of Bollinger’s emblematic champagne, with its English spelling, encapsulates its entire history. It was the British agent of Georges Bollinger who, in 1911, christened it “Special Cuvée”, as he found the expression “non-vintage brut” did not befit a champagne of such subtlety. Over a century later, the name of the champagne emblematic of Bollinger’s expertise still encapsulates its entire history.

name: Villa Sandi  Prosecco Spumante "Il Fresco" (375 ml)
wine_color: Very pale straw yellow and fine, persistent perlage.
desc_en_short: Very pale straw yellow and fine, persistent perlage. This aroma is fruity and flowery with hints of ripe golden apple and small mountain flowers. The dry, fresh and flavoursome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.

name: Villa Sandi  Prosecco Spumante "Il Fresco"
wine_color: Very pale straw yellow and fine, persistent perlage.
desc_en_short: Very pale straw yellow and fine, persistent perlage. The aroma is fruity and flowery with hints of ripe golden apple and small mountain flowers. Dry, soft and flavoursome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.

name: Fleur De France  Blanc de Blanc Brut
desc_en_short: Rich and full on the palate, extended finish of fruity notes, very light and refreshing finish showing clean minerality and citrus. Perfect as an aperitif, also good with tapas

name: Bottega  Spumante Millesimato
wine_color: Pale straw yellow, brilliant, fine and persistent perlage
desc_en_short: Pale straw yellow, brilliant, fine and persistent perlage. Scents of acacia flowers, peach blossom, citrus and Golden apple on aromas. Dry, pleasant and harmonious, light, fragrant, fresh, well balanced with intense hints of fruit.

name: Bottega  Prosecco DOC Brut
wine_color: Brilliant, with a rich and persistent foam and fine perlage Pale straw yellow
desc_en_short: Brilliant, with a rich and persistent foam and fine perlage Pale straw yellow. Fruity, flowery, with scents of acacia flowers, apple, white peach and citrus fruits on aromas. The palate is fresh, delicate, fragrant and well-balanced. Fabulous as an aperitif and in cocktails as well as with starters, first courses, fish and poultry.

name: Bottega  Prosecco Gold Brut
wine_color: Brilliant, fine and persistent perlage. Light straw yellow.
desc_en_short: Brilliant, fine and persistent perlage. Light straw yellow. Clear, characteristic, fruity and flowery with scents of Golden apple, Williams pear, acacia flowers and lily of the valley. Quite tasty, harmonious, elegant and fresh. As aperitif, in cocktails, with starters, first courses, fish and poultry.

name: Bottega  Spumante Rose Gold Brut
desc_en_short: Brilliant with fine and lasting perlage. Peach-coloured. Distinctly flowery with scent of mixed berries, mainly currants and wild strawberries aromas. Fresh, with a good acidity, harmonious, delicate and persistent.

name: Krug  Grande Cuvee (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep golden colour and fine, vivacious bubbles, predicting fullness and elegance.
desc_en_short: As you taste it, notes of toasted bread, hazelnut, nougat, barley sugar and jellied fruits may take you by surprise. You may even taste hints of apples still on the tree, flowers in bloom, ripe and dried fruit, almonds, marzipan, gingerbread, sweet spices and even brioche and honey.

name: Veuve Clicquot  Brut Yellow Label (375 ml)
desc_en_short:
Winemaker's Notes

A Champagne House is eventually judged on the quality of its Brut Non Vintage. It is in the making of such a wine that the true Art of Champagne blending reveals itself.

This is an art in which the House of Veuve Clicquot excels. Our Brut Yellow Label reflects the superb vineyards we own and the consistent nature of our House style.

The predominance of Pinot Noir provides the structure that is so typically Clicquot, while a touch of Pinot Meunier rounds out the blend. Chardonnay adds the elegance and finesse essential in a perfectly balanced wine.

name: Veuve Clicquot  Brut Yellow Label (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
A Champagne House is eventually judged on the quality of its Brut Non Vintage. It is in the making of such a wine that the true Art of Champagne blending reveals itself.

This is an art in which the House of Veuve Clicquot excels. Our Brut Yellow Label reflects the superb vineyards we own and the consistent nature of our House style.

The predominance of Pinot Noir provides the structure that is so typically Clicquot, while a touch of Pinot Meunier rounds out the blend. Chardonnay adds the elegance and finesse essential in a perfectly balanced wine.

name: Moet & Chandon  Brut Imperial (750 ml)
wine_color: An elegant golden straw yellow with green highlights.
desc_en_short: Moet Imperial is the House iconic champagne. Created in 1869, it embodies Moet and Chandon unique style, a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity.

name: Moet & Chandon  Rose Imperial (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Rosé Impérial is a spontaneous, radiant, romantic expression of the Moët & Chandon style, a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity.

name: Chandon  Brut
desc_en_short: "A nice, everyday bubbly that offers elegance at an affordable price. Chardonnay contributes crisp flavors of limes, wile Pinot Noir brings deeper flavors of cherries. A lovely wine that grows in the glass."

name: Chandon  Rose
wine_color: Pink peach skin with vibrant rose gold to light bronze hues.
desc_en_short: Chandon Brut Rosé enters gently and creamy with mouth-filling stone fruits, strawberry and vanilla ice cream characters. Soft citrus tones keep the palate fresh and balanced. The inclusion of a little red pinot noir base wine in the assemblage provides an extra layer of complexity, additional richness and persistence.

name: Nua  Vino Spumante Brut
wine_color: Intense, straw yellow with golden shades
style: Local Grapes Grown In The Production Area Of Piedmont
desc_en_short: Intense, straw yellow with golden shades. Open, broad, intense with scents of crust of bread, honey and nuts. Harmonic, sapid and well balanced. Persistent taste of almond. Indicated as aperitif, it is perfect with fish dishes and hard cheeses

name: Nua  Prosecco Vino Spumante Extra Dry
wine_color: Light straw yellow with green shimmers
desc_en_short: Light straw yellow with green shimmers. Fruity, elegant, clean and typically aromatic. Soft, characteristic, pleasently fresh and harmonic. Ideals as aperitif, excellent with light courses, finger food and sushi

name: Follador  Torri di Credazzo Cru Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG Extra Brut
wine_color: Bright yellow straw with greenish reflections. Very fine and persistent bubbles.
desc_en_short: Flavor Supple, full-bodied, savoury and fulfilling. aromas of apple, peach and rose petals. He has a lovely smooth , full-bodied with an exciting finish.

name: Follador  Prosecco Runier treviso Extra Dry Silver DOC
wine_color: Wine , pale yellow , clear , thin , pretty bubbles .
desc_en_short: Wine , light yellow transparent thin bubble pretty sweet fruity smell green compatible with some other minerals and yeast . Light sour wine a little better balanced sweet and sour drink some cool refreshing drink to have a very good seafood and drinking Maaa shifts in the sea.

name: Follador  Prosecco Farder treviso Extra Dry Gold DOC
wine_color: Pale yellow straw with greenish reflections
desc_en_short: Bright yellow straw. Very fine bubbles. Fine and delicate foam. The fruity and flowery scents are clearly perceived. The green apple prevails with nuances of acacia flowers and jasmine. Fresh, well structured and pleasantly persisting. Recommended Food Excellent for cocktails and aperitifs, with pasta and rice dishes in general and also with fish and shellfish.

name: Champagne Ruinart Blanc de Blancs
wine_color: The wine shows a superb, golden yellow color with a beautiful luminosity and a fine and persistent mousse.
desc_en_short: The wine shows a superb, golden yellow color with a beautiful luminosity and a fine and persistent mousse. The nose is clean and intense with warm, rich notes of brioche, French toast and roasted almonds. On the palate the wine is very supple and harmonious, with notes of honey and minerals on the long, sustained finish. Ruinart Blanc de Blancs is produced from a blend of 100% premiers crus Chardonnay grapes from the best of recent vintages.

name: Moet & Chandon  Brut Imperial (200 ml)
wine_color: An elegant golden straw yellow with green highlights.
desc_en_short: Moet Imperial is the House iconic champagne. Created in 1869, it embodies Moet and Chandon unique style, a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity.

name: Bottega  Moscato Manzoni Rosé
wine_color: Brilliant, with fine and lasting perlage .Rose-colored.
desc_en_short:
This rosé sparkling wine is characterized by its distinctive sweet taste. The bright pink painted bottle is fully part of the collection of glamour Bottega sparkling wines. The label, which depicts a rose in full bloom, evokes the aroma of the wine.

Awards

Silver Medal - The Asian Rosé Masters - HK (2018)

Commended - DWWA Decanter World Wine Awards - UK (2017)

Gold Medal - The Global Rosé Masters - Drink Business - UK (2014)

Silver Medal - Cathay Pacific Hong Kong International Wine and Spirit Competition HKIWSC - HK (2014)

name: Bodegas Codorniu Raventos  Delapierre Tradicion Brut
desc_en_short: The wine is golden-straw color with greenish reflections and a large elastic bubbles, forming a lush, but the unstable foam. In a pleasant, mild fruity aroma of wine noticeable shades of fresh baking yeast and white flowers. Simple, clean taste of the wine is filled with tones of green apples, toast and citrus complemented by a nice refreshing acidity. Served to light snacks, fruit, ice cream, fruit desserts, cakes, strawberries and cream.

name: Wolf Blass  Eaglehawk Cuvee Brut
wine_color: Pale straw with a delicate bead.
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

Zesty, fresh citrus, white peach and sherbet aromas, a generous palate filled with flavours of apple and melon, and a soft, creamy mouthfeel come together in a refreshing, flavoursome wine with a crisp, lingering finish.

name: Laurent Perrier  La Cuvée (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Laurent-Perrier La Cuvée

The wine comes from the purest grape juice and it alone allows Laurent-Perrier to craft ‘La Cuvée’,  a champagne of great finesse and a beautiful freshness obtained after a long ageing process in our cellars.

Laurent-Perrier’s style and personality are defined by its very high proportion of Chardonnay. Purity, freshness and elegance – essential characteristics, expressed in this champagne – are a good introduction to the spirit of the House.

name: Moet & Chandon  Rose Imperial (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Rosé Impérial is a spontaneous, radiant, romantic expression of the Moët & Chandon style, a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity.

name: Freixenet  ICE
desc_en_short: Fine bubbles, peach and ripe pear flavours, flowers and hints of tropical fruits. The palate is creamy and sweet with a long refreshing finish.

name: Taittinger  Prestige Brut
wine_color: The brilliant body is golden yellow in colour.
desc_en_short: The brilliant body is golden yellow in colour. The bubbles are fine, while the foam is discreet yet lingering. The nose, very open and expressive, delivers aromas of fruits and brioche. It also gives off the fragrace of peach, white flowers (hawthorn,accia) and vanila pod. The entry onto the palate is lively, fresh and in total harmony. This is a delicate wine with flavours of fresh fruits and honey.

name: Piper-Heidsieck  Cuvee Brut (750 ml)
wine_color: A clear, golden Champagne robe par excellence. Delicate and fine bubbles resulting from an extended maturation time.
desc_en_short:
PIPER-HEIDSIECK Cuvée Brut is a classic, structured, full-bodied and bursting with fruit Champagne. The blend is composed of a majority of Pinots Noirs, incorporating more than 100 crus from around the Champagne region and Pinots Meuniers from the Grande et Petite Montagne de Reims region.

AWARDS :

90/100 - HUON HOOKE 2013
16.5/20 - WORLD OF FINE WINES 2012
93/100 - WINE SPECTATOR 2012
90/100 - #3 NON VINTAGE CHAMPAGNE - FINE CHAMPAGNE MAGAZINE 2012
15.5/20 - BETTANE AND DESSEAUVE 2012 GOLD MEDAL - JAPAN WINE CHALLENGE 2012

name: Piper-Heidsieck  Cuvee Brut (375 ml)
wine_color: A clear, golden Champagne robe par excellence. Delicate and fine bubbles resulting from an extended maturation time.
desc_en_short:
PIPER-HEIDSIECK Cuvée Brut is a classic, structured, full-bodied and bursting with fruit Champagne. The blend is composed of a majority of Pinots Noirs, incorporating more than 100 crus from around the Champagne region and Pinots Meuniers from the Grande et Petite Montagne de Reims region.

AWARDS :

90/100 - HUON HOOKE 2013
16.5/20 - WORLD OF FINE WINES 2012
93/100 - WINE SPECTATOR 2012
90/100 - #3 NON VINTAGE CHAMPAGNE - FINE CHAMPAGNE MAGAZINE 2012
15.5/20 - BETTANE AND DESSEAUVE 2012 GOLD MEDAL - JAPAN WINE CHALLENGE 2012

name: Perrier-Jouet  Grand Brut Champagne (750 ml)
wine_color: A pale and sparkling yellow robe, suggestive of vivacity.
desc_en_short: The Perrier-Jouët Grand Brut is delicate, elegant and balanced. The striking freshness and vivacity of the floral and fruity fragrances (yellow fruits and fresh fruits) take root, before giving way to subtle notes of vanilla and butter, lending the wine a fruity and consistent character. The notes of cherry plum, lemon and bergamot orange emerge first, then make way for the flowers of fruit trees, such as lime and honeysuckle. These are followed by notes of butter, madeleine cakes and vanilla sugar. Lingering notes of grapefruit, white peaches, green pears, apple trees and green hazelnuts round off the taste. Ampleness and vivacity balance out in the mouth, developing into a flavour of round and vinous elegance. A fresh, balanced champagne with a long finish. Its flavours are best revealed between 7 and 9°. Can be matched with dishes such as carpaccio of fish or white meats. Its lively vivacity works well with crisp vegetables and tofu.

name: Jacob's Creek  Sparkling Moscato Rose (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
A light and refreshingly sweet wine, perfect for any social occasions. Fragrant and refreshing, crisp with red summer berries.

Wine Score : 88 POINTS, James Suckling - jamessuckling.com (Oct-18)

Award : GOLD, Concours Mondial de Bruxelles 2015

name: Jacob's Creek  Sparkling Chardonnay Pinot Noir (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
A premium expression of Australian Sparkling wine.

Wine Score : 4 STARS, Winestate (Nov/Dec-17)

Award : BRONZE, New World Wine Awards 2017

name: Monsoon Valley  Brut Prestige Sparkling Wine
desc_en_short:
Taste & Aroma

Vibrant fruit and tinkle acidity. Some residual sugar perfectly balances the acidity and lively fizz, yet enhancing the fruit.

Food Recommendation

Salad with light sauce, Thai papaya salad, Vegetarian & Seafood Dim Sum, Parma Ham, Prosciutto, Bruschetta, Sushi & Sashimi, Shellfishes and White flesh fishes.

name: Bottega  Prosecco Gold Brut (200 ml)
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Blossom, Citrus, Apple, Bread, Pear
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short: Bottega Gold is one of Italy's most recognisable sparkling wines — a dry, elegant Prosecco Brut in its iconic gold metallic bottle, delivering fresh pear, apple blossom, citrus, and delicate yeasty notes with fine persistent bubbles and a clean finish.

name: Pitars  Prosecco Gold Spumante Extra Dry Millesimato
desc_en_short: The bouquet is rich and enormously pleasurable.The fragrance is of a variety of mature fruit: an aroma of powdery yellow apple and pear stand out, while there are also gentle shades of citrus sweet, fine flowery hints.The creamily sparkling palette doesn’t disappoint as it’s well moulded into the sugar residue. Wonderful as an aperitif, this wine is intriguingwith savoury dishes delicately combined with fruit, such as trout marinated withMelissa grass accompanied by cookedmust and sour cream.

name: Zardetto  Prosecco Brut
wine_color: Crystal clear with a hearty white foam and fine perlage.
desc_en_short: Crystal clear with a hearty white foam and fine perlage. Fresh fragrant aromas and a delicately soft and harmonious taste are the hallmarks of this quintessential aperitif wine.

name: Bottega  Spumante Rose Gold Brut (200 ml)
flavor_tags: Strawberry, Raspberry, Red Berry, Citrus, Rose
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short: Bottega Rose Gold is the rosé sibling of the iconic Gold Prosecco — a pale pink Italian sparkling wine in a shimmering rose-gold bottle, offering fresh red berry, rose petal, and citrus aromas with lively bubbles and a dry, elegant finish.

name: Bisol & Figli  Belstar Prosecco Brut
wine_color: Straw yellow with lightly green hints
desc_en_short: “Belstar” a lovely name for a vineyard on the threshold of the historical production area of Prosecco. It was right here in these immaculate hills with unparalleled landscapes that the sovereign grape variety of Northern Veneto found its niche, a place to express its natural elegance. “Belstar” is a Prosecco with a fruity scent and a floral bouquet enhanced during vinification by the protection of the must from the action of oxygen and by a light pressing. An extremely delicate and elegant Prosecco thanks to the great attention paid during the maceration, pressing and slow fermentation stages.

name: Follador  Prosecco Xzero Valdobbiadene Superiore Extra Brut DOCG
wine_color: Straw yellow with lime green reflections. Extra fine bead.
desc_en_short: This Millesimato Extra Brut, is a well-structured, harmonious wine that offers strong mineral notes thanks to the particularly clayey and chalky characteristics of the vineyards'. soil. Appreciated for its delicate, dynamic and pleasantly dry flavour thanks to the absence of residual sugar that typifies this particular category of spumante. A wine that epitomises the region'.s excellence, one that will undoubtedly be appreciated by those that love dry wine, and will also win over those that have palates more oriented towards extra dry.

name: Charles Heidsieck  The Brut Reserve (750 ml)
wine_color: The Brut Réserve boasts a deep golden hue. Delicate, vivacious and long-lasting bubbles are the result of a long, slow maturing process in chalk cellars.
desc_en_short:
IT IS WITH BRUT RÉSERVE that the House has expresses the quintessence of its style. Particularly recognisable, this cuvée is the fruit of a unique blend that can be summarised with one equation: 60/40/10.

60: The number of crus gone into a blend that is precise, stringent and tailor-made. The wines produced that year, a third for each varietal (Meunier, Chardonnay and Pinot Noir), are vinified cru by cru, varietal by varietal, in stainless steel vats.

40: A high proportion of 40% reserve wines, equally divided between Chardonnay and Pinot Noir, to ensure the fine complexity and indulgence of the Brut Réserve.

10: The average age of the reserve wines, an exception in Champagne. Taken from the best crus from the best years, the wines placed in reserve are kept in vats for between 5 and 15 years, if not more, to develop finesse and their aromatic range.

name: Juvé & Camps  Cava Brut Nature Gran Reserva
desc_en_short: Our most well-known cava is a Brut Nature made with free-run juice from grapes grown on our Espiells (Can Rius), La Cuscona and Mediona estates. It has a typically pale golden colour, with a rich, elegant nose that begins with ripe white fruit and moves towards the notes that come from ageing: baked goods, toasted bread, spices… On the palate it is extremely seductive, with a fresh, pleasant texture and long finish that is once again reminiscent of white fruit.

name: Veuve du Vernay  Brut
wine_color: Pale-yellow colour with hints of green.
desc_en_short: "Fresh on the nose, vibrant aromas expressing a delicate blend of floral and fruit-driven notes. Rich and full on the palate, extended finish of fruity notes, very light and refreshing finish showing clean minerality and citrus."

name: Veuve du Vernay  Brut Rose
wine_color: Nice rosé color. A persistent mousse followed by numerous and fine bubbles.
desc_en_short: " Veuve du Vernay is a reflection of the French way of life; sophisticated, spontaneous, romantic, elegant and chic. A range of sparkling wines that are produced in Bordeaux, the heart of the French wine country. Sparkling wine has long been a part of everyday French life; an aperitif, a wine with food, a wine for celebrations, a wine that encompasses the French ‘joie de vivre’ in every glass, Veuve du Vernay is a reflection of this French way of life. "

name: Champagne Ernest Rapeneau  Rose
desc_en_short: An elegant salmon-pink colour. A very fruity, powerful nose (cherries, strawberries). A delicious, structured, complex attack, followed by a very fruity finish accompanied by vanilla notes.

name: Champagne Palmer  Brut Reserve
desc_en_short:
Palmer Brut Reserve is based on a selection of wines from the best vineyards in the Champagne region. The Premiers and Grands Crus from the Montagne de Reims area predominate and lend their distinctive personality to these wines.

The nose, amazingly clean, is expressed through a rich palette of aromas, including citrus, pear and apricot with some subtle notes of hazelnut and a discreet touch of buttery brioche.

Succulent and substantial to the palate, yet with an unfettered freshness, this wine is eminently seductive: a model of perfect balance.

name: Palazzo Grimani by Allegrini  Prosecco DOC Millesimato Dry
desc_en_short: On the nose, it unveils an intense fruity bouquet of apple, pear, citrus and pleasant white flowers. This wine is medium bodied with a lovely freshness. Pairs well with sushi, Catalan style lobster, and shellfish in general, salmon marinated with dill, couscous with oriental flavours, Venetian style liver and artichokes.

name: Aviva  Red Rose
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short:
SHAKE UP YOUR LIFE!!!

Tired of the routine, of the same plans, of the same people? Tired of taking your life so seriously? Why not stir up your life with a completely different drink?

We present you AVIVA, the most original sparkling wine drink in the world.

THE COLOURS

AVIVA has different colours inspired by our moods and in the colours of nature, just like when the life and soul of the party arrives and reaches a group and revolutioni- zes everything, AVIVA has been conceived to always be the protagonist.

FLAVOR

A fine bubble sparkling wine with a delicious taste on the palate, fresh, fruity and easy to drink. AVIVA reminds you of all of the flavors and aromas of the Mediterra- nean. Elaborated through natural processes and with a low alcohol content. Fo- llowing in the footsteps of the worlds wine experts and their know how.

A drink that shows the nuances inside and outside, the way we are, the taste of our grapes and our land, elements that make the difference with everything we have seen until that point.

We did not want it to make a typical prosecco, a cava or a moscato, we wanted it to be something unique, special and new.

The taste and the Mediterranean way, in never before seen format.
