name: Acquesi  Asti Spumante DOCG
desc_en_short: Brilliant straw color. Aromas of peach puree, fresh apricot, yellow apple, lime zest, and lemon candy with a satiny, lively, fizzy, moderately sweet light-to-medium body and an interesting, relaxed lemon curd, honeycomb, pineapple cola, mineral, and peach syrup finish with no oak flavor. An ethereal, delicious, and precisely balanced Sparkling Moscato; ready to pair with a fresh fruit and cream dessert - or replace dessert entirely.

name: Villa Sandi  Prosecco IL Fresco Bio (Organic)
desc_en_short: The organoleptic examination highlights the valuable characteristics of this Prosecco from Villa Sandi starting from the color which is pale straw yellow with a fine and persistent perlage. The bouquet is fruity and floral with notes of ripe Golden apple and small mountain flowers. In the mouth it is dry, soft and savory with a fruity and aromatic finish.

name: Champagne Ruinart Rose
wine_color: The colour is a delicate pomegranate pink with very slightly orange reflections. The sparkling, light effervescence has a persistent foam.
desc_en_short: The Ruinart Champagne Brut Rosé features a delicate fragrance of roses, spices, red fruits, exotic fruit and freshly turned earth. This sparkling wine is an elegant blend of French chardonnay and pinot noir to balance freshness and body. Workers harvest the grapes manually to preserve their flavor, then Ruinart Champagne Rosé undergoes a fermentation process in thermoregulated stainless steel casks. Then, the winemakers start a malolactic fermentation to create the bubbles we all love.

name: Domaine Cold River  Cuvee Tradition Brut (Black Label)
desc_en_short:
Straw yellow colour with an elegant nose of lemon citrus, delicate herbal characters of thyme, lemon mint and fresh bread dough yeast. The palate is soft and lemony with nutty and creamy yeast characters and a gentle and persistent mousse. The finish is smooth and refreshing with a fine balance leading to a wine with an “eternal sparkle”.

Served chilled and match with fish especially salmon and tuna, as well as trout and shellfish. Asian style chicken and pork are also well enjoyed with aromatic herbs such as mint, lemon grass, coriander and mild chilli.

name: Champagne Albert Lebrun  Blanc de Noir Extra Brut
desc_en_short: Golden in color, the nose looks like a fresh and fruity wine, with aromas of fresh fruit. Lively and voluminous wine on the palate, with notes of plum. Minimum 18 months on lees.

name: Botter  Prosecco DOC Rose
wine_color: Fine bright perlage, light rosé colour
desc_en_short: Delicate and complex bouquet with fruity notes that remind of peach, green apple and lemon. Floral notes of acacia and rose. Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body; Round and full bodied structure. Enjoy rosé bubbles as an aperitif but excellent with fish soups, grilled fish and courses based on mushrooms

name: Champagne Ruinart  Brut
wine_color: Ruinart Brut sparkles in chestnuts, yellows and golds.
desc_en_short: Ruinart Brut is a well-balanced champagne, made from a blend of pinot noir, pinot meunier and the freshness of chardonnay. It is 40 to 50 crus from the terroirs of the Côte des Blancs and the Montagne de Reims.

name: San Maurizio  Cuvee Brut
desc_en_short: lightly straw with herbaceous reflections. floral and delicate. on the palate is dry, well-balanced, right acidity.

name: San Maurizio  Moscato
desc_en_short: This wine is golden yellow color. aroma is intense, floral and slightly musky. on the palate is sweet and velvety characteristic of the grape.

name: Granmonte  Sparkling Rose Méthode Traditionnelle Brut
desc_en_short: Our Sparkling Rosé has a subtle fruity nose of raspberry, strawberry with hints of creaminess. The bubbles are delicate on the tongue with refreshing acidity that cleanses your palate especially when enjoyed with food. Our style of Sparkling Rosé is ‘Brut’ with only a touch of balancing sweetness.

name: Granmonte  Crémant Méthode Traditionnelle Extra Brut
desc_en_short: Our crémant has a subtle yet captivating nose of apple, pear, lime peel with hints of fresh dough and cashew. The bubbles are delicate on the tongue with crisp and drying acidity that cleanses you palate especially when enjoy with food. Our style of crémant is extra brut with only a balancing sweetness.

name: Aromo Chardonnay Brut
wine_color: A pale yellow, bright sparkling wine.
desc_en_short: A pale yellow, bright sparkling wine. The very fine bubbles rise to the surface in a persistent, pearlescent string. Fresh aromas of citrus fruit and white flowers with slight touches of bread. Fresh and mineral on the palate, this is a perfect match for all kinds of fish and shellfish.

name: Charles Du Lac  Mousseux Brut
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 12 Bottles.

This Sparking sweetness in its delivery, setting it apart from most Bruts. With a lovely freshness and effervescent charm, Charles Du Lac Brut is the perfect celebratory beverage, served chilled to perfection in a Champagne flute held high in the air for that well-deserved toast.

name: Expresion  Premium Sparkling Mojito
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Bright yellow with green highlights. Very fruity, recalling lime with hint of spearmint.Refreshing, flavoursome and young. In the mouth, the gas appears as if it were cream, recalling aromas of fresh herbs combined with slightly sweet but fresh flavour.

name: Expresion  Premium Sparkling Mimosa
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Bright orange and fine bubbles. Very fruity, recalling orange juice. Refreshing, flavoursome and young. In the mouth, the gas appears as if it were cream, recalling aromas of orange juice combined with slightly sweet but fresh flavour.

name: Pares Balta  Cava Brut Organic
wine_color: Pale yellow colour with bright yellow reflections.
desc_en_short:
A young and lively organic sparkling wine

Parés Baltà’s Brut cava is a blend of the three traditional varieties of the Penedès: Parellada, Macabeu and Xarel·lo. The parellada, from the highest mountains of the region, provides the freshness, the macabeu gives us the fruit and the xarel·lo gives us the body.

The three varieties complement each other creating a perfect synergy of aromas and freshness.

name: Contadi Castaldi  Franciacorta Brut
wine_color: In the glass it is straw yellow in colour with greenish highlights, enlivened by a fine and persistent perlage.
desc_en_short: This is a lively brut, fragrant and tending to smoothness and an accessible sensory lexicon, with a balanced and versatile style.

name: Follador  El Brolo Prosecco DOC Treviso Brut
wine_color: Straw yellow in colour with lime green reflections.
desc_en_short: Finesse and excellent structure are the bywords of this high-quality spumante produced from the finest grapes. Straw yellow in colour with lime green reflections, and a fine, persistent bead. A wonderful fragrance of acacia flowers, golden delicious apple and almond. It is sapid, fresh and well-structured on the palate. Ideal for starters, light first courses and medium to mature cheeses.

name: Follador  Joani Spumante Bianco Millesimato Extra Dry
desc_en_short: Produced using grapes from the Montello hills, the homeland of nonno Giovanni, known as "Joani" to everyone. This elegant, sapid and richly fragrant spumante is dedicated to him and his land. Bright straw yellow in colour with an extra fine, persistent bead. An elegant, rich, harmonious fragrance with intense notes of apricot and wisteria and acacia flowers. On the palate it has a balanced acidity, it is sapid, full and has a dry finish. Pairs excellently with first courses, white meats and fish dishes.

name: Follador  Ruiol Castei Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore Millesimato DOCG Extra Dry
wine_color: Bright straw yellow in colour with lime green reflections
desc_en_short:
Ruiol Castei: ​​​​​​​a name that conjures up images of the ancient strongholds dotted around the area, testimony of its long history.

​​​​​​​Typically bright straw yellow in colour with lime green reflections, the bead is fine and persistent. Fruity with clear notes of golden delicious apple, peach and pear, with a floral hint of wisteria. A full and pleasant fragrance with a refined balance of flavours. The aperitif par excellence. Ideal for fish and shellfish dishes as well as following a meal with biscuits.

name: Botter Prosecco DOC Extra Dry
wine_color: Pale light yellow colour with typical crisp and delicate perlage
desc_en_short: Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body; harmonic with a long persistent aftertaste Ideal as an aperitif, it is a perfect combination to hors-d’oeuvres and delicate first courses. Also wonderful with sushi, fish and shellfish

name: Champagne  Alain Navarre Cuvée Tradition Brut
wine_color: Clear color with brilliant straw gold nuances.
desc_en_short: Clear color with brilliant straw gold nuances. Beautiful fine bubbles. Elegant nose of dried fruits and white fruits and tangy mirabelle plum enhanced by fresh citrus notes. Gourmet mouth, round and ample. Long, balanced finish.

name: French Bloom  Le Rose Organic French Bubbly (750 ml) (Alcohol-Free)
desc_en_short:
With a well-balanced complexity, the Rosé oscillates between minerality and freshness to reveal at its heart a true floral bouquet with vibrant notes. A majestic burst of rose petals meets the acidity of freshly picked red fruit, combined with notes of dry white peach. French Bloom's signature French Chardonnay wine accents with a touch of Pinot-Noir are enhanced by these bright, sparkling aromas.

TASTING NOTES

Rose petals - Red Fruits - White Peach

2023 WORLD SPARKLING AWARDS

World's Best AF Sparkling Winner

name: Louis Roederer  Blanc de Blancs 2016
wine_color: Golden yellow hue flecked with green.
desc_en_short: Golden yellow hue with bright highlights. Magnificent, soft and even bubbles. Bouquet of white flowers (jasmine, orange blossom), citrus zest (lemon) and wheat complemented by an impression of iodine freshness, sea spray, sea breeze and powdered chalk. A few smoky notes and a reductive, calcareous quality, reminiscent of grilled almonds, emerge after aeration. The palate is creamy and caressing, revealing softness and finesse; coated velvet-like textures that quickly give way to fresh, marine, powdery and concentrated sensations. One has the impression of biting into a ripe, juicy fruit bursting with a lingering and mouth-watering zesty freshness. The finish is smooth, saline and stretches out like a shaft of sunshine, luminous and drying yet never brittle.

name: Miquel Pons  Brut Reserve Ecologic
wine_color: Pale yellow colour with golden nuances with a continuous release of bubbles that form a perfect crown.
desc_en_short: Cava Brut Nature 100% without added expedition liquor. Pale yellow colour with golden nuances with a continuous release of bubbles that form a perfect crown. With aromas of ripe white fruit, brioche and honey. In the mouth, the soft flavour with the light toast typical of aging, white fruit (apple and pear), dried fruit and brioche, with a long and elegant aftertaste stand out pleasantly. These characteristics make this cava an adeal paring any occasion.

name: Otello Ceci 1813 Nero di Lambrusco Emilia IGT Frizzante
wine_color: Intense ruby red colour, with lively, rich and persistent foam.
desc_en_short: The sparkling red wine considered the Ceci Winery masterpiece. An enveloping Lambrusco, an unmistakable colour and aroma, which bears the name of the founder of our family.

name: Giuseppe Verdi Antico Bruscone Lambrusco Emilia IGT Frizzante
desc_en_short: Typical Lambrusco, which stains the lips and opens hearts. The sparkling red wine of our ancestors that has always been on the Parmesan tables with a very modern design. The past and the future in one sip.

name: Freixenet  Prosecco Extra Dry DOC
desc_en_short: Freixenet extends its expertise and globally-renowned name to Prosecco, blending superior quality with stunning beauty. Made from the finest Glera grapes in Italy’s Prosecco region of Veneto, Freixenet Prosecco is as distinctive as it is delicious.

name: Louis Roederer  Cristal Brut 2016
wine_color: Golden yellow in colour with glistening gold tints.
desc_en_short: The 2016 vintage was characterised by particularly marked weather variations: spring was cool, wet and relatively late whereas summer was warm and dry with a heatwave in late August followed by dry and sunny weather over the harvest period which was highly beneficial to the ripening of the grapes. Our Pinot noirs thrived in these dry, sunny conditions and the heat has given them an intensely fruity character and silky smooth texture. The Chardonnays are just as outstanding although more chiselled and saline in character.

name: Villa Calappiano Prosecco DOC Treviso Extra Dry
wine_color: Beautiful pale yellow with a hint of green.
desc_en_short: Elegant Prosecco from Treviso with fresh flowers, apple, and white peach notes — crisp, refreshing, with soft, persistent bubbles. Perfect for seafood and celebrations.

name: Louis Roederer  Collection 245
desc_en_short: Louis Roederer's 245th blend takes advantage of a particularly remarkable 2020 harvest: a dry, continental year of perfect maturity that produced juicy, well-structured, aromatic grapes, resulting in dense, full-bodied wines with a perfect balance of substance and freshness. Collection 245 therefore offers us a complex symphony in a wine of remarkably generous and flavourful intensity

name: Chandon  Garden Spritz
desc_en_short: Chandon Exception Sparkling Wine is macerated with a Unique Bitter Liqueur made of 100% locally sourced oranges, herbs and spices. A perfect balance of bitterness and spices. 0 artificial flavors. 0 artificial colorant. 100% delicious.

name: Louis Roederer  Blanc de Blancs 2017
wine_color: Intense yellow hue with bright, luminous tints.
desc_en_short: Intense yellow hue with bright, luminous tints. An even flow of creamy, ultra-fine bubbles. Bouquet of harvest (almonds), spring flowers (honeysuckle) and citrus (lemon). The aromas are harmonious and deep, with delicate notes of roasted almonds and roasting. Upon aeration, powdery and chalky nuances emerge, creating a refined reductive nose typical of exceptional Chardonnays. Precise, juicy and deep on entry to the palate, this wine exudes a magnificent concentration of ripe fruit and floral aromas interwoven with a mineral freshness. The mouthfeel is creamy and chalky, almost powdery and drying, imparting a trim, finely honed quality to the palate. Juicy and rounded, the wine is drawn out into a fresh, powdery finish. The palate crescendos like a torrent of white mountain water, with a lingering sweetness from the wood ageing complementing the saline length and structure imparted by the white chalk of Avize.

name: Lungarotti  Pinot Grigio IGT
wine_color: Straw yellow colour with visible greenish reflections.
desc_en_short: A wine of Umbria in Italy. LungarottiPinot Grigio dell'Umbria Made from grape combination of Pinot Grigio 100%.This wine is yellow in colour with greenish reflections, with a delicate bouquet of herbs, hay, wild mint and pistachio, dry on the palate, with a pleasant softness, fragrant acidity and long finish.

name: Craggy Range  Te Muna Sauvignon Blanc Martinborough
desc_en_short: From the lower terrace of our Te Muna Road Vineyard in Martinborough, this wine is sourced exclusively from several parcels of vines growing on stony, limestone influenced soils.

name: Michel Lynch  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Light straw green. Aromas of green apples, grass and minerals.Tasting notes is grapefruit, green melon and lime notes with a long, satisfying finish. Enjoy drinks with seafood, shellfish, light pasta dishes, vegetables and chicken.

name: Sunnycliff  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Rich and smooth with ripe fruit-salad flavours. A delicious Chardonnay that delivers on fruit flavour without being over-the-top. Best enjoyed young. Serve chilled.

name: Banrock Station  Moscato
wine_color: Light straw colour with green hues.
desc_en_short: This Moscato displays fresh summer fruits and grape flavours, with a sweet muscaty character. This wine is lively, grapey and easy to drink. A gentle spritz give the palate a lively, rich finish.

name: Hardys  Varietal Range Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

Brilliant and clear with lifted tropical and stone fruit characters of melon, peach and pineapple. Juicy fruit characters of Melon, yellow nectarine and subtle hints of vanillin, fresh acid structure, with medium body.

name: Hardys  Stamp Chardonnay/Semillon
wine_color: Medium Golden Straw In Colour With A Hint Of Green Tint
desc_en_short: Our Stamp Chardonnay Semillion is a medium-bodied wine, exhibiting fresh citrus and tropical fruit flavours with a creamy texture, delicate oak and a smooth finish. Perfect with chicken or salmon.

name: Robert Mondavi   Private Selection Vint Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Golden straw in color and opens with aromas of key lime pie, pineapple, crème brûlee, and vanilla bean.Rich and creamy flavors of baked apples, poached pears, pineapple, baking spices, and toasty oak with a balanced acidity and finish. Enjoy our Chardonnay with roasted turkey and rosemary stuffing, chicken cordon bleu, fish dishes, and fettucine Alfredo.

name: Robert Mondavi   Woodbridge Chardonnay
style: Chardonnay, 18% French Colombard, 3% Viognier, 3% Proprietary Blend Of Aromatic Varieties
desc_en_short: An aroma of green apple and a floral undertone, our Woodbridge Chardonnay displays a smooth elegance. The aromas and flavors show nuances of baked apples and cinnamon, ending in a rich oak finish. Great to enjoy with friends over appetizers, such as crab cakes or prawn skewers. You can also try this Chardonnay with smoked salmon, grilled chicken, creamy pastas, and stuffed clams.

name: Montes  Alpha Chardonnay
desc_en_short: 93 points in James Suckling - "This is a very serious chardonnay with pie-crust and cooked-apple character. Full body, tight and focused. Beautiful and long. Small percentage of new wood and malolactic fermentation. Excellent. Drink now."

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Bordeaux Blanc
desc_en_short: The wine, a vivid and brilliant, golden straw colour, has a lively nose of citrus, white blossom and lemon zest accompanied by thoroughly characteristic, refined and elegant Sauvignon notes. Round, fresh and alert on the palate, though without tartness, it displays a fine balance between round Semillon and crisp Sauvignon, imparting an excellent impression of volume on attractive, ripe yellow fruit flavours, especially peach and nectarine. The ample and expressive finish, typical of a ripe, rich and powerful vintage, nevertheless retains all its elegance and refinement.

name: Concha Y Toro  Reservado Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This Chardonnay was produced in their vineyards located in the best areas of Chile's Central Valley, Pale yellow color. Fruity, peach, apple, pineapple and tropical fruit aromas. Fresh, well-balanced medium - light body, sweet touch. Food Matching with fish, aperitif with snacks spicy seafood.

name: Concha Y Toro  Frontera Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

Fruity with notes of apple, pear, papaya and pineapple, butter and wood. Pallet Refreshing soft, balanced and slightly sweet. Frontera Chardonnay bears a distinctive varietal character. Excellent with light seafood and fish.

name: Castello Banfi  Le Rime IGT
wine_color: Straw yellow with fresh green reflections.
desc_en_short: Le Rime takes its name from the lines that form on the sloping vineyard floor as water washes down the hillside, much as the ebb tide leaves its mark on the sandy beach. This Pinot Grigio catches that fresh minerality inherent to the terrain of southern Tuscany.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero del Diablo Reserva Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale greenish yellow with golden and bright hints
desc_en_short: Good structure, an excellent balance, fresh and lively acidity. Medium bodied with a long and dry end palate. At the end you find green pear and delicate hints of white peach complemented with toast impression. Perfect to enjoy with delicate fish such as grilled sea bass, sole or turbot, garnished with capers or herbs creamy sauces

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero del Diablo Reserva Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale yellow colour with green hues, very bright and clean.
desc_en_short: An elegant wine due to the intensity and balanced acidity. The citric characteristics from the coastal areas of the Central Valley stand out. It is fresh from the beginning to the end, where the balance of fruit and acidity refresh the palate.

name: "Tormaresca" By Antinori  Chardonnay IGT
flavor_tags: Tropical Fruit, Butterscotch, Maritime, Citrus, Toasty, Almond, Mango, Apple, Wood, Oak
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Tormaresca Chardonnay is a fresh, approachable white from Antinori's southern Italian estate in Puglia — showing ripe tropical fruit, citrus zest, and a hint of toasty oak, with generous texture and a clean, lively finish.

name: Batasiolo  Gavi Del Comune Di Gavi Granee
wine_color: Pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections, clear and bright.
desc_en_short: Pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections, clear and bright. The nose is fresh and floral, with good intensity and persistence. In the mouth it is dry and pleasantly cool. The final sensation reminiscent of almonds is typical of the appellation.

name: Sileni Estates  Cellar Selection Sauvignon Blanc Marlborough
desc_en_short: The Cellar Selection Sauvignon Blanc has ripe tropical and gooseberry fruit flavours with a zingy finish and impeccable balance. A great aperitif or seafood wine made for drinking young. Serve lightly chilled.

name: Frescobaldi  Pomino Bianco DOC
desc_en_short: Pomino Bianco is a straw-yellow wine with brilliant highlights. To the nose it has both a flowery (Scotch broom) a fruited aroma (sweet Williams pear, fragrant lemon). When tasted, Pomino Bianco demonstrates a perfect balance of alcoholic content and freshness. The wine has an excellent, persistent finish and a pleasant aromatic aftertaste. A fine wine for aperitifs, vegetarian antipasti, or large fish, such as salmon.

name: Inspired Company  Unoaked Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale straw with green tinges in colour
desc_en_short: Harvested when the grapes achieved optimum ripeness, in the cool of night, so that the peach, melon and zest citrus fruit flavours that typify premium chadonnay and showcased non the nose and palate. Pale straw with green tinges in colour, the palate is light, lively and fresh with a clean and crisp finish.

name: Prinz Von Hessen  H Riesling
wine_color: A pale-yellow colour and light green reflexes.
desc_en_short: A Riesling with a pale-yellow colour and light green reflexes, which displays a smell from fresh and juicy fruits. The flavours remind of orange blossom and decently of grapefruit. This Riesling convinces with its well balanced acidity and its fine-linked mineral character. Serving temperature: 10°C up to 12°C

name: Laurenz V.  Charming Gruner Veltliner
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Grüner Veltliner is Austria's showpiece grape. It yields concentrated, harmonious wines rich in finesse and with a long life potential. Veltliner wines are reliable in their development. They bring pure enjoyment in their youth, and guarantee utmost drinking pleasure in maturity.

name: Laurenz V.  Singing Gruner Veltliner
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: A very attractive fruit bouquet yields apple, peach and citrus aromas along with a typical Veltliner spiciness and a touch of white pepper. The soft and juicy palate is supported by fine acidity. It sings on the palate!

name: Joseph Drouhin  Vaudon  Chablis
desc_en_short: "A dry and fruity wine, easy to drink. Its colour is pale gold with greenish hues. Very fresh aromas reminiscent of citrus (lemon or grapefruit); small pleasant touches of fern or coriander are found as well. On the palate, dry and fruity, with mineral notes. Pleasant and long aftertaste".

name: Joseph Drouhin  Vaudon  Chablis "Reserve De Vaudon"
wine_color: Brilliant colour, with hints of green.
desc_en_short: "An elegant wine. Brilliant colour, with hints of green. Typical Chablis nose, where aromas of citrus (lemon) fern and even salty sensations predominate. On the palate: vigorous and lively, but in a soft mode. A lot of finesse and balance".

name: Joseph Drouhin  Pouilly Fuisse
wine_color: The colour is golden, with some green reflections.
desc_en_short: "A seductive wine and a really nice expression of the Chardonnay grape! The colour is golden, with some green reflections. Among the floral and fruity aromas, almond and ripe grapes dominate. On the palate, the wine is refreshingly pleasant, ethereal in its lightness.  Long and refreshing aftertaste".

name: Nederburg  Winemaster's Reserve Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Lemon green color. Aromas of lime and melon with vanilla oak notes in the background. Refreshing with citrus and apricot flavours and a creamy texture.

name: Matua  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Pale straw green. The nose shows tropical and citrus fruits with subtle herbaceous undertones. The crisp fresh palate offers classic Marlborough acidity, structure and length. As an aperitif or seafood marinara linguini, white meats and any pasta sauce.

name: Pighin  Pinot Grigio Grave Del Friuli DOC
wine_color: Straw yellow with lightly amber-coloured tinges.
desc_en_short: Straw yellow with lightly amber-coloured tinges. Fruity and floral, banana, pineapple and wisteria flowers on aromas. Persistent, excellent body and correct balance. Excellent with risotto and vegetable soups; also pairs well with light white meats and sweet cheeses.

name: Cloudy Bay  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Cloudy Bay Vineyards, established in 1985, is today a partnership between champagne house Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin and co-founder of Cape Mentelle Vineyards in Western Australia, David Hohnen. The Cloudy Bay team is committed to producing 'wines of region' and strives to enhance the pure, bracing flavors naturally afforded by the climate and soils of Marlborough. The winery and vineyards are situated in the Wairau Valley in Marlborough at the northern end of New Zealand's South Island. This unique and cool wine region enjoys a maritime climate with the longest hours of sunshine of any place in New Zealand. Cloudy Bay has estate vineyards located at prime sites within the Wairau Valley and long-term supply agreements with five Wairau Valley growers. The main varieties grown are Sauvignon Blanc, Chardonnay and Pinot Noir.

name: Echeverria  Reserva Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Bright yellow with light green hues.
desc_en_short:
Bright yellow with light green hues. This vibrant Sauvignon Blanc combines aromas of fresh herbs, green pepper and tomato leaves, with citric notes of grapefruit and lime. The palate is fresh and crisp, with a balanced natural acidity and a fruity finish.

Sustainable Winery

ISO 9001-HACCP

name: Feudo Maccari  Grillo IGT
desc_en_short: Feudo Maccari’s challenge continues, the climb to absolute quality of Sicilian wine has a stage among whites, not any one, of course, but a great interpreter of classic island grapevines, always faithful and versatile companion of many styles and names. A pure Grillo then, that bewitches for the ability to speak an ancient language, archaic in some ways, in a totally contemporary version.

name: Cantina Terlano  Pinot Grigio DOC
desc_en_short:
"An extremely elegant wine is the Pinot Grigio with its multifaceted fruity bouquet. It combines a youthful freshness with balanced acidity and a mild finish."
Rudi Kofler

name: Cantina Terlano  Quarz Sauvignon Blanc DOC
desc_en_short:
Cantina Terlano Quarz

"Delicate as the fine inclusions of quartz in Terlano’s volcanic porphyry rock – that is our Sauvignon Selection, which does full justice to its name. Quarz offers a combination of fine texture, depth and salty aftertaste that has given this noble white an international reputation." - Rudi Kofler

Vinification

Manual harvest and selection of the grapes; gentle whole cluster pressing and clarification of the must by natural sedimentation; slow fermentation at a controlled temperature and aging on the lees for nine months partly in big wooden barrels (50%) and partly in stainless steel tanks (50%); blending three months before bottling.

name: Cantina Terlano  Winkl Sauvignon Blanc DOC
wine_color: Intensive straw yellow with a delicate green shimmer.
desc_en_short:
Intensive straw yellow with a delicate green shimmer. Ripe fruit aromas of apricot, mandarin and passion fruit mingle with elements of elderberry, nettle and mint. The fruitiness continues on the palate in combination with a fine acidity. The wine
scores with a good structure and a minerally but at the same time aromatic finish.

name: Laurent Miquel  Chardonnay Viognier
desc_en_short: This wine is characterized by combined aromas of citrus and white peach. The “Père et Fils” Chardonnay Viognier is a delicious introduction to the unique flavours of the Viognier. The influence of the early-picked, unoaked Chardonnay is evident on the palate with lemons and white fruit notes. Rich apricot fruit on the finish.

name: Salisbury 1848  Pinot Grigio
desc_en_short: The aromas carry through to the palate and are complemented by a nuance of almond. Built in texture from lees stirring balances a crisp, citrus like finish. The perfect summer wine to enjoy with an antipasto platter in the sun.

name: Chateau Montelena  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: There’s a wonderful fullness and weight on the palate punctuated by ripe melon, green apple, and fresh citrus. The oak contribution remains subtle with a hint of vanilla and baking spice.

name: Peter Michael  Chardonnay Ma Belle Fille
desc_en_short: Ma Belle-Fille shows spectacular intensity, packed with aromas of ripe peach, tangerine blossom, dried apricot, golden apple and nectarine, accented with wet stone-like minerality, brioche and lily flower notes. Rich and concentrated in the mouth, the wine displays deep flavors of William pear, honey, dried almond,meringue, dry chamomile, orange rind and notes of baked Reinette apple. In the mouth, the wine is tactile, gourmand and extremely pure. Layered and seductive, the finish is very long.

name: Tasca D'Almerita  Regaleali Bianco
desc_en_short: Straw-yellow in color, aromas of green apples and pitted fruits complement undertones of pears and grapefruits. On the palate, crisp acidity and a rich body make for an easy-to-drink white wine that is particularly refreshing on a hot summer day.

name: Felton Road  Chardonnay Block 2
desc_en_short: A complex Chardonnay still in the subtlety of its youth. The aromatics start with nutty typicity. Vibrant stone fruit blossoms and peach pit are beginning to rise over savoury notes of wet stone and musk. Mouth coating texture with a core of pristine, crystalline purity. Both lingering and refreshing. Drink / Hold

name: Mud House  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Pale straw with a vibrant nose reminiscent of spring with snow pea and passion fruit aromas. A focused and concentrated palate with crisp grapefruit acidity and bold tropical flavours.

name: Monsoon Valley  Colombard
desc_en_short: A delicate and elegant style similar to a Sauvignon Blanc characterizes the Monsoon Valley Colombard. Its light to medium body, crisp acidity, and complex aromas of citrus and green apple give Monsoon Valley Colombard a medium finish balanced by pure lemon and grapefruit flavors that make it ideal for sipping on a hot day or to accompany Thai dishes like Somtam (spicy papaya salad) or Moo Satay (grilled pork strips on a skewer), Indian and western dishes.

name: Castello del Poggio  Moscato Di Pavia IGT
desc_en_short: Straw-yellow with golden reflections and a delicate mousse. Fruity and very inviting, with intense scents of peaches and exotic fruit. Fresh and pleasantely sweet with a taste that reveals its varietal characteristic.

name: Los Vascos  Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Light yellow color with hints of green.
desc_en_short: Los Vascos’ Sauvignon Blanc is made from grapes purchased on long term contracts with growers in the Casablanca and Curicó regions. The vintages all offer very pure fruit and a lively, refreshing palate. This wine has remarkable aromatic expression in the bouquet with lemon, grapefruit and exotic fruit enhanced by the characteristic boxwood aroma of the Sauvignon.

name: Los Vascos Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Los Vascos’s Chardonnay is a fresh, delicate wine, with a harmonious, fruity bouquet. The vineyard’s own Chardonnay grapes are complemented by a selection of grapes from the Casablanca Valley, further north between Santiago and Valparaiso. Flavourful, fresh and pleasant, this wine has an appealing character with good length of fruit. The nose offers an explosion of aromas with notes of melon, banana, grapefruit and exotic fruit.

name: Trimbach  Pinot Blanc
desc_en_short: A wine for pure pleasure ! Maturing early, it is dry, well-balanced, supple and refreshing. Pinot Blanc is ideal for serving as an aperitif, at formal dinners, receptions or light meals.

name: Wairau River  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: This is an elegant wine with intense tropical and stone fruit aromatics with delicate citrus and floral notes, full flavoured and textured. The wine has fine mouthwatering mineral acidity on the finish that refreshes the palate, leaving you longing for more.

name: De Bortoli  Sacred Hill Semillon Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

This Wine is Very pale straw. Ripe tropical flavours and a defining green apple backbone. Fresh early January rains prepared vines for what was to be a mild Riverina vintage anyway. The cooler temperatures allowed for great depth in fruit aromas especially in the Colombard and it also allowed for good natural acid in the Chardonnay.

name: Duckhorn  North Coast Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: At Duckhorn Vineyards, we have been making Sauvignon Blanc since 1982. Harvested from our estates and elite vineyard sites in California’s North Coast, this rich and elegant Sauvignon Blanc was blended with Sémillon to add depth and complexity. Fermented and aged using both stainless steel and French oak, it offers ripe citrus and tropical flavors, refreshing acidity and Sémillon-driven silkiness.

name: Albert Bichot  Domaine Long-Depaquit  Chablis
wine_color: pale yellow colour with light green
desc_en_short:
This Chablis' crystalline limpidity and its pale yellow colour with light green highlights tell a great deal about its character which is bursting with mineral precision and finesse. Very pure nose that is typical of Chablis (white flowers, flint) opens up to a palate that boasts an elegant combination of almond notes and lovely vivacity.

In northern Burgundy, not far from Auxerre, the Chablis appellation covers an approximately fifteen-kilometre radius around the village of the same name. It was the monks of the Cistercian abbey of Pontigny who began growing vines in the region. Chablis is located at the south-eastern extremity of the Paris Basin. The grapes used to craft this Chablis at the Domaine Long-Depaquit estate come from a mosaic of terroirs, which lends remarkable complexity to the wine.

name: Nik Weis  Urban Riesling
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Minerality, Blossom, Mineral, Citrus, Floral, Peach, Apple, Slate, Lime
desc_en_short: Urban Riesling from Nik Weis is a fresh, vibrant off-dry Mosel Riesling — light on its feet with crisp green apple, citrus zest, and a delicate floral lift, balanced by characteristic Mosel slate minerality and racy acidity.

name: St.Paul's  Gewurztraminer Justina DOC
desc_en_short: Characteristic exotic aroma of mango, papaya and ripe lychee accompanied by spicy notes of nutmeg and cinnamon and light scent of roses. The lively freshness surprises the palate. Its full body goes well with the balanced fruit sweetness and supports the juicy finish.

name: Blue Nun  Riesling
desc_en_short: The purest expression of this variety is found in Germany. This German Riesling combines grapefruit, peach and lavender on the nose with an exciting yet harmonious palate. Can be enjoyed with grilled dishes and pairs exceptionally well to Asian cuisine due to it’s clean and crisp finish.

name: Villa Maria  Private Bin Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale straw-yellow colour with green hues.
desc_en_short: This intense Sauvignon Blanc is alive with a myriad of flavours dominated by gooseberry, passionfruit, fresh citrus, melon and herbaceous aromas. The wine has an enticing palate with a juicy flavour profile, purity and concentration, finishing crisp and clean with an interwoven thread of acidity. This Sauvignon Blanc is the perfect pairing with seafood and all white meats.

name: Nautilus Estate  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short:
#32 Wine Spectator Top 100 of 2018

92 points in Wine Spectator - "Rich and complex, with honeysuckle and freshly grated ginger notes up front, giving way to juicy and crisp Meyer lemon, yellow apple and Asian pear flavors. Hints of lime zest and dried mango linger. Editors' Choice"

name: Tenuta Lunelli  Pietragrande
desc_en_short: Pietragrande is an intriguing and attractive Chardonnay - made even more precious by a dash of Sauvignon - that charms one with the elegance of its aromas and its delicate persistence. It is the result of careful vinification, designed to highlight Trentino’s vocation for healthy, sustainable mountain viticulture.

name: Buronga Hill Estate  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Ripe tropical fruits of melon and mango with herbaceous aromas of grass, capsicum and asparagus. This is a full-flavoured wine with the classic characters of passionfruit, cut grass and hints of peach.

name: De Bortoli  Sacred Hill Chardonnay
wine_color: Very pale straw with a green tinge.
desc_en_short: Very pale straw with a green tinge. Tight, fresh pear with stone fruit and is balanced with a subtle, hint of oak. This wine displays early picked peach and melon notes carried on a weighty palate, culminating in a fresh & crisp finish with the most interesting of oak nuances. A perfect stand alone wine or try with semi-soft goat cheese

name: Monsoon Valley Signature White
wine_color: Straw yellow with a clear rim
desc_en_short: Monsoon Signature White, hand-picked for premium quality selection Chenin Blanc, handcrafted in traditional Burgundy technique “Sur Lie” which contributes to richness and a lingering finish.

name: Jacob's Creek  Classic Chardonnay (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Attractive melon and fresh fruit flavours complemented by subtle toasty oak that are all hallmarks of this fresh crisp variety.

Wine Score : 89 POINTS, Decanter (Apr-18)

Award : PLATINUM, Critics Challenge 2018

name: Brancott Estate  Sauvignon Blanc (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
This range of fruit-forward and approachable wines focusses on varieties we introduced to Marlborough.

Wine Score : 88 Points, Jamie Goode - WineAnonak.com (Mar-18)

Award : DOUBLE GOLD, New York International Wine Competition 2018

name: Brancott Estate  Letter Series "B" Sauvignon Blanc (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Named in honour of iconic vineyards, Letter Series wines are hand-crafted from grapes of the highest quality.

Wine Score : 89 points, James Suckling (Nov-17)

Award : DOUBLE GOLD, New York International Wine Competition 2018

name: Apopo  Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Aromas and flavours of zesty lime, savoury herbs, crisp green apple and hints of honeydew melon wash in waves over the palate finishing up crisp, refreshing and lip-smacking good.

name: Greywacke  Pinot Gris
desc_en_short: A plush concoction of poached pears, red apples and quince jelly make for a rich aromatic profile with additional hints of honeysuckle and a cardamom-like spiciness. The palate has ample body, succulent ripeness and a herbal savoriness giving the wine an intriguing array of flavors in a supple, richly concentrated just off-dry style.

name: Greywacke  Wild Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Imagine an almond friand full of white nectarine, blood orange and rockmelon – laced with linseed, tarragon and lightly smoked tea. This is an alternative style that is both intricate and textural, a delicious concoction created by fermenting sauvignon blanc entirely with naturally occurring yeast.

name: Elena Walch  Pinot Grigio Alto Adige D.O.C.
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Mineral, Citrus, Floral, Apple, Cream, Slate, Pear
food_matching: Seafood, Oysters, Salad, Light Fish, Goat Cheese
desc_en_short: Elena Walch's Pinot Grigio is one of Alto Adige's finest expressions of the variety — precise and Alpine in character with crisp green apple, pear, mineral slate notes, and a distinctive floral elegance that sets it apart from flatter interpretations of the grape.

name: Louis Jadot  Chablis
wine_color: A very nice golden yellow colour.
desc_en_short: The Louis Jadot Chablis has a very nice golden yellow colour. It is a lipid, bright and fresh wine, which taste and bouquet develop relatively quickly. It should be served chilled. and can be served with oysters, charcuterie and fried fish. It also goes very well with goats cheese.

name: Bodegas Protos   Verdejo Rueda D.O.
desc_en_short: Greenish straw colour, bright and clean. Powerful and fruity aroma with green apple, citrus and tropical fruits, white blossoms, fragrant herbs and fennel hints. Very fresh taste with a good acidity, fruity, well balanced and complex with a long finish and slightly bitter aftertaste.

name: Bread & Butter  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This Chardonnay opens delicately with rich notes of vanilla bean and almond husk, which is reminiscent of a decadent crème brûlée. The creamy custard notes are balanced by a soft minerality and a hint of tropical fruit. Those creamy notes continue to your palate where they are joined with a light woodiness from the oak. Just like that first bite of brûlée, this wine will lingers into a long, creamy finish.

name: Angove  Long Row Chardonnay (187 ml)
wine_color: yellow in colour with highlights of gold lining the glass.
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 24 Bottles.

Aromas of stone fruit, ripe melons and delicate oak precede a palate with abundant ripe tropical fruits, some nutty and toasty characters and a long soft finish

name: Yellow Tail  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Cashew nuts, rockmelon and white peach. A rush of peach and melon is met by more of the nuttiness from the bouquet. This is a lithe, seamless white wine. Serve with roast quail, pork chops or salad Nicoise.

name: Yellow Tail  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Sauvignon Blanc at its clean, crisp best with passionfruit combining with grapefruit to create a vibrant, long and fresh palate with crunchy acidity and ultimate drinkability. Serve with green leafy salads, salt and pepper squid or perfect on its own.

name: Yellow Tail  Moscato
desc_en_short: Moscato is delicious. There is nothing like that light, perky fizz and natural raciness to make things feel good. Freshness is key and this Moscato has it in spades. Crushed green grapes, hints of peach and a little lift of tropical fruits to round out the soft palate but the real hero is the delicate 'frizzante' bubbles. A big win.

name: Penfolds  Bin 51 Eden Valley Riesling
desc_en_short: The wine offers delicate aromas of fresh cut apples and pears with a twist of lemon and minerality towards the end. A great deal of fruits and acidity makes for an interesting white wine with propensity to age gracefully if carefully cellared.

name: Angove  Long Row Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale straw with attractive green hues.
desc_en_short: Pale straw with attractive green hues. Herbaceous and tropical characters leap from the glass with some lime and lemon aromas following. Clean crisp flavours of tropical fruits abound with some light gooseberry/herbaceous notes and a clean finish.

name: Mount Riley  Riesling
desc_en_short: made from grapes grown on Mount Riley’s Litchfield and Anderson Vineyards in Marlborough’s Wairau Valley. A perfect growing season coupled with warm mid-summer

name: Mount Riley  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Mount Riley's Estate Range is great quality and value. Each wine in this range is fresh with pure, vibrant fruit flavours and aromas.

name: Mount Riley  Gewurztraminer
desc_en_short: Mount Riley's Estate Range is great quality and value. Each wine in this range is fresh with pure, vibrant fruit flavours and aromas.

name: Famille Perrin  La Vieille Ferme Blanc
desc_en_short: This wine is expressive and has a lot of balance. Beautiful pale-yellow colour, shiny green undertones. The bouquet is delicate white-flesh fruit, citrus fruit and spring flowers, fresh with an attractive aromatic intensity. The mouth is full of freshness, rich with mineral acidity, the final is aromatic and mouth-watering.

name: Jermann  Pinot Grigio DOC
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Minerality, Mineral, Acacia, Floral, Saline, Peach, Apple, Pear
food_matching: Seafood, Oysters, Salad, Light Fish, Goat Cheese
desc_en_short: Silvio Jermann's Pinot Grigio is a benchmark example from Friuli-Venezia Giulia — a fresh, elegant white with crisp green apple, pear, and delicate floral notes, underpinned by clean minerality and a pleasing, food-friendly finish.

name: Wolf Blass  Eaglehawk Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

Wolf Blass Eaglehawk Chardonnay is a fresh, fruity white wine with bright peach and nectarine aromas. The palate is medium-bodied, with citrus and white peach flavours, gently spiced oak, and a soft, crisp, lingering finish. Pairs well with rich fish, seafood or egg dishes, chicken, turkey, pork, creamy pasta, nuts, root vegetables and pumpkin.

name: Alta Mora  Etna Bianco
desc_en_short: Carricante, a native Sicilian grape variety, trained in espalier and alberello at an autitude of 600/750m asl. Area of production: Contrada Arrigo, Linguaglossa and Castiglione di Sicilia in the Contrade Verzella and Pietramarina where the freshness of the land allows full ripening of the Carricante without altering its aromas.

name: Santiago Ruiz  Albarino
desc_en_short: Clear and bright yellow. Intense and complex nose showcasing aromas of fruit (apple, pear, apricot), herbs (lemon verbena, aniseed) and mineral notes. Full bodied, its fruity complexity returns combined with wet-stone minerality on the palate prior to a long and crisp finish. The combination of five native grape varieties to Rias Baixas makes this a wine with a uniquely distinct character.

name: Dr Loosen  Red Slate Riesling Dry
desc_en_short: "Notes of grapefruit, tangerine, a hint of apricot, geranium, anise, and herbs. The wine is rather ample and juicy on the almost sweet-tasting palate. Yet the finish has more presence, zest, and spices, and tastes dry" - Mosel Fine Wines

name: Botter   Pinot Grigio delle Venezie (Organic Wine)
desc_en_short: Straw yellow color. Large and fresh bouquet with apple notes. On the palate it is clean and fresh with typical mineral taste. Ideal as an aperitif and with any fish courses.

name: Pinical Estate  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Pinical Estate is a family owned business who takes extreme pride in their company. The owner aims to produce wines that are delightful, friendly and drunk for all occasions amongst family and friends. The wines are produced from highly acclaimed vineyards in the South Eastern Australia.

name: Victoria Park  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This Chardonnay is pale gold with vibrant green hues. Flavours are reminiscent of citrus, honeydew melon and ripe peach with a hint of nougat and cinnamon. The palate finishes with a creamy texture and persistent mineral acidity.

name: Domaine De L'Herre  Sauvignon Blanc Cotes De Gascogne
wine_color: Bright straw with silver and gold tints
desc_en_short: Bright straw with silver and gold tints. Fresh citrus and grapefruit, followed with floral and spicy subtle notes. Mineral and fruity. Linger- ing finish with flavours of citrus and exotic fruits.

name: Concha Y Toro  Reservado Sauvignon Blanc Pedro Jimenez
desc_en_short: With flavours of grapefruit and peach, this zesty refreshing white pairs perfectly with seafood and mildly spicy dishes. Crisp and Refreshing, this white is a perfect match for seafood dishes

name: Annalina  Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: A juicy well-fruited entry of lime, gooseberry and peach. Red apples and quince join on the mid-palate and continue onto the crisp and lingering mineral finish.

name: Babich Family  Reserve Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Our Family Reserve Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc has aromas of tropical fruits and lime. The palate shows stone fruits with passionfruit, blackcurrant and a touch of grapefruit. A dry lingering finish, a premium Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc.

name: Granmonte  Spring Chenin Blanc
wine_color: Light green tint on the hue.
desc_en_short: This wine is a burst of tropical fruit on the nose, with hints of pear and citrus. It is inviting with soft impression, a hint of sweetness and pomelo-like juiciness. The wine is crisp on the palate with a zesty acidity and refreshing finish.

name: Granmonte  Viognier
wine_color: Light green tint on the hue.
desc_en_short: The wine shows layers of exotic flowers, expressive of tropical climate like papaya flower, honeysuckle, lime zest, dried apricot with minerality. Elegant, complex with long lingering finish of vanilla oak and tight acid backbone. This wine is pleasurable drinking on its own as well as lending itself to food.

name: Granmonte  The Orient Viognier
wine_color: Light green tint on the hue.
desc_en_short: The Orient Viognier has opulent nose of stone fruit, apricot, orange blossoms and musk. It is elegant yet juicy on the palate with notes of flintiness and a long lingering finish of vanilla oak and tight acid backbone. This wine is pleasurable drinking on its own as well as lending itself to food.

name: Colina  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Colinas Chardonnay is an elegant, velvety and aromatic white wine that is produced in the Bairrada wine region. It presents aromas of tropical fruits with notes of banana and pineapple aromas, dried fruits together with citric acidity.

name: Aromo  Reserva Privada Chardonnay
wine_color: attractive pale yellow color with green hues.
desc_en_short: This wine is attractive pale yellow color with green hues. The wine brims with aromas of very fresh tropical fruit against a vanilla and caramel background. Fresh, balanced and youthful mouthfeel followed by a vibrantly sweet aftertaste.

name: Domaine de la Motte  Chablis
desc_en_short: Lots of lovely ripe stone fruit aromas and hot stones on the nose. Followed by generous, pronounced fruit on the palate with nectarine skins and a soft acidity.

name: Reserve St Martin  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Straw color. Aromas of green apple candies and apple gelee with a supple, bright, dry light body and a seamless, brisk minerals finish. A clean and balanced Chardonnay for weeknight quaffing.

name: Satellite  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: This wine has a bouquet of kiwi, and green apple, with classic Marlborough notes of sweet pea and grapefruit. On the palate the wine has sweet fruit flavours with a bright, crisp palate. Use as an aperitif, pair with cold salad dishes (mixed greens, pasta, potato), or have it alongside your favourite seafood dishes.

name: Fraser Gallop  Margaret River Parterre Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale straw with lime green hues.
desc_en_short: Pale straw with lime green hues. Aromas of citrus, cumquat, pineapple, citrus blossom, white peach. Lime and lemon juice with an almond glossiness and a whisper of lactose. The acidity and pH sets this up as a long term cellaring prospect which will develop a touch of richness as it matures. Should develop further complexity with 10-12 years careful cellaring.

name: Louis Jadot  Chablis 1er Cru Fourchaume
wine_color: A light golden hue with greenish reflections
desc_en_short: A light golden hue with greenish reflections, this is a powerful wine with lemon citrus, herbs and scents of forest floor and superbly fresh, rounded fruit flavours.

name: La Chablisienne  Chablis 1er Cru Fourchaume
wine_color: Pale gold in colour with golden reflections
desc_en_short:
Pale gold in colour with golden reflections, limpid and brilliant.
The first nose is expressive and sweet with aromas of ripe fruit.
Full in the mouth with a nice sweetness brought by woody notes (vanilla, caramel).
The whole is well balanced with density, length and a fine mineral tension.

name: William Fevre  Chablis Premier Cru
desc_en_short: Domaine William Fèvre was bought by maison Bouchard Père & Fils and is made up of a unique set of great terroir in Chablis. Ploughing the soil, hand harvesting and yield regulation have all enhanced this vineyard and enabled the wines to gain in natural expression. In this way the maison produces highly pure, well-defined Chablis with some great vintages. And some chiselled, precise Grand Crus that blend freshness with density.

name: Kessler-Zink  Gewurztraminer Spatlese
desc_en_short: Fruity and well-bodied white wine with a fruity and well balance of sweetness and acidity, with hints of sweet oranges and fresh lemons. The sweetness is in perfect harmony with the aroma and taste of tropical fruits and fresh honey, which gives this Spätlese the harmonic elegance.

name: Spy Valley  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Lifted floral notes, guava, and citrus. Distinctive flavors of passionfruit and white nectarine intermingled with layers of minerality, finishing with a fresh mouth-watering acidity.

name: Dog Point  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short:
Our version of the classic dry aromatic style of Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc. The citrus core of flavours are juicy and intense with deliciously refreshing saline acidity. The wine calls for simple fresh seafood but can also be enjoyed as a pre-dinner aperitif.

Grapes are picked from eight of our own vineyards within the Wairau Valley. Cropped at an average of 10 tonnes/hectare. The fruit is whole bunch pressed, cold settled before fermentation and 4 months aging in stainless steel tanks. A portion of this wine is fermented using indigenous yeast. Bottled without fining.

name: Weingut Robert Weil  Riesling Rheingau Tradition
desc_en_short:
Alluring and delicate residual sweetness paired with tantalizing fruit aromas; a perfect pirouette of charming
sweetness and crisp acidity. Enjoy this wine on its own, or as a complement to hot and spicy cuisines.

name: Nollen Erben	 Mosel Riesling Spatlese
desc_en_short: The wine is pale with lemon green colour. It has medium intensity aromas of green apple, pear, lime, lemon with hint of elderflower. The wine is tend to be off-dry to medium sweetness balance with nice acidity. This is medium-bodied wine with medium flavor intensity and medium to long finish. It can go well with spicy food such as Thai or Indian cuisines.

name: Nollen Erben	 Mosel Dry Riesling
desc_en_short: Pale with lemon green colour, the wine show aromas of lime, lemon, green apple with a hint of wet rock. Dry with a touch of residual sugar, high acidity with medium bodied and long finish. Perfectly for fried food and Thai cuisine.

name: Nollen Erben	 Rheinhessen Gewürztraminer Kabinett
desc_en_short: Nollen Erben is under The Wein- & Sektkellerei Josef Drathen GmbH & Co. KG, one of the leading winemakers and sparkling wine producers of the Mosel regionwhich has over 100 years experience in the winemaking and has been handed down from generation to generation.

name: Nik Weis  Mosel Dry Riesling VDP.ESTATE WINES (GUTSWEINE)
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Grapefruit, Minerality, Mineral, Citrus, Petrol, Peach, Lemon, Apple, Slate
desc_en_short: Nik Weis Mosel Dry Riesling is a VDP-classified estate wine of exceptional precision — a bone-dry expression of Mosel Riesling from slate slopes, delivering intense citrus, green apple, and white peach character with razor-sharp acidity and a long, stony mineral finish.

name: Belena  Moscato
wine_color: Straw yellow in colour with light golden hues.
desc_en_short: Sweet aromas of honeyed apricot & citrus lemon that echo the palate to make this a refreshing Moscato.

name: Dr Loosen  Dr. L Riesling Dry
desc_en_short:
A harmonious, beautifully balanced Riesling, made in a dry style that is extraordinarily versatile with food.

This well-rounded Riesling is the dry counterpart to the lightly sweet Dr. L Riesling. Together, these two wines provide a glimpse into the unique stylistic diversity of Riesling, capturing the elegant and racy characteristics of steep, slate-soil Mosel vineyards at a very reasonable price. They are produced with grapes from contracted growers throughout the Mosel River valley who work closely with brothers Ernst and Thomas Loosen to achieve excellent quality in every vintage.

name: Caleo Pecorino Terre Di Chieti IGT
wine_color: A yellow colour with green reflections.
desc_en_short: Made from Pecorino grapes, it has a yellow colour with green reflections. The bouquet is unmistakable and immediate, with an intense impression of white-pulped fruits with the complexity given by exotic fruits.

name: Domaine du Chardonnay  Chablis Les Lys
desc_en_short: Fine nose with citrus and slightly vanilla notes. Silky and elegant with delicate aromas of stone fruits (peach and nectarine) and some notes of honey.

name: Louis Latour  Genevrieres Meursault 1er Cru
desc_en_short: Situated just south of Volnay and Pommard in the Côte de Beaune, Meursault is the most extensive southerly white wine commune of the Côte-d'Or. The perfect south-easterly exposure and the rocky, stony soils contribute greatly to the remarkable finesse of which the wines of Meursault are capable. 'Genevrières' comes from 'genévrier' (juniper), a shrub with prickly needles and purple berries which enjoys the limestone soils of Burgundy. Many junipers were replaced by vines, hence the name of the juniper forms part of the name of many parcels of vines. The Meursault 1er Cru "Genevrières" is a great example of a fine Burgundy Chardonnay.

name: Chavin Zero Non-Alcoholic Chardonnay (750 ml)
wine_color: Pale yellow robe with bright reflections.
desc_en_short:
Expert in alcohol-free wine, Chavin Zéro reflects 10 years’ experience in de-alcoholizing wine with 100% de-alcoholized wine and no added aromas.

The range offers a sophisticated, iconic alternative. More than an olfactory and gustatory experience, the pleasure also lies in the high-end packaging.

Chavin Zéro will dress up your table with a light touch, perfectly matching your food and wine pairings.

For an optimal, uninhibited tasting experience, the range features a low sugar content.

name: Los Cerros De San Juan  De La Colonia Riesling Viognier
desc_en_short: This yong and crisp white blended is ideal to enjoy in any occasion. On the nose it stands out for its expressive aromas, where the natural freshness and floral scent of rislig combline harmoniously with the white fruits and minerality of Viognier.

name: Joseph Mellot  Sincerite Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Blackcurrant buds' aromas and broom touches. Beautiful structure which fills in the mouth. Fresh, crispy and varietal.

name: Joseph Mellot  Sancere La Chatellenie
wine_color: A pale gold color with green highlights.
desc_en_short: Intense and complex nose where, among the yellow fruits and citrus notes, a superb minerality is expressed. The palate opens with this minerality which stretches the wine throughout its tasting. An elegant mouth where the pear and yellow peach bring their aromatic and juicy side. An elegant salinity prolongs the mouth in a beautiful balance.

name: Joseph Mellot  Pouilly Fume Le Tronsec
wine_color: Deep yellow color with light green highlights.
desc_en_short:
A beautiful citrus nose
complemented by white-fleshed fruits
,
A beautiful minerality in the mouth, with
freshness,
A frank and powerful finish
brings a beautiful persistence to this
wine.

name: Tavernello Vino Bianco d’Italia Amabile
desc_en_short: Tavernello Vino Bianco d’Italia Amabile has a straw-yellow colour with a light greenish hue. On the nose, an intense bouquet of white fruits and flowers. A very fresh wine with good balance and fine sweet aftertaste. Thanks to its freshness and mild taste, this white wine pairs well with light salads and delicate pasta dishes, such as delicious basil pesto pasta.

name: Ruppertsber Riesling Dry Pfalz
desc_en_short: Elegant and crisp Riesling from Pfalz, Germany — showcasing bright citrus, green apple, and mineral notes. A dry, refreshing white wine perfect for seafood, spicy dishes, and light cuisine.

name: Dr Loosen Erdener Treppchen Riesling Kabinett
desc_en_short: The centuries-old stone steps at Erdener Treppchen speak to the historic significance of this steep iron-rich slope. This is a truly impressive Kabinett that transports you through the spectrum of cherries and apples. After piquing your interest with its alluring nose, on the palate it delivers focus, lift, and flavors tessellating through a long finish. This wine’s depth of fruit is absolutely delicious now and will reward time in the cellar.

name: Wairau River  Summer Riesling
desc_en_short: Riesling is an aromatic grape variety displaying primary fruit aromas of orchard fruits like nectarine, apricot, honey-crisp apple, and pear.  Often you will detect things like honeycomb, jasmine, or lime peel.  Superb as an aperitif, Riesling also pairs well with richer foods.

name: Final Touch  Mojito Set
desc_en_short: This all-in-one mojito set has the tools you need to make the perfect mojito. Includes two classic tom collins glasses and a wooden muddler for crushing ingredients.

name: Koala  Bako Deluxe Corkscrew - Gold
desc_en_short: The new vertically opening corkscrew with a gold-effect chrome handle, clean and hand-lacquered. Designed to improve ease of use, with minimal effort. Double support at the height of the spiral to make opening easier.

name: Jiggers  30oz Boston Shaker (with weighted base)
desc_en_short: This heavyweight boston shaker comes with weighted base, easy to spin and heavy enough to handle with either the sister 18oz tin or 16oz missing glass.

name: The 4 Barmen  Speedy Bottle Pourer (Rose Gold)
desc_en_short: The 4 Barmen Speedy Bottle Pourer in Rose Gold is a stylish, professional free-flow pourer that combines elegant aesthetics with functional precision — delivering controlled, drip-free pours from spirit bottles with a warm metallic finish that looks great on any bar.

name: The 4 Barmen  Speedy Bottle Pourer (Mirrored Silver with Black Rubber)
desc_en_short: The 4 Barmen Speedy Bottle Pourer in Mirrored Silver with Black Rubber insert is a professional-grade free-flow pourer designed for fast, drip-free service — ideal for home bartenders and professionals who want precision and style behind the bar.

name: Vacu Vin  Vacuum Wine Stopper (Set of 2)
desc_en_short: The Wine Stoppers preserve an opened bottle of wine under vacuum for up to 10 days. Use in combination with our Wine Saver.

name: Coravin   Pivot Plus Black
desc_en_short:
Revolutionize the way you enjoy wine with the Coravin Pivot+ Wine preservation system. Enjoy any wine, any day of the week, with no pressure to finish the bottle.

The ingenious combination of the Pivot"" Stopper and Device keeps the remaining bottle fresh for up to 4 weeks. Choose between two different pack formats

name: Coravin  Pure Sparkling CO2 Capsules (Pack 6)
desc_en_short: Coravin Pure™ Sparkling CO2 Capsules power your Coravin Sparkling® System. These replacement Capsules are filled with pure CO2, the same gas that creates bubbles in sparkling wine, to preserve its taste and effervescence for up to 4 weeks. Each Capsule preserves up to 7 standard bottles of sparkling wine.

name: Dometic  D46B Compressor Wine Cooler, Dual-Temp Zone, 46 Bottles (Design Range)
desc_en_short:
** Free delivery for Bangkok Area. For other provinces, delivery fees are calculated based on distance.

 

Compressor wine cooler, dual-zone, freestanding or built-in, 46 bottles Enhance your kitchen with this dual-zone wine cooler that can be seamlessly built-in to create an elegant style in any home. It has room for 46 Bordeaux bottles attractively presented on FSC certified wooden shelves.

 

Stunning Minimalist Design

Store your treasured wine collection in a beautifully designed Dometic wine cooler. With its minimalist all-black exterior and attractive interior lighting, the Design range of Dometic wine coolers will enhance any space. Allow the Dometic wine cooler to take center stage in your kitchen. Enjoy a stylish interior feature and drink your wine at its very best.

 

Optimal Storage Environment

For wine to unfold its full bouquet and flavor, both the storage conditions and the serving temperature must be right. Dometic wine coolers ensure the optimal environment for unlocking the wine's full flavors and charecter. The temperature is accurately controlled thanks to electronic regulation and a constant humidity is maintained between 50-70% ensuring the corks don't dry or mold. A fan circulates the air inside the wine cooler while the integrated carbon filters eliminates any potential odors. The low emission treatment of the triple-glazed doors on Dometic wine coolers stops ultraviolet rays that can damage and change the character of the wine.

name: Cohiba  Club (20 Sticks per Box)
desc_en_short: Machine rolled in Cuba. The leaves used for the tobacco are taken from the same plants which are harvested for world famous premium hand made Havana cigars. These plants are grown in the Vuelta Abajo region in Cuba, an area located west of the island, which is widely regarded as the finest tobacco growing land in the world.

name: Cohiba  Mini (10 Sticks per Box)
desc_en_short: The Cohiba Mini is a complex and spicy light-to-medium cigarillo, A distinctive format designed to meet with the most modern and dynamic consumption trends. Short 20-30 min smoke, ideal for a break time moment.

name: Punch  Petit Coronation (Aluminum Tube)
desc_en_short: These little coronas exhibit great amounts of smoke right from the first draw. The start is cedar and oak with a floral hint. In the middle I found more woody notes with a vague citrus flavour and a sweet bean in there that I could not pin down, dammit! Leather taste is starting to build. The last third still exhibits some mild floral notes but with a heavy leather and tobacco end.

name: Guantanamera  Cristales (5 Sticks per Box)
desc_en_short: Guantanamera make a great introduction to Cuban Cigars. As with a good Malt Cuban Cigars are an acquired taste and can often prove overpowering to the less experienced Cigar smoker. The Guantanamera have been rolled using the highly regarded leaves from the Vuelta Arriba region of Cuba but the leaves have not been aged for as long, which means they have a less intense flavour and remain enjoyable for the less experienced, whilst giving a good insight into the flavours that make Cuban cigars so famous. The Guantanamera are machine made, which keeps the price tag more reasonable.

name: Guantanamera  Puritos (5 Sticks per Box)
desc_en_short: this cigar looks very rough and loosely rolled, but smokes evenly. This lightly flavoured cigar offers slightly tangy undertones and mellow roasted flavours. Great for an introduction to Cuban cigars.

name: Partagas  Chicos Cello (5 Sticks per Box)
Plumm  Vintage RED A
desc_en_short: The Plumm Vintage range provides a slice of everyday luxury for those who love drinking great wine minus the pomp and ceremony. Machine made from premium European crystal, this range brings both function and durability to a sleek and stylish form. Dishwasher friendly and destined to be used every day. Designed for Full Bodied Red Wine.

name: Plumm  Vintage SPARKLING
desc_en_short: The Plumm Vintage range provides a slice of everyday luxury for those who love drinking great wine minus the pomp and ceremony. Machine made from premium European crystal, this range brings both function and durability to a sleek and stylish form. Dishwasher friendly and destined to be used every day. Designed for Sparkling Wine & Champagne.

desc_en_short: Recommended for: Barbaresco, Barolo, Beaujolais Cru, Blanc de Noirs, Blauburgunder, Burgundy (red), Chambolle Musigny, Echézeaux, Moulin à vent, Musigny, Nebbiolo, Nerello Mascalese, Nuits Saint Georges, Pinot Noir New World, Pinot Noir Old World, Pommard, Romanée Saint Vivant, Rosé Champagne, Santenay, St. Aubin, Volnay, Vosne-Romanée, Vougeot

This modern presentation invites consumers to reimagine how they savor the iconic blend.

name: Laird's 100 Proof Straight Applejack (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Laird’s 100 Proof Straight Applejack is more than just a spirit — it’s a piece of American history in a bottle. The Laird family distillery, founded in 1780 in New Jersey, is recognized as the oldest licensed distillery in the United States, and its Applejack has been enjoyed by generations since the birth of the nation.

Made entirely from fresh, hand-selected apples grown in the cool orchards of Virginia and New Jersey, this expression follows the same traditional methods used by Robert Laird — a soldier in George Washington’s army and the pioneer of American apple brandy.

Unlike blended versions, Laird’s 100 Proof Straight Applejack is 100% apple brandy, aged in charred American oak barrels to develop warmth, depth, and a golden-amber hue. Bottled at 100 proof (50% ABV), it reflects both authenticity and bold character — a true embodiment of America’s rustic spirit and pioneering craftsmanship.

name: Coutanseaux Aîné XXO Cognac (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Coutanseaux Aîné stands among the great houses that shaped the golden age of Cognac. Founded in Jarnac in 1767, the Maison was one of the earliest négociants to export French brandy to the royal courts of Europe. From the rolling chalky hills of the Grande Champagne and Petite Champagne crus, its legacy was built on purity, patience, and the art of long maturation.

The XXO (Extra Extra Old) expression represents the rarest tier of the house’s craft — a blend of eaux-de-vie aged a minimum of 14 years, though many in this cuvée rest far longer in old Limousin oak casks. Each barrel tells a story of quiet evolution: the spirit breathing through oak grain, exchanging air, and gaining the deep amber hue and complex bouquet that only time can bestow.

Coutanseaux Aîné XXO pays homage to centuries of distillers who shaped Cognac’s soul — where science meets poetry, and where time becomes flavor.

name: Capel Pisco Reservado Transparente (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Capel Pisco Reservado Transparente represents the essence of Chile’s Elqui Valley — a land where sunlight, altitude, and craftsmanship converge to create one of the world’s most expressive piscos. Produced by Cooperativa Capel, Chile’s most respected pisco house founded in 1938, this expression honors the tradition of distilling grapes into a spirit of unmatched clarity and soul.

Crafted from Moscatel grapes grown under the high Andean sun, this Reservado pisco undergoes slow, precise distillation in copper pot stills, yielding a crystal-clear, aromatic elixir that reflects both the purity of the Andes and the passion of Chilean artisans.

“Transparente” is more than its appearance — it’s a statement of honesty, precision, and balance. Every drop reveals the delicate heart of Chilean terroir, distilled to perfection

name: Gilbey's  Gin (1 L)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
Tasting Notes

The nose is classic with plenty of juniper, with orange zest and angelica present as well. The lower notes have the bright, sappy, angelica still accompanied by the orange. The nose is simple, but familiar and inviting. I don’t think I would guess the price by the nose. It’s fresh and generally quite positive.

The palate is assertive and sharp, with lots of classic gin botanicals making an appearance: pine-forward juniper, bitter orange rind, coriander mid-palate— surprisingly obvious for a second and then quickly vanishing from consciousness— the finish is sharply citrus with a mineral-tinged, calciferous/slightly chalky astringency. Quite dry, with a roar of heat that is more expected at this price point.

The finish is moderately long, with that orange/citrus note enduring.

name: No. 3 London Dry Gin  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: No.3 is the classic London Dry Gin distilled to a proprietary recipe of Berry Bros. & Rudd, London's oldest wine and spirit merchant. With juniper at its heart, it unashamedly celebrates the integrity and character of traditional London Dry Gin: six perfectly balanced botanicals distilled in traditional copper pot stills. The botanicals: Juniper orange peal, grapefruit peel, angelica root, Moroccan coriander, cardamom.

name: Rivo  Mediterranean Gin (500 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes

A MAGICAL GIN FROM A MAGICAL PLACE

For centuries, local women have scoured the mountainside meadows surrounding the lake for herbs and flowers to prepare traditional medicines and remedies. While some might have considered them witches we see them as pioneers of herbal medicine. And it is the theme of magic that inspired our packaging and labeling. Crisscrossing geometrical lines create abstract representations of the two key elements of Lake Como’s geography: The mountains and the waves.

name: An Dulaman	Irish Maritime Gin (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
An Dúlamán Irish Maritime Gin is born where land meets sea — along the rugged coastline of Donegal, Ireland, where Atlantic winds, ocean mist, and ancient Gaelic traditions intertwine. The name “An Dúlamán” comes from the Irish word for “seaweed”, an homage to the ocean’s deep influence on this unique gin.

Crafted by Sliabh Liag Distillers, one of Ireland’s pioneering independent distilleries, this gin reflects a maritime soul shaped by the wild northwest coast. What sets it apart is the use of five native seaweeds harvested by hand from the Atlantic shores — including Dulse, Sweet Kelp, Carrageen Moss, Channel Wrack, and Pepper Dulse, known as the “Truffle of the Sea.” These are blended with classic gin botanicals such as juniper, angelica, and citrus peel, creating a spirit that is both profoundly coastal and unmistakably Irish.

Each small batch is distilled slowly in a copper pot still named Méabh, allowing the oceanic botanicals to reveal their delicate minerality and briny complexity. The result is a gin that tastes like the Atlantic breeze itself — crisp, fresh, and full of character.

name: Chiyomusubi Craft Gin Impact (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Chiyomusubi Craft Gin “Impact” hails from Tottori Prefecture, Japan, a coastal region where mountains, forests, and the Sea of Japan converge. It is crafted by the historic Chiyomusubi Shuzo, a brewery founded in 1865, long admired for its exceptional sake and shochu. With over 150 years of distilling expertise, the house brings its deep fermentation knowledge into the world of gin — creating a spirit that bridges Japanese purity and modern intensity.

The name “Impact” reflects its bold yet balanced character — a gin designed to awaken the senses with a wave of Japanese botanicals. Distilled in small batches, it features a core of juniper berries, harmonized with local ingredients such as Nashi pear, Yuzu citrus, Japanese pepper (Sansho), and green tea. Each botanical is distilled separately to capture its purest aroma before being artfully blended into one cohesive expression.

This careful process allows Chiyomusubi to achieve the essence of Japanese craftsmanship (Monozukuri) — precision, respect for nature, and harmony in every drop.

name: G'Vine  June Watermelon (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
June by G’Vine Watermelon is a delicate and joyful expression of French artistry, born in the vineyards of Cognac — where the iconic G’Vine Gin de France is crafted. It captures the spirit of French summer, celebrating sunshine, friendship, and freshness in a bottle.

Unlike traditional gins, G’Vine is made from grape-based spirit, not grain, giving it an elegant softness and fruity texture. The June series takes that refinement further, infusing the gin with natural watermelon and summer fruits, creating a refreshing, modern twist that feels effortlessly French.

Vibrant yet refined, June Watermelon embodies the lightness of a warm afternoon by the Riviera — a gentle sweetness balanced with floral notes, made for easy enjoyment under the sun
