name: Boatyard Old Tom (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Boatyard Old Tom is made using a gin
base that has been distilled in our Copper
Alembic Pot Still, called ‘Érainn’. The
collected spirit rests in hand-picked firstfill Pedro Ximénez sherry casks where the
natural sweetness and richness of the
sherry absorbs into our gin. To finish the
process a small amount of PX sherry is
added to give our spirit a velvety smooth
mouthfeel

name: Nonino  Grappa Tradizione  (1 L)
food_matching: Chocolate, Dried Fruits, Cheese, After Dinner
desc_en_short: Grappa obtained by white and red pomace . Typical and elegant.

name: Grappa di Sassicaia  (Single-Vintage) (Barrel Aged) (500 ml)
food_matching: Chocolate, Dried Fruits, Cheese, After Dinner

name: Carlo Pellegrino Grappa Di Marsala (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Carlo Pellegrino Grappa di Marsala is a distillation of Sicilian soul — a spirit born from the sun-drenched vineyards of Marsala, on the western coast of Sicily, where tradition and terroir meet the art of transformation.

Produced by Casa Pellegrino, one of Sicily’s most historic wine houses founded in 1880, this grappa captures the essence of Marsala wine production — transforming the pomace left from those noble grapes into a refined, aromatic distillate. Crafted using traditional copper pot stills, it reflects the warmth, energy, and generosity of Sicilian craftsmanship.

The result is a grappa that carries the perfume of the vineyard: fragrant, soft, and luminous — with the sun of Marsala shining through every drop.

name: Carlo Pellegrino  Grappa Nero Di Avola (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Carlo Pellegrino Grappa Nero d’Avola is a powerful and elegant expression of Sicilian heritage — distilled from the noble Nero d’Avola grape, known as “the black pearl of Sicily.” It represents the island’s warmth, volcanic soil, and passion for craftsmanship, all captured through centuries of winemaking tradition.

Produced by Casa Pellegrino, established in 1880 in Marsala, this grappa is born from the pomace of Nero d’Avola, Sicily’s most celebrated red grape. After the wine is made, the grape skins are distilled slowly in traditional copper pot stills, preserving their bold character and aromatic depth.

The result is a grappa that combines strength and grace — a true reflection of Sicilian contrast: sun and sea, fire and softness. Each sip carries the warmth of the Mediterranean and the craftsmanship of Pellegrino’s distilling mastery.

name: Cristiani  Sambuca (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Sambuca is an anise flavored
liqueur, sweetened with sugar
and enhanced with a secret
combination of herbs and spices.
A traditional Italian preparation is
sambuca, with three coffee beans
representing “health, wealth, and
happiness”

name: Cristiani  Sambuca Caffe (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Diamante Moka (Sambuca & Coffee) is an aromatic sweet dessert liquor, with an intense aroma and delicate test. Drink straight or with ice, added to vanilla ice cream or coffee.

The aroma is created throw the infusion of all herbs for 60 days where the master distiller mix, following his experience. The aroma of Sambuca is sweet with a great density of the products. Diamante Moka (Sambuca & Caffè) is an excellent drink for dessert, but also to drink with an Italian coffee.

name: De Kuyper  Amaretto (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Through antiquity we learned that almond aroma arouses passion in females. Only to release that aroma, you have to go beyond nuts. Don't you worry, it's still almonds galore in our Amaretto. But with a little extra. For that extra oomph, we added some more hard to resist ingredients, such as vanilla extract and fresh lemon distillate. A touch of caramel finishes it, turning the liqueur deep gold.

name: De Kuyper  Creme de Cassis (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Used as an antidote for snakebites in the 16th century, blackcurrant liqueur has come a long way. Over the years the cordial has been refined, without losing its unique sweet taste. By carefully extracting European blackcurrants and blending the concentrate with natural juices and sweets, we fit the tradition. Our Crème de Cassis is as rich and red as it was 500 years ago, only it tastes better.

name: De Kuyper  Creme de Menthe Green (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Defining fresh, two natural flavours spring to mind: mint and citrus. For our Crème de Menthe we’ve used both ingredients, distilling lemon oil and the essence of crisp mint leaves. The result is this eye-catching green liqueur, bursting with mouth-tingling freshness. As you can see, this crème is all but creamy. The ‘crème’ in our Menthe only refers to the amount of sugar that we’ve used.

name: De Kuyper  Melon (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Here’s something to remember: you can’t fake the taste of a ripe melon. People spend fortunes searching for the right formula, but obviously we prefer working with the real fruit. All-natural melons matured in abundant sunlight, bursting with juice and freshness. And once we’ve extracted their essence, we leave it at that. Just add some neutral spirits and done. That’s melon in its purest form.

name: De Kuyper  Sour Apple Pucker (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Sour Apple Pucker is a sweet and sour sensation. A burst of sweet flavor followed by a mouth puckering sour. Get ready to Pucker-up!

name: De Kuyper  Wild Strawberry (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Voluptuous, vibrant, juicy and sweet, strawberries speak to the imagination. If not, they certainly speak to ours. Determined to trap the full strawberry sensation we set out to create a stunning cocktail ingredient. And guess what, wild strawberries work wonderfully well with alcohol. This liqueur not only oozes sweet strawberry out of every drop, it also hints at honey, cherry and fresh oranges.

name: Cynar  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Cynar is an artichoke based bitter. Its distinctive flavour is enriched from an infusion of 13 herbs and plants, making it a completely natural drink, rich in scents and a unique taste .

name: Pallini  Limoncello (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Pallini Limoncello is a natural liqueur that has been crafted by the Pallini family in Italy since 1875. It is made from prized, organic Sfusato lemons, exclusive to the Amalfi coast. The handpicked lemons are infused immediately, so their freshness and flavor is delivered in every bottle. Its versatility is almost endless – enjoy it neat, on the rocks, straight from the fridge, or mixed into cocktails and food recipes. For a crisp and authentic taste of Italy, none can compare!

GMO Free, Gluten Free, Organic Lemons & Kosher.

name: Branca  Menta (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Brancamenta, the unmistakable mint-flavour liqueur, gives you an intense pleasure thrill at every sip. Its surprising formula includes herbs, spices and the finest peppermint essential oil in the world. Natural and specially refreshing, it's a drink perfect for all seasons.

name: Mr.Boston  Amaretto (1 L)
flavor_tags: Orange Peel, Marzipan, Orange, Almond, Cola
desc_en_short: Deep reddish copper color. Light marzipan and orange peel aromas follow through to a syrupy, lightly sweet medium body and a brisk almond and cola nut fade.

name: Mr.Boston  Green Creme De Menthe (1 L)
desc_en_short: Creme de menthe is a sweet, mint-flavored alcoholic beverage. Its flavor is primarily derived from Corsican mint. It is available commercially in a colorless (called "white") and a green version (which obtains its color from the mint leaves or from the addition of coloring, if extract and not the leaves are used to make the liqueur.

name: Bitter Truth  Golden Falernum Liqueur (500 ml)
desc_en_short: This rum based liqueur is rich and complex in flavor. The Nose is Spicy ginger with clove and a hint of vanilla. On The Palate A more subtle ginger, followed by almond and vanilla. An allspice tingle on the tongue develops into a long finish with a zest of lime.

name: Bitter Truth  Cacumber Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Fresh green cucumber with grassy notes of herbs de Provence. Light & inviting with aromas of freshly cut cucumber peel and balanced herbal bitter notes.

name: Bitter Truth  Grapefruit Bitter (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Bright, complex citrus. A dominant grapefruit aroma and flavor mellows into the vegetal green flavors of hops. A great bitter for citrus-heavy drinks that may otherwise feel dull or overly sweet.

name: Bitter Truth  Creole Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Bitter, sweet and spicy. According to the traditional Creole style, fruity and floral aromas unite with the flavors of anise, caraway and fennel.

name: Bitter Truth  Celery Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Very complex and exotic. The initial flavor of celery is dominant, leading into a complex palate with aromas of lemongrass, orange peel and ginger.

name: Bols  Amaretto (700 ml)
desc_en_short: BOLS Amaretto is a gold-brown liqueur. Amaretto, which originated in Italy, is famous for its sweet almond aroma and nutty caramel flavour. A distillation of carefully selected ingredients creates this exquisite liqueur.

name: Bols  Melon (700 ml)
desc_en_short: BOLS Melon is a light emerald green liqueur based on the honeydew melon. It has a uniquely crisp and fruity finish. Melon as a popular liqueur first came to prominence during the disco boom of the late 1970s, in globally popular drinks such as the Melon Martini and the Melon Sour.

name: Bols  Apricot Brandy (700 ml)
desc_en_short: BOLS Apricot Brandy uses fresh apricot juice supported by tones of orange to give it a richer, fuller flavour that matches its golden-amber colour.

name: Bittermens  Hopped Grapefruit (125 ml)
desc_en_short: Extraordinary bitters, Bittermens Hopped Grapefruit Bitters are made with grapefruit essences and peels, hops for bitterness, and bottled at 53% abv. We recommend these be used in cocktails such as Daiquiris, Gimlets, Gins and Tonic or even Tequila.

name: Averna  Amaro Siciliano (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Averna is an excellent liqueur with full body and smooth taste, extremely pleasant for every moment of the day.

name: Cointreau  Orange Liqueur (350 ml)
desc_en_short: A truly premium international brand created in 1849, made from 100% pure orange liqueur. Cointreau is a perfect marriage between sweet and bitter orange peels resulting in a crystal clear spirit with exquisite fullness, enveloping fragrance and fine clarity 3 Gold Medals, SFWSC 2007, 2008, 2009 | Hall of Fame Inductee Class of 2011, SJ June 2011

name: Bitter Truth  Orange Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: The fruity sweetness at the beginning is quickly followed by a very bitter taste. The aroma of bitter orange peel is in the foreground, completed by spicy flavors of cardamom, caraway and nutmeg

name: Giffard  Cherry Brandy Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This traditional liqueur is made with the slow maceration of two varieties of cherries (one sweet and one bitter). It is obtained from carefully selected cherries from the best orchards and stepped into alcohol.

name: Giffard  Amaretto (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A sweet, nutty Amaretto from French syrup and liqueur experts, Giffard. Made with the maceration of almonds, apricot pits and cherry stones. Should make a great Godfather cocktail that you just couldn't refuse to take another sip from.

name: Giffard  Blue Curacao (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Its name comes from a Carribean island and its colour (deep blue) evokes the blue seas it has crossed.

name: Giffard  Cacao (White) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Liqueur made from the distillation of cocoa beans. The cocoa beans are steeped into alcohol and are then distilled.

name: Giffard  Poire Williams (William Pear Liqueur ) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Liqueur made from brandy "Poire William." Nose steeped in brandy, very focused on the fruit's skin. Then come more fruity, juicy, forming a very balanced package. On the palate, ripe fruit aromas combining the softness of the pulp and the slight bitterness skin. Great and powerful length. Pure on crushed ice or in cocktails.

name: Giffard  Crème De Cassis D'Anjou (Blackcurrant) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Fruit liqueur made from maceration of blackcurrants berries, exclusively harvested in the Loire Valley and coming from the sustainable agriculture. This guarantees high-quality fruits on the nutritional and health sides as well as for the tasting side.

name: Giffard  Crème De Framboise (Raspberry) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Liqueur made from raspberry infusion (alcoholic juice resulting from the fruit maceration). The raspberry varietal used is “williamette” sourced from Serbia. This varietal is very aromatic and coloured, well suited to a maceration process.

name: Giffard  Crème Aux Fraises Des Bois (Wild Strawberry) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The wild tiny strawberries bring this typical “green”taste to the liqueur, while the bigger sanga-sangana varietal strawberries -which are very sweet and aromatic- counter-balance the taste of wild strawberries.

name: Giffard  Lichi-Li (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Fruit Liqueur made from litchi spirit (distillate) obtained by alcoholic distillation of litchi . Presented in a satin-like bottle, screen silky design .

name: Giffard  Menthe Pastille (White Mint) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: After a double distillation, he obtained an essential oil, which became the main ingredient to do the Menthe Pastille. Digestive and not much alcohol Fine and fresh peppermint aroma. Perfect balance and freshness.

name: Giffard  Banane Du Brésil (Banana) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A blend of slow maceration of best bananas from Brazil, spirit of bananas for an intense aroma, and a touch of Cognac to add body.

name: Giffard  Abricot Du Roussillon (Apricot) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Liqueur exclusively made from the slow maceration of “Rouges du Roussillon” apricots. This is a stunning liqueur from Giffard, made in France.

name: La Quintinye  Vermouth Rouge
desc_en_short: Made from a selection of 28 plants and spices and a blend of white wines and Pineau des Charentes Rouge, hence naturally providing the deep reddish to amber colour.

name: Pierre Ferrand  Dry Curacao (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Aromas of orange blossoms combined with candied orange zest as well as toasted wood notes reminiscent of aged Cognac. On the palate find delicious bitter-sweet orange enriched by notes of candied orange with a touch of hazelnut, bitter almonds and marzipan. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED 90-95 POINTS – WINE ENTHUSIAST

name: Hiram Walker  Crème De Banana (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Full banana character both to the nose and on the palate. Well rounded body with a smooth entry that leads to rich banana flavors. Pronounced flavors blend well to make delicious tropical cocktails.

name: Noilly Prat  Original Dry Vermouth (1 L)
desc_en_short:
Aged dry white wines blended with botanicals, including Roman chamomile and gentian from France, bitter orange from Tunisia and nutmeg from Indonesia.

Appearance : Pale golden straw.

Aroma : Slightly oaked mistelles with herbal aromas balanced with floral notes and hints of chamomile.

Taste : Dry white wines with a complex yet delicate bitter finish with a touch of spices.

name: Campari  Cask Tales : A Celebration of Legacy in a Bottle (1 L)
Angostura  Amaro di Angostura Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: It is a deep amber colour, offering aromas of cinnamon, dark chocolate and unmistakeable ANGOSTURA® aromatic bitters. The finish is perfectly balanced, exotic, lush and reminiscent of the essence of Trinidad and Tobago’s pulsating rhythms, tropical climate and beauty. This beautiful liqueur can be enjoyed over ice, is splendid on its own and offers delicious harmony in a cocktail.

name: Saint James  Aromatic Cocktail Bitters (200 ml)
The Japanese   Umami Bitter (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Umami Bitters is Carefully selected high quality materials from all over Japan from kelp, bonito flakes, and dried shiitake mushrooms, which contain the most UMAMI components. The balance between each ingredients and citrus is created to the finest attention to details.

name: The Japanese   Shiso Bitter (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Shiso bitters are prepared using carefully selected blue shiso from the longstanding Aoba plantation, which grows the highest quality of shiso in Chiba Prefecture. Chiba Prefecture is also the heart of Japanese Bitter production.

name: The Japanese   Sakura Bitter (200 ml)
desc_en_short: The Japanese Bitters Sakura bitters are hanami in a bottle. In Japan, the ability and art of appreciating spring (sakura) is known as hanami. These bitters are a delicate, fresh bouquet of spring blooms, marrying fresh cherry blossom buds with subtly wood.

name: The Japanese   Yuzukosho Liqueur (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Japanese citrus fruit ‘Yuzu’ from Kagoshima pref. mixed with white pepper. Very strong aroma of yuzu citrus. Enjjoy with soda water.

name: Disaronno  Velvet (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Perfect for those who love cream liqueurs with an intense aroma, Disaronno Velvet masterfully and harmoniously mixes the distinctive imprinting of Disaronno Originale with velvety notes and unexpected nuances. Incredibly smooth, to be enjoyed over ice, a true tasting experience that enhances its unique and fresh taste.

name: Pale Ink  Sugar Free Coffee Liqueur (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Made with natural plant-based stevia, this sugar-free coffee liqueur from Perfume Trees Gin offers a healthier alternative to traditionally sugar-rich coffee liqueurs, with just 150 calories in every 100ml of liqueur. Brewed using a unique double cold brew method that captures the unique aroma and full flavour profile of the coffee beans, this smooth, rich coffee liqueur is the perfect way to make it down to your Christmas and New Year’s Eve midnight countdown.

Team Spectre’s recommendation: add a healthy dose of Maker’s Mark 46 Whisky or Perfume Trees Gin to make your Christmas or New Year’s Eve midnight countdowns truly memorable this year.

name: Cinzano  Vermouth Di Torino Bottega Rosso 1757 (1 L)
desc_en_short: • The Bottega Cinzano 1757 Vermouth di Torino G.I. is an authentic vermouth, handcrafted in small batch and produced in numbered bottles. The base of Italian wines is enriched with the finest mature blend of aromatic botanical flavours, featuring the unmissable Artemisia from Piedmont

name: Strega  Luna Nera (700 ml)
desc_en_short: One of a kind, Luna Nera is our dark sambuca liqueur. The taste is pleasantly sweet, intense, and rich, with persistent aniseed notes. Ideal to have after coffee or on the rocks. Thanks to the mysterious dark color with violet reflections, it is a classic.

name: Strega  Sambuca (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A high-quality Sambuca, the result of our expert distillers selecting the best ingredients. Sweet, warm, and harmonious taste with long persistence, excellent after coffee and on the rocks.

name: Strega  Limoncello (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A perfect balance of taste and aroma: Skilful method of infusing lemon peels selected by our master liquorists, gives life to a limoncello with intense aroma and a rich, velvety and juicy taste. Suitable for all occasions, Strega Limoncello after a meal makes an excellent digestif.

name: Strega  Amaretto (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Our Amaretto reveals new aromas with every sip: Sweet spices, Madagascar bourbon, vanilla beans, and cocoa distillate. Soft and pleasant taste, with a hint of crunchy almonds for a balanced and pleasant liqueur, excellent for all occasions and as a mixer.

name: Mariposa Cream Liqueur Yuzu (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Mariposa Cream Liqueur Yuzu is a graceful fusion of Japanese craftsmanship and modern indulgence, capturing the essence of Yuzu, Japan’s most aromatic citrus, in a silky, creamy form.

Crafted with meticulous precision, this liqueur reflects the beauty of balance — the harmony between the fresh brightness of Yuzu and the smooth richness of cream. The result is a refined expression of Japan’s pursuit of perfection, where simplicity and sophistication coexist in every sip.

The name Mariposa — meaning “butterfly” in Spanish — symbolizes transformation and elegance, representing how Japanese tradition evolves into a contemporary form of pleasure. Each bottle is a testament to the artistry of blending — light and creamy, zesty yet soft, evoking a sense of calm luxury.

name: Nakano BC  Kishu Hachimitsu Umeshu (720 ml)
desc_en_short: Kishu is the best place for growing plum in Japan. This kishu hachimitsu umeshu is using premium plum and 100% pure orange honey. It has a nice fragrance of honey with a smooth plum's sour flavour. This kishu Hachimitsu should be enjoyed on the rockor chilled for straight.

name: Nakano BC  Kishu Hachimitsu Umeshu (1.8 L)
desc_en_short: Kishu is the best place for growing plum in Japan. This kishu hachimitsu umeshu is using premium plum and 100% pure orange honey. It has a nice fragrance of honey with a smooth plum's sour flavour. This kishu Hachimitsu should be enjoyed on the rockor chilled for straight.

name: Kozaemon  Shiroku Junmai Kabosu Sake (1.8 L)
desc_en_short: This is pure sake liqueur using Kabosu from Oita. It can be serve with ice to weaken its taste and a juice sense and hint is still present. It has moderate sweetness and juicy on a palate. Very suitable to be a gift item.

name: Kobe Sparkling Umeshu (200 ml)
desc_en_short: From Kobe, Japan, this is any easy-to-drink sparkling plum sake with a fruity, ume aftertaste. Enjoy chilled

Komasa Jyozo  Komasa no Yuzushu (500 ml)

Suntory  Yamazaki Cask Umeshu Plum (750 ml)
Kinmon Akita Plum Sake Shizuku (720 ml)
Flor de Caña  7 years Grand Reserve Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Burnt caramel, straw, and peppery spice aromas. A round entry leads to medium-bodied palate of dark caramel and toasted nuts. Finishes with a dry toasted coconut fade.

name: Flor de Caña  12 years Centenario Rum (750 ml)
desc_en_short: The aroma offers succulent dried fruit and nut surface notes plus deeper scents of oak, black raisins, cinnamon, prunes, vanilla bean and honey. Palate entry is stately and semisweet; by mid palate, lip-smacking flavors of nougat, almond butter, molasses and Sherry abound.

name: Flor de Caña  18 years Centenario Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Aromas of cacao nib, tobacco leaf, toasty caramelized Brazil and macadamia nuts, and fig follow through on a round, silky entry to a dryish medium-to-full body with elegant depth and balance.

name: Gosling  Black Seal Dark Bermuda Rum (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: “Deep, assertive and highly flavoured. Very fragrant with herbal ￼￼￼￼￼￼sharpness. At the finish there is a softness and elegance. A most complex, unusual spirit.”

name: Chalong Bay  Tropical Note Series Sweet Thai Basil (700 ml)
Flor de Caña  Extra Seco Imported Rum 4 Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: A crystal clear, light-bodied, silky rum that blends well with juices, colas, soda and tonic water. It’s perfect for mixed drinks. Winner of 10 International Awards including the Platinum Award & Gold Medal, at the International Rum Festival in 2003.

name: Issan Rum  (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Issan rum distillery is born of a common passion for agricultural rum and for traditional production processes combined with a constant search for quality and aromatic expertise. Located in the heart of Nong Khai agricultural area in northern Thailand, Issan Rum distillery started to build durable partnerships with small sugarcane producers. The vesou freshness comes from the fermenting process which starts from the day the sugarcane is cut; the sugarcane juice will be then distilled in copper column still. This is the only way to preserve and develop all the aromas.

name: Plantation  3 Stars White Rum  (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Plantation 3 Stars is a blend of rums from three islands: Trinidad (rum aged two or three years), Barbados (young rum), and Jamaica (old rum). This final blend was carefully thought out by our cellar master and each island brings its own aromatic characteristics.

name: Plantation  XO 20th Anniversary Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
This extraordinary vintage was introduced to mark the 20th anniversary of Maison Ferrand. An assemblage of fine rums 12 - 20 years old, all originating in Barbados, this is a wonderful reflexion of the island itself. 

As with the other rums in the Plantation range, this exotic spirit is aged first in its original country, Barbados, and then benefits with further aging and nurturing in Cognac. Resting in casks originally used for Pierre Ferrand cognac, and meticulously nurtured by Cellar Master of Maison Ferrand, a unique expression is achieved using traditional local methods.

name: Diplomatico  Planas (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This successor of Blanco rum is more intense: this elegant white measure 46 ° alcohol by volume (7° more than its predecessor). It is filtered with coals and takes its name from a region close to the Diplomatico distillery.

name: Diplomatico  Mantuano (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Mantuano is the replacement for Diplomatico's Reserva rum. 'Mantuano', meaning 'nobleman', reflects Don Juancho's status and his passion for travel and the discovery of new spirits, mainly rums. Don Juancho is present on each of Diplomatico's rums.

name: Nusa Cana  Tropical Island White Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Inspired by the Island of the Gods. Blending vibrant and expressive Indonesian rum with mellow, aged, Caribbean rum, to create Nusa Caña

name: Dead Man's Finger  Coconut Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate

name: Ron Matusalem  Solera 7 Year Old Rum (700 ml)
Chalong Bay  Tropical Note Series Kaffir Lime (700 ml)
Chalong Bay  Spiced Series (White Spiced) (700 ml)
Kosapan  Sugarcane Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Everything is carefully handcrafted from the start to finish. From harvesting to peeling the fruits for mash and fermentation, the alcohol is then double or triple-distilled by hand in traditional French copper alembic stills and aged in limited batches. This French artisanal method is rarely practiced in modern manufacturing process due to its time-consuming nature however, we find, that it gives distinctly complex aroma and exceptionally delicate notes. Additionally, we are proud to say all Kosapan Distillery products are 100% natural without any additives.

name: Plantation  Xaymaca Special Dry Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Plantation's take on traditional Jamaican rum, packed with funky fruitiness. It's a blend of rums from two distilleries on the island, distilled on the John Dore pot-still at Long Pond and Clarendon's Vendome-made pot, balancing the character of each. The palate offers notes of banana, apricot, pineapple, cashews and ginger, as well as hints of sweet coconut.

name: Dead Man's Finger  Herbal Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate

Dead Man's Finger  Passion Fruit Rum (700 ml)
Dead Man's Finger  Mango Rum (700 ml)
Dead Man's Finger  Pineapple Rum (700 ml)

food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate

name: Kingston 62  White Rum (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate

name: Captain Morgan  Spice Gold Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
Captain Morgan Gold Rum is distilled and then charred in oak casks for aging. Morgan Spiced Rum is mellow and has delicious flavours of vanilla and spices.

Take a sip and lift it to your nose, just the way the Captain did when he first created his sumptuous spiced spirit drink. You’ll taste notes of rich vanilla, brown sugar, warming spices with just the hint of oak. They all combine for balance, a smooth finish and the perfect drink for buccaneers and landlubbers alike.

name: Captain Morgan  White Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The pristine waters of the Caribbean inspired the creation of Captain Morgan White Rum. A white rum that is five times distilled and made with fine cane molasses, Captain Morgan White Rum is as smooth as the captain himself. This medium bodied crisp and clean rum is light like the Captain’s unfurled sail. It has the distinct clear composition of the finest Caribbean white rum, but with a slight sweet aftertaste.

name: Asura  (Thai White Spirits Distilled From Potato) (Alc. Volume 40%) (330 ml)
Asura  Silver Giant (Thai White Spirits Distilled From SugarCane) (625ml)
Asura  Rose Gold Giant (Thai White Spirits Distilled From Lychee) (625ml)
Plantation  Isle of Fiji Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
From the pristine lagoons to the lush jungles, the Plantation Isle of Fiji is an ode to the beauty of the Fiji Islands.

This delicious rum is made using traditional techniques and local Fijian sugar cane. First aged in this tropical climate in bourbon casks, the rum is then sailed to the southwest of France for a second maturation in French oak casks.

name: Asura  (Thai White Spirits Distilled From SugarCane) (Alc. Volume 40%) (330 ml)
desc_en_short: Asura Rum is our award winning aromatic rum spirit. Made in a multi-step process, each step carefully controlled by our distillers to produce a rum spirit with a punchy flavour.

name: Asura  (Thai White Spirits Distilled From Pineapple) (Alc. Volume 40%) (330 ml)
desc_en_short: Asura Rum is our award winning aromatic rum spirit. Made in a multi-step process, each step carefully controlled by our distillers to produce a rum spirit with a punchy flavour.

name: Asura  Pearl White Giant (Thai White Spirits Distilled From Potato) (625ml)
desc_en_short: Asura Rum is our award winning aromatic rum spirit. Made in a multi-step process, each step carefully controlled by our distillers to produce a rum spirit with a punchy flavour.

name: The Pirates Gold Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The Pirates Gold Rum was inspired by the legendary seafarers and privateers who once chased fortune and freedom across the Caribbean’s sunlit waters. It pays homage to their courage, their rebellion, and their endless love for life at sea.

Crafted from the finest molasses and pure sugarcane, this golden rum is double-distilled in traditional copper pot stills to preserve its deep, aromatic character. It is then aged in American oak barrels, previously used for whiskey, where time imparts warmth, richness, and complexity.

The result is a golden spirit that glows like the setting sun over the ocean — smooth, elegant, and layered with flavors shaped by the sea breeze and the patient touch of oak.

The Pirates Gold Rum isn’t merely a drink; it’s a legend reborn — a celebration of freedom, craftsmanship, and the golden heart of the Caribbean.

name: Dassai  Junmai Daiginjou Migaki Niwari Sanbu 23 (300 ml)
desc_en_short: One of the top ranking sake in Japan. The fruity bouquet offers apple, peach and nashi pear.  It's both vivid and sensuous. The initial impression is that of the clean flavor with an aftertaste that combines the sweetness of fruit with a soft mellowness.Dassai "Ni-wari San-bun" junmai daiginjo is the sake that defines Dassai. It is made with rice that has been milled so that only 23% of the original size of the grains remains, this is the highest degree of milling of any sake in the world. Going to this extreme allows the brewers to create a sake like no other, a sake that is the pinnacle of refined elegance, subtlety, and delicate flavors and aromas.

name: Kozaemon  Junmai Ginjo Bizen Omachi (1.8 L)
desc_en_short: This product has a nice and soft taste on a palate which is unique character of Omachi rice, the finest rice for brewing Sake.Omachi is the most easily recognisable rice variety which is often full and savoury with some chestnut flavours in the finish. It has candied florals with hints of peach nose which would be a great match to slightly meatier fish dishes.

name: BORN  Gold Junmai-Daiginjo (1.8 L)
desc_en_short: "Born Gold" won the highest quality, gold award, in the Daiginjo section B of the 2013 U.S. National Sake Appraisal. Finishes soft and easy with a medium sweetness and very light, clean acidity. After lagering over a year at -10 degrees, the smoothness of this sake pairs very well with everything. Best enjoy when well chilled.

name: El Jimador  Reposado (750 ml)

desc_en_short:
Made from 100% agave, our proprietary production process and aging in white oak barrels for two months is what gives el Jimador Reposado its golden color and balanced flavor of cooked agave and hints of vanilla and caramel. Smooth and mellow. No wonder this is Mexico's #1 selling tequila.

Awards :

Gold Premium Reposado - 2020 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Herradura  Reposado (100% Blue Agave Aged) (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Herradura’s own Gabriela Romo de la Peña introduced the world to reposado tequila in 1974. Our reposado is “Rested” or aged for 11 months (9 more than category standards) which gives this tequila its deep copper color and exceptionally smooth taste.

Award :

Gold Tequila Reposado 2019 : The Luxury Masters (The Spirits Business)

Silver Super Premium Reposado 2018 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: 1800 Tequila  Blanco (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Made from 100% Weber Blue Agave — aged for 8-12 years and harvested at their peak. The liquid is double distilled, and a special selection of white tequilas is blended together for added complexity and character. The result is a premium tequila with a smoother, more interesting flavor than most on the market. The clean, balanced taste with hints of sweet fruit and pepper is perfect sipped neat, on the rocks, as a shot or in a cocktail.

Awards :

  • Silver Premium Blanco - 2015 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Don Julio  Blanco (750 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
Don Julio® Blanco Tequila is the base from which all of our other variants are derived. Commonly referred to as “silver” tequila, its crisp agave flavor and hints of citrus make it an essential component to a variety of innovative drinks including margaritas. It can also be enjoyed neat or on the rocks.

Awards :

  • Gold Medal: Super Premium Blanco - 2022 The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

Unaged, crystal clear color, delightfully explosive to sip

Produced from 100% Blue Weber Agave hand-harvested in Jalisco, Mexico, this tequila is aged for over two and a half years in American white oak barrels, creating a flavor profile that’s revered across luxury dining and mixology circles worldwide.

name: Los Cabos Silver Tequila (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Los Cabos Silver Tequila is a celebration of Mexico’s sun, sea, and spirit — inspired by the iconic coastal beauty of Cabo San Lucas, where the desert meets the Pacific Ocean. This tequila embodies the purity of the landscape: fresh, bright, and full of life.

Crafted from 100% Blue Weber Agave, grown in the highlands of Jalisco, each agave plant is harvested by hand at full maturity, ensuring rich sugar content and deep natural flavor. The hearts of the agave (piñas) are slowly roasted in traditional stone ovens, then double-distilled in copper pot stills to preserve their crisp, herbal essence.

Unaged and crystal clear, Los Cabos Silver Tequila represents tequila in its most authentic form — clean, luminous, and refreshing. It is the spirit of freedom, ocean breeze, and the Mexican soul captured in a glass.

name: Los Cabos Gold (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Los Cabos Gold Tequila captures the warmth, color, and spirit of the Mexican sun. Inspired by the sunset glow over Cabo San Lucas, this golden tequila embodies the perfect harmony between tradition and pleasure.

Crafted from 100% Blue Weber Agave, grown in the volcanic soils of Jalisco, the heart of Mexico’s tequila country, each agave is hand-harvested at its peak maturity. After slow roasting and double distillation, the spirit rests for a short period in American oak barrels, giving it its signature golden hue and soft, mellow complexity.

This balance between youthful freshness and oak-aged depth makes Los Cabos Gold a versatile tequila — ideal for both sipping and mixing. It celebrates the craftsmanship of Mexico while reflecting the golden radiance of the Baja coast.

A soft, supple entry leads to a smooth, medium bodied palate with pastry frosting, talc and citrus rind flavors. Finishes with a clean, lightly sweet, sugar dust, wet straw and balanced pepper fade.

name: Stolichnaya Citrus (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Stoli® Citrus is a refreshing expression of the legendary Stoli® Vodka, celebrated globally for its purity and precision. Crafted using superior Russian winter wheat and pure artesian water, Stoli® has been synonymous with quality since 1938 — the original pioneer of the flavored vodka movement.

The Citrus edition captures the vibrant zest of lemon and lime, delivering an invigorating twist while maintaining the clean, silky foundation of Stoli® Premium. Every batch is quadruple-distilled and triple-filtered through quartz sand and birch charcoal, achieving remarkable clarity and smoothness.

Perfectly balanced between brightness and depth, Stoli® Citrus embodies sophistication with a playful edge — a vodka that refreshes, inspires, and stands timeless in any cocktail.

strength and majestic grace of the ocean guardian - a golden Asura standing amidst the deep blue realm, symbolizing
power, stability, and timeless honor.

Smooth aroma of tropical coconut flower sugar -refined, flowing, and endlessly elegant, capturing the serene power of

name: Game of Thrones Single Malt Scotch Whisky Collection @Blue Moon Siam Paragon
desc_en_short:
Game of Thrones fans, this one’s for you. Each glass represents a different house and its story. From bold Highland smoke to smooth Speyside sweetness, each sip brings the saga back to life, one kingdom at a time.

 

Game of Thrones Single Malt Scotch Whisky Collection

1. The Night’s Watch – Oban Bay Reserve (15 ml)

2. House Stark – Dalwhinnie Winter’s Frost (15 ml)

3. House Targaryen – Cardhu Gold Reserve (15 ml)

4. House Greyjoy – Talisker Select Reserve (15 ml)

5. House Tully – Singleton of Glendullan Select (15 ml)

6. House Lannister – Lagavulin 9 YO (15 ml)

7. House Baratheon – Royal Lochnagar 12 YO (15 ml)

 

Experience Details & Requirements

• 15 ml per tasting label

• E-Ticket provided upon purchase via LIQ9 (redeemable at the venue)

• 10% service charge waived on all tasting flights

• Advance reservation required (minimum 1 day)

• Available daily from 11:00 – 23:00

• Venue: Bluemoon Bar & Restaurant, Siam Paragon

name: Glenfiddich  18 Years Old (700 ml) (With Box)
desc_en_short:
The resulting touch of sweetness from the Sherry wood is perfectly balanced by the oakiness drawn from the traditional casks, delivering a single malt Scotch whisky of brilliant character - smooth and full bodied.

Awards :

Gold - Speyside Single Malts 13-18yo - 2019 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: The Balvenie  DoubleWood 12 Years Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The Balvenie DoubleWood is a 12 year old single malt which gains its distinctive character from being matured in two wood types. Over the period of maturation it is transferred from a traditional oak whisky cask to a first fill European oak sherry cask. Each stage lends different qualities to the resulting single malt ~ the traditional casks soften and add character, whilst the sherry wood brings depth and fullness of flavour.

name: The Balvenie  Portwood 21 Years Old (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
To create The Balvenie PortWood 21 year old single malt whisky, a marriage of rare Balvenie is transferred to port casks, or pipes, which have held fine port wines.

Here it is sampled regularly by The Balvenie Malt Master David C. Stewart MBE to ensure that just the right amount of character is imparted by the port casks, enhancing and developing the single malt whilst preserving its original characteristics.

Considered by many to be David’s finest creation, this whisky is one of his proudest achievements and has won an array of highly coveted industry awards since its release in 1996.

Awards :

Gold Outstanding - Scotch Single Malt - Highland - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

The 21 Year Old expression is composed of meticulously selected rare malt and grain whiskies, each aged for a minimum of 21 years, resulting in a blend of remarkable complexity, warmth, and velvety richness.

name: Glenfarclas  Single Highland Malt Whisky 12 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: An excellent introduction to the distillery style. Glenfarclas means Glen of the Green Grassland, and the freshness on the nose reminds me of grassland in spring. So, this is the ‘farclas’ aroma. In 2006 this was named the ‘Best Sherried Whisky’ in the Single Malt World Cup. More recently Glenfarclas 12 Years Old won Gold at the Stockholm Beer & Whisky Festival in 2007 and again in 2008.

name: Glenfarclas  Single Highland Malt Whisky 15 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Complex, sherried, deliciously peated, light butterscotch aromas, with a hint of dried fruit. Full bodied with super balance of sherried sweetness, malty tones and peaty flavours. Long lasting, gloriously sherried, sweet, gently smoky, and distinguished. With greater complexity than our younger whiskies, this is a great whisky drinker’s whisky. We bottle this at 46% simply because my grandfather preferred it at this strength. It’s still a family favourite. In his 2007 Whisky Bible, Jim Murray gave Glenfarclas 15 Years Old a score of 95/100, one of the highest scores he has awarded.

name: Glenfarclas  Single Highland Malt Whisky 25 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Complex, yet refined, delicately peated, with fresh tempting aromas of marmalade, honey, freshly ground coffee, sherry and nuts. Some oaky tannins. Full-bodied and robust, the sherry and the oak fight for your attention yet neither is overpowering. A powerful nutty smokiness. Intense, long lasting, dry smoky and malty. A beautiful dark Belgium chocolate taste at the back of your mouth to complete the flavour of the 25 Years Old. A great after-dinner whisky so rich and full that it is a dessert in itself, with a finish that goes on forever.

name: Glenfarclas  Single Highland Malt Whisky 30 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Glenfarclas is renowned for producing Single Highland Malt Scotch Whisky in the traditional Speyside style, with a heavy Sherry influence. We produce a wide range of expressions from the mouthwatering freshness of the 10 Years Old, to the indulgent 30 Years Old. One of the delights of Glenfarclas is exploring the subtle differences between the different expressions. Please click on the bottle of your choice to read Tasting Notes by George S Grant, Brand Ambassador and Sixth Generation.

name: Johnnie Walker  Blue Label (200 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Johnnie Walker  Blue Label is a big flavoured whisky that reflects the Walker family's belief that neither whisky age alone, nor whisky from a single location, is enough to achieve the creation of an unrivalled masterpiece today. Layers of big flavour, deep richness and smoke, layers of honey and fruit and an incredibly smooth finish deliver the truly rare character of Johnnie Walker  Blue Label.

name: Talisker  10 Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
A classic Island dram from the Isle of Skye. Aged for a minimum of 10 years in American oak casks, this welcome member of Diageo's Classic Malts series has been recognised numerous times for its excellence.

Awards :

- A gold medal winner at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2017

- Best Islands Single Malt 2017 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Talisker  18 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Talisker Distillery, founded in 1830, is the only distillery on Scotland’s Isle of Skye—renowned for producing bold, maritime single malts that reflect the island’s rugged coastlines and sea spray.

The 18-Year-Old is one of the distillery’s most critically acclaimed expressions, offering a matured, mellow character that combines peppery spice, gentle smoke, and the depth of the sea—refined through 18 years of aging in oak casks.

name: Glenmorangie  The Nectar d'Or (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
In hand selected wine barriques from Sauternes: the most famous and ancient sweet wine growing region of France, that this whisky develops its rich, spicy and dessert-like flavours. Non chill-filtered for additional aroma and mouthfeel.

Awards :

Gold Single Malt No Age Statement - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

name: Ardbeg  Uigeadail (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Uigeadail derives from the Scotch Gaelic for 'Dark and Mysterious Place' and is named for the Loch from whence Ardbeg draws its waters. Jim Murray's 2009 World Whisky of the Year, this cask-strength bottle exudes breathtaking balance.

Awards :

Gold Scotch Single Malt - Islay - 2014 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Tullamore D.E.W.  Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The original blended Irish whiskey, known the world over for its smooth and gentle complexity. For one, it is triple distilled and patiently aged in a combination of ex-bourbon and sherry casks, developing its distinctive smoothness. Secondly, being a blend of all three types of Irish whiskey, it has a gentle complexity. The malt and the pot still whiskey we use give it citrus and spicy notes.

name: Benchmark Bourbon Whisky (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: The nose bears caramel notes with a delicate stone-fruit backdrop. A robust and sturdy palate with some fine leather notes mingling with dry tobacco, a touch of oak and a hint of dried cherries. The finish is smooth and calming.

name: Kilchoman  Machir Bay  (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Matured in a combination of bourbon barrels and sherry butts.Machir Bay is a classic smokey Islay style of single malt with a unique balance of peat, vanilla, tropical fruit and intense sweetness.

Awards :

Gold Islay No Age Statement - 2019 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

Silver Scotch Single Malt - Islay - 2017 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Glen Moray  Classic Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
Glenfarclas  105 Cask Strength Single Highland Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A great whisky holding all the flavours of all the Glenfarclas in one glass. Being so warming, this is the perfect Hogmanay dram. Don’t be afraid of the strength and order a 210, if you dare!

The smoothness makes the 105 drinkable at cask strength, but I suggest adding a little water to fully explore its great depth.

For its price to performance ratio, the Malt Maniacs named Glenfarclas 105 their ‘Bang for your Buck’ in 2004.

name: The Balvenie  Caribbean Cask 14 Years Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The Balvenie Caribbean Cask 14 year old single malt whisky has been matured in traditional oak whisky casks for 14 years, and then ‘finished’ in casks that previously held Caribbean rum.

To create the ideal finish Malt Master David C. Stewart MBE filled American oak casks with his own blend of select West Indian rums.

When he judged the casks to be ready, the rum was replaced with the 14 year old spirit and the wood was put to work adding the final touches.

The result is an exceptional single malt whisky with the traditional smooth, honeyed character of The Balvenie married with notes of toffee and a hint of fruit, with a warm, lingering finish.

name: Jack Daniel's  Gentleman Jack Rare Tennessee Whiskey (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Gentleman Jack® rare Tennessee Whiskey furthers the jack Daniel tradition by making special use of the unique charcoal-mellowing process. Unlike any other whiskey in the world, Gentleman Jack is charcoal-mellowed twice, once before it goes in the barrel and again after it has fully matured. The result is an exceptionally smooth whiskey with a rich, taste.

name: Woodford Reserve (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Woodford Reserve would be considered a more complex bourbon - with over 200 flavours notes, including orange, vanilla, tobacco, cocoa, grain and wood. This complexity is mainly attributed to extra time in the spent barrel and its higher rye content, which provides a slightly spicier, less sweet proposition.

Awards :

Master American Whiskey - 2018 : The Travel Retail Masters (The Spirits Business)

Gold Bourbon - Premium - 2018 : The American Whiskey Masters (The Spirits Buiness)

Woodford Reserve Old Fashioned Recipe :

  • Woodford Reserve = 45 - 60ml
  • White Sugar 1 teaspoon or Syrup = 10 ml
  • Bitter = 3 drops 
  • Stir and garnish with Orange Peel

name: Loch Lomond  Reserve Blended Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: This Unique Premium Blended Scotch Whisky Contains Both Malt And Grain Whisky Distilled And Matured On The Banks Of Loch Lomond In The Very Heart Of Scotland. Each Barrel Is Selected For Its Character And Maturity, Then Expertly Blended To Create A Well-Balanced Whisky That Delivers A Perfectly Smooth Finish.

name: Auchentoshan  Single Malt Scotch Three Wood (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
This unique Auchentoshan Lowland Single Malt Whisky has been matured in three different cask types. Moving from American Bourbon to Spanish Oloroso Sherry - and finally Pedro Ximenez Sherry casks - Three Wood is a rich, complex whisky with incredible toffee and sherry oak flavours.

Awards :

Gold Single Malt No Age Statement - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

Double Gold Single Malt Scotch - to 12 Yrs - 2013 : San Francisco World Spirits Competition

Gold Scotch Whisky - Single Malt - NAS - 2018 : The Asian Spirits Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Johnnie Walker  Green Label (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Johnnie Walker Green Label Scotch is a blend of entirely Single Malts and has aromas of smoky vanilla oak, pepper, fresh cut grass and sandalwood on the nose. Rich mouthfeel with a delicate earthiness are balanced through to a lingering malty aftertaste. Sophisticated and full of finesse. Great to enjoy neat or on the rocks.

name: Evan Williams  1783 Small Batch (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Evan Williams 1783 is our signature, small batch Bourbon meaning that each batch is pulled from no more than 80 hand-selected barrels. It is extra-aged and uses the same sour mash process and traditional recipe made popular by our namesake. The result is a classic Bourbon- smooth rich, and worthy of the name.

name: Kavalan Solist Oloroso Sherry Single Cask Strength Single Malt Whiskey (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Matured in Spanish top quality oloroso sherry casks in special editions, Kavalan Solist Sherry is bottled by hand at the distillery, without any colouring, chill-filtration. It is a naturally smooth and rich whisky with a complex character. It is clean and complex with multi-layers of dried fruit, nuttiness and spices with some marzipan and vanilla touches to it as well.

name: Wild Turkey  Rye (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Wild Turkey Straight Rye Whiskey is an 81 proof (40.5% alcohol) ode to America’s first distilled spirit: rye whiskey. When making Wild Turkey Rye, we use a deeper, “alligator” char for extra flavor. Big, broad vanilla and spice notes burst through without changing the bold rye taste. Wild Turkey Rye stands up to any mixer and shines through in cocktails.

name: Evan Williams  Single Barrel (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Evan Williams Single Barrel Vintage Bourbon is a five-time Whiskey of the Year award winner. Each year our Master Distiller selects barrels that meet his exacting standards. It’s a bourbon that is vintage dated, meaning each bottle is marked with the vintage date it was put into oak, along with the year it was bottled and the exact serial number of the single barrel that the Bourbon was drawn from. 

Careful handcrafting and many years in the barrel result in our most premium and decorated Bourbon.

name: Jack Daniel's  Fire (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Sometimes, mixing fire and whiskey is a good thing. Our Tennessee Fire blends red-hot cinnamon liqueur with the smooth character of Jack Daniel’s Old No. 7 for a classic spirit with a fiery finish.

name: Southern Comfort  (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Southern Comfort offers an easy way to enjoy the flavor of whiskey. From classic calls to crowd pleasing mixers, Southern Comfort provides consumers with a wide range of ways to be “whatever’s comfortable” to them. Straight, mixed, or shot shared

name: Southern Comfort  Lime  (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Lime Comfort is a ready to go version of the popular SoCo Lime bar call. The perfect blend of Southern Comfort with the unique taste of lime and subtly sweetened with soft caramel and vanilla. Basically, we put the lime in the SoCo and we mixed it all up.

name: Suntory  Hakushu 18 Years Old Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
90 Points in Whisky Advocate - Unlike their collegues in Scotland, Japanese distillers do not exchange stock for their blending requirements. This means that each distillery is set up to produce a wide range of styles. Hakushu uses four different types of malt (unpeated to heavy) run through four pairs of differently-shaped stills. Each single malt is a different blend of these bases. While still herbal, this example shows more sherried notes along with sour orange zest, tropical fruit, and some smoke.

Awards :

Category Winner Japanese Single Malt 13 to 20 Years - 2020 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Nikka From the barrel (500 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Nikka  Coffey Malt Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Ichiro's  Malt & Grain Blended Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: A blend from the king of independent Japanese distillers, Ichiro Akuto. In addition to whisky from his own stocks, including potentially Hanyu and Karuizawa as well as his own Chichibu distillery, and possibly also some components distilled at other Japanese distilleries and from other countries - as it says on the label 'This is worldwide blended whisky'.

name: The Macallan  18 Years Old Sherry Oak Cask (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: The Macallan Sherry Oak 18 Years Old forms part of our Sherry Oak range which features a series of single malt whiskies matured exclusively in hand-picked sherry seasoned oak casks from Jerez for richness and complexity. A full bodied palate of mature oak, ginger and raisin flavours is complimented by a light mahogany natural colour.

name: Suntory  Yamazaki 12 Years Old Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Succulent with soft fruit. Peach, pineapple, grapefruit,clove, candied orange, vanilla, Mizunara (Japanese oak) on nose. Coconut, cranberry, butter on palate. The finish is sweet ginger, cinnamon, long finish

name: The Glenlivet  15 years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This complex whisky is as rich as you would expect on the nose, but also filled with aromas of orange peel and candied grapefruit. The palate is very round, smooth and slightly sweet, with fruity and nutty flavours underlined with the subtle spice of cinnamon. This gives way to lingering hint of toasted almonds and hazelnuts.

name: The Glenlivet  18 years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The Glenlivet was founded in 1824 by George Smith, the first legally licensed distiller in Speyside. His vision and courage set the foundation for what would become one of the most revered single malt distilleries in the world.

The 18 Year Old is a signature of Glenlivet's craft, aged in a mix of first-fill American oak and European sherry casks, bringing forward layers of fruit, spice, and mellow oak that only time can achieve.

Awards :

Gold Outstanding - Scotch Single Malt - Speyside - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Aberlour  16 Year Old Double Cask Matured (700 ml)
desc_en_short: With the depth and complexity that comes from being matured for 16 years in a combination of first fill oak Bourbon casks and the finest Sherry butts, this expression’s warm fruity notes are enriched by an engagingly spicy sweetness.

name: Aberlour  A' Bunadh Cask Strength (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
With each batch carefully made by hand, Aberlour A’bunadh is a unique cask strength whisky that has achieved cult status among whisky connoisseurs.

Meaning ‘the original’ in Gaelic, A’bunadh is made in homage to Aberlour’s founder, James Fleming, using only traditional methods without chill filtration or other modern processes.

The result is a heavier, creamier single malt than most have ever experienced – memorably flavoursome, with an intense raisin character.

name: Bulleit  Bourbon (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Bulleit Bourbon is inspired by the whiskey pioneered by Augustus Bulleit over 150 years ago. Only ingredients of the very highest quality are used. The subtlety and complexity of Bulleit Bourbon come from its unique blend of rye, corn, and barley malt, along with special strains of yeast and pure Kentucky limestone filtered water. Due to its especially high rye content, Bulleit Bourbon has a bold, spicy character with a finish that's distinctively clean and smooth.

name: Glengoyne  10 Year Old Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Fresh green apples, toffee and a hint of nuttiness. This is the taste of distilling slower than anyone else in Scotland, of barley we dry by air – never peat – and of hand-selected sherry casks crafted from European and American oak.

Awards :

Gold Distillers' Single Malts 12 years and under - 2020 International Spirits Challenge

Silver Distillers' Single Malts 12 years and under - 2019 International Spirits Challenge

Silver Highlands & Islands up to 12yo - 2018 - The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Aultmore  12 Years Old Speyside Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
Michter's  US*1 American Whiskey (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Wolfburn  Aurora Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
This beautiful sherried whisky is made from spirit laid down in a combination of ex-bourbon and Oloroso sherry casks. Benefitting from long fermentation and slow, gentle distillation, the spirit is laid down on site in our purpose-built warehouses. At the end of the maturation process the casks are brought together to create an exceptionally smooth and perfectly balanced dram.

Award :

Worlds best scotch craft distillery, Tokyo whisky & spirits competition 2019.

name: Wolfburn  Morven Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
This lightly peated whisky is made from malted barley infused with smoke during the drying process. The flavour imparted by the smoke is a reflection of Wolfburn’s history – the original 19th Century distillery was largely fired by peat. Gentle distillation is followed by maturation in our purpose-built warehouses. The result is a beautifully smooth and rounded whisky.

Award :

Double Gold Medal winner, FiftyBest 2018

name: Tamnavulin  Double Cask Speyside single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The first official bottling of Tamnavulin for more than two decades, Double Cask has been finished in sherry butts. The result is a whisky with notes of dried orange, ginger and wood spice.

Awards :

Gold Single Malt No Age Statement - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

Silver Scotch Single Malt - Speyside - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

Sexton  Single Irish Malt Whiskey (700 ml)

name: Tamdhu  12 Year Old Speyside Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
Lower East Side  Blended Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This smooth, complex blended malt whisky from Lower East Side has a sweet balanced character, initially offering notes of vanilla and bitter almonds. Supple, fruity flavours build alongside sweet honey and a mild smoky element that builds into a smooth finish.

name: Glen Moray  Classic Sherry Cask Finish Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
Jura  Seven Wood Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
AN INGENIOUS APPROACH REVEALS A FRUITY & SPICY SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY MADE FOR SAVOURING

The ability of Jura’s tiny island community to reimagine and reinvent has allowed our distillery to thrive. Such vision has brought to life this complex single malt - a fitting tribute to our Master Blender’s skill. Thanks to the forestry commission, sawmill and cooperage in France, we use the finest virgin French oak casks to enhance our whisky.

Layers of complexity and flavour emerge from a maturation journey that begins in American White Oak ex bourbon casks before a portion of the whisky is split between six different virgin oak casks sourced from across various regions of France.

The result is a fruity and spicy whisky with flavours of crème caramel, baked peach and sweet liquorice.

Awards :

Gold Single Malt No Age Statement - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

Silver Scotch Single Malt - Island - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Kyoto Whisky  Aka-Obi (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Tomintoul  Tawny Port Cask Finish (700 ml)
The Glenlivet  Licensed Dram (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: A spiritual successor to the fantastic Illicit Still, the Licensed Dram celebrates a period slightly later in the long history of the Glenlivet, when George Smith was granted royal assent to the production of whisky. So synonymous with the style that malt whisky was sometimes generically known as "Glenlivet" for some time! First-fill ex-Bourbon and ex-sherry casks and a higher-than-usual proof come together for a dram that emphasizes the rounded, slightly fruity baking-spice signature taste of the Glenlivet. Like the Illicit Still before it, this one's also a limited edition.

name: ET.51  Premium Whisky 10 Year (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Glendalough  Double Barrel Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Glendalough Double Barrel Irish Whiskey is a single grain Irish whiskey, initially matured in American bourbon barrels before enjoying a finishing period of six months in Spanish Oloroso Sherry casks. This comes bottled at 42% ABV, brought down to this strength by Wicklow mountain water. A rather tasty release presented by Glendalough, rich in vanilla, caramel, Christmas spices and dried fruit notes.

Awards : Silver- Irish Single Grain - Premium - 2019 The Irish Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Glendalough  Canteiro Aged Madeira Cask Finish Single Cask Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Glendalough Single Cask - Canteiro Aged Madiera Finish is a premium single malt Irish whiskey produced by Glendalough Distillery, located in Wicklow, Ireland. The whiskey is made using 100% malted barley and aged in ex-bourbon casks before being finished in Canteiro Aged Madiera casks, giving it a unique and complex flavor profile. This release is a single cask release, meaning each bottle comes from a single cask, making each bottle unique in terms of flavor and character.

Tamnavulin  Sherry Cask Edition Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A wonderfully well-sherried single malt from the Tamnavulin Distillery, which begins its life in American oak barrels before being finished in three different types of sherry casks! Three of 'em! Shouldn't come as a surprise, but if you're a fan of all those Christmas cakey, chocolatey, red berry-y notes, you'll probably be into this one from the Speyside-based distillery.

Awards :

Gold Single Malt No Age Statement - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

name: The Gladstone Axe - The Black Axe Blended Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)

name: Wolfburn  Single Malt Whisky Small Batch No.458 (Limited Edition) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The seventh small-batch release from Wolfburn, Batch 458 has been crafted from a 50/50 combination of whisky matured for seven years in first-fill Pedro Ximénez sherry butts, married with lightly-peated spirit matured in first-fill bourbon barrels. These casks produced 5,100 bottles in total and the result is a rich, sweet single malt with an exceptional depth of flavour.

name: Royal Salute  21 years Richard Quinn Roses Edition II (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Elevate your whisky collection with the Royal Salute 21 Year Old Blended Scotch Whisky - Richard Quinn Roses Edition, a collaborative masterpiece between Royal Salute and esteemed fashion designer Richard Quinn. This 70cl bottle embodies 21 years of expert blending and exceptional design, marrying the worlds of whisky and fashion. Immerse yourself in the rich aromas of red apple, creme brulee, and rosehip, leading to a palate adorned with exquisite notes of ginger, apricot, and mango.

name: Royal Salute  21 years  Richard Quinn Daisy Edition II (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This exceptional 21-Year-Old blend was co-created by Richard Quinn and Royal Salute Master Blender, Sandy Hyslop, during an experimental blending session in Strathisla Distillery, in Scotland. Hand-selecting a range of the finest Scotch whiskies from Braeval, Strathisla and Caperdonich distilleries, together Richard and Sandy crafted a rich, fruity whisky with hints of spice and soft smoke. A reflection of Richard’s personal palate, the blend is balanced and opulent with a remarkable depth of flavour and a lingering finish.

name: Jameson  Cold Brew Whiskey & Coffee (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Jameson Cold Brew is a meeting of Arabica beans from Brazil and Colombia with triple-distilled Jameson Irish Whiskey. You may know the Irish Coffee, but this is different. Jameson Cold Brew is best served chilled, over ice, with cola and a twist of orange. Some cracking tunes in the background, optional. Enjoy the perfectly balanced combination of the smoothest whiskey with the richness of coffee.

name: Arran  Malt Sherry Cask Finish (700 ml)
Arran  25 Years old Single Malt (700 ml) (Limited)
Bruichladdich  18 Aged Years Old Whisky (700 ml)

name: Jack Daniel's  Old No.7  McLaren X JD Edition 2024 (700 ml)
Prakaan  Single Malt Whisky Tribura Series Peated Malt (700 ml)
Arran  Barrel Reserve Single Malt Whisky  (700 ml)
Sober Spirits  Whisky Non-Alcoholic Beverage (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Crafted from an authentic 3-year-old Whisky, this spirit has been 'bourbonized' by redistilling it with torrefied wood bark. The aroma of Sober Spirits W 0.0% - Whisky Bourbon alternative is typical of an American Bourbon, woody and intense in flavor with a gourmand Toffee note (chocolate & caramel) sublimated by a delicious hint of vanilla.

For all your cocktails, our Whisky Bourbon Alternative is to be used in the same way and with the same dosage as an alcoholic whisky (4 to 5cl per cocktail).

Although some love it neat, it is a mixology product, and its full potential is revealed in cocktails.

Awarded Non-Alcoholic Spirit of the Year at the prestigious London Spirits competition, it joins his older brother Sober Spirits R 0.0% - Rum alternative, which has already been acclaimed as the best in its category.

name: Lark  Tasmanian Peated Single Malt (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Tasmanian Peated shows that where there's smoke, there's feeling. This is a new frontier, our island's own peat bog & post malt smoking process, creates a lightly peated whisky for a bold palate. A delicately smoky dram to ignite the senses, best enjoyed by anyone, any way they like.

Awards

2024 Global World Whisky Master - Gold Medal

2023 Global World Whisky Master - Master Medal

name: Glenfiddich 15 Years Old Chinese New Year Gift Pack 2025
desc_en_short: This limited edition Lunar New Year gift set features a bottle of Glenfiddich 15-years and two Glenfiddich-branded whisky glasses. If you’re looking for luxury CNY gift ideas for this 2025 Snake Year, then this festive gift pack is the perfect choice! Gift it to your husband, boss, or the whisky lover you know at your upcoming New Year party.

If you’re looking for luxury CNY gift ideas for this 2025 Snake Year, then this festive gift pack is the perfect choice! name: Compass Box  Nectarosity (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Process

Special American oak barrels are deployed twice. First to impart sweet spice to grain spirit, which finishes maturing in other casks. Once 'prepared', the barrels age malt whisky. We expertly blend these two characterful whiskies with selected others to dial up the fruit and toffee notes.

Flavour profile

Zesty with honey, poached pears, nectarine and lychee, then juicy apricot and pineapple excite the palate. Toffee, vanilla and butterscotch sauce follow, with a lasting flavour of cinnamon bun.

Serving recommendations

Nectarosity will bring an irresistible dynamism everywhere it goes, from classic cocktails to boilermakers. Partner with a dry pilsner to create a soft centre of fruity caramel notes.

Technical details

Bottled at 46% ABV.

Natural colour.

Not chill-filtered.

Blended Scotch Whisky.

name: Compass Box  Orchard House (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Process

Harvest a fruitful selection of malt whiskies at just the right time, then blend to showcase their bright fruit characteristics. With a light oak influence, a gentle honey sweetness comes through from first-fill bourbon barrels.

Flavour profile

Aromas of apple and pear dominate, with hints of pineapple, lemon and lime zest, and Earl Grey tea. Take a sip and note the malty and gingery flavours. These are soon joined by honey, wild strawberries and vanilla shortbread.

Serving recommendations

Vibrant when neat, syrupy when enjoyed on the rocks. Enjoy as a boilermaker alongside a crisp pale ale or pilsner for a delightful pairing

Technical details

Bottled at 46% ABV.

Natural colour.

Not chill-filtered.

Blended Scotch Whisky.

name: Nikka YOICHI Discovery - Non-Peated (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
For 2021, Nikka's limited edition showcases a unique unpeated variation of Yoichi's single malt, crafted by Master Blender Masashi Watanuki. This blend includes the oldest unpeated malt cask from 1989, presenting a completely different facet of the typically peaty Yoichi.

Nose : Fruity notes of banana and green apple mingle with spicy and herbaceous undertones.

Palate : Vibrant citrus aromas transition to roasted coffee and creamy vanilla flavors.

Finish : Dried fruits, creamy vegetal notes, and a hint of cinnamon and clove spice complete the experience.

name: Nikka MIYAGIKYO Discovery - Peated (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
In 2021, Nikka unveiled a limited-edition single malt from Miyagikyo, crafted by Master Blender Yumi Ozaki. This rare expression blends heavily peated malt with lightly peated malts, creating a bold yet elegant interpretation of the distillery's signature style.

Nose : Fruity aromas of red and exotic fruits paired with woody, lightly smoked oak notes, with peat subtly in the background.

Palate : Smooth peat emerges, complementing fruity flavors with surprising iodine and salt notes.

Finish : Persistent iodine and salt tones transition into retro olfaction with hints of bitter cocoa.

name: Nikka  Yoichi Discovery Aromatic Yeast (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Introduced in 2021 as part of Nikka's Discovery Series celebrating its 90th anniversary, the 2022 edition highlights the influence of yeast in shaping the flavor profile of Yoichi and Miyagikyo single malts.

Nose : Saline peat dominates, blending with fruity notes of apple, pear, and yellow melon, alongside floral hints of lily and carnation.

Palate : Enhanced peat is accompanied by fruity tones of mirabelle plum and greengage, and floral notes of tulip and cyclamen.

Finish : A long-lasting profile featuring plum, licorice, and evolving peat that transitions into smoky nuances.

name: Nikka MIYAGIKYO Discovery Aromatic Yeast (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Launched in 2021 to celebrate Nikka Whisky's 90th anniversary, the Discovery Series highlights key aspects of the creation of Yoichi and Miyagikyo single malts.

Nose : Fruity notes of pear, peach, and apricot are complemented by unique hints of lavender, marshmallow, and meringue.

Palate : Cereal flavors of malt and barley are enriched by brioche bread and acacia honey.

Finish : Long and silky, with herbal undertones of cut grass, sage, verbena, and chamomile.

Heritage : Renowned for its fruity single malts, Miyagikyo embodies the expertise passed down from Masataka Taketsuru, the pioneer of Japanese whisky.

name: Kavalan Solist Port Single Cask Strength Single Malt Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Port is a Portuguese fortified wine that is robust and sweet with a full and rich body. It is therefore usually served as a dessert wine or digestif. Kavalan Solist Port Cask is fully matured in Portuguese Port barriques in Taiwan's subtropical climate to create multiple fruity flavours such as plum, blueberry, blackberry and strawberry, with chocolate as the main background note.

name: Glen Scotia  Festival Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Glen Scotia was born in a place like no other – the smallest whisky region on the west coast of Scotland that was to become the Victorian Whisky Capital of the World. We’re once again delighted to be opening our distillery doors to friends from near and afar, in a celebration of both Campbeltown and its rich whisky-making heritage.

The Campbeltown Malts Festival takes place for one week every May, and allows those few distilleries that have endured, to step away from their stills and fully open their doors to the local community and visitors from afar. For the workers at our Glen Scotia Distillery, the festival represents their favourite and most anticipated moment of the year – a time for celebration and raising a dram with old and new friends alike.

name: Glen Scotia  10 Year Old Unpeated Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: A unique flavour profile of rich oils, green fruits and citrus, and our signature maritime nuances.

name: Kurayoshi  18 Year Old Pure Malt Whisky (700 ml)
Loch Lomond  12 Year Old Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Loch Lomond 12 year old is a perfect representation of our signature style, delivering delicious notes of peach and pear, layered with vanilla sweetness and a gentle hint of smoke on the finish.

name: Dandy Classic Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Dandy Whisky is a brand of Scotch whisky that offers a range of blends, each with a
distinct character. Dandy Classic embodies elegance and sophistication with notes of
maple syrup, banana, and smoke. Dandy Rebel encourages individuality and challenges
conventions with its smoky-sweet profile and hints of nuts and caramel. Both whiskies
invite drinkers to savor the unique character of each blend and enjoy the whisky on their
own terms.

name: Dandy Rebel Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Dandy Whisky is a brand of Scotch whisky that offers a range of blends, each with a
distinct character. Dandy Classic embodies elegance and sophistication with notes of
maple syrup, banana, and smoke. Dandy Rebel encourages individuality and challenges
conventions with its smoky-sweet profile and hints of nuts and caramel. Both whiskies
invite drinkers to savor the unique character of each blend and enjoy the whisky on their
own terms.

food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
