Chateau Timberlay is soft and full-bodied, with good structure and acidity, as well as very elegant tannin. It is very long on the palate, with hints of vanilla and cinnamon.

name: Chateau Haut Fourat  Bordeaux
desc_en_short: Clear, bright ruby-red in colour. The nose is up-front, complex and rather concentrated, and has spicy, fruity overtones. It is quite long on the palate, with an altogether rich, soft taste.

name: Delas  Cotes Du Rhone Saint Esprit Rouge
Delas  Crozes Hermitage "Domaine des Grands Chemins"
Oxford Landing  Cabernet Sauvignon & Shiraz
wine_color: Crimson red with hints of purple.
desc_en_short: Crimson red with hints of purple. There are aromas of blackberry, tobacco leaf and plums with subtle notes of black currant, cedar and violets. The palate is elegantly structured, with a silky texture and fruit sweetness to the mid palate and layers of black cherry, spice and subtle briar flavours. The wine finishes with soft grainy tannins.

name: Oxford Landing  Merlot
wine_color: Crimson in colour with purple hues.
desc_en_short: Crimson in colour with purple hues. Enticing aromas of milk chocolate, plum and raspberries with subtle cedar and spices. The medium bodied palate starts with vibrant flavours of plums and although tightly structured, the finish is rich and generous with persistent fruit flavours. Soft, velvety tannins are a feature of the supple palate. Roast lamb with rosemary and garlic, or asparagus fettuccine with tomato cream sauce would be a lovely accompaniment.

name: Oxford Landing  Shiraz
wine_color: A lovely dark purple in colour with red hues.
desc_en_short: A lovely dark purple in colour with red hues. There are lifted plums, subtle vanilla and spice aromas with the floral hint of violets. The generous silky palate has blackberry and plum fruit flavours, complimented by soft, supple tannins with hints of cherry, chocolate and spice. Bright fruit flavours linger during the long succulent finish.

name: Chateau Lynch-Moussas  Grand Cru Classé AOC Pauilac
Kendall Jackson  Vintner's Reserve Merlot
desc_en_short: 89 Point by Wine Enthusiast "There's good cut to this minerally red, which features luscious raspberry, dark plum and blackberry flavors. Well-structured, with a spicy and chocolaty finish. Drink now through 2020."

name: Kendall Jackson  Grand Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This Grand Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon has distinct flavors of blackberry, blueberry, plus both red and black currants with enticing fragrances of mocha and nutmeg. Subtle notes of chocolate and toasty vanillins add to the richness and length of this bold Cab, and are accompanied by fine grained tannins on a lengthy finish.

name: Montes Winemaker's Choice  Merlot
desc_en_short: A approachable Chilean Merlot from Montes, offering fresh strawberry and cherry aromas layered with creamy caramel and toffee notes, silky tannins, and a long, satisfying finish — ideal for everyday dining.

name: Chateau L'Ecuyer
desc_en_short: A beautifully composed Pomerol with velvety tannins, round, plush fruit filled with plums and blackberries. Fairly long length.

name: Chateau Teyssier  St.Emillion Grand Cru
desc_en_short: Château Teyssier rests in one of the most privileged terroirs of Bordeaux and without a doubt one of the most acclaimed wine regions in the entire world. This Château is right in the heart of Saint-Emilion Grand Cru and just over 3 miles from the famous Saint-Emilion’s First Classified Château Angelus

name: Chateau Laforge  St.Emillion Grand Cru
desc_en_short: Deep garnet, smudgy rim. Fresh, lively damson fruit, hint of fruit cake. A little watery on the mid palate but pleasantly balanced, without excess tannin or acid. Fresh, a bit timid and lean in the middle

name: Siro Pacenti  Brunello di Montalcino Pelagrilli DOCG
desc_en_short: Pacenti's Brunello di Montalcino Pelagrilli is a drop-dead gorgeous beauty. Sweet red cherries, plums, smoke, licorice and spices flesh out in a supple, resonant Brunello loaded with class. The style is as always rich and fruit-driven, while all the elements are in balance. The pedigree of this site and Giancarlo Pacenti's pure skill are evident. This is a great showing.

name: Pio Cesare  Oltre Langhe DOC
desc_en_short:
It is the first wine of Pio Cesare “No Monovarietal”. This is a wine for those who love Piemonte’s wines with an international touch.
“Oltre” is a blend of Nebbiolo and Barbera and a small part of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot.

name: Pio Cesare  Barbaresco DOCG
desc_en_short: A very classical style Barbaresco: elegance and velvety, with ripe and spicy fruit. Strong tannins, but elegant. Good structure and concentration. Very long life. Barbaresco is a great wine—it should not be described as a “basic” or “regular” Barbaresco, simply because it does not have any additional indication on the label.

name: Pio Cesare  Barolo Ornato DOCG
desc_en_short: Great structure, concentration, ripe fruit, soft tannins and tobacco. May be appreciated immediately, but with a very long life. Produced in small quantities

name: Domaine Philippe Colin  Santenay Clos Saint Jean
desc_en_short: From a walled premier cru plot in the Grand Clos Rousseau area of Santenay, Philippe Colin's Clos Saint Jean delivers earthy, sappy Pinot Noir with black plum, raspberry, gentle pepper, and smooth tannins — a characterful, terroir-driven Burgundy from young vines on clay-limestone soils.

name: Domaine Jan Marc & Hugues  Pavelot Savigny-Les-Beaune 1er Cru "aux Guettes"
desc_en_short: A deep red color, this wine has a nose of great upright, with some notes of black fruits. The racy mouth is accompanied by strong but silky tannins and a very pleasant fruity. A pinot noir or terroir expresses itself fully.

name: Chateau Le Puy  Emilien
grape_variety: Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec

name: Montes  Alpha Malbec
desc_en_short: 90 points in James Suckling - "Aromas of mint, spice and blackberries. Hints of spearmint, too. Medium body, fine tannins and a creamy and polished finish. Drink now."

name: Montes  Alpha Carmenere
desc_en_short: 92 points in James Suckling - "Blackberries and dark cherries with hints of flowers, such as violets and lavender. Medium body, firm and fine, chewy tannins and a fruity yet savory finish. Some spice and cedar undertones. Touch of cabernet in here. Drink now."

name: Heitz Cellar  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
Villa Maria  Private Bin Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Displaying lifted aromas of mature red cherries and berry fruits - hallmarks of Marlborough Pinot Noir, whilst on the palate the wine displays succulent fruit with complex spice, wild herb and savoury elements. Enjoy with red meats, salmon or aged cheese.

name: Nautilus Estate Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: A gentle perfume of cloves, red berries and orange peel lend a potpourri-like feel to this Pinot. It's slightly sappy and autumnal, with a raw mineral edge. The palate is lightweight but with a sturdy spine of sap-like tannins and snappy acidity that feels like you're taking a bite rather than a sip. There is an ease and expressiveness here that's easy to love. Editors' Choice

name: Kaiken  Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A smooth wine with a deep red color and a medium-high intensity and that displays an ample and varied fruit expression on the nose with a predominance of notes that evoke fresh red fruits intermingled with aromas of tobacco and spices developed with its aging in French oak barrels. On the palate we find a genuine expression of typical Cabernet Sauvignon flavors marked by an unusual and extraordinary smoothness on the palate that allows for pairing with a great diversity of dishes. These unique characteristics are the product of the typicity of the distinctive Agrelo terroir.

name: Kaiken  Estate Malbec
desc_en_short: Kaiken Estate Malbec from Mendoza pours a deep violet with inviting aromas of ripe dark fruit, tobacco, and butterscotch, followed by a full-bodied, juicy palate with fleshy tannins and a long, harmonious oak-kissed finish — a textbook expression of Argentine terroir.

name: Kaiken  Terroir Series Malbec/ Bonarda/ Petit Verdot
wine_color: Intense red color with violet hues.

name: Ca' Momi  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: High-toned aromas of raspberry and fresh plums brighten notes of warm earth and smoke on the nose. In the mouth, plush layers of dark Bing cherries and berry bramble meet sweet vanilla and milk chocolate. Ripe, round tannins provide substance and structure without rough edges, carrying the wine into a long finish of oregano and dried summer savory. This smooth, graceful Cabernet is an ideal choice for slow-simmered stews and succulent roasts.

name: Bodega Volcanes de Chile  Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
Fattoria Le Pupille  Morellino Di Scansano Riserva DOCG
desc_en_short: Bright red with ruby reflections. The nose, the predominant morello cherry evolves into small red berries notes. The palate of elegant body reflects its freshness and persistence tense and silky tannins.

name: Merryvale  Napa Valley Merlot
desc_en_short: The Wine is dark and inky, made in big, bold style. Cedar, pine and tart black-currant notes provide one side of its personality, as more richly concentrated chocolate and blackberry flavors give it oomph.

name: Protest  Sonoma County Red Bland
desc_en_short: The Rye whiskey aromas are uniquely subtle, and meld well with the silky, dense-fruit Syrah with hints of cigar box and fresh leaf tobacco. The intense, dusty-black fruit flavors have a warm intermingling of the Rye whiskey flavors. It taste like a sumptuous wine, but then it has transformed into a different animal, with the Rye whiskey aromas and tastes. More delicious chewy, bacon-fat tones, with deep blackberry and black raspberry jam highlights. It invokes a pleasantly, pipe smoke filled room, with old classic novels lying about.

name: Layer Cake  Malbec
desc_en_short: Big, brooding, black fruit, then rich earth, truffles and dark cocoa are at the front. The Sea of Stones vineyard is at its core, always evident with the thread of minerality that the deep alluvial cobblestones lend. This wine is elegant in the mouth with fresh-picked blackberries, simmering chocolate sauce on the stove, and somewhere someone’s cooking bacon.

name: Mollydooker  'Enchanted Path' Shiraz Cabernet - McLaren Vale
desc_en_short: A blend of two quintessential Australian varieties, our 2021 Enchanted Path blend showcases Shiraz and Cabernet working together in perfect harmony. Gorgeous wild berries and fresh plum jump out of the glass, with hints of cinnamon and dark chocolate creating an alluring fragrance. Liquorice and mocha notes emerge on the palate in a long finish that captivates your taste buds.

name: Corte Viola  Cabernet Sauvignon IGT
desc_en_short: Bright red with violet reflex. Fresh and winy with hints of ripe red fruits, cherry, light herby notes. Well balanced, dry and sapid, leaves a pleasant sensation of cleanliness and freshness.

name: Corte Viola  Merlot IGT
desc_en_short: Bright red with violet reflex. Fresh and winy with hints of ripe red fruits, cherry, light herby notes. Well balanced, dry and sapid, leaves a pleasant sensation of cleanliness and freshness.

name: Corte Viola  Rubicone Sangiovese IGT
desc_en_short: Ruby red with purplish hues. Pleasant floral bouquet with notes of dry violet, overripe red fruits, cherry in spirits and plums. Full-bodied and well balanced in the palate with a delicious food-friendly freshness. Ripe black fruits in the after taste, ethereal notes, but a fresh and clean finish.

name: San Filippo  Brunello di Montalcino Le Lucere
wine_color: Ruby red with reflexes verging on garnet.
desc_en_short:
98 points in James Suckling - "This is rich and very linear at the same time, with cherry, tile, walnut and light chocolate aromas. Some mahogany. Very complex. Full-bodied, yet tight and reserved with a very, very long finish. Really gorgeous."

98 points in Wine Spectator - "This red is laden with balsamic aromas and flavors of juniper, rosemary and rose, plus black currant and raspberry fruit. There's an underlying mineral element, along with firm, mature tannins that enhance the overall elegance and finesse. Best from 2024 through 2045."

94 points in Robert Parker's Wine Advocate - "This special selection of fruit from San Filippo is characterized by more intensity and concentration compared to the estate's classic Brunello. In this vintage, I also discovered a greater level of Sangiovese purity and direction, thanks to tight berry tones, dusty mineral, spice and balsam herb. To the palate, the 2016 Brunello di Montalcino le Lucére delivers succulent fruit and even a touch of sweetness, all powered by tannins, clearly driven by both the oak and the fruit itself. This wine ages in a combination of barrique, tonneau and botte grande for two years."

name: Little Beauty  Marlborough 'Black Edition' Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Litle Beady Pinot Noir Edition unfoids a smooth and soft fture on the palate, delghing with nuances of red fruits such s n cherry and raspberry. These fruity notes are artfully combined with hints of cinnamon stick and forest undergrowth, which give the wine additional depth. Earthy accents round off the taste experience. This Pinot Noir is both seductive and elegant, and shows a remarkable balance between fruit, spice and earthy elements.

name: Bodegas Muga  Selección Especial Rioja DOC
wine_color: A deep, very dense black-cherry colour.
desc_en_short: A deep, very dense black-cherry colour. The nose reveals ripe, red berry fruit aromas together with notes of spices (pepper) and forest floor against a backdrop of coffee variations, such as milk coffee toffee and roasted coffee beans mingling with subtle well-integrated oak. Silky on the palate with tannins showing through, indicating the wine’s youth and good ageing potential and providing an elegant and balanced structure. This wine pairs well with red meats, lamb and charcoal-grilled rockfish.

name: Bret Brothers  Morgon  Fleurie “Grand Pre” (Magnum) (1.5 L)
De Bortoli  Sacred Hill Shiraz
desc_en_short: Bright crimson with ruby hues. Generous layers of ripe red fruits combining with notes of mint and spice. The wine has a nice silky texture mouthfeel complimenting red berry characters with a touch of peppery spice from underlying oak and integrated tannins.

name: De Bortoli  DB Family Selection Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep burgundy with cherry red hues
desc_en_short: Deep burgundy with cherry red hues. Blackberries, plum and an underlying cedar, nutmeg and cinnamon nuances. Aromas carry through onto the palate with plum and fruit cake being enhanced by the subtle minty notes. The vanilla undertones coupled with the ripe tannins give this wine depth and length of flavour.

name: De Bortoli  DB Family Selection Shiraz
desc_en_short: Vibrant cherry red appearance, with aromas of rich red fruits, white pepper and hints of spicy oak. A generous palate with layers of red and dark berried fruits infused with fine grained tannins and a dash of vanillan oak.

name: De Bortoli  Windy Peak Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Medium red with good brightness. Expressive Pinot, classic strawberry and dark cherry, perfumed. Soft, plump, textural, flavours of cherry and wild spice, soft acidity.

name: Jacob's Creek  Classic Shiraz Cabernet (375 ml)
wine_color: Deep purple with a hint of ruby
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 12 Bottles.

This Shiraz Cabernet is a skilfully blended, medium-bodied red wine with ripe plum and berry fruit flavours, mellow tannins and subtle oak integration. Spicy yet velvety with vibrant cherries and a backdrop of cedery oak

Award : SILVER, China Wine & Spirits Awards 2018

name: Jacob's Creek  Classic Shiraz (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Spicy yet velvety with vibrant cherries and a backdrop of cedery oak.

Wine Score : 88 POINTS, Jane Faulkner - winecompanion.com (Aug-18)

Award : DOUBLE GOLD, Tasters Guild International 2018

name: Jacob's Creek  Double Barrel Cabernet Sauvignon (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep purple with a hint of ruby
desc_en_short:
Double Barrel is finished in aged whisky barrels for a richer, deeper, and smoother taste.

Wine Score : 90 POINTS, Julien Miquel - Social Vignerons (Oct-17)

Award : SILVER, Sakura Awards Japan, 2018

name: G7  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Intense red color with bluish tints.
desc_en_short: Intense red color with bluish tints. Delicate aromas of cherries, cassis and blueberries mixed with sweet notes chocolate. Juicy and soft tannins.

name: G7  Merlot
desc_en_short: Red-purple color with violet tones. Aromas of chrries, raspberries and strawberries. A gentle wine with round sweet tannins.

name: Luigi Bosca  Finca Los Nobles Cabernet Bouchet
Eugenio Collavini  Schioppettino Turian DOC
wine_color: The deep ruby is still tinged with purple.
desc_en_short: The deep ruby is still tinged with purple. Intriguingly concentrated, evolved aromatics foreground varietal notes of forest fruits, raspberries, black pepper and spices. Soft tannins on entry with freshness that accompanies progression through to the lingering finale. Food matchings with feathered game, wood pigeon, duck. Pappardelle pasta in hare sauce, wild boar, roe deer. Serve at 16-18 °C.

name: Louis Jadot  Pommard Clos de la Commaraine Premier Cru
desc_en_short:
Characteristics

The Clos de la Commaraine is 4 hectares large ; it is oriented to the East next to the village. The soil is deep and well drained on the surface. Some springs in the underground bring freshness to the soil. Moreover, the soil is quite stony .

Wine making

This premier cru is vinified in vats (the grapes are destemmed) during to 3-4 weeks in order to obtain the real expression of the soil (terroir). It is then put into oak barrels for aging between 15 to 18 months.

name: Louis Jadot  Volnay
desc_en_short:
The Volnay wines combine distinction, nobility, finesse and femininity. They offer an incomparable bouquet of red berries, violets and vanilla.

Elegant, full and generous, Volnay will happily accompany the finest meals like roast meat and poultry. With mellow cheeses like Brie, Chaource or Reblochon, drink an old vintage

This wine will age for 7-10 years in good conditions of constant temperature and humidity.

name: 9 Lives Reserve Delirious Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Live a life of intense delirium when you try this 9 Lives cabernet sauvignon! unleash your creativity with a ruby red wine where delirious ripe strawberry and cherry aromas combine with subtle hints of pepper, black tea and vanilla. A balanced wine with smooth and structured tannins.

name: Bodegas Protos  Crianza Ribera del Duero D.O.
wine_color: Cherry colour with garnet rim, bright and intense.
desc_en_short: Cherry colour with garnet rim, bright and intense. Red fruit expression in the nose, powerful and elegant with aromas of dry stone, cocoa bean, creamy oak and hints of spices. Powerful, flavourful and fruity taste with a good acidity, smoky aftertaste, and a toasty, long finish.

name: Chateau Meyre  Cru Bourgeois Haut-Medoc
desc_en_short: First Cru Bourgeois Organic, on the Haut Medoc Chateau Meyre is the quintessence of wine production, from the 18th century 1876. The current owners have magnified the wine with the choice of Organic farming. This is a firm wine whose tannins are a fine sheen laced over the ripe fruits, the wine has structure and juicy blackberry flavors laced with acidity. Medium. Balance and Elegant Wine.

name: Henschke  Mount Edelstone Shiraz, Eden Valley
Yellow Tail  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon is an approachable, fruit-forward Australian red brimming with cassis, mulberry, and crushed herbs, backed by soft oak and feathery tannins — easy to enjoy now yet capable of rewarding a few years in the cellar.

name: Penfolds  Bin 128
desc_en_short: Created in 1962, Penfolds Bin 128 is a regional wine that reflects the unique climate and growing conditions of South Australia's Coonawarra district and the relatively elegant style of coolclimate Shiraz. From the 1980 vintage, French oak replaced American, highlighting the pepper, spice and floral characteristics that define this style. Since the mid-1980s, a greater attention has been paid to fruit ripeness, resulting in a wine that is fuller in style and structure.

name: Penfolds  Max's Shiraz
desc_en_short: Penfolds Max’s Shiraz is a tribute to former Chief Winemaker Max Schubert 1948-1975, a legend in Penfolds history. Max’s constant pursuit of excellence paved the way for those who followed in his footsteps and also allowed the status and heritage of Penfolds to grow. A contemporary offering of South Australian Shiraz, this release provides a fruit-driven wine which is generous in flavour and persistent across the palate.

name: Penfolds  RWT Bin 798 Shiraz
wine_color: Deep mauve – impressive colour and brightness.
desc_en_short: RWT Barossa Valley Shiraz presents an admirable alternative to the multi-regional sourcing and American oak maturation that are hallmarks of Grange, expressing instead, single region Barossa Valley shiraz matured only in French oak. The initials RWT stand for ‘Red Winemaking Trial’, the name given to the project internally when developmental work began in 1995. Naturally, now no longer a ‘Trial’, RWT Shiraz was launched in May 2000 with the 1997 vintage. Its style is opulent and fleshy, contrasting with Grange, which is more muscular and assertive. RWT is made from fruit primarily selected for its aromatic qualities and lush texture. The result is a wine that helps to redefine Barossa shiraz at the highest quality level.

name: Beringer  Main & Vine Merlot
desc_en_short: Ripe plum and currant flavors are immediately evident in its aromas and flavors. A sweet, toasty note of oak rounds out the blend and gives the wine a nice body and mouth feel.

name: The Old Town  South African Dry Red (Fruit wine blend)
Angove  Long Row Merlot
desc_en_short: Deep red with purple hues. Aromas of cherry and blackcurrant precede herbal undertones. The medium to full palate is well balanced with red and dark berry fruits, good length and a soft, rounded finish. Abundant ripe tropical fruit flavours fill the mouth followed by some nutty and toasty characters and a long soft finish.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Reserva Merlot
desc_en_short: Silky and friendly from the beginning with elegant and balanced finish. The body is medium and the fresh black fruit makes this wine very balanced and pleasant. Perfect with Italian cuisine not spicy and rich in tomato sauces. White meat garnished with creamy sauces and/or soft cheeses.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Reserva Pinot Noir
wine_color: Soft and brilliant ruby red colour.
desc_en_short: Absolutely elegant with a correct presence of tannins and the barrel notes are very well integrated. The acidity is fresh due to the fruit that maintains a good balance among all the components of the wine. The end palate is outstanding thanks to the fresh raspberries and dried flowers. Combines very well with grilled oily fish such as tuna. Also with white meats it manages to express itself deliciously well.

name: Famille Perrin  Chateauneuf du Pape - Les Sinards
Argiano  Rosso di Montalcino
desc_en_short: Rosso di Montalcino, made with 100% Sangiovese grapes like Brunello, is another expression of the tradition and terroir of Montalcino. Argiano's Rosso di Montalcino has a noble pedigree and is produced with the grapes grown in the Sangiovese vineyards that extend around the estate. The grape-variety is Sangiovese Grosso, a selected clone which has adapted perfectly to the soil at Argiano; this wine receives the same care and attention devoted to the Brunello, from vineyard management to bottling.

name: La Belle Angele   Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This wine has a lovely deep red colour. It exhales delicious scents of blackcurrant and strawberry enhanced by green pepper hints which are very typical of Cabernet Sauvignon grape. It is an elegant, complex and velvety wine. Its rich and complex aromas will perfectly match traditional cooking (shepherd's pie, gratins, steak au poivre), grilled meat and cheeses. Serve at 17°C

name: Antigal  Estimulo Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This Antigal Estimulo Cabernet Sauvignon is a deliciously smooth and rich red wine that is perfect for any occasion. When you pour yourself a glass of this cabernet sauvignon, you will immediately smell the delectable fruitiness of this red wine. Pair it with a rich and decadent Italian pasta dish and you will take your meal to the next level.

name: Vigneti del Salento  "ZOLLA" Malvasia Nera Solento IGP
wine_color: Wine ruby ​​red color with garnet reflections.
desc_en_short: very intense ruby red colour, intense and inviting, with hints of cherries, enriched with pleasant notes of cloves. Full-bodied wine, pleasantly soft at first, complex, it strikes with its remarkable freshness.

name: Vigneti del Salento  "ZOLLA" Salice Salentino DOP
wine_color: Wine ruby ​​red color with garnet reflections.
desc_en_short: very dense ruby red colour, intense aroma, fruity with hints of cherries, prune and pomegranate, spicy and herbal. Full-bodied wine, warm, tasty, with pleasant fresh aftertaste.

name: Ronan by Clinet  Bordeaux AOC Red
desc_en_short: Ronan by Clinet Bordeaux Redpresents a brilliant ruby appearance. Its nose is aromatic with hints of cherry, raspberry and blackcurrant, enlivened with sweet pepper. The fruity freshness of the bouquet is equally complemented by floral hints (blueberry flowers).

name: Poggio Al Tesoro - (Bolgheri)  IL Seggio DOC
desc_en_short: This wine is intense ruby red in colour with aromas of fresh crunchy red berries enriched with mineral and spicy notes. The red fruit follows onto the palate which is medium bodied with elegant silky tannins and a lively clean finish.

name: Damilano  Dolcetto D' Alba DOC
desc_en_short: Dolcetto d’Alba Doc is a ruby-colored wine with reflections of blackberry and purple, a harmonic and pleasantly dry flavor, as well as an almond finish, with a delightful, fruity and distinguished aroma.

name: Rapitala by Giv  "Hugonis" Cabernet Sauvignon & Nero D' Avola IGT
Chateau Chasse-Spleen
wine_color: Deep ruby in color with earth

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Reserva Privada Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: 87 points in Wine Enthusiast - "Cherry cough-drop and menthol aromas don't hold up to intense scrutiny. On the palate, this smacks hard with acidity, tannins and weight. Shrill black-plum and black-currant flavors finish with tough, drying tannins."

name: Castello Banfi  Aska Bolgheri DOC
desc_en_short: 89 points in Wine Enthusiast - "A blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc, this opens with ripe dark berry and baking spice scents. The dense palate delivers black currant, tobacco and mocha flavors, fleshed out by round tannins. Drink through 2020."

name: Catena Zapata  Malbec Argentino
wine_color: A saturated dark violet color with ruby reflections
subregion: Luján de Cuyo / Valle de Uco
desc_en_short: Catena Zapata's Malbec Argentino is a landmark expression of high-altitude Argentine Malbec, weaving together cold maceration, whole-cluster complexity, and 15–18 months in French oak into a wine of remarkable depth, dark fruit richness, and earthy elegance.

name: Wolf Blass  Bilyara Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A medium-bodied palate with rich fruit flavours of raspberry and blackcurrant, supported by gentle savoury oak and following through to a soft tannin finish. Great with lamb souvlaki with cucumber and mint yoghurt, or pork and fennel sausages with mash and caramelised onions.

name: Wolf Blass  Gold Label Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Dark crimson with a brilliant, vibrant hue.
desc_en_short: A generous, medium to full bodied, smoothly textured palate with intense varietal and regional flavors of red berries, mulberry, dark chocolate and ripe blackcurrant. Moderate use of new French oak and gentle maturation has contributed subtle oak influences, which are beautifully integrated and harmonious, adding to the superb balance shown in this wine.

name: Wolf Blass  Grey Label Shiraz
desc_en_short:
Shiraz was sourced from low yielding Barossa vineyards selected for elegance and intensity of fruit, and rich, bright character.

Individual vineyard batches were fermented in small open-top fermenters for 5 to 10 days. Plunging and gentle irrigation were used to work the cap and optimise flavour, colour and tannin extraction, providing for concentration and depth of fruit flavour, while keeping tannins plush, hallmarks of the Grey Label style. Select batches completed fermentation in barrel, contributing mid-palate texture, while others finished fermentation on skins, providing structural length and focus.

name: Wolf Blass  Black Label 44th Cabernet Shiraz Malbec
desc_en_short: The elite parcels of Shiraz and Cabernet Sauvignon selected for Wolf Blass Black Label are brought together to form a perfect storm of concentrated power. This wine is the darling of collectors as a result, and it should be yours with its magnificent ability to be a rich and concentrated when young and a wonderfully balanced amalgam of flavors with a touch of bottle age. Sublime!

name: Yalumba  Samuel's Collection Barossa Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon
Bodegas Salentein  Portillo Malbec Organic
desc_en_short: Portillo Organic Malbec from Bodegas Salentein delivers a fruit-forward Mendoza red with aromas of ripe plum and blackberry, lifted by a whisper of vanilla and supported by round, approachable tannins — an everyday organic Malbec built for easy enjoyment.

name: G.D. Vajra  Barolo Albe DOCG
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

Albe is "Barolo di Barolo", a Barolo blended from vineyards only in the Barolo comune. Fosatti, Coste de Vergne and La Volta all have different southern exposures and add distinct qualities to the wine, they yield a complex and rich Barolo that will age gracefully for another three to five years, but is an absolute pleasure to drink now. Tannins are round, aromatics complex and the fruit is delicious.

name: Vasse Felix  Premier Range Cabernet Suavignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 9% Malbec, 2% Petit Verdot, 1% Merlot
desc_en_short: A landmark Margaret River Cabernet Sauvignon with roots stretching back to 1972, the Vasse Felix Premier Range delivers classic varietal purity — rich, structured, and deeply expressive of Wilyabrup's ancient gravel soils — elevated by small additions of Malbec and Petit Verdot.

name: De Stefani  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: From old vines rooted in the clay soils of the Piave DOC, De Stefani's Cabernet Sauvignon delivers an intense ruby pour with ripe red and wild fruit aromas, a smooth full body, and a pleasantly spicy finish — a classically structured Italian Cabernet built for the table.

name: Brancaia  Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG
wine_color: An intense ruby red in color.
desc_en_short: Brancaia Chianti Classico Riserva is produced from the best Sangiovese grapes from Brancaia and Poppi and then blended with a touch of Merlot. The wine ages 16 months in French oak barrels - half of them are new - and matures for a few months in the bottle, prior to release.

name: Brancaia  ILatraia IGT Rosso Toscana
wine_color: An intense ruby red in color.
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Petit Verdot, Cabernet Franc

name: Marchesi Di Barolo  Barolo di Barolo DOCG
Ceretto  Nebbiolo d' Alba "Bernardina" BIO DOC
desc_en_short: The Monsordo-Bernardina estate is one of the places in Alba more suited to the production of great Nebbiolo. While on the border of the Barolo zone, soils and climate, for technical reasons, was not allowed inside the protected area from the prestigious designation. Today the vineyards around the historic farmhouse provide high quality grapes. Fermentations in stainless steel and ageing in old wood produces wines of great expressive potential, complex and long-lived, protected by D.O.C. Nebbiolo d'Alba.

name: Ceretto  Barbaresco BIO DOCG
desc_en_short: This classic Barbaresco is a blend of our finest vineyards, a small part of Asili, the part with younger vineyards, and the lowest part of Bernadot in Treiso. With the union of these two different expressions, the wine achieves a better balance than vinifying the two wines as separate parcels. While on the one side there is the explosive finesse of Asili and on the other, the fullness of the Treiso cru, in the glass we find the right balance; the result is a delicious and traditional wine, a perfect example of an area that moves between structure and elegance.

name: Fattoria Le Pupille  Pelofino Rosso IGT
desc_en_short: Bright, bright ruby red. Fresh and compact nose, fine cherry and ripe raspberry, forest fruits. Crisp and juicy on the palate, flows nicely, uncomplicated and drinkable, light tannin in the finish.

name: Odfjell  Orzada Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A classic expression of the Maipo Valley for the “king of grapes”. Fermented with native yeasts, minimal intervention, and aged in new and used barrels. This wine is a perfect combination of fruit and oak. The grapes come from a cooler sector in Padre Hurtado, Maipo Valley, which guarantees that the grapes reach a perfect ripeness for producing a traditional, complex, and elegant wine that truly respects Odfjell’s style.

name: Chateau Tenein  Bordeaux Superieur
desc_en_short:
AOC Bordeaux Supérieur. This wine is produced on Tenein clayey-limestone soils. Château Tenein is aged in barrels.

This wine is rich, complex, with spiced notes reminding the cabernet sauvignon. In the mouth, this wine is nice with some toasted and empyreumatic notes at the end.

name: Santa Ema  Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Santa Ema Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon from Chile's Maipo Valley delivers a classically structured red with aromas of sour cherry, prune, mint, and tobacco, backed by ripe tannins and a lingering finish that suits grilled meats and aged cheeses beautifully.

name: Agricola San Felice  Bell'Aja Bolgheri DOC
Agricola San Felice  Vigorello Toscana IGT
Cuatro Mill  Discolo Cinco de Copas
Sterling  Vintner S Collection Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Combining elegance and approachability, our Cabernet Sauvignon opens with rich aromas of blackberry bramble, accented by nutmeg and mocha spices. The palate is smooth and supple, delivering a balanced expression of dark cherries, currants and spice. Fine, chocolaty tannins hold the finish, which is long and luxurious. With its bold flavors and an easy accessibility, our Cabernet Sauvignon pairs well with a variety of foods and occasions, from filet mignon to barbecued ribs.

name: Brancaia  Rosso Toscana "IL Blu" IGT
desc_en_short: Brancaia Cabernet Sauvignon comes from our Maremma estate on the Tuscan coast. This easily accessible wine, which matures in oak for 12 months, is smooth and velvety and has a lasting finish. The perfect "little brother" of our top wine from the vineyards in the same region, Brancaia Ilatraia.

name: Bodegas LAN  Rioja Crianza
wine_color: Bright cherry red with a garnet rim.

name: Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci  Da Vinci I Capolavori Brunello di Montalcino DOCG
wine_color: Clear, crimson red in color verging on garnet.
desc_en_short: Leonardo’s art and in this famous wine are the epitome of Tuscany: power, classicism and elegance, a harmonious combination of refined characteristics. Maceration on the skins; during 15-20 days of fermentation, a light pumping-over is performed frequently and delestage (rack and return) is carried out to increase complexity. In order to achieve the maximum extraction of color and tannins, fermentation takes place in stainless-steel containers at controlled temperatures of 30-32°C. When fermentation is over, the wine is aged in oak barrels for at least 2 years.

name: Velenosi  Rosso Piceno DOC Superiore Circum
desc_en_short: Fresh, dry and velvety flavour, rightly tannic, tangy and full-bodied. It has a well-orchestrated and pleasant fruity finish.

name: E.Guigal  Chateauneuf du Pape Chateau De Nalys - Grand Vin
brand: E.Guigal  Chateauneuf du Pape Chateau De Nalys
desc_en_short:
Château de Nalys - Grand Vin

"Four centuries old, the exceptional terroirs of the Château de Nalys are managed under the keen auspices of Marcel and Philippe Guigal. They are passionate about making the wines in this flagship domain in the South."

This Grand Vin de Châteauneuf-du-Pape is a perfect example of the class and complexity of Château de Nalys. An elegant palate with silky, powerful and long-lasting tannins.

name: Botter  Primitivo Puglia (Organic Wine)
desc_en_short: Intense purple colour. This wine has a pleasant, characteristic and ethereal bouquet. Fruity, with notes of plums cherry marmalade and tobacco; spicy with an aftertaste of cocoa, coffee and vanilla. Great wine for roasted and grilled meats. Ideal with game dishes. Excellent with mature hard cheeses.

name: Silver Oak  Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 2018
brand: Silver Oak  Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley
desc_en_short: The 2018 Silver Oak Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is ruby in color with notes of strawberry, fresh carnation, black pepper and vanilla. This wine builds in strength and body across the mid-palate with a blackberry character on the finish and bright cherry return. With integrated tannins, it’s expressive yet luxurious with an even, balanced finish. Given proper cellaring conditions, this wine will continue to improve through 2043.

name: Tenuta di Biserno  IL Pino di Biserno DOCG
style: Cabernet Franc, 15% Cabernet Sauvignon, 15% Merlot, 5% Petit Verdot

name: Rocca di Montegrossi  Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short:
93 points in James Suckling - "Blueberries and cherries with floral and cocoa-powder undertones. Medium to full body, ripe tannins and a flavorful finish. Lovely length to this, especially for this difficult vintage. From organically grown grapes. Drink or hold."

92 points in Wine Spectator - "A rich, plum- and black cherry–infused red, pitting the lush texture against a solid base of tannins. Tobacco, earth and mineral notes add depth. The finish is vibrant and long. Drink now through 2030."

name: Robert Mondavi   Private Selection  Vint Rye Barrel-Aged Red Blend
Rochester  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Black cherry, liquorice and vanilla on the nose with soft spice following through to the palate. Smooth, soft tannins with a peppery backdrop.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Escudo Rojo Gran Reserva Carmenere
wine_color: Carmine red with a purple tint.
desc_en_short: Carmine red with a purple tint in colour. Powerful and complex with intense, forward fruits, the nose opens on black plum and blackberry aromas mingled with notes of spice. This wine has a very good attack, good substance and balanced concentration and acidity, with a very round, silky and fine  tannins offering a velvety mouthfeel.

name: Folonari  Amarone della Valpolicella "Folonari" DOCG
wine_color: Deep ruby red with a garnet rim.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red with a garnet rim, then a generous, complex nose with jam, raisin and violet notes, hints of spice and balsam, echoes of forest floor. The paiate is rich, warm and vigorous, well-orchestrated, with a distinct and persistent finish of dried fruit (plum) and toasted almond. Pairings with red meat roasts, game, medium-mature goat cheeses.

name: Valdubon  Roble
desc_en_short:
Valdubón Roble is made entirely with the Tinta del País grape (Tempranillo). The original vineyards of Valdubón are distributed by different terms of Ribera del Duero, their main origins being the terms of Roa and Milagros.

An exhaustive monitoring of the care applied to the vineyard is carried out, focusing efforts on a severe thinning of bunches that leaves the strain with an average production of 7-8 bunches per strain, which represents a maximum yield of 5,000 kg / Ha.

During the harvest, the evolution of the Baumé degree, acidity and color potential are controlled. Based on the results obtained, a first classification is made, with Valdubón Roble being destined for those vineyards that stand out year after year for providing very fruity wines, with medium-high structure, good acidity and ripe tannins.

The vineyards destined for Valdubón Roble are harvested at night to guarantee an entry into the cellar at a low temperature and a soft start of fermentation that keeps all the fruit on the nose and in the mouth. The cut grape is transferred to the winery as soon as possible, being ground within 6 hours after its harvest.

name: Donnafugata  Sherazade Sicilia DOC Nero d'Avola
wine_color: A brilliant ruby red color with violet reflections

name: Casisano  Colombaiolo Brunello di Montalcino DOCG
desc_en_short:
Colombaiolo Brunello is a wine of depth, grace, and regional purity. Aromas of ripe red fruit, dried rose petals, tobacco leaf, and soft herbs unfold over a balanced and structured palate.

Its fine tannins and lively acidity make it equally enjoyable now or age-worthy for 10–20+ years, offering a true reflection of the Montalcino soul in a single-vineyard bottling.

name: Messenez Family  Chateau M Gran Vin Gold Label
desc_en_short: Dark red with violet reflex in color. Spicy, cedar, fresh tobacco aromas. Voluminous body with subtle tannins. Pairing with cheese, red meat or pastas.

name: Castelli del Grevepesa  Col Silente Nobile di Montepulciano DOCG
wine_color: Intense color of rare depth and finesse.

name: Castelli del Grevepesa  Castello Di Bibbione Riserva Chianti Classico DOCG
Moulin de Gassac  Syrah IGP
desc_en_short: Deep violet red. Very ripe red fruit, a touch of leather. Warm, fruity, concentrated. Good tannic structure. Open and satisfying. Good length. Pairing with game terrine, Pizza, Mediterranean pasta and Meat.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Reserve Pauillac
wine_color: A glittering garnet red with a slightly crimson hue.
desc_en_short: A glittering, deep vermilion red. The nose displays aromas of black cherry and blackcurrant liqueur, with a touch of fig and notes of vanilla and toast. From a round and full attack with burnished tannins, the mid-palate reveals powerful blackcurrant and blackberry fruit underpinned by the elegance of the tannins, leading into a long and beguiling finish enhanced by the vanilla and toast notes found on the nose.

name: Mas Martinet  Els Escurcons 2016
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ

name: Georges Duboeuf  Beaujolais Villages
desc_en_short: An intense, brilliant cherry colour with purplish tints. Complex nose with red and black berry aromas. A smooth wine with fine tannins, harmonious and complete. Ideal for all occasions, from aperitif to cheese.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Cabernet Sauvignon (VDF D'OC)
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: This wine has a deep crimson colour and offers a range of aromas: dark berries, Morello cherries and liquorice. Powerful, with well-rounded tannins, this is a highly complex wine with good length.

name: Argiano  Brunello di Montalcino
desc_en_short:
Fresh, complex, and fruity nose with balsamic and fleshy final notes. In the mouth it is
very refined and elegant, with distinctive but silky and well-blended tannins and a
marked flavor that makes it very gastronomic.

name: Tasca D'Almerita  Tascante Contrada Sciaranuova VV
desc_en_short: 97 Point by Wine Enthusiast : Aromas of wild red berry, rose petal, wet stone, Mediterranean brush and star anise shape the nose on this compelling, vibrant wine. Made with Nerello Mascalese planted in 1961, the wine has a linear, racy palate that's almost ethereal and loaded with finesse and energy, delivering sour cherry, pomegranate, licorice and orange zest before a flinty mineral close. Taut, refined tannins and vibrant acidity lend lithe support.

name: Chateau Boyd-Cantenac  Margaux
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mapu Carmenere (Screw Cap)
wine_color: Intense red color with a hint of purple.
desc_en_short: Intense red color with a hint of purple. Aromas of black currant, blackberry, black cherry and blueberry emerge stimulated by the fresh and fruity nose. These aromas mingle with notes of black and green peppercorns. The taste starts with a fresh attack supported by soft tannins, while blackcurrant lingers in the taste combined with delicate notes of spice. The balanced aftertaste and nice acidity accentuate the freshness in the wine in an elegant way.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mapu Merlot (Screw Cap)
desc_en_short: A vibrant, fruit-forward Merlot from Baron Philippe de Rothschild's Chilean Mapu range, bursting with bilberry, redcurrant, and blackberry character, silky tannins, and a fresh, balanced finish that makes it an effortlessly enjoyable everyday red.

name: Masi  Campofiorin Rosso Veronese
desc_en_short:
Full bodied, smooth and velvety, but approachable and versatile in its food pairings. Combines simplicity with style, strength and majesty.

This is the original Supervenetian created by Masi in 1964 and internationally recognised as a wine of “stupendous body and complexity”, the prototype for a new category of wines from the Veneto inspired by the Amarone production method (Burton Anderson). Its own production method was described by Hugh Johnson as “an ingenious technique”.

name: Finca Museum  Real DO Cigales Reserva
wine_color: Dense cherry red with orange highlights

name: Hardys  Tintara Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: A dense deep garnet with ruby hues.

name: Hardys  The Chronicles Reserve Cebernet Sauvignon
Wynns  Coonawarra  Estate  Black Label Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
Wynns Black Label Cabernet is a true icon of Australian wine. First produced in 1954, it has a reputation for ageing gracefully and displaying excellent varietal and regional characteristics. The wine is produced from only the top quality 20 to 25 per cent of Cabernet Sauvignon fruit grown in our terra rossa vineyards.

A wine of style and stature - and a perennial favourite in auction circles - ‘Black Label’ is one of Australia’s most collectable wines and Australia’s benchmark Cabernet Sauvignon. It consistently delivers potential for medium to long-term cellaring.

name: J. Lebegue  Medoc
style: Merlot, Cabernet Franc E Cabernet Sauvignon

name: J. Lebegue  Lussac St-Emilion
style: Merlot, Cabernet Franc E Cabernet Sauvignon

name: Montgras  Day One Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Bright ruby ​​red in color with violet notes, and intense aromas of fresh red fruit along with subtle spicy touches and some herbs. It has a juicy and tasty palate, with good acidity and a pleasant texture that invites you to continue enjoying it with a long and pleasant finish.

name: Dominio de Punctum  Norte Sur Tempranillo / Cabernet Sauvignon
Zenato  Alanera Rosso
desc_en_short: Brilliant ruby in color, Alanera delights the senses with a variety of aromas and flavors that include fresh and dried cherries and prunes, sweet spice, and hints of coffee and tobacco. On the palate, Alanera is full-bodied with elegant and velvety tannins. Vibrant acidity brings balance and freshness, and supports a long and harmonious finish.

name: Chateau Puy Favereau Bordeaux Superieur
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: Château Puy Favereau's Bordeaux Supérieur is a classically structured Merlot-led blend offering ripe red and dark fruit with gentle spice, silky tannins, and a balanced finish that rewards both immediate drinking and short-term cellaring.

name: Birchgrove  Bird'S Block Cuvee "Inspiring Red" (Fruit Wine)
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese

name: Montgras  Day One Carmenere
wine_color: Deep ruby colour with violet hues.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby colour with violet hues. Intense aromas of ripe plums and blackberries with spicy notes along with hints of coffee and dark chocolate in the finish. The mouth has a pleasant texture with good grip and well-rounded, juicy tannins that end in a long and pleasant finish.

name: Argiano  Solengo IGT
desc_en_short: The Supertuscan of Montalcino. The legacy of G.Tachis for Argiano. Since 1995 it represents power and boldness, pride and longevity.

name: Passi di Orma Bolgheri DOC
wine_color: Rich ruby red with a slightly lightening rim.
desc_en_short: A Bolgheri-Rosso with a strong character and clear origins: the vines for the cuvée of 40% Merlot, 35% Cabernet Sauvignon and 25% Cabernet Franc grow on chalky, well-drained soils near Castagneto Carducci. The 2023 vintage was characterised by warm days and cool nights - ideal conditions for aromatic depth and freshness. After vinification, the wine matures for six months in French barriques and is bottled unfiltered to preserve its structure and texture.

name: Tasca D'Almerita  Tascante Ghiaia Nera
desc_en_short: This wine is there take on the Nerello Mascalese from the young vineyards at Piano Dario, on the North-East slope of Mount Etna. There are ninety-eight terraces, surrounded by chestnut and downy oak groves, a typical biodiversity that gives the wines their personlity. Soft tannins, good drinkability and freshness. Aged in 60 hl rover barrels for 12 months, an ideal and non-invasive wood for Nerello.

name: Masseria Borgo Dei Trulli Negroamaro Salento IGP (750 ml)
Masseria Borgo Dei Trulli Primitivo Salento IGP (750 ml)
Ricossa  Barbera D' Asti DOCG
wine_color: Rich ruby color with traditional ruby highlights.

name: Maison Castel  Syrah Pays d'Oc
wine_color: Deep garnet robe with dark purple hints
desc_en_short: A generous, fruit-forward Syrah from Maison Castel in the sun-drenched Pays d'Oc, crafted to balance vibrant dark-fruit character with supple structure — an approachable yet expressive southern French red that punches well above its everyday price point.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Cote des Roses Rouge
wine_color: The colour is a dense, deep red.

name: La Cour Des Dames  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Our Pinot Noir has a dark colour, with ruby tints. It has scents of red and black berries mixed with floral notes, together with hints of delicate wood and vanilla. It is complex and long on the palate. It displays aromas of crushed black fruits (blackberries, blackcurrants, cherries) and jam. The tannins are plump and well-integrated.

name: La Cour Des Dames  Merlot
desc_en_short: This wine has a very deep colour, almost black. Complex, rich, and full bodied, it has flavours of crushed black fruits (ripe blackberries, black currant, cherries), jam and cooked fruits with hints of spices (cinnamon, thyme). On the palate, this wine is round, fat and long («velvety») with matured tannins at the end. It is a well-balanced and easy drinking wine.

name: Annalina  Marlborough Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: From the Babich family's Marlborough range, Annalina Pinot Noir delivers a graceful, multi-layered red brimming with raspberries, dark plum, truffle, and dried herbs, finishing long and spicy — elegant proof that Marlborough does far more than Sauvignon Blanc.

name: Duckhorn  Decoy Limited Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir
Michele Chiarlo  Barolo Cannubi DOCG
desc_en_short: Ruby red in color, this aristocratic and complex wine offers notes of small fruits, licorice, and sweet tobacco. A full-bodied wine with silky tannins

name: Penfolds  Barossa Valley Explorer Dual Pack
desc_en_short: With the limited edition Barossa Valley Explorer pack, we celebrate the best of this famed region with two different expressions. Bin 150 is a stylish and contemporary shiraz born from the ancient soils of Marananga, while Bin 138 is a plush and approachable blend of shiraz, grenache and mataro.

name: Jeff Carrel  Les Darons Rouge
wine_color: Deep red with glints of purple.

name: F. Jeantet  Cotes du Rhone Rouge

name: Granmonte  Durif
desc_en_short: The wine is layered with lively fruit aromas of ripe mulberry, blackcurrant, and blueberry. On the palate, the wine reveals juicey plum character, mocha and black pepper nuance. It is young yet elegant with powerful tannins and long lingering finish.

name: Granmonte  The Orient Syrah
desc_en_short: The Orient Syrah becomes fuller in body and more robust with layers of dark cherries, chocolate and spices. The palate shows ripe plums and black currant with complex, dry and generous mouthfeel with rich fruit, young yet refined tannins. Held together by balanced acidity and the long, sweet and toasty hints of coffee and cedar. It is robust with integrated vanilla oak, powerful tannins and long lingering finish. This wine is pleasurable drinking on its own or with food.

name: Baron de Lestac Bordeaux Rouge
wine_color: Subtle, deep garnet with brick red highlights.
desc_en_short: Our wine's character and balance come firstly from our choice of grape varieties - Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc. Baron de Lestac also undergoes a tailor-made ageing process in barrel to bring body, a light touch of oak, and some spice and red fruit notes.

name: Castello Banfi  Cum' Laude IGT Toscana
desc_en_short: A wine with an excellent potential. On the nose the scent is characterized by hints of red fruits with intense cherry tones, accompanied by spicy notes of licorice and pepper. Broad structure, with sweet and powerful tannins, very balanced with a persistent finish.

name: Angove  Anchorage Cabernet Merlot
desc_en_short: Medium density red in appearance. Cedar, bay leaf and mulberry aromas. A medium-bodied style with an earthy mix of red fruit, fine yet drying tannins and white pepper complexity on the generous finish.

name: Antigal  Aduentus Malbec
desc_en_short: Notes of cherry, mint, linden, dried fruits, strawberry, plum, spices, tea infusion, chocolate, and vanilla. The fruit-wood balance is excellent and there is a great structure in the mouth with round silky tannins and a long finish.

name: Aromo  Reserva Privada Malbec
desc_en_short: This wine is bright and intense violet red. Intense ripe red fruits. Cherries, strawberries and a light touch of violets. Concentrated young wine, with sweet tannins. Mocha, coffee and some smoke in the aftertaste.

name: Aromo  Reserva Privada Syrah
desc_en_short: This wine is bright, deep purplish red with dark hues. Intense ripe black fruit, some hints of white pepper and blackcurrant. Wide mouthfeel, juicy attack and firm tannins. The fruit boosts the roasted coffee touches, offering medium persistence and hints of sweetness.

name: Aromo  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This wine is intense, limpid and bright ruby red. Pleasantly ripe plums and berries with subtle notes of tobacco leaves. In the mouth, the medium structure and tannic ripeness of this gentle wine bestow a delicate consistency and harmonious complexity.

name: Aromo  Carmenere
desc_en_short: This wine is deep garnet red with violet hues. Brimming with spices and pepper tones intertwined with light tinges of blac k fruit. In the mouth the medium persistence is loaded with ripe and round tannins that add to the structure and streamline a stylish finish.

name: Aromo  Reservado Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This wine is Beautiful bright ruby red. Intense spicy aromas with a red fruit background. Juicy, with very gentle and balanced tannins. Pleasant aftertaste.

name: Aromo  Reservado Carmenere
desc_en_short: This wine is Attractive bright ruby red color. Intense aromas of spices in a background of berries. Soft and well-balanced tannins.

name: Chateau Lauzanet   Bordeaux Rouge

name: Les Vignerons du Sommierois  Les Arcades Languedoc

desc_en_short: Beautiful dark red with bluish reflections. Aromas of cassis liqueur and candied fruit on the hose, fleshy and juicy on the palate. Licorice and vanill a notes marry beautifully with the fruit in the long-lasting finish.

Ageing brings a fine maturity where it developes toasted oak flavours.

name: Escarpment  Pinot Noir Martinborough

True to the Escarpment style showing bold complexity, texture and a mix

or better after 5 years. Serve with any good Asian cuisine, Beef Bourgogne
or full flavoured fish. Serve at 16°C.

name: Miguel Torres  Las Mulas Cabernet Sauvignon

name: Miguel Torres  Cordillera Vigno Carignan Red
desc_en_short: Opaque, intense ruby red color. Floral and fruit aromas with toasty oakimparted undertones. The palate is big and unfolds beautifully. Here the notes perceived on the nose are complemented by hints of bay leaf and mint.

wine_color: Intense garnet red with violet hints.
desc_en_short: Wine with a lively red colour. Intensely vinous aroma. Dry and balanced on the palate, with a harmonious, dry, savoury and slightly tannic flavour. Riserva, mature wines. Company DOC and DOCG become Riserva only after ageing in big oaks for minimum two years and refining to improve the organoleptic qualities. Wines with depth, the depth proudly shown on the label RISERVA.

Enzo Bartoli  Barbaresco Rio Sordo DOCG

name: Chateau Malescot St. Exupery Margaux
desc_en_short: The Chateau Malescot St. Exupery is a dark color with a fine crimson tint. The wine offers notes of ripe fruit, mocha and vanilla along with powerful yet harmonious and smooth tannins.

name: Chateau La Fleur-Petrus  Pomerol
desc_en_short:
Château La Fleur-Pétrus is one of the most renowned vineyards of Pomerol. This historic estate, situated exclusively on the plateau, was named in the 18th century for its position across the localities ‘Petrus’ and ‘La Fleur’. Established in Libourne since 1937, Jean-Pierre Moueix perceived early on the excellent quality of the Pomerol appellation. Château La Fleur-Pétrus was his very first acquisition in 1950. Quickly after, he purchased Château Trotanoy in 1953.

The personality of Château La Fleur-Pétrus lies in the careful association of the famous gravel and clay terroirs of the plateau of Pomerol. The vineyard, located at 33 to 38 meters above sea level, draws its identity from the nuances of soil and elevation of each parcel. Those parcels which are dominated by gravel tend to yield wines of great elegance, while those dominated by clay are distinctly velvety, dense, and structured.

Château La Fleur-Pétrus is composed predominantly of Merlot, which lends silkiness and generosity to the wine. Cabernet Franc, planted on gravel and fine clay, contributes rigor and complexity, while a small percentage of Petit Verdot, planted on fine gravel, offers a hint of spice to the finish.

The wine combines a unique elegance with the generosity and structure typical of the great vineyards of Pomerol. An attentive tasting reveals remarkable refinement, complexity, and a touch of violet.

name: Chateau Barrail Du Blanc  Saint-Emilion
desc_en_short:
Château Barrail du Blanc produces wines that are exceptional for their depth and consistency. Owned by the same family for over 150 years, this property is located in the commune of Saint-Sulpice-de-Faleyrens, in the south of the Saint-Émilion Grand Cru appellation.

The vineyard, averaging 25 years of age, is planted on gravel and clay soils that allow for good drainage and are particularly well-suited to Cabernet Franc. The grapes are treated with attentive care by Monsieur Elliès and his daughter, Nathalie, in the vineyard and in the cellar. Ploughing, green harvesting, and leaf cropping are favored in order to ensure a consistent maturity of the fruit. The wine is vinified in thermoregulated stainless-steel tanks before aging partly in French oak barrels (50% new).

The resulting wine is charming, supple, elegant, and can be kept for five to ten years.

name: Chateau Branaire-Ducru  Saint-Julien
wine_color: A medium to deep garnet-purple color
desc_en_short: Château Branaire-Ducru is located in the heart of the Medoc, between Margaux and Pauillac in the Saint-Julien appellation area. It is surrounded by the other great Classified Growths that populate this outstanding terroir. The vines grow in a mixture of gravel and pebbles, deposited there by the River Garonne in the Quaternary Period. From the top of their hillocks, called “mounds”, they overlook the vast Gironde Estuary, locally referred to as “the river”.

name: Chateau Gloria  Saint-Julien 2018
style: Cabernet Suavignon, 25% Merlot, 5% Cabernet Franc, 5% Petit Verdot

name: Phelps Creek  Le Petit Pinot Noir

name: Juris  Golser St.Laurent
wine_color: Very dark garnet with purple reflections.
desc_en_short:
"JURIS" is also the name for the family estate Stiegelmar in Gols, for a more precise name and for elimination of
future confusion. The family as germ-cell, in the last centuries always has been our refuge of energy. This
structure remained alive until today's time. Axel und Herta Stiegelmar has led the winery on the highest level of
Austrian estates. Two aspects are responsible for this: One of them is the consistency and strength in all wine
categories, offering regularly high quality with dry white wines, highly profiled red wines and sweet wines.
JURIS comprises about 18 ha (2/3 for red wines and 1/3 for white wines) of vineyards, which are situated all over
the wine-region of Gols. Gols is located in the wine region Burgenland between Vienna and Budapest in the warm
Pannonian climate with permeable soils of gravel and sand. Caused by the geologic conditions in our area, a great
number of the grape varieties growing in Austria, are also planted in our estate. It has however crystallised, that
the family of the Pinot-varieties is cultivated very often. JURIS strive to produce wines with character and style
that are well balanced and possess complexity, aging potential, and a certain elegance.
The highlight of father - Georg Stiegelmar - was the international rewards of the "Robert Mondavi World Wine
Trophy" for the Winemaker of the year 1995 (International Wine & Spirit Competition) in London.

name: Mr.Riggs  'The Truant' Shiraz
desc_en_short:
The Truant Shiraz is a tribute to John William Riggs, Ben Riggs’ great-great-great-grandfather, and his colourful past. The Truant has as much character as the man himself.

It is a full flavoured McLaren Vale Shiraz, with notes of plum and blackberries, complimented by hints of vanilla and cinnamon spice.

Drink with either good food and great company or as a well deserved glass after a long day of work.

name: Mr.Riggs  'Burnt Block' Shiraz
desc_en_short: Evolving from the Scarce Earth project, our Burnt Block Shiraz is an expression of a single vineyard McLaren Vale Shiraz. The 2020 Burnt Block Shiraz is sourced from Ben Riggs Piebald Gully vineyard, located in McLaren Vale’s coolest sub-region, Clarendon. Onyx, and svelte, evocative, long, and intense, this keynote wine anchors an entire winemaking philosophy. Plums, molasses, violets and vibrant fruits funnel upward, lofty, swifting, and sensual.

name: Chateau Maris  Merlot Syrah (Organic)

Church Road  Grand Reserve Merlot Cabernet Sauvignon
Chateau Pape Clement  2018
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes :

With their smoky and spicy bouquet, the red wines are of an admirable quality and a very characteristic softness. The wine is both concentrated, fine and harmonious, with an aromatic palette as wide as it is precise. The depth and length in the mouth are exceptional. Quality of the terroir, sustained efforts and dynamism have borne fruit bringing Pape Clément to a level very close to that of the premiers crus.

name: Maison 1982  'Atlantique' Bordeaux

name: Chateau Premeaux  Cote de Nuits Villages
desc_en_short: Wild and powerful nose combining aromas of blackcurrant and blackberry, spices and earthy aromas. Pleasantly medium (+) bodied and long finish.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Baron Carl AOC Saint-Emilion
wine_color: brilliant shimmering purple color. At the edges, there is also a color transition to garnet red.
desc_en_short: In the glass, the Baron Carl Saint-Émilion from the house of Baron Philippe de Rothschild reveals a brilliant shimmering purple color. At the edges, there is also a color transition to garnet red. If you give it some air by swirling, this red wine is characterized by a fascinating brilliance that makes it dance lively in the glass. These are joined by hints of dark chocolate, cinnamon and gingerbread spice.
